english_verse: they went in. But they did not find the body of the Lord Jesus,
translation_verse: Foesũ biwo nɛ de kamɛ lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu ɔnɔkpa a.

english_verse: and they did not know what to think. Suddenly two men in shining white clothes stood beside them.
translation_verse: Bɛkɛna saa bɛdzɛ̃ bakɔna foe akũ, ade lɛtalɛta bati nviã kĩ bɛna nɛ tɛtadiɛ kĩ tata muamua kamɛ nɛ bɛta nɛ be akũ a.

english_verse: The women were afraid and bowed to the ground. But the men said, “Why are you looking in the place of the dead for someone who is alive?
translation_verse: Libe wo be paa foesũ bɛkɛna akũ nɛ kayɔ bɛkpa be, ade banyole a bi be kĩ, “Nde sũ miawɛ oti kĩ edzi nkpã nɛ banɔkpa kamɛ?

english_verse: ‘The Son of Man will be handed over to sinners who will nail him to a cross. But three days later he will rise to life.’ ”
translation_verse: kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkɔa Otidziwa Obi a bido nɛ bati kpa awɛ, baabɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ, lɔkɔa nɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ liti a, eyidza edzi nkpã.”

english_verse: That same day two of Jesus' disciples were going to the village of Emmaus, which was about eleven kilometers from Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Nɛ luwi mɔapɛ a akũ a, bikĩ bitómɔ Yesu a be kamɛ bati nviã tsɛ̃ osi banaa akula adi kĩ bavɛ Emaus kamɛ. Osi a lugo aana ndɛ fusikũ evũkɔnɔ kito awã kɛnaa Yerusalem.

english_verse: Jesus came near and started walking along beside them.
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛkalɔmɛna kanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ a, Yesu yapi be ade bɛtsã bɛnaa a.

english_verse: Jesus asked them, “What were you talking about as you walked along?” The two of them stood there looking sad and gloomy.
translation_verse: Yesu via be kĩ, “Litsa akũ milamɛna kalɔmɛna nɛ osi a?” Bɛfɔ̃ bɛdza dĩĩ mɔ anɛ kamɛ mɔ kɔnya.

english_verse: We had hoped that he would be the one to set Israel free! But it has already been three days since all this happened.
translation_verse: Bɔna kɔnɛte nɛ ye akũ kĩ ye aanya oti a kĩ yaanyɛ Israel. Ade nviã nyɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ kĩ fukĩĩ flee ya nɛ foe kamɛ a.

english_verse: Some women in our group surprised us. They had gone to the tomb early in the morning,
translation_verse: Boe katsu a kĩ kitomɔ ye a kamɛ batsole badi fɔ̃ akũ nyɛnɛ boe, kitonɛkĩ ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu kĩĩ bɛnaa ye linikɛ ɔwɛ̃,

english_verse: Some men from our group went to the tomb and found it just as the women had said. But they didn't see Jesus either.
translation_verse: Boe katsu a kamɛ banyole badi naa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ bɛnamɔ foe pɛpɛɛpɛ ndɛ ayekĩ batsole a lɛ a, lɛmɛ bɛtámɔ Yesu.”

english_verse: Then Jesus asked the two disciples, “Why can't you understand? How can you be so slow to believe all that the prophets said?
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitɛnɛ kadzimbi! Mi adzuni lɛlá sɔwa kĩ miatɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a fɔlɛtsa a flee mido!

english_verse: Didn't you know that the Messiah would have to suffer before he was given his glory?”
translation_verse: Mitányi tɔ̃ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ Kristo a ɛmɔ lubo kĩĩ bamɛ flee fɔmɔ yaaawo nɛ ye lɛgãkanya kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus then explained everything written about himself in the Scriptures, beginning with the Law of Moses and the Books of the Prophets.
translation_verse: Ade ke Yesu kpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ɛtsa be nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a tsɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ, kito Mose tuvoli akũ kɛyake nɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ flee katsɛlɛ a akũ a.

english_verse: They begged him, “Stay with us! It's already late, and the sun is going down.” So Jesus went into the house to stay with them.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ biwũnya ye ade bibi ye kĩ, “Dzi nɛ boe sɛkɛ̃. Kade dɔ kiyua ade ɔtũ do kake awɛ a.” Foesũ ɛnase nɛ be sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: After Jesus sat down to eat, he took some bread. He blessed it and broke it. Then he gave it to them.
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛmɔ be bidzi kĩ banya a, ɛbɔɛ abodoo ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, ɛsɛ̃ ɛkpa be.

english_verse: At once they knew who he was, but he disappeared.
translation_verse: Nɛ awã naa, be anɛ binya ade bɛmɔ́ ye biyi ɔsũ a, lɛmɛ ɛyɛla nɛ be anɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: They said to each other, “When he talked with us along the road and explained the Scriptures to us, didn't it warm our hearts?”
translation_verse: Ade ke bibi be akũ kĩ, “Fɔtákɛna ndɛ fi fudi lɛkatɛ̃ nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, kĩ ɛkanyɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a kamɛ katsa boe nɛ osi a?”

english_verse: So they got up and returned to Jerusalem. The two disciples found the eleven apostles and the others gathered together.
translation_verse: Ade biyidza bimuniki mɔatsɛ bɛnaa Yerusalem, bɛnamɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-odi a mɔ bati bɛbã a kĩ bɛkpɔta a.

english_verse: And they learned from the group that the Lord was really alive and had appeared to Peter.
translation_verse: Bɛnabi be kĩ, “Nuwĩ boe Ɔlate yidza eto kanɔkpa ade ɛnyɛ ye akũ ɛtsa Simon a.”

english_verse: Then the disciples from Emmaus told what happened on the road and how they knew he was the Lord when he broke the bread. What Jesus' Followers Must Do (Matthew
translation_verse: Bati nviã a bi be lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ osi akũ a, mɔ ayekĩ bɛmɔ́ boe Ɔlate a biyi ɔsũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛyɛlɛ abodoo ɛkpa be a. Yesu Nyɛ Ye Akũ Ɛtsa Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ a.

english_verse: While Jesus' disciples were talking about what had happened, Jesus appeared and greeted them.
translation_verse: Kĩ bati nviã kĩĩ kabi be fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, deedimɔapɛ Yesu mɔawɛ nɛ ɛdza nɛ be kayite, ade ebi be kĩ, “Lukudɔ litomɔ mi.”

english_verse: They were frightened and terrified because they thought they were seeing a ghost.
translation_verse: Libe wo be paa ade bɛkakɔna kĩ ɔnɔkpa bɛmɔ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “Why are you so frightened? Why do you doubt?
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nde sũ mibɔa obili lɔmɔ? Nde sũ miatɛ atsindze nɛ mi kamɛ?

english_verse: Look at my hands and my feet and see who I am! Touch me and find out for yourselves. Ghosts don't have flesh and bones as you see I have.”
translation_verse: Midã yĩ awɛ mɔ yĩ fɔnɛta. Mita yĩ midã mimɔ kĩ nnɛ́ ɔnɔkpa manɛ, kitonɛkĩ hũhũ lɛlá sukɛna mɔ fɔtsɔ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ miamɔ kĩ ndeĩ a.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he showed them his hands and his feet.
translation_verse: Kĩ ɛlɛ foe a, ɛkɔa ye awɛ mɔ fɔnɛta ɛtsa be.

english_verse: The disciples were so glad and amazed that they could not believe it. Jesus then asked them, “Do you have something to eat?”
translation_verse: Kawɔlɛ de be paa, lɛmɛ fɔkɛna be wãwã, foesũ biti bɛtátɛ bido. Ade ke Yesu via be kĩ, “Mideĩ funitsã fudi nɛ awĩ?”

english_verse: They gave him a piece of broiled fish.
translation_verse: Bɛkpa ye kafɔabi tɔlɛwa kadi,

english_verse: He took it and ate it as they watched.
translation_verse: ɛtɛ ke ɛba nɛ be anɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said to them, “While I was still with you, I told you that everything written about me in the Law of Moses, the Books of the Prophets, and in the Psalms had to happen.”
translation_verse: Ke liti a ebi be kĩ, “Ade fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ bamɛ mbi mi nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ mi kamɛ a. Kɛnɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi nɛ Mose mbla, Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tuvoli mɔ Tɔnɔ Ovoli a kamɛ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔmɔ.”

english_verse: Then he helped them understand the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Ebinya be adzuni ayekĩ baanu Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a kayɔ.

english_verse: He told them: The Scriptures say that the Messiah must suffer, then three days later he will rise from death.
translation_verse: Ebi be kĩ, “Bɛtsɛlɛ biyi kĩ Kristo a aamɔ lubo, lɔkɔa eyidza eto kanɔkpa nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde a akũ.

english_verse: They also say that all people of every nation must be told in my name to turn to God, in order to be forgiven. So beginning in Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Nɛ ye dĩ akũ ni, bikĩ bitomɔ ye a aade lɛtsã nɛ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kadani mɔ tɔkpa kakɔakate akũ bɛkpa katinya kamɛ bati flee. Baayi lɛtsã kĩĩ kade kayɔ bitomɛna Yerusalem.

english_verse: you must tell everything that has happened.
translation_verse: Mi nyɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ flee adansifɔ.

english_verse: I will send you the one my Father has promised, but you must stay in the city until you are given power from heaven. Jesus Returns to Heaven (Mark
translation_verse: Yĩ mɔawɛ a maakɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa mma mi ndɛ ayekĩ Nda lɛ eyi a. Lɛmɛ midzi nɛ Yerusalem nɛ awĩ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ kɔbɛ̃ a aato ode kɔyaatɛ mi kamɛ.” Baguma Bɔɛ Yesu Ɛnamɛna Ode.

english_verse: Jesus led his disciples out to Bethany, where he raised his hands and blessed them.
translation_verse: Ade ɛkpã be bɛnɛ nɛ Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa Betania, awã kĩ ɛdzɛla awɛ nɛ ode ehila be a.

english_verse: As he was doing this, he left and was taken up to heaven.
translation_verse: Kĩ ɛkahila be a, ɛdzakũ ɛfɔnɛ be ade bɛbɔɛ ye bɛnamɛna ode a.

english_verse: After his disciples had worshiped him, they returned to Jerusalem and were very happy.
translation_verse: Ade ke bisum ye bimuniki bɛnaa Yerusalem nɛ kawɔlɛ kpale kamɛ a.

english_verse: They spent their time in the temple, praising God.
translation_verse: Bidzi nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ daa, bɛkamu Baguma.

english_verse: From the very beginning the Word was with God.
translation_verse: Kalɛ a mɔ Baguma deĩ anɛ kayɔkayi a fɔmɔ bɛbɔa katinya.

english_verse: received its life from him, and his life gave light to everyone.
translation_verse: Kalɛ a kamɛ nkpã deĩ, ade nkpã kĩĩ lɛma batidziwa ɔhaĩ a.

english_verse: The light keeps shining in the dark, and darkness has never put it out.
translation_verse: Ɔhaĩ a avɔlɛ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ, ade ɔtũ tápuli edina ye da a.

english_verse: God sent a man named John,
translation_verse: Baguma do onyole odi kĩ bavɛ Yohanes.

english_verse: who came to tell about the light and to lead all people to have faith.
translation_verse: Ɛya kĩ yayaadi adansiɛ nɛ ɔhaĩ a akũ ayekĩ bati flee aatsã ye akũ bɛtɛ bido.

english_verse: The true light that shines on everyone was coming into the world.
translation_verse: Ɔhaĩ wĩ a kĩ yatɛ̃ kakpa odi nyɛ odi a, aya nɛ katinya kamɛ.

english_verse: The Word was in the world, but no one knew him, though God had made the world with his Word.
translation_verse: Kalɛ a na nɛ katinya kamɛ, lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ Baguma bɔa katinya ɛtsãmɛna ye akũ malo ni, batidziwa támɔ ye biyi ɔsũ.

english_verse: He came into his own world, but his own nation did not welcome him.
translation_verse: Ɛya nɛ ye mɔawɛ bati sɛkɛ̃, lɛmɛ ye bati a tátɛ ye.

english_verse: They were not God's children by nature or because of any human desires. God himself was the one who made them his children.
translation_verse: Bɛtádani Baguma babi nɛ batidziwa kama onukpɛ̃, ĩye ndɛ ayekĩ otinyole ama babi aye, mbom Baguma mɔawɛ lɛwɛ kĩ yakɛna be ye babi.

english_verse: The Word became a human being and lived here with us. We saw his true glory, the glory of the only Son of the Father. From him the complete gifts of undeserved grace and truth have come down to us.
translation_verse: Kalɛ a dani kɛkɛna otidziwa, edzi nɛ boe kamɛ, ade kɔnyakamɔ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali yi ye kamɛ a. Bɔmɔ́ ye kukũkpalɛ a, kukũkpalɛ a kĩ ɛtɛ ndɛ Ɔlɛga a Obi mɔapɛ a aye.

english_verse: Because of all that the Son is, we have been given one blessing after another.
translation_verse: Nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ beblebee sũ ni, ehila boe flee ɛkpa boe nhila ete nɛ nhila akũ.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. The only Son, who is truly God and is closest to the Father, has shown us what God is like. John the Baptist Tells about Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Odima támɔ tɔ̃ Baguma. Ye Obi mɔapɛ a kĩ eketimɔ Baguma a, kĩ edeĩ nɛ Ɔlɛga sɛkɛ̃ a, ade ye lɛnyɛ ayekĩ Baguma la a ɛtsa boe a. Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a De Lɛtsã.

english_verse: The religious authorities in Jerusalem sent priests and temple helpers to ask John who he was. He told them plainly, “I am not the Messiah.”
translation_verse: Yohanes tásĩ be mbuayɛ kakpa, mbom ɛkpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ yededeede ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ yĩ nyɛ Kristo a.”

english_verse: Then when they asked him if he were Elijah, he said, “No, I am not!” And when they asked if he were the Prophet, he also said “No!”
translation_verse: Ade bivia ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ nɔ nyɛ owei? Mbɔɛɛ nɔ nyɛ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Eliya a?” Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo, nnɛ́ ye manɛ.” Bibuki bivia ye kĩ, “Nɔ nyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ yaaya a?” Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oowo.”

english_verse: Finally, they said, “Who are you then? We have to give an answer to the ones who sent us. Tell us who you are!”
translation_verse: Adeke bibi ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ bi boe oti a kĩ anɛ, kitonɛkĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɔa mbuayɛ bɔma bikĩ bido boe fɔtɔ a. Owei koũ anɛ?”

english_verse: John answered in the words of the prophet Isaiah, “I am only someone shouting in the desert, ‘Get the road ready for the Lord!’ ”
translation_verse: Yohanes kpa be mbuayɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya tsɛlɛ eyi a kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ yabɔa fɔwɔla a odo kĩ bɛkɛna osi kpĩĩ bɛkpa Ɔlate a.”

english_verse: Some Pharisees had also been sent to John.
translation_verse: Batɔ a kĩ bido bito Farisifɔ sɛkɛ̃ a,

english_verse: They asked him, “Why are you baptizing people, if you are not the Messiah or Elijah or the Prophet?”
translation_verse: via Yohanes kĩ, “Ntɛ nnɛ́ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a, ĩye Eliya, ĩye Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a ni, nde sũ akɛna mui kawɔla amaniɛ?”

english_verse: John told them, “I use water to baptize people. But here with you is someone you don't know.
translation_verse: Ade Yohanes kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ kɔ̃ ni, mawɔla bati mui, lɛmɛ odi kĩ minyína ye dzɛ̃ nɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: Even though I came first, I am not good enough to untie his sandals.”
translation_verse: Ade ye tomɔ yĩ nɛ liti yaya a, lɛmɛ ntáfɛta kĩ mawũnya ye mpabua tɔwɛ̃ malo.”

english_verse: John said this as he was baptizing east of the Jordan River in Bethany. The Lamb of God
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ flee ya nɛ foe kamɛ nɛ Betania ɔmatɔ kamɛ, nɛ Yordan ɔwɔ liti, awã kĩ Yohanes kawɔla bati mui a. Yesu Nyɛ́ Baguma Kavelibi a.

english_verse: The next day, John saw Jesus coming toward him and said: Here is the Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world!
translation_verse: Kĩ kade nyina a, Yohanes mɔ́ Yesu kĩ yaya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Midã Baguma Kavelibi a kĩ yaakɔa katinya kamɛ bati tɔkpa ɛnamɛna a!

english_verse: He is the one I told you about when I said, “Someone else will come, who is greater than I am, because he was alive before I was born.”
translation_verse: Ade oti kĩĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa mbi mi kĩ, ‘Oti odi aya nɛ yĩ liti, kĩ ɛbɛ̃ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ edzi nkpã kɔkɔɛ fɔmɔ bɛma yĩ.’

english_verse: I didn't know who he was. But I came to baptize you with water, so that everyone in Israel would see him.
translation_verse: Yĩ mɔawɛ a ntányi oti a kĩ ye yanɛ, lɛmɛ ĩyaawɔla bati mui, ayekĩ maanyɛ ye ntsa Israel kade a.”

english_verse: I was there and saw the Spirit come down on him like a dove from heaven. And the Spirit stayed on him.
translation_verse: Ade Yohanes lɛ nɛ Yesu akũ kĩ, “Mmɔ́ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ ɛka eto ode ndɛ mblɔduma aye ɛyadzi nɛ ye akũ.

english_verse: Before this I didn't know who he was. But the one who sent me to baptize with water had told me, “You will see the Spirit come down and stay on someone. Then you will know that he is the one who will baptize with the Holy Spirit.”
translation_verse: Nɛ kayɔkayi a, ntányi ye, lɛmɛ Baguma kĩ edo yĩ kĩ nwɔla bati mui a bi yĩ kĩ, ‘Oti a kĩ aamɔ kĩ yĩ Hũhũ a ka ɛyadzi nɛ ye akũ a ni, ade ye aakɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛwɔla bati mui a.’

english_verse: I saw this happen, and I tell you that he is the Son of God. The First Disciples of Jesus
translation_verse: Mmɔ́ foe lɔmɔ, ndi adansiɛ kĩ ade oti kĩĩ nyɛ Baguma Obi a.” Yesu Vɛ Ye Fɔtsa Bakɔlɛnɛ Batɔnyade a.

english_verse: The next day, John was there again, and two of his followers were with him.
translation_verse: Luwi lɛyade a, kĩ Yohanes mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã dzɛ̃ nɛ awã a,

english_verse: When he saw Jesus walking by, he said, “Here is the Lamb of God!”
translation_verse: bɛmɔ́ Yesu kĩ yatɛ̃ a, Yohanes lɛ kĩ, “Midã Baguma Kavelibi a!”

english_verse: John's two followers heard him, and they went with Jesus.
translation_verse: Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã a nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a, foesũ bitomɔ Yesu bɛnaa.

english_verse: When Jesus turned and saw them, he asked, “What do you want?” They answered, “Rabbi, where do you live?” The Hebrew word “Rabbi” means “Teacher.”
translation_verse: Yesu dani, ɛmɔ́ be kĩ bitomɔ ye, ade evia be kĩ, “Litsa miawɛ?” Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Rabi,” foe kayɔ nyɛ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, “ndia odzi?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Come and see!” It was already about four o'clock in the afternoon when they went with him and saw where he lived. So they stayed on for the rest of the day.
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Miyaadã.” Lɔkɔ a aana ndɛ olobe tɔdɔũ ɛna kamɛ, foesũ bitomɔ ye bɛnamɔ awã kĩ edzi a, ade bidzi nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ olobe a flee a.

english_verse: One of the two men who had heard John and had gone with Jesus was Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter.
translation_verse: Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa nyɛ Andrea, Simon Petro ɔwaɛ̃nyole.

english_verse: The first thing Andrew did was to find his brother and tell him, “We have found the Messiah!” The Hebrew word “Messiah” means the same as the Greek word “Christ.”
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ Andrea nya lɔtɔ ɛkɛna nyɛ kĩ ɛnawɛ ɔwaɛ̃ Petro ebi ye kĩ, “Bɔmɔ́ Mesia a!” De kayɔ nyɛ Kristo.

english_verse: Andrew brought his brother to Jesus. And when Jesus saw him, he said, “Simon son of John, you will be called Cephas.” This name can be translated as “Peter.” Jesus Chooses Philip and Nathanael
translation_verse: Ke liti a, Andrea kpã Simon ɛnamɛna Yesu sɛkɛ̃. Yesu dã Simon kɛnanaana ade ebi ye kĩ, “Nɔ dĩ nyɛ Simon kĩ ɛnyɛ Yohanes obi a, lɛmɛ kito finyaa baavɛ nɔ Kefas,” ĩye Petro. Buĩ nviã a kayɔ nyɛ de. Yesu Vɛ Filipo Mɔ Nataniel.

english_verse: Philip then found Nathanael and said, “We have found the one that Moses and the Prophets wrote about. He is Jesus, the son of Joseph from Nazareth.”
translation_verse: Filipo mɔ Nataniel ade ebi ye kĩ, “Bɔmɔ́ oti a kĩ Mose mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ ye akũ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa kamɛ a. Ade ye nyɛ Yosef obi Yesu, kĩ eto Nazaret a!”

english_verse: Nathanael asked, “Can anything good come from Nazareth?” Philip answered, “Come and see.”
translation_verse: Nataniel via kĩ, “Fɔtsa wĩ fudi aapuli fɔnɛ futo Nazaret lɛmɛ kamɛ?” Filipo kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yaadã!”

english_verse: When Jesus saw Nathanael coming toward him, he said, “Here is a true descendant of our ancestor Israel. And he isn't deceitful.”
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ Nataniel yaya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ a, ɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ kĩ, “Ade Israelni kpanunuunu nɛ awĩ a, ɛnyɛ́ anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa ɔkɛnanɛ!”

english_verse: “How do you know me?” Nathanael asked. Jesus answered, “Before Philip called you, I saw you under the fig tree.”
translation_verse: Nataniel via Yesu kĩ, “Nde ɔkɛna onyi yĩ?” Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mmɔ́ nɔ kɔkɔɛ nɛ kɔya kutse a kayɔ fɔmɔ Filipo yavɛ nɔ.”

english_verse: Nathanael said, “Rabbi, you are the Son of God and the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Ade Nataniel lɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, nɔ nyɛ Baguma Obi a. Nɔ nyɛ Israel Lɛgã a!”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Did you believe me just because I said that I saw you under the fig tree? You will see something even greater.
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ayekĩ mbi nɔ kĩ mmɔ́ nɔ nɛ kɔya kutse a kayɔ sũ mɔ ɔtɛ odo a? Aamɔ fɔtsa baũ kĩ fɔbɛ̃ fukĩĩ!”

english_verse: I tell you for certain you will see heaven open and God's angels going up and coming down on the Son of Man.”
translation_verse: Ade ke ebi be kĩ, “Mabi mi flee nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ míamɔ ode kĩ ebinya, ade míamɔ kĩ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ aakade bɛkaka nɛ yĩ, Otidziwa Obi a, akũ.”

english_verse: Three days later Mary, the mother of Jesus, was at a wedding feast in the village of Cana in Galilee.
translation_verse: Nɛ luwi lɛlalɛde akũ a, bipi obolitsɔ̃ nɛ Kana ɔmatɔ kĩ edeĩ nɛ Galilea tite akũ. Yesu ɔma na nɛ awã,

english_verse: Jesus and his disciples had also been invited and were there.
translation_verse: ade bɛvɛ Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lɛmɛ bɛya nɛ obolitsɔ̃ kapikɔ̃ a.

english_verse: When the wine was all gone, Mary said to Jesus, “They don't have any more wine.”
translation_verse: Kĩ waĩ woli a, Yesu ɔma fuã Yesu ebi ye kĩ, “Be waĩ a woli.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Mother, my time hasn't yet come! You must not tell me what to do.”
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Otsole, nnɛ́ nɔ aabi yĩ lɛtsa a kĩ nkɛna. Yĩ lɔkɔ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ.”

english_verse: Mary then said to the servants, “Do whatever Jesus tells you to do.”
translation_verse: Yesu ɔma nabi basumunɛ a kĩ, “Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ yaabi mi ni, mikɛna.”

english_verse: At the feast there were six stone water jars that were used by the people for washing themselves in the way that their religion said they must. Each jar held about
translation_verse: Ayekĩ fɔnyɛ Yudafɔ amaniɛ kĩ bavɔlɛ akũ fɔmɔ bawo nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ sũ ni, bake boe tɔpɔɔlɔ evũ nɛ tɔtɔ a kamɛ. Mui fugumi tsɛtsɛɛ ɛna ĩye foe elo awo nɛ lɔmɔa kamɛ.

english_verse: Jesus told the servants to fill them to the top with water. Then after the jars had been filled,
translation_verse: Yesu bi basumunɛ a kĩ, “Minu mui miyula tɔpɔɔlɔ a.” Foesũ binu mui biyula foe tsɔnɔnɔɔnɔ.

english_verse: he said, “Now take some water and give it to the man in charge of the feast.” The servants did as Jesus told them,
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Minu mui a badi mima oti a kĩ yadãmɛna funitsã akũ a.” Ade binu badi bɛma ye a.

english_verse: and the man in charge drank some of the water that had now turned into wine. He did not know where the wine had come from, but the servants did. He called the bridegroom over
translation_verse: Funitsã akũ ɔdãmɛnanɛ a tá mui a kĩ bɛdani bavɛ a onukpɛ̃ ɛdã. Ɛtányi awã kĩ bitomɛna be, lɛmɛ basumunɛ a kɔ̃ nyina. Foesũ ɛvɛ obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ a,

english_verse: and said, “The best wine is always served first. Then after the guests have had plenty, the other wine is served. But you have kept the best until last!”
translation_verse: evia ye kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi akpa bati a bavɛ vɔɛ̃ kanyamɛna lɔtɔ, lɔkɔa ntɛ bɛmɔa be biwĩ a, yabɔɛ bakɔɛ a kayamɛna. Nde fɔya mɔ nɔ kɔ̃ ɔkɔa bavɛ vɔɛ̃ a oke kɛyawo lɔkɔ kĩĩ?”

english_verse: But Jesus was talking about his body as a temple.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ asɔli kɔla a kĩ Yesu lamɛna kalɛ a nyɛ ye sukɛna.

english_verse: Not long before the Jewish festival of Passover, Jesus went to Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yudafɔ Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi kanya a wo ɔtɔ liyua a, Yesu naa Yerusalem.

english_verse: So he took some rope and made a whip. Then he chased everyone out of the temple, together with their sheep and cattle. He turned over the tables of the moneychangers and scattered their coins.
translation_verse: Foesũ ɛnɔ ɔwɛ̃ ɛkɛna mple ɛkɔa ɛblɔmɛna bayaɛ a flee, banantsue mɔ baveli a nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Edu be tupunu lɛmɛ ewula, ɛpansam sika babɛ̃nɛ a sika ɛsã.

english_verse: The disciples then remembered that the Scriptures say, “My love for your house burns in me like a fire.”
translation_verse: Ade ke ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a te anɛ kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “O Baguma, nɔ kɔla akũ mbɔdibɔ atɛ̃ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ndɛ fi aye.”

english_verse: “Destroy this temple,” Jesus answered, “and in three days I will build it again!”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Miveli Baguma Kɔla kĩĩ, ade nɛ fuwi ɛlalɛ liti ni, maabuki nke koe.”

english_verse: There he found people selling cattle, sheep, and doves in the temple. He also saw moneychangers sitting at their tables.
translation_verse: Nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, ɛmɔ kĩ bati dzi banɔ banantsue, baveli mɔ mblɔduma. Ɛmɔ́ lɛmɛ kĩ sika babɛ̃nɛ dzi nɛ be tupunu akũ nɛ awã.

english_verse: Jesus said to the people who had been selling doves, “Get those doves out of here! Don't make my Father's house a marketplace.”
translation_verse: Ade ebi bikĩ banɔ mblɔduma a kĩ, “Mifila fɔtsa kĩĩ minɛmɛna nɛ awĩ, mitakɔa Nda kɔla mikɛna kɔyaatɔ.”

english_verse: The Jewish leaders asked Jesus, “What miracle will you work to show us why you have done this?”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ yavia Yesu kĩ, “Litsa nsɛntsɛlɛni aapuli ɔkɛna ɔtsa boe kĩ odeĩ osi kĩ akɛna fukĩĩ?”

english_verse: And when he was raised from death, his disciples remembered what he had told them. Then they believed the Scriptures and the words of Jesus. Jesus Knows What People Are Like
translation_verse: Foesũ kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa liti a, ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a te anɛ kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyi, ade bɛtɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ a bido a. Yesu Nyina Otidziwa Kutitse.

english_verse: In Jerusalem during Passover many people put their faith in Jesus, because they saw him work miracles.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu na nɛ Yerusalem nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi kanya kamɛ a, bati pii tɛ ye bido nɛ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ ɛkɛna a sũ.

english_verse: But Jesus knew what was in their hearts, and he would not let them have power over him.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu tákɔa ye akũ ɛkpa be, kitonɛkĩ enyina bati flee.

english_verse: No one had to tell him what people were like. He already knew.
translation_verse: Foesũ fɔtásĩ kĩ odima abi ye kadi nɛ bati akũ, kitonɛkĩ ye mɔawɛ a enyina lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: There was a man named Nicodemus who was a Pharisee and a Jewish leader.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a naa kamɛ a, Yudafɔ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔa na kĩ ɛnyɛ Farisini, kĩ bavɛ Nikodemo.

english_verse: One night he went to Jesus and said, “Rabbi, we know that God has sent you to teach us. You could not work these miracles, unless God were with you.”
translation_verse: Luwi a lɛnyɛ, ɛya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ ɛyabi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bunyina kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ oto ɔya, kitonɛkĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna nsɛntsɛlɛni a kĩ akɛna a, ntɛ Baguma lítomɔ ye.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “I tell you for certain that you must be born from above before you can see God's kingdom!”
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali mabi nɔ kĩ ntɛ bɛtábuki bɛlɔla oti kama ni, ɛláapuli ɛmɔ Baguma lɛgãkanya a.”

english_verse: Nicodemus asked, “How can a grown man ever be born a second time?”
translation_verse: Nikodemo via ye kĩ, “Nde baapuli bibuki bɛma oti kĩ ebo anɛ? Ɛláapuli ewo nɛ ɔma sɛmɛ kamɛ bɛlɔla ye kama lɛyade.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that before you can get into God's kingdom, you must be born not only by water, but by the Spirit.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali a mabi nɔ kĩ, ntɛ bɛtáma oti bitomɛna mui mɔ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ ni, ɛláapuli ewo nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.

english_verse: Humans give life to their children. Yet only God's Spirit can change you into a child of God.
translation_verse: Sukɛna kamɛ bama sukɛna oti katomɛna, lɛmɛ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ bama hũhũ ode.

english_verse: Don't be surprised when I say that you must be born from above.
translation_verse: Foesũ fɔtakɛna nɔ wãwã kĩ nlɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɛlɔla mi flee kama.

english_verse: Only God's Spirit gives new life. The Spirit is like the wind that blows wherever it wants to. You can hear the wind, but you don't know where it comes from or where it is going.
translation_verse: Ɔwɛ abɔa kanaa awã kĩ yawɛ, anu ye nkã, lɛmɛ onyína awã kĩ eto ĩye awã kĩ yanaa. Ade aye fɔla fɔkpa odi nyɛ odi kĩ bɛma ye nɛ Hũhũ a kamɛ a.”

english_verse: “How can this be?” Nicodemus asked.
translation_verse: Ade Nikodemo via ye kĩ, “Nde fukĩĩ aapuli fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: How can you be a teacher of Israel and not know these things?
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛnɔkɔɛ̃ anɛ nɛ Israel, mɔ onyína fukĩĩ a?

english_verse: I tell you for certain we know what we are talking about because we have seen it ourselves. But none of you will accept what we say.
translation_verse: Mabi nɔ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ bɔalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bunyina a akũ, ade bɔadi adansiɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔmɔ́ akũ a, lɛmɛ mi kamɛ odima láwɛ kĩ yatɛ boe fɔlɛtsa a.

english_verse: If you don't believe when I talk to you about things on earth, how can you possibly believe if I talk to you about things in heaven?
translation_verse: Ntɛ mbi nɔ tite akũ fɔlɛtsa mɔ́ ɔtátɛ foe odo a, lɔkɔa ntɛ mbi nɔ ode fɔlɛtsa a ni, aapuli ɔtɛ foe odo?

english_verse: No one has gone up to heaven except the Son of Man, who came down from there.
translation_verse: Ade odima táde tɔ̃ ɛnaa ode, mbɔɛntɛ yĩ, Otidziwa Obi a, kĩ nto ode ĩya a odi.

english_verse: And the Son of Man must be lifted up, just as the metal snake was lifted up by Moses in the desert.
translation_verse: “Ndɛ ayekĩ Mose dɛla kɔɛ kĩ bɛkɔa kɔɔble bɛkɛna a nɛ otse akũ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ a, ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ baadɛla yĩ, Otidziwa Obi a, lɛmɛ nɛ asendua akũ a,

english_verse: Then everyone who has faith in the Son of Man will have eternal life.
translation_verse: ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo aana nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: God loved the people of this world so much that he gave his only Son, so that everyone who has faith in him will have eternal life and never really die.
translation_verse: “Kitonɛkĩ Baguma ti ɛwɛ katinya kalɛ paa kĩ ɛkɔa ye Obi mɔapɛ a ɛkpa kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo lɛláaku ɛwɔ, mbom yaana nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: God did not send his Son into the world to condemn its people. He sent him to save them!
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tádo ye Obi kĩ ɛyaakɔ katinya kamɛ bati kɔtɔ, mbom kĩ fɔtsã ye akũ bati bɛna katɛ.

english_verse: No one who has faith in God's Son will be condemned. But everyone who doesn't have faith in him has already been condemned for not having faith in God's only Son.
translation_verse: “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Obi a edo ni, bɛtákɔ ye kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtátɛ edo ni, bɛkɔ ye kɔtɔ kɔkɔɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛtátɛ Baguma Obi mɔapɛ a edo.

english_verse: The light has come into the world, and people who do evil things are judged guilty because they love the dark more than the light.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ badzɛmɔ katinya kakɔ bati kɔtɔ a nyɛ kĩ ɔhaĩ a ya nɛ katinya kamɛ lɛmɛ bati wɛ ɔtũ kalɛ bɛba ɔhaĩ a, kitonɛkĩ be fɔtsakɛlawa nyɛ tɔkpa.

english_verse: People who do evil hate the light and won't come to the light, because it clearly shows what they have done.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa akesĩ ɔhaĩ a, ade ɛláaya nɛ ɔhaĩ a sɛkɛ̃ a, kitonɛkĩ yaáwɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye tɔkpa kanya.

english_verse: But everyone who lives by the truth will come to the light, because they want others to know that God is really the one doing what they do. Jesus and John the Baptist
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, yaya nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ ayekĩ ɔhaĩ a aafɔ̃ bɛmɔ́ kĩ yakɛna fɔtsa nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ.” Yohanes Mui Ɔwɔlanɛ a Kpalɛ Yesu Akũ.

english_verse: Later, Jesus and his disciples went to Judea, where he stayed with them for a while and was baptizing people.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ liti a, Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a naa Yudea amantam a kamɛ a. Edzi nɛ awã fuwi sukuloo ɛwɔla bati mui.

english_verse: John's followers got into an argument with a Jewish man about a ceremony of washing.
translation_verse: Luwi a, fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ ya nɛ Yohanes fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ mɔ Yudani odi kayite nɛ Yudafɔ akũ mui kawɔla amaniɛ akũ.

english_verse: They went to John and said, “Rabbi, you spoke about a man when you were with him east of the Jordan. He is now baptizing people, and everyone is going to him.”
translation_verse: Foesũ bɛya nɛ Yohanes sɛkɛ̃ bɛyabi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, ate anɛ nɛ onyole a kĩ ɛna nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Yordan ɔwɔ liti, kĩ odi adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ a? Ɛlamɛna bati mui kawɔla ade bati flee lamɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ kanaa a!”

english_verse: John replied: No one can do anything unless God in heaven allows it.
translation_verse: Yohanes kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odima lɛláapuli ɛna litsedi mbɔɛntɛ Baguma lɛkpa ye de.

english_verse: You surely remember how I told you that I am not the Messiah. I am only the one sent ahead of him.
translation_verse: Mi mɔawɛ a nyɛ yĩ adansifɔ kĩ nlɛ kĩ, ‘Nnɛ́ yĩ nyɛ Kristo a, mbom Baguma do yĩ kĩ ĩnya ye lɔtɔ.’

english_verse: At a wedding the groom is the one who gets married. The best man is glad just to be there and to hear the groom's voice. That's why I am so glad.
translation_verse: Obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛla obolitsɔ̃ a, lɛmɛ obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ ɔkɔba kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃ yatse a kɔ̃, kawɔlɛ ade ye pii ntɛ enu obolitsɔ̃ ɔnyɔ a odo. Ade ayea kĩ nnu ye odo a, yĩ kawɔlɛkamɔ akpɔla a.

english_verse: Jesus must become more important, while I become less important. The One Who Comes from Heaven
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ ye dĩ lide nɛ ode lɔkɔa yĩ lide lɛka nɛ kayɔ. Oti a Kĩ Eto Ode Ɛya a Bɛ̃ Be Flee.

english_verse: God's Son comes from heaven and is above all others. Everyone who comes from the earth belongs to the earth and speaks about earthly things. The one who comes from heaven is above all others.
translation_verse: “Oti a kĩ eto ode ɛya a bɛ̃ be flee. Oti a kĩ eto tite akũ a nyɛ tite akũ oti, ade tite akũ fɔlɛtsa yalɛ a, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ eto ode a bɛ̃ be flee.

english_verse: He speaks about what he has seen and heard, and yet no one believes him.
translation_verse: Yalɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛmɔ́, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ enu, lɛmɛ odima látɛ ye adansiɛ kadi a.

english_verse: But everyone who does believe him has shown that God is truthful.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a, asipi kĩ Baguma adi ɔnɔkɔali.

english_verse: The Son was sent to speak God's message, and he has been given the full power of God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ Baguma do a alɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔa Hũhũ eyula ye kamɛ.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has given him everything.
translation_verse: Ɔlɛga a awɛ ye Obi kalɛ, ade foesũ ɛkɔa fɔtsa flee edo nɛ ye awɛ a.

english_verse: Everyone who has faith in the Son has eternal life. But no one who rejects him will ever share in that life, and God will be angry with them forever.
translation_verse: “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Obi a edo ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaátse Obi a ni, ɛláana nkpã, mbom Baguma kalɔkpa aana nɛ ye akũ.”

english_verse: But Jesus' disciples were really the ones doing the baptizing, and not Jesus himself. Jesus and the Samaritan Woman
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Yesu mɔawɛ táwɔla odima mui, mbom ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a odi lɛwɔla bati mui.

english_verse: Jesus left Judea and started for Galilee again.
translation_verse: Foesũ kĩ Yesu nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛdzakũ nɛ Yudea emuniki ɛnaa Galilea tite akũ.

english_verse: This time he had to go through Samaria,
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛtsã Samaria tite kamɛ ɛnaa awã.

english_verse: “You are a Jew,” she replied, “and I am a Samaritan woman. How can you ask me for a drink of water when Jews and Samaritans won't have anything to do with each other?”
translation_verse: Otsole a bi Yesu kĩ, “Nde fɔya mɔ nɔ Yudani avia yĩ Samaria otsole kĩ nkpa nɔ mui kamɔa?” Ɛlɛ lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ mɔ Samariafɔ lákã.

english_verse: “Sir,” the woman said, “you don't even have a bucket, and the well is deep. Where are you going to get this life-giving water?
translation_verse: Otsole a bi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, ɔnɛ́ɛ bokiti kĩ bakɔa kanu mui, ade lɔwɔkɛ a lɛmɛ dzũ a. Ndia aatomɛna mui a kĩ bakpa nkpã a?

english_verse: Our ancestor Jacob dug this well for us, and his family and animals got water from it. Are you greater than Jacob?”
translation_verse: Boe ɔwanyɔ Yakob lɛnyɛ lɔwɔkɛ kĩĩ ɛkpa boe, ade ye mɔawɛ, ye babi mɔ ye bayaɛ flee mɔa mui bitomɛna de kamɛ a. Mbɔɛɛ katsa atsa kĩ ɔbɛ̃ Yakob?”

english_verse: But no one who drinks the water I give will ever be thirsty again. The water I give will become in that person a flowing fountain that gives eternal life.”
translation_verse: lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yamɔa mui a kĩ maakpa ye a ni, ɔmɔado lɛláabuki ɛkɔ ye da. Kitonɛkĩ mui a kĩ maakpa oti a aadani mui katokɔ̃ kĩ nkpã mui deĩ a nɛ ye kamɛ, bɛkpa ye nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.”

english_verse: The woman replied, “Sir, please give me a drink of that water! Then I won't get thirsty and have to come to this well again.”
translation_verse: Otsole a bi Yesu kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, kpa yĩ mui a na badi ayekĩ ɔmɔado lɛláabuki ɛkɔ yĩ da, ĩye mbuki ĩya nɛ awĩ kĩ maanu mui.”

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Go and bring your husband.”
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Naakpã nɔ ɔnyɔ miya.”

english_verse: The woman answered, “I don't have a husband.” “That's right,” Jesus replied, “you're telling the truth. You don't have a husband. You have already been married five times, and the man you are now living with isn't your husband.”
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, odzimɔ banyole elo tɔ̃, ade onyole a kĩ mimɔ ye midzi finyaakĩĩ malo liti ɛnyɛ́ nɔ ɔnyɔ a.”

english_verse: The woman said, “Sir, I can see that you are a prophet.
translation_verse: Ade otsole a bi Yesu kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, mmɔ́ kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ anɛ.

english_verse: My ancestors worshiped on this mountain, but you Jews say Jerusalem is the only place to worship.”
translation_verse: Boe Samariafɔ bawanyɔ sum Baguma nɛ ɔtɔ kĩĩ akũ, lɛmɛ mi Yudafɔ mibo Yerusalem nyɛ awã kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bati bisum Baguma.”

english_verse: Jesus said to her: Believe me, the time is coming when you won't worship the Father either on this mountain or in Jerusalem.
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Boe ɔma, tɛ yĩ kado kĩ lɔkɔ aaya kĩ bati lɛláabuki bisum Ɔlɛga a nɛ ɔtɔ kĩĩ akũ ĩye nɛ Yerusalem.

english_verse: You Samaritans don't really know the one you worship. But we Jews do know the God we worship, and by using us, God will save the world.
translation_verse: Mi Samariafɔ miti minyína oti a kĩ ye miasum. Lɛmɛ boe Yudafɔ kɔ̃ bunyina oti a kĩ bɔasum, kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ akũ nkpã katɛ a tsã kɛya.

english_verse: But a time is coming, and it is already here! Even now the true worshipers are being led by the Spirit to worship the Father according to the truth. These are the ones the Father is seeking to worship him.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ lɔkɔ aya, ade lɛya kɔkɔɛ malo kĩ bati a kĩ basum Baguma nɛ osi wĩ akũ a, aasum Ɔlɛga a nɛ Baguma Hũhũ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. Ade bati a kĩ basum ye lɔmɔ a Baguma awɛ a.

english_verse: God is Spirit, and those who worship God must be led by the Spirit to worship him according to the truth.
translation_verse: Baguma ni, Hũhũ yanɛ, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ bati a kĩ basum ye a, bisum ye nɛ Hũhũ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ.”

english_verse: The woman said, “I know that the Messiah will come. He is the one we call Christ. When he comes, he will explain everything to us.”
translation_verse: Ade otsole a bi ye kĩ, “Ĩnyina kĩ Mesia kĩ bavɛ Kristo a aaya, ade ntɛ ɛya ni, yaabi boe lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa.”

english_verse: “I am that one,” Jesus told her, “and I am speaking to you now.”
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ ye, yĩ a kĩ nlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ nɔ a.”

english_verse: The disciples returned about this time and were surprised to find Jesus talking with a woman. But none of them asked him what he wanted or why he was talking with her.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ mɔ Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a muniki bɛya. Fɔkɛna be wãwã paa kĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ ye mɔ otsole bɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ. Lɛmɛ be kamɛ odima távia otsole a kĩ, “Litsa awɛ?” ĩye bivia Yesu kĩ, “Nde sũ mimɔ ye mialɔmɛna?”

english_verse: The woman left her water jar and ran back into town, where she said to the people,
translation_verse: Ade otsole a fɔnɛ ye kugumi awɛ eyi nɛ awã, ɛnaa ɔmatɔ kamɛ ɛnabi bati kĩ,

english_verse: “Come and see a man who told me everything I have ever done! Could he be the Messiah?”
translation_verse: “Miyaadã onyole odi kĩ ebi yĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ nkɛna tɔ̃. Mbɔɛɛ ye nyɛ Kristo a?”

english_verse: Everyone in town went out to see Jesus.
translation_verse: Foesũ bati nɛ́ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa Yesu sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: While this was happening, Jesus' disciples were saying to him, “Teacher, please eat something.”
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kake ye aduli kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, yaanya litsedi.”

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I have food you don't know anything about.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ndeĩ funitsã kĩ maanya, kĩ minyína foe akũ lɛtsama.”

english_verse: His disciples started asking each other, “Has someone brought him something to eat?”
translation_verse: Foesũ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kavia be akũ kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ odi ma ye funitsã?”

english_verse: Jesus said: My food is to do what God wants! He is the one who sent me, and I must finish the work that he gave me to do.
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Yĩ funitsã nyɛ kĩ makɛna nɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kawɛ akũ, lɔkɔa nwũna ye adzuma a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ a.

english_verse: You may say there are still four months until harvest time. But I tell you to look, and you will see that the fields are ripe and ready to harvest.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ mi alɛ kĩ kite tidetɔ ɛna sɔũ kĩ funitsã kakpɔta lɔkɔ awo ɔtɔ? Lɛmɛ mabi mi kĩ miko anɛ midã fɔba a! Funitsã a bo kĩ bakpɔta.

english_verse: Even now the harvest workers are receiving their reward by gathering a harvest that brings eternal life. Then everyone who planted the seed and everyone who harvests the crop will celebrate together.
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ yakpɔta funitsã a atɛ kɔtɔkase, ade ɔkpɔtanɛ akpɔta foe kakpa nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Foesũ funitsã odunɛ a mɔ ɔkpɔtanɛ a flee aamɔ kawɔlɛ bɛkpɔta.

english_verse: So the saying proves true, “Some plant the seed, and others harvest the crop.”
translation_verse: Foesũ kalɛ a kĩ balɛ kĩ, ‘Oti mɔa adu fɔtsa, oti bɛbã akpɔta foe’ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali.

english_verse: A lot of Samaritans in that town put their faith in Jesus because the woman had said, “This man told me everything I have ever done.”
translation_verse: Samariafɔ pii kĩ bito ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a tɛ Yesu bido nɛ otsole a adansiɛ a kĩ edi kĩ, “Ebi yĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ nkɛna tɔ̃ nɛ yĩ nkpã kamɛ,” a sũ.

english_verse: They came and asked him to stay in their town, and he stayed on for two days.
translation_verse: Foesũ kĩ bɛyamɔ Yesu a, bike ye aduli kĩ edzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃, ade Yesu dzi nɛ awã fuwi nviã fudi a.

english_verse: Many more Samaritans put their faith in Jesus because of what they heard him say.
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã pii lɛmɛ tɛ Yesu bido nɛ ye mɔawɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a sũ.

english_verse: They told the woman, “We no longer have faith in Jesus just because of what you told us. We have heard him ourselves, and we are certain that he is the Savior of the world!” Jesus Heals an Official's Son (Matthew
translation_verse: Ade bibi otsole a kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃, nnɛ́ nɔ fɔlɛtsa a sũ bɔtɛ budo, kitonɛkĩ boe mɔawɛ a bunu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a, ade bunyi kĩ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ye nyɛ katinya kamɛ Ɔtɛnɛ a.” Yesu Tsá Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Odi Obinyole.

english_verse: Jesus had said, “Prophets are honored everywhere, except in their own country.” Then two days later he left
translation_verse: Ye mɔawɛ a ɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ lɛ́la obu nɛ ye mɔawɛ kade bati kamɛ.”

english_verse: and went to Galilee. The people there welcomed him, because they had gone to the festival in Jerusalem and had seen everything he had done.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kĩ ewo Galilea tite akũ a, bati a tɛ ye katɛ wĩ, kitonɛkĩ bɛnaa Yerusalem nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanya a kamɛ, ade bɛmɔ́ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a nɛ luwi kanya a kamɛ.

english_verse: While Jesus was in Galilee, he returned to the village of Cana, where he had turned the water into wine. There was an official in Capernaum whose son was sick.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, Yesu muniki ɛnaa Kana nɛ Galilea tite akũ, awã kĩ ɛdani mui bɛkɛna bavɛ a. Abãã ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ odi deĩ nɛ awã, ye obinyole asɔ nɛ Kapernaum.

english_verse: And when the man heard that Jesus had come from Judea, he went and begged him to keep his son from dying.
translation_verse: Kĩ enu kĩ Yesu to Yudea ɛya nɛ Galilea a, ɛnaa ye sɛkɛ̃ ɛnake ye aduli kĩ ɛyatsa ye obi kĩ edeĩ nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite a ɛkpa ye.

english_verse: Jesus told the official, “You won't have faith unless you see miracles and wonders!”
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ mitámɔ awãwã mɔ nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa ni, miátɛ kado.”

english_verse: The man replied, “Lord, please come before my son dies!”
translation_verse: Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a ke ye aduli kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ ɔtáya mɔatsɛ ni, yĩ obi aaku.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “Your son will live. Go on home to him.” The man believed Jesus and started back home.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Naa, nɔ obi aana nkpã.” Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a tɛ Yesu fɔlɛtsa a edo ade epi ɔtɔsi a.

english_verse: Some of the official's servants met him along the road and told him, “Your son is better!”
translation_verse: Kĩ yanaa a, ye basumunɛ yatsɛlamɔ ye bibi ye kĩ ye obinyole a saɛ.

english_verse: He asked them when the boy got better, and they answered, “The fever left him yesterday at one o'clock.”
translation_verse: Evia be lɔkɔ a kĩ de kamɛ obinyole a saɛ, ade bibi ye kĩ, “Kadzɔ suwa ɔdɔũ mɔa kamɛ mɔ atilili a fɔnɛ ye awɛ.”

english_verse: The boy's father realized that at one o'clock the day before, Jesus had told him, “Your son will live!” So the man and everyone in his family put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Ade ɔlɛga a te anɛ kĩ ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Nɔ obi aana nkpã.” Nɛ foesũ ye mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee tɛ Yesu bido.

english_verse: This was the second miracle that Jesus worked after he left Judea and went to Galilee.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ nsɛntsɛlɛni ayade kĩ Yesu kɛna nɛ Galilea, kĩ emuniki eto Yudea ɛya a.

english_verse: Later, Jesus went to Jerusalem for another Jewish festival.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, kĩ Yudafɔ luwi lidi kanya wo ɔtɔ a, Yesu muniki ɛnaa Yerusalem.

english_verse: In the city near the sheep gate was a pool with five porches, and its name in Hebrew was Bethzatha.
translation_verse: Lutubu lidi deĩ nɛ Yerusalem kakɔ a kĩ bavɛ Baveli Onyukpɛ̃ a ɔwɛ̃, kĩ bavɛ nɛ Hebri tide kamɛ kĩ Betesda. Bike tɛpata elo nɛ de atɔ.

english_verse: Beside the pool was a man who had been sick for
translation_verse: Onyole odi kĩ ɛkasɔ futeli taalɛ-alɛ̃ flee na nɛ awã.

english_verse: You have not believed his message, because you refused to have faith in the one he sent.
translation_verse: Mitátɛ ye fɔlɛtsa a nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ mitátɛ oti a kĩ edo a mido.

english_verse: When Jesus saw the man and realized that he had been crippled for a long time, he asked him, “Do you want to be healed?”
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ ye kĩ ɛwaa nɛ awã a, enyi kĩ ɛkasɔ owi buna, foesũ evia ye kĩ, “Awɛ kĩ asaɛ?”

english_verse: The man answered, “Sir, I don't have anyone to put me in the pool when the water is stirred up. I try to get in, but someone else always gets there first.”
translation_verse: Ɔsɔnɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, ntɛ bikputua mui a ni, nlá odima kĩ yabɔɛ yĩ ɛnaado nɛ lutubu a kamɛ. Ntɛ mbɔa mbɔdi ĩyidza manaa a, lɔkɔa oti bɛbã tɛ̃ ɛnya yĩ lɔtɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus told him, “Pick up your mat and walk!”
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yidza kadza, kabɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna katsã!”

english_verse: Right then the man was healed. He picked up his mat and started walking around. The day on which this happened was a Sabbath.
translation_verse: Lɛtalɛta ɔsɔnɛ a na akũ ɔsĩ, ɛbɔɛ ye ɔkɛna edo katsã awɛ. Luwi a kĩ fukĩĩ ya a nyɛ Yudafɔ Kawɛya Luwi,

english_verse: When the Jewish leaders saw the man carrying his mat, they said to him, “This is the Sabbath! No one is allowed to carry a mat on the Sabbath.”
translation_verse: foesũ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a bi oti a kĩ Yesu tsa a kĩ ɛnɔnɛ ye ɔkɛna a kĩ, “Nviã nyɛ Kawɛya Luwi. Boe mbla a tákpa osi kĩ alɔ nɔ ɔkɛna.”

english_verse: But he replied, “The man who healed me told me to pick up my mat and walk.”
translation_verse: Onyole a kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛtsa yĩ a libi yĩ kĩ, ‘Yidza kadza, kabɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna katsã!’ ”

english_verse: They asked him, “Who is this man that told you to pick up your mat and walk?”
translation_verse: Ade ke bivia ye kĩ, “Owei nyɛ oti a kĩ ebi nɔ kĩ bɔɛ nɔ ɔkɛna katsã?”

english_verse: But he did not know who Jesus was, and Jesus had left because of the crowd.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ oti a kĩ bɛtsa a linyína Yesu, kitonɛkĩ bati yi awã, ade Yesu lɛmɛ vɛlɛ akũ ɛnɛ nɛ bati a kamɛ a.

english_verse: Later, Jesus met the man in the temple and told him, “You are now well. But don't sin anymore or something worse might happen to you.”
translation_verse: Ke liti a, Yesu mɔ́ ye nɛ Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ ade ebi ye kĩ, “Dã! Finyaa ɔna akũ ɔsĩ, foesũ fɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, lɛtsa kpa bɛbã kĩ lɛbɛ̃ fukĩĩ aaya nɛ nɔ akũ.”

english_verse: The man left and told the leaders that Jesus was the one who had healed him.
translation_verse: Ade ke onyole a dzakũ ɛnabi Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ Yesu lɛtsa ye.

english_verse: They started making a lot of trouble for Jesus because he did things like this on the Sabbath.
translation_verse: Foesũ bido Yesu liti katomɛna awɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛtsa oti nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ.

english_verse: But Jesus said, “My Father has never stopped working, and this is why I keep on working.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nda akɛna adzuma luwi nyɛ luwi, ade yĩ malo kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna adzuma a.”

english_verse: Now the leaders wanted to kill Jesus for two reasons. First, he had broken the law of the Sabbath. But even worse, he had said God was his Father, which made him equal with God. The Son's Authority
translation_verse: Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ fɔ̃ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a buki bɛwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ bakɔ Yesu, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ Kawɛya Luwi mbla a odi efum, mbom ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ Baguma nyɛ Ɔlɛga, kĩ fɔatsa kĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ eketimɔ Baguma. Baguma Kpa Obi Kɔbɛ̃.

english_verse: Jesus told the people: I tell you for certain the Son cannot do anything on his own. He can do only what he sees the Father doing, and he does exactly what he sees the Father do.
translation_verse: Foesũ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ Obi a lɛláapuli ɛkɛna lɛtsama nɛ ye mɔawɛ akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ Obi a amɔ kĩ Ɔlɛga akɛna a, ade de odi ye malo yakɛna a.

english_verse: The Father loves the Son and has shown him everything he does. The Father will show him even greater things, and you will be amazed.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Ɔlɛga a awɛ Obi a kalɛ, ade yatsa ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ye mɔawɛ yakɛna a. Yaatsa Obi fɔtsa kpale kɔlaa kĩ fɔbɛ̃ fukĩĩ kĩ ɛkɛna, kĩ fɔ́akɛna mi wãwã.

english_verse: Just as the Father raises the dead and gives life, so the Son gives life to anyone he wants to.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a adzɛla banɔkpa badzi nkpã a, ade aye Obi a lɛmɛ aakpa bikĩ ɛpau a nkpã a.

english_verse: The Father doesn't judge anyone, but he has made his Son the judge of everyone.
translation_verse: Ɔlɛga mɔawɛ a ládzɛmɔ odima, mbom ɛkɔa kɔbɛ̃ flee edo nɛ Obi a awɛ kĩ ɛdzɛmɔ bati flee,

english_verse: The Father wants all people to honor the Son as much as they honor him. When anyone refuses to honor the Son, this is the same as refusing to honor the Father who sent him.
translation_verse: ayekĩ be flee baakɔa obu bɛkpa Obi a ndɛ ayekĩ bakɔa kakpa Ɔlɛga a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaábu Obi a ni, yaábu Ɔlɛga a kĩ ye lido ye a lɛmɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who hears my message and has faith in the one who sent me has eternal life and will never be condemned. They have already gone from death to life.
translation_verse: “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatse yĩ fɔlɛtsa, mɔ yatɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kado ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Bɛláadzɛmɔ ye, mbom ɛtsã wuda kamɛ ɛtɛ̃, ɛna nkpã kɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain the time will come, and it is already here, when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of God. And those who listen to it will live!
translation_verse: Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ lɔkɔ lidi aya, ade lɛya kɔkɔɛ malo, kĩ banɔkpa aanu Baguma Obi a odo, ade bikĩ binu ye odo a aadzi nkpã a.

english_verse: The Father has the power to give life, and he has given that same power to the Son.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a mɔawɛ kamɛ nkpã deĩ a, ade ayea ɛfɔ̃ nkpã deĩ nɛ Obi a lɛmɛ kamɛ a.

english_verse: And he has given his Son the right to judge everyone, because he is the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Ɛkpa ye kɔbɛ̃ kĩ ɛdzɛ ɛkɔ kɔtɔ lɛmɛ, kitonɛkĩ ye nyɛ Otidziwa Obi a.

english_verse: Don't be surprised! The time will come when all of the dead will hear the voice of the Son of Man,
translation_verse: “Fukĩĩ fɔtakɛna mi wãwã, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ lidi aya kĩ banɔkpa flee aanu ye odo,

english_verse: and they will come out of their graves. Everyone who has done good things will rise to life, but everyone who has done evil things will rise and be condemned.
translation_verse: lɔkɔa baanɛ nɛ be funikɛ kamɛ. Bikĩ bɛkɛna tuwĩ a aayidza bidzi nkpã, ade bikĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa a aayidza bɛkpa kɔtɔkaku.” Bati a Kĩ Bidi Adansiɛ Nɛ Yesu Akũ.

english_verse: I cannot do anything on my own. The Father sent me, and he is the one who told me how to judge. I judge with fairness, because I obey him, and I don't just try to please myself. Witnesses to Jesus
translation_verse: Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nláapuli nkɛna lɛtsama nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ otumi akũ. Madzɛ fɔlɛtsa ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma abi yĩ, foesũ madzɛ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, kitonɛkĩ maákɛna nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kawɛ akũ, mbom makɛna nɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kawɛ akũ.

english_verse: If I speak for myself, there is no way to prove I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: “Ntɛ ndi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ ni, yĩ adansiɛ a tákpɔla.

english_verse: But there is someone else who speaks for me, and I know what he says is true.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ oti bɛbã deĩ kĩ yadi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ, ade ĩnyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ yalɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a kpɔla.

english_verse: You sent messengers to John, and he told them the truth.
translation_verse: “Mido batɔ nɛ Yohanes sɛkɛ̃, ade ebi mi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ yĩ akũ a.

english_verse: I don't depend on what people say about me, but I tell you these things so that you may be saved.
translation_verse: Ntásĩ otidziwa adansiɛ kadi nɛ yĩ akũ, mbom nlɛ fukĩĩ ayekĩ míana nkpã katɛ.

english_verse: John was a lamp that gave a lot of light, and you were glad to enjoy his light for a while.
translation_verse: Yohanes la ndɛ ɔsɛdza kĩ yatɛ̃ kakpalɛ fɔkɔ, ade miawɛ kĩ miamɔ kawɔlɛ sukuloo nɛ ye ɔhaĩ a kamɛ a.

english_verse: But something more important than John speaks for me. I mean the things that the Father has given me to do! All of these speak for me and prove that the Father sent me.
translation_verse: “Lɛmɛ ndeĩ adansiɛ kĩ ɛbɛ̃ Yohanes ade a. Fɔtsa a kĩ makɛna a kĩ fɔnyɛ tudzuma kĩ Nda kpa yĩ kĩ nkɛna nwũna a, ade foe adi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ, katsa lɛmɛ kĩ Ɔlɛga a lido yĩ a.

english_verse: The Father who sent me also speaks for me, but you have never heard his voice or seen him face to face.
translation_verse: Ɔlɛga a kĩ edo yĩ a, ade ye adi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a. Mitánu tɔ̃ ye odo ĩye mimɔ́ tɔ̃ ayekĩ ɛla a.

english_verse: You search the Scriptures, because you think you will find eternal life in them. The Scriptures tell about me,
translation_verse: Miatsã Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a fɔlɛtsa kamɛ fininiini, kitonɛkĩ miakɔna kĩ foe kamɛ míatsã mina nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Ade ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa mɔapɛ a adi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ akũ a,

english_verse: but you refuse to come to me for eternal life.
translation_verse: lɛmɛ miáwɛ kĩ miaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ayekĩ míana nkpã.

english_verse: I don't care about human praise,
translation_verse: “Maáwɛ kamu ntomɛna batidziwa sɛkɛ̃,

english_verse: I have come with my Father's authority, and you have not welcomed me. But you will welcome people who come on their own.
translation_verse: Ĩya nɛ Nda dĩ akũ lɛmɛ mitátɛ yĩ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti bɛbã lɛya nɛ ye mɔawɛ dĩ akũ ni, míatɛ ye.

english_verse: How could you possibly believe? You like to have your friends praise you, and you don't care about praise that the only God can give!
translation_verse: Miawɛ kĩ miatɛ mi akũ akũ kamu, lɛmɛ miáwɛ kamu a kĩ kito oti a kĩ ye odi nyɛ Baguma a sɛkɛ̃, lɔkɔa nde míapuli mitɛ yĩ mido?

english_verse: Don't think that I will be the one to accuse you to the Father. You have put your hope in Moses, yet he is the very one who will accuse you.
translation_verse: “Lɛmɛ mitakɔna kĩ yĩ aatsua mi onukpɛ̃ nkpa Nda. Mose a kĩ ye akũ mikɔa anɛ mite a, ade ye nyɛ oti kĩ yaatsua mi onukpɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Moses wrote about me, and if you had believed Moses, you would have believed me.
translation_verse: Ntɛ miti mitɛ Mose mido ni, kufɛ míatɛ yĩ malo mido, kitonɛkĩ ɛtsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa eyi nɛ yĩ akũ.

english_verse: But if you don't believe what Moses wrote, how can you believe what I say?
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ mitátɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛtsɛlɛ eyi a mido ni, nde míakɛna mitɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a mido?”

english_verse: The disciples gathered them up and filled twelve large baskets with what was left over from the five barley loaves.
translation_verse: Foesũ bifila fukĩ bati a nya bitina nɛ abodoo elo a kamɛ a biyula tɛtsɛtsɛ ewua-nviã.

english_verse: The disciples wanted to take him into the boat, but suddenly the boat reached the shore where they were headed. The Bread That Gives Life
translation_verse: Ɔwɔlɛ ka edzi be ade bɛfɔ̃ Yesu wo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ a. Lɛtalɛta ɔkɔlɔ a wo lɔwɔtuni nɛ awã kĩ banaa a. Bati a Tsã Bɛwɛ Yesu.

english_verse: They replied, “What miracle will you work, so that we can have faith in you? What will you do?
translation_verse: Ade bivia ye kĩ, “Nsɛntsɛlɛni awɔdabe aakɛna bɔmɔ́ lɔkɔa bɔtɛ nɔ budo? Litsa aakɛna?

english_verse: No one can come to me, unless the Father who sent me makes them want to come. But if they do come, I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Odima lɛláapuli ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mbɔɛntɛ Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a vɛlɛ ye ɛma yĩ, ade maadzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a.

english_verse: “There is a boy here who has five small loaves of barley bread and two fish. But what good is that with all these people?”
translation_verse: “Opopo odi nɛɛ abodoo fɔbɔ elo mɔ kɔfɔabi nviã nɛ awĩ. Lɛmɛ futi fɔláato bati beblebee kĩĩ?”

english_verse: The ground was covered with grass, and Jesus told his disciples to tell everyone to sit down. About
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bati a flee bɛkɛna akũ bidzi.” Tuwĩ blɔblɔ deĩ nɛ awã ade bati a flee kɛna akũ bidzi nɛ te akũ a. Banyole a lidede aana ndɛ mpim elo.

english_verse: They got into a boat and started across for Capernaum. Later that evening Jesus had still not come to them,
translation_verse: Biwo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ kamɛ bimuniki binyina banaa Kapernaum. Nɛ lɔkɔ a, kade dɔ lɛmɛ Yesu táyawo tɔ̃ be sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: A large crowd had seen him work miracles to heal the sick, and those people went with him.
translation_verse: Bati kɔdabu kpale tomɔ ye kitonɛkĩ bɛmɔ́ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna, nɛ basɔnɛ katsa kamɛ a.

english_verse: Philip answered, “Don't you know that it would take almost a year's wages just to buy only a little bread for each of these people?”
translation_verse: Ade Filipo kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ bɔya funitsã sika ovoe ɔha nviã malo ni, fɔláawĩ be ntɛ odi nyɛ odi tɛ sukuloo sukuloo malo.”

english_verse: Andrew, the brother of Simon Peter, was one of the disciples. He spoke up and said,
translation_verse: Awã naa, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa, Andrea, kĩ ɛnyɛ Simon Petro ɔwaɛ̃ bi ye kĩ,

english_verse: Jesus took the bread in his hands and gave thanks to God. Then he passed the bread to the people, and he did the same with the fish, until everyone had plenty to eat.
translation_verse: Ade ke Yesu tɛ abodoo a ɛnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ, ade ɛsɛ̃ ye ɛkpa bati a. Ɛkɛna kɔfɔabi a lɛmɛ lɔmɔ, ade be flee bɛna funitsã ndɛ ayekĩ bawɛ a.

english_verse: The people ate all they wanted, and Jesus told his disciples to gather up the leftovers, so that nothing would be wasted.
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛnya biwĩ a, Yesu bi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mikpɔta fukĩ fute a. Mitafɔ̃ bubula fudima kade.”

english_verse: Jesus realized that they would try to force him to be their king. So he went up on a mountain, where he could be alone. Jesus Walks on the Water (Matthew
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ kĩ baayatimtim ye bipi bidzina lɛgã a, foesũ ɛnɛ́ nɛ be kamɛ ebuki ede ɛnaa ɔtɔ akũ ye odi. Yesu Tsã Mui Anɛ.

english_verse: The people who had stayed on the east side of the lake knew that only one boat had been there. They also knew that Jesus had not left in it with his disciples. But the next day
translation_verse: Kĩ kade nyina a, bati kɔdabu a kĩ bɛkahɔ nɛ ɔwɔ lutuni litide kadzɔ a mɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ ɔkɔlɔ mɔapɛ lɛna nɛ awã. Bɛmɔ́ lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu táwo nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ ebumɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a, mbom bɛdzakũ bɛfɔnɛ ye.

english_verse: Don't work for food that spoils. Work for food that gives eternal life. The Son of Man will give you this food, because God the Father has given him the right to do so.”
translation_verse: Mitaha akũ nɛ funitsã kĩ fɔ́abu kade akũ, mbom miha akũ miwɛ funitsã a kĩ fɔ́awa fɔkpa daa nkpã a kĩ Otidziwa Obi a aakpa mi a, kitonɛkĩ ade ye akũ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a te awɛ a.”

english_verse: One of the prophets wrote, “God will teach all of them.” And so everyone who listens to the Father and learns from him will come to me.
translation_verse: Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a tsɛlɛ biyi kĩ, ‘Baguma aatsa bati flee fɔtsa!’ Odi nyɛ odi kĩ etse Ɔlɛga a, ɛkɔlɛ fɔtsa etomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ ni, aya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: They started arguing with each other and asked, “How can he give us his flesh to eat?”
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ fɔ̃ Yudafɔ a yi fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ kayɔ nɛ kalɔkpa kamɛ nɛ be kamɛ ade bivia kĩ, “Nde oti kĩĩ aapuli ɛkɔa ye sukɛna ɛkpa boe kĩ bɔba?”

english_verse: That evening, Jesus' disciples went down to the lake.
translation_verse: Kĩ olobe lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a ka bɛnaa ɔwɔ lutubu baũ a abuĩ.

english_verse: and a strong wind was making the water rough.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, ɔwɛ kpale odi kavũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kabɔa mui kadɛla kakamɛna.

english_verse: When the disciples had rowed for five or six kilometers, they saw Jesus walking on the water. He kept coming closer to the boat, and they were terrified.
translation_verse: Kĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tá ɔkɔlɔ a banaa lɔtɔ ndɛ fusikũ ɛlalɛ ĩye foe ɛna a, bɛmɔ́ Yesu kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ mui anɛ yaya nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a sɛkɛ̃, ade libe wo be a.

english_verse: But he said, “I am Jesus! Don't be afraid!”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitavila. Yĩ manɛ!”

english_verse: some boats from Tiberias sailed near the place where the crowd had eaten the bread for which the Lord had given thanks.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, tɔkɔlɔ bɛbã tidi kĩ tito Tiberia ɔmatɔ a yadza tifuã awã kĩ bati nya abodoo a kĩ boe Ɔlate bɔa mpaɛ nɛ ye akũ a.

english_verse: They saw that Jesus and his disciples had left. Then they got into the boats and went to Capernaum to look for Jesus.
translation_verse: Kĩ bati kɔdabu a mɔ́ kĩ Yesu ĩye ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ odima lɛláa awã a, biwo nɛ tɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ bɛnaa Kapernaum bɛnaawɛ ye. Yesu Nyɛ́ Nkpã Abodoo a.

english_verse: They found him on the west side of the lake and asked, “Rabbi, when did you get here?”
translation_verse: Kĩ bati a mɔ́ Yesu nɛ lɔwɔtuni litide a ni, bivia ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, lɔkɔ lɔwɔdabe ɔyawo awĩ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that you are not looking for me because you saw the miracles, but because you ate all the food you wanted.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, nnɛ́ awãwã fɔtsa a kĩ nkɛna mimɔ́ a sũ mitsɛ̃ miawɛ yĩ, mbom abodoo a kĩ mina minya miwĩ a sũ.

english_verse: “What exactly does God want us to do?” the people asked.
translation_verse: Foesũ bati a via Yesu kĩ, “Litsa kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna fɔtsa kĩ bɔakɛna Baguma adzuma?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “God wants you to have faith in the one he sent.”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ mikɛna nyɛ kĩ mitɛ oti a kĩ edo a mido.”

english_verse: For example, when our ancestors were in the desert, they were given manna to eat. It happened just as the Scriptures say, ‘God gave them bread from heaven to eat.’ ”
translation_verse: Boe bawanyɔ nya funitsã a kĩ bavɛ mana a nɛ kɔsa kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, ‘Ɛkpa be abodoo etomɛna ode kĩ bɛnya.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus then told them, “I tell you for certain that Moses wasn't the one who gave you bread from heaven. My Father is the one who gives you the true bread from heaven.
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali a mabi mi kĩ, nnɛ́ Mose lɛkpa mi abodoo a etomɛna ode, mbom Nda akpa abodoo wĩ katomɛna ode.

english_verse: And the bread that God gives is the one who came down from heaven to give life to the world.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma abodoo a nyɛ́ oti a kĩ eto ode ɛya kĩ yakpa katinya nkpã.”

english_verse: The people said, “Sir, give us this bread and don't ever stop!”
translation_verse: Ade bibi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, kpa boe abodoo kĩĩ daa.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am the bread that gives life! No one who comes to me will ever be hungry. No one who has faith in me will ever be thirsty.
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ yakpa nkpã. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ni, kɔlɛ lɛláakɔ ye da, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, ɔmɔado lɛláakɔ ye da.

english_verse: I have told you already that you have seen me and still do not have faith in me.
translation_verse: Finyaa mbi mi kĩ, mimɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ miátɛ mido.

english_verse: Everything and everyone that the Father has given me will come to me, and I won't turn any of them away.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ Nda kɔa ɛkpa yĩ ni, yaaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ni, nláablɔmɛna ye da,

english_verse: I didn't come from heaven to do what I want! I came to do what the Father wants me to do. He sent me,
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ nto ode ĩya, nnɛ́ kĩ mayaakɛna nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kawɛ akũ, mbom kĩ makɛna oti a kĩ edo yĩ a odi kawɛ akũ.

english_verse: and he wants to make certain that none of the ones he has given me will be lost. Instead, he wants me to raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Ade oti a kĩ edo yĩ a kawɛ nyɛ kĩ bati a kĩ ɛkɔa ɛkpa yĩ a kamɛ odima ɛtayɛla, mbom kĩ ndzɛla be flee bidzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ.

english_verse: My Father wants everyone who sees the Son to have faith in him and to have eternal life. Then I will raise them to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Nda kawɛ nyɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔ́ Obi a mɔ ɛtɛ ye edo lɛmɛ ni, ɛna nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Ade maadzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a.”

english_verse: The people started grumbling because Jesus had said he was the bread that had come down from heaven.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ a do hũhũhũhũ kakɛna awɛ nɛ Yesu akũ, kitonɛkĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ eto ode ɛya a.”

english_verse: They were asking each other, “Isn't he Jesus, the son of Joseph? Don't we know his father and mother? How can he say that he has come down from heaven?”
translation_verse: Foesũ bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ Yesu, Yosef obinyole a kĩ bunyina ɔlɛga mɔ ɔma flee a nɛ awĩ a? Nde fɔya mɔ finyaa yalɛ kĩ ode eto ɛya?”

english_verse: The only one who has seen the Father is the one who has come from him. No one else has ever seen the Father.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ fukĩĩ látsa kĩ odi mɔ́ tɔ̃ Ɔlɛga a, mbɔɛntɛ oti a kĩ eto Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a odi lɛmɔ Ɔlɛga a.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that everyone who has faith in me has eternal life.
translation_verse: Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ edo ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.

english_verse: I am the bread that gives life!
translation_verse: Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ yakpa nkpã.

english_verse: Your ancestors ate manna in the desert, and later they died.
translation_verse: Mi bawanyɔ nya mana nɛ kɔsa kamɛ, lɛmɛ biku.

english_verse: But the bread from heaven has come down, so that no one who eats it will ever die.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ abodoo a kĩ eto ode ɛya a aafɔ̃ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yanya ye a lɛláaku.

english_verse: I am that bread from heaven! Everyone who eats it will live forever. My flesh is the life-giving bread I give to the people of this world.
translation_verse: Yĩ nyɛ abodoo a kĩ yakpa nkpã, kĩ eto ode ɛya a. Ntɛ odi nya abodoo kĩĩ ni, yaadzi nkpã daa, ade ke abodoo a kĩ maakpa ye a nyɛ yĩ sukɛna, kĩ makpa katinya kamɛ bati bɛna nkpã.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I tell you for certain that you won't live unless you eat the flesh and drink the blood of the Son of Man.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ ntɛ mitába Otidziwa Obi a sukɛna, mimɔa ye babɔanɛ a ni, miláana nkpã nɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: But if you do eat my flesh and drink my blood, you will have eternal life, and I will raise you to life on the last day.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛba yĩ sukɛna ɛmɔa yĩ babɔanɛ lɛmɛ ni, yaana daa nkpã a, ade maadzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a.

english_verse: My flesh is the true food, and my blood is the true drink.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ yĩ sukɛna nyɛ funitsã wĩ a, ade yĩ babɔanɛ lɛmɛ nyɛ bavɛ wĩ a.

english_verse: If you eat my flesh and drink my blood, you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaba yĩ sukɛna, kĩ yamɔa yĩ babɔanɛ lɛmɛ ni, edeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: The living Father sent me, and I have life because of him. Now everyone who eats my flesh will live because of me.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a kĩ edzi nkpã do yĩ a, kĩ ndzi nkpã nɛ ye sũ a, ade ayea odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛba yĩ sukɛna lɛmɛ aadzi nkpã nɛ yĩ sũ a.

english_verse: The bread that comes down from heaven isn't like what your ancestors ate. They died, but whoever eats this bread will live forever.
translation_verse: Ade abodoo a kĩ eto ode a nɛ awĩ a. Ɛlá ndɛ mana a kĩ mi bawanyɔ nya lɛmɛ ke liti, biku a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnya abodoo kĩĩ aadzi nkpã daa.”

english_verse: Jesus was teaching in a synagogue in Capernaum when he said these things. The Words of Eternal Life
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛkatsa fɔtsa nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ nɛ Kapernaum. Yesu Tsa Fɔtsa Nɛ Daa Nkpã a Akũ.

english_verse: Many of Jesus' disciples heard him and said, “This is too hard for anyone to understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a pii nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ tɛnɛ́ ɔsĩ! Owei aapuli ɛtɛ foe?”

english_verse: Jesus knew that his disciples were grumbling. So he asked, “Does this bother you?
translation_verse: Yesu mɔ́ eyi ɔsũ kĩ bɛkakɛna hũhũhũhũ, foesũ ebi be kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ fukĩĩ fɔ̃ miawɛ kĩ miakpa lɔlɔ?

english_verse: What if you should see the Son of Man go up to heaven where he came from?
translation_verse: Kekɔ̃ nde fɔ́ana ntɛ mimɔ́ Otidziwa Obi a kĩ emuniki ede yanaa ode, awã kĩ ɛna tɔ̃ a?

english_verse: The Spirit is the one who gives life! Human strength can do nothing. The words that I have spoken to you are from that life-giving Spirit.
translation_verse: Baguma Hũhũ a akpa nkpã, otidziwa kɔbɛ̃ lɛláa lɛtsama kamɛ. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi a nyɛ Hũhũ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ foe kamɛ nkpã deĩ.

english_verse: But some of you refuse to have faith in me.” Jesus said this, because from the beginning he knew who would have faith in him. He also knew which one would betray him.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ badi tátɛ bido.” Kitonɛkĩ Yesu nyi kito anɛ kayɔkayi a bati a kĩ bɛláatɛ bido mɔ oti a kĩ ye aanyɛ ye ɛkpa a.

english_verse: Then Jesus said, “You cannot come to me, unless the Father makes you want to come. That is why I have told these things to all of you.”
translation_verse: Ɛlɛ ebu kĩ, “Ade fukĩĩ sũ mbi mi kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mbɔɛntɛ Ɔlɛga a kpa ye osi.”

english_verse: Because of what Jesus said, many of his disciples turned their backs on him and stopped following him.
translation_verse: Kito fukĩĩ akũ a, Yesu fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a badi pii muniki nɛ ye liti, ade bɛtábuki bitomɔ ye a.

english_verse: Jesus then asked his twelve disciples if they also were going to leave him.
translation_verse: Foesũ evia fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ ewua-nviã a kĩ, “Mi malo miawɛ kĩ miadzakũ mbɔɛɛ?”

english_verse: Simon Peter answered, “Lord, there is no one else that we can go to! Your words give eternal life.
translation_verse: Ade Simon Petro kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei sɛkɛ̃ bɔ́adzakũ bɔnaa? Nɔ deĩ daa nkpã a fɔlɛtsa.

english_verse: We have faith in you, and we are sure that you are God's Holy One.”
translation_verse: Finyaa kɔ̃ bɔtɛ budo ade bunyina kĩ nɔ nyɛ Oti Kpalɛwa a kĩ eto Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a.”

english_verse: Jesus told his disciples, “I chose all twelve of you, but one of you is a demon!”
translation_verse: Ade ke Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ mi bati ewua-nviã mpau? Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa nyɛ Abonsam!”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot. He would later betray Jesus, even though he was one of the twelve disciples.
translation_verse: Yuda, Simon Iskariot obi a akũ fɔlɛtsa ɛkalɛ, kitonɛkĩ titɔ kĩ ɛnyɛ be ewua-nviã a kamɛ ɔmɔa malo ni, ade ye aanyɛ ye ɛkpa a.

english_verse: Jesus decided to leave Judea and to start going through Galilee because the leaders of the people wanted to kill him.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, Yesu natsã emini nɛ Galilea tite akũ, ɛtáwɛ kĩ yamini nɛ Yudea tite kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ awã kawɛ kĩ bakɔ ye.

english_verse: It was almost time for the Festival of Shelters,
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Yudafɔ Tɛpatampa Kayɔ Kadzi Luwi kanya a fuã,

english_verse: and Jesus' brothers said to him, “Why don't you go to Judea? Then your disciples can see what you are doing.
translation_verse: foesũ Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole bi ye kĩ, “Dzakũ nɛ awĩ kanaa Yudea tite akũ, lɔkɔa nɔ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a lɛmɛ bɛmɔ adzuma a kĩ ɔlamɛna kakɛna a.

english_verse: No one does anything in secret, if they want others to know about them. So let the world know what you are doing!”
translation_verse: Odima lákɔla ye adzuma ntɛ yawɛ kĩ bati binyi ye kanyi wĩ. Ntɛ nuwĩ ɔlamɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee kakɛna ni, nyɛ nɔ akũ katsa katinya kamɛ bati flee!”

english_verse: Even Jesus' own brothers had not yet become his followers.
translation_verse: Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole a lɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ be malo bɛtátɛ ye bido.

english_verse: Jesus answered, “My time hasn't yet come, but your time is always here.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Yĩ lɔkɔ wĩ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ nɛnɛ lɛkpa mi.

english_verse: The people of this world cannot hate you. They hate me, because I tell them that they do evil things.
translation_verse: Katinya kamɛ bati lɛláapuli bikesĩ mi, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ bakesĩ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ ndzɛmɔ be kabi kĩ be tudzuma nyɛ tɔkpa.

english_verse: Go on to the festival. My time hasn't yet come, and I am not going.”
translation_verse: Minaa luwi a kanyakɔ̃. Yĩ kɔ̃ nláanaa luwi kĩĩ kanyakɔ̃, kitonɛkĩ yĩ lɔkɔ wĩ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this and stayed on in Galilee. Jesus at the Festival of Shelters
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ebuki ɛkahɔ nɛ Galilea. Yesu Naa Tɛpatampa Kayɔ Kadzi Luwi Kanyakɔ̃.

english_verse: After Jesus' brothers had gone to the festival, he went secretly, without telling anyone.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu bawaɛ̃nyole a dzakũ bɛnaa luwi kanyakɔ̃ a, ye malo ɛyanaa awã, lɛmɛ ɛtányɛ ye akũ ɛtsa, mbom ɛbɛla ye akũ.

english_verse: During the festival the leaders of the people looked for Jesus and asked, “Where is he?”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kawɛ ye nɛ luwi a kanyakɔ̃, bɛkavia kĩ, “Nde oti a?”

english_verse: The crowds even got into an argument about him. Some were saying, “Jesus is a good man,” while others were saying, “He is lying to everyone.”
translation_verse: Bati kɔdabu a kalɛ kɔdzɛla pɛtɛɛ pɛtɛɛ nɛ Yesu akũ. Be kamɛ badi lɛ kĩ, “Oti wĩ yanɛ.” Ade babɛbã lɛmɛ lɛ kĩ, “Oowo, ɛtsɛ̃ yakɛ bati.”

english_verse: But the people were afraid of their leaders, and none of them talked in public about him.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ odima tápuli ɛlɛ foe kɔɔba, kitonɛkĩ bivila Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a.

english_verse: When the festival was about half over, Jesus went into the temple and started teaching.
translation_verse: Kĩ kite sukuloo luwi kanya a atɛ̃ de kayite a, Yesu naa Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ ɛnado bati fɔtsa katsa awɛ.

english_verse: The leaders were surprised and said, “How does this man know so much? He has never been taught!”
translation_verse: Ye fɔtsa katsa a kɛna Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a wãwã paa, ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nde oti kĩĩ kɛna enyina ovoli lɔmɔ, kĩ ɛtána fɔtsa kakɔlɛ kadima?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I am not teaching something I thought up. What I teach comes from the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Fɔtsa a kĩ matsa a lɛnyɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ fude, mbom futo Baguma kĩ edo yĩ a sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: If you really want to obey God, you will know if what I teach comes from God or from me.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yakɛna nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ akũ a, aanyi ntɛ fɔtsa a kĩ matsa a to Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ĩye malɛ foe nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ.

english_verse: If I wanted to bring honor to myself, I would speak for myself. But I want to honor the one who sent me. This is why I tell the truth and not a lie.
translation_verse: Oti kĩ yatsa fɔtsa nɛ ye mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ ni, obu yawɛ ɛkpa ye akũ. Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti awɛ obu ɛkpa oti a kĩ edo ye a ni, ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini, ade tɔkpa tidima lɛláa ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: Didn't Moses give you the Law? Yet none of you obey it! So why do you want to kill me?
translation_verse: Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ Mose lɛkpa mi mbla a? Lɛmɛ mi kamɛ odima lákɛna nɛ mbla a akũ. Nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ yĩ?”

english_verse: The crowd replied, “You're crazy! What makes you think someone wants to kill you?”
translation_verse: Ade bati kɔdabu a bi ye kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ! Owei awɛ kĩ yakɔ nɔ?”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I worked one miracle, and it amazed you.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awãwã fɔtsa mɔa kĩĩ nkɛna, ade mi flee mikɛna saa a.

english_verse: Moses commanded you to circumcise your sons. But it wasn't really Moses who gave you this command. It was your ancestors, and even on the Sabbath you circumcise your sons
translation_verse: Mose kpa mi mbla kĩ mitsua mi babinyole fɔkpati, ade titɔ kĩ nnɛ́ Mose sɛkɛ̃ futo, mbom mi bawanyɔ liyi foe kayɔ malo ni, miatsua onyole lɛkpati nɛ Kawɛya Luwi akũ.

english_verse: in order to obey the Law of Moses. Why are you angry with me for making someone completely well on the Sabbath?
translation_verse: Ntɛ bitsua obi lɛkpati nɛ Kawɛya luwi akũ ayekĩ bɛláafum Mose mbla a ni, nde sũ mina kalɔkpa nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ ntsa oti fɔsɔ nɛ Kawɛya Luwi a akũ?

english_verse: Some of the people from Jerusalem were saying, “Isn't this the man they want to kill?
translation_verse: Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a kamɛ bati badi via kĩ, “Nnɛ́ oti kĩĩ Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a lamɛna kawɛ kĩ bakɔ a nɛ awĩ a?

english_verse: Yet here he is, speaking for everyone to hear. And no one is arguing with him. Do you suppose the authorities know he is the Messiah?
translation_verse: Midã kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ kanade yalɛ kɔdzɛla, kĩ bɛtávia ye kadima. Mbɔɛɛ fɔ́anya kĩ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a nyina nuwĩ kĩ ye nyɛ Kristo a?

english_verse: But how could that be? No one knows where the Messiah will come from, but we know where this man comes from.”
translation_verse: Boe flee bunyina awã kĩ oti kĩĩ kɔ̃ to, lɛmɛ ntɛ Kristo a ya ni, odima lɛláanyi awã kĩ eto.”

english_verse: As Jesus was teaching in the temple, he shouted, “Do you really think you know me and where I came from? I didn't come on my own! The one who sent me is truthful, and you don't know him.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu katsa fɔtsa nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛlɛ kĩ, “Kalɛ mialɛ kĩ miti minyina yĩ mɔ awã kĩ nto a? Ntáya nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ. Oti a kĩ edo yĩ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini kĩ mi minyína ye,

english_verse: But I know the one who sent me, because I came from him.”
translation_verse: lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ĩnyina ye, kitonɛkĩ ye sɛkɛ̃ nto ĩya ade ye lido yĩ a.”

english_verse: Some of the people wanted to arrest Jesus right then. But no one even laid a hand on him, because his time had not yet come.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ bɛwɛ kĩ bapi Yesu, lɛmɛ odima tákɔa awɛ ɛta ye, kitonɛkĩ ye lɔkɔ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ.

english_verse: A lot of people in the crowd put their faith in him and said, “When the Messiah comes, he surely won't perform more miracles than this man has done!” Officers Sent To Arrest Jesus
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ bati pii tɛ ye bido ade bivia kĩ, “Ntɛ Kristo a ya ni, yaakɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii fɔba fukĩ oti kĩĩ lamɛna kakɛna a?” Bido Asɔli Kɔla Akũ Badãmɛnanɛ Kĩ Bɛnaapi Yesu.
