english_verse: When the Pharisees heard the crowd arguing about Jesus, they got together with the chief priests and sent some temple police to arrest him.
translation_verse: Farisifɔ nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bati kɔdabu a lamɛna kalɛ pɛtɛɛ pɛtɛɛ nɛ Yesu akũ a, foesũ bɛmɔ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a bido Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a kĩ bɛnaapi ye.

english_verse: But Jesus told them, “I will be with you a little while longer, and then I will return to the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Maana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ fubuna owi sukuloo, lɔkɔa maadzakũ nnaa oti a kĩ edo yĩ a sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: You will look for me, but you won't find me. You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: Míawɛ yĩ lɛmɛ miláamɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ miláapuli miya nɛ awã kĩ maana a.”

english_verse: The people asked each other, “Where can he go to keep us from finding him? Is he going to some foreign country where our people live? Is he going there to teach the Greeks?
translation_verse: Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a via akũ kĩ, “Nɛ ndia ɛwɛ kĩ yanaa kĩ bɔláapuli bɔmɔ́ ye? Mbɔɛɛ kĩ yanaa Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛgba biko nɛ Helafɔ kamɛ a ɛnaatsa Helafɔ a fɔtsa?

english_verse: What did he mean by saying that we will look for him, but won't find him? Why can't we go where he is going?” Streams of Life-Giving Water
translation_verse: Ɛlɛ kĩ bɔ́awɛ ye lɛmɛ bɔláamɔ ye, ade bɔláapuli bɔnaa awã kĩ yaana a. Foe kayɔ nyɛ litsa?” Yesu Nyɛ́ Nkpã Mui a.

english_verse: On the last and most important day of the festival, Jesus stood up and shouted, “If you are thirsty, come to me and drink!
translation_verse: Nɛ luwi nkaɛ a kĩ lɛnyɛ luwi titiliwu nɛ fuwi kanya kamɛ akũ a, Yesu yidza ɛdza ade ɛbɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, ɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ ɛyaamɔa mui.

english_verse: Have faith in me, and you will have life-giving water flowing from deep inside you, just as the Scriptures say.”
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ a, ‘Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, nkpã tɔwɔ aatini bito ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.’ ”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the Holy Spirit, who would be given to everyone that had faith in him. The Spirit had not yet been given to anyone, since Jesus had not yet been given his full glory. The People Take Sides
translation_verse: Yesu kalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ Hũhũ a kĩ bikĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a aayatɛ a akũ. Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, bɛtákpa tɔ̃ Hũhũ a, kitonɛkĩ bɛtádzɛla Yesu ewo nɛ kukũkpalɛ kamɛ. Kasɛ̃ Wo Nɛ Yudafɔ a Kamɛ.

english_verse: When the crowd heard Jesus say this, some of them said, “He must be the Prophet!”
translation_verse: Kĩ bati a badi nu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Yesu lɛ a, bɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔali, Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ a nyɛ oti kĩĩ.”

english_verse: Others said, “He is the Messiah!” Others even said, “Can the Messiah come from Galilee?
translation_verse: Babɛbã lɛ kĩ, “Ade Kristo a nɛ awĩ a.” Lɛmɛ bati bɛbã kɔ̃ via kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ Galilea tite akũ Kristo a aato ɛya?

english_verse: The Scriptures say that the Messiah will come from the family of King David. Doesn't this mean that he will be born in David's hometown of Bethlehem?”
translation_verse: Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a tálɛ kĩ Kristo aato Lɛgã Dawid kasinu a kamɛ, ade baama ye nɛ Betlehem, ɔmatɔ a kĩ Dawid dzi a kamɛ?”

english_verse: The people started taking sides against each other because of Jesus.
translation_verse: Foesũ kasɛ̃ wo nɛ bati kɔdabu a kamɛ nɛ Yesu sũ.

english_verse: Some of them wanted to arrest him, but no one laid a hand on him. The Leaders Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus
translation_verse: Badi wɛ kĩ bapi ye, lɛmɛ odima tákɔa awɛ ɛta ye. Yudafɔ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a Tátɛ Yesu Bido.

english_verse: When the temple police returned to the chief priests and Pharisees, they were asked, “Why didn't you bring Jesus here?”
translation_verse: Kĩ Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a muniki bɛya nɛ Yudafɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Farisifɔ a sɛkɛ̃ a, bivia be kĩ, “Nde sũ mitápi ye miyamɛna?”

english_verse: They answered, “No one has ever spoken like this man!”
translation_verse: Asɔli Kɔla akũ badãmɛnanɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odima tálɛ tɔ̃ kɔdzɛla ndɛ ayekĩ oti kĩĩ alɛ a!”

english_verse: The Pharisees said to them, “Have you also been fooled?
translation_verse: Ade Farisifɔ a via be kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ ɛnakɛ mi malo?

english_verse: Not one of the chief priests or the Pharisees has faith in him.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ĩye Farisini ɔdabe lɛtɛ ye edo kĩ minyina?

english_verse: And these people who don't know the Law are under God's curse anyway.”
translation_verse: Ade bati kɔdabu kĩĩ, kĩ binyína Mose mbla a sũ ni, Baguma dumu be!”

english_verse: Nicodemus was there at the time. He was a member of the council, and was the same one who had earlier come to see Jesus. He said,
translation_verse: Nikodemo kĩ ɛnyɛ Farisifɔ a kamɛ ɔmɔa, kĩ ɛnaa Yesu sɛkɛ̃ tɔ̃ a na nɛ awã. Edo onukpɛ̃ ebi be kĩ,

english_verse: “Our Law doesn't let us condemn people before we hear what they have to say. We cannot judge them before we know what they have done.”
translation_verse: “Boe mbla tákpa boe osi kĩ bɔakɔ oti kɔtɔ, mbɔɛntɛ bɔdzɛmɔ ye butse ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa bunyi lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a.”

english_verse: Then they said, “Nicodemus, you must be from Galilee! Read the Scriptures, and you will find that no prophet is to come from Galilee.” A Woman Caught in Sin
translation_verse: Bibi ye kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ Galilea nɔ malo oto? Tsã Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kadã, lɔkɔa aamɔ kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ odima láto Galilea.”

english_verse: but Jesus walked out to the Mount of Olives.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu de ɛnaa Kugua Futse Ɔtɔ a akũ.

english_verse: Then early the next morning he went to the temple. The people came to him, and he sat down and started teaching them.
translation_verse: Kĩ kade nyina ɔnɔnɛ tutuutu a, Yesu muniki ɛya nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ. Bati pii yakpɔta nɛ ye akũ, ade ɛkɛna akũ edzi eyi be fɔtsa katsa kayɔ a.

english_verse: The Pharisees and the teachers of the Law of Moses brought in a woman who had been caught in bed with a man who wasn't her husband. They made her stand in the middle of the crowd.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ mbla batsanɛ mɔ Farisifɔ a kpã otsole odi nɛ adɔpaa kabɔa kamɛ bɛyadzɛla nɛ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: Then they said, “Teacher, this woman was caught sleeping with a man who isn't her husband.
translation_verse: Ade bibi Yesu kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, bipi otsole kĩĩ kĩ onyole bɛbã awa mɔ ye.

english_verse: The Law of Moses teaches that a woman like this should be stoned to death! What do you say?”
translation_verse: Nɛ boe mbla a kamɛ ni, Mose kpa otumi kĩ bɛtalɛ otsole kĩĩ odu boe bɛkɔ. Litsa nɔ kɔ̃ alɛ nɛ foe akũ?”

english_verse: They asked Jesus this question, because they wanted to test him and bring some charge against him. But Jesus simply bent over and started writing on the ground with his finger.
translation_verse: Bivia fukĩĩ kĩ bakɔa banaĩ ye, ayekĩ baana kalɛ kadi bɛkɔa bitsua ye onukpɛ̃. Lɛmɛ Yesu kɛna akũ ɛkɔa lawobi ɛtsɛlɛ fɔtsa nɛ tite.

english_verse: They kept on asking Jesus about the woman. Finally, he stood up and said, “If any of you have never sinned, then go ahead and throw the first stone at her!”
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛdza bɛkavia ye fɔlɛtsa a, ɛdzɛla akũ ade ebi be kĩ, “Mi kamɛ owula a kĩ ɛtákɛna tɔkpa tidima tɔ̃ ni, ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛta de ɛbɔa otsole a.”

english_verse: Once again he bent over and began writing on the ground.
translation_verse: Ade ke ebuki ɛkɛna akũ ɛtsɛlɛ fɔtsa nɛ tite a.

english_verse: The people left one by one, beginning with the oldest. Finally, Jesus and the woman were there alone.
translation_verse: Kĩ binu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, be flee bɛdzakũ ɔmɔa ɔmɔa, kito banɔkɔɛ̃ a akũ kɛnawo kĩ kite Yesu mɔ otsole a odi nɛ awã.

english_verse: Jesus stood up and asked her, “Where is everyone? Isn't there anyone left to accuse you?”
translation_verse: Yesu dzɛla akũ evia otsole a kĩ, “Boe ɔma, nde bati a? Be kamɛ odima táte kĩ yakɔ nɔ kɔtɔ?”

english_verse: “No sir,” the woman answered. Then Jesus told her, “I am not going to accuse you either. You may go now, but don't sin anymore.” Jesus Is the Light for the World
translation_verse: Otsole a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, oowo.” Ade ke Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Kekɔ̃ yĩ malo ntákɔ nɔ kɔtɔ. Dzakũ kanaa, lɛmɛ tabuki ɔkɛna tɔkpa.” Yesu Nyɛ́ Katinya Kamɛ Ɔhaĩ.

english_verse: Once again Jesus spoke to the people. This time he said, “I am the light for the world! Follow me, and you won't be walking in the dark. You will have the light that gives life.”
translation_verse: Yesu buki ebi bati a kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ katinya kamɛ ɔhaĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ etomɔ yĩ ni, yaana nkpã ɔhaĩ a, ade ɛláatsã nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ da a.”

english_verse: The Pharisees objected, “You are the only one speaking for yourself, and what you say isn't true!”
translation_verse: Farisifɔ a bi ye kĩ, “Adi adansiɛ nɛ nɔ mɔawɛ akũ, foesũ nɔ adansiɛ a tákpɔla.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Even if I do speak for myself, what I say is true! I know where I came from and where I am going. But you don't know where I am from or where I am going.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ madi adansiɛ nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ malo ni, lɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a kpɔla, kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina awã kĩ nto mɔ awã kĩ manaa a. Mi linyína awã kĩ nto ĩye awã kĩ manaa a.

english_verse: You judge in the same way that everyone else does, but I don't judge anyone.
translation_verse: Miadzɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ batidziwa kamɔ onukpɛ̃, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ maádzɛmɔ odima.

english_verse: If I did judge, I would judge fairly, because I would not be doing it alone. The Father who sent me is here with me.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ maadzɛ mɔ bati ni, yĩ kadzɛ a aakpɔla, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ yĩ odi adzɛ kalɛ, mbom bɔmɔ Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a adzɛ fɔlɛtsa.

english_verse: Your Law requires two witnesses to prove that something is true.
translation_verse: Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ mi mbla a kamɛ kĩ ntɛ adansifɔ nviã onukpɛ̃ kɛna ɔmɔa ni, lɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ a kpɔla.

english_verse: I am one of my witnesses, and the Father who sent me is the other one.
translation_verse: Madi adansiɛ kakpa yĩ akũ, ade Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a lɛmɛ adi yĩ akũ adansiɛ a.”

english_verse: “Where is your Father?” they asked. “You don't know me or my Father!” Jesus answered. “If you knew me, you would know my Father.”
translation_verse: Bati a via Yesu kĩ, “Ndia aga deĩ?” Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Minyína yĩ, ĩye Nda. Ntɛ kanyina minyina yĩ ni, kufɛ míanyi Nda lɛmɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus said this while he was still teaching in the place where the temple treasures were stored. But no one arrested him, because his time had not yet come. You Cannot Go Where I Am Going
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ tɔgɔlɛ katekɔ̃ a, kĩ ɛkatsa fɔtsa nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, lɛmɛ odima tápi ye, kitonɛkĩ ye lɔkɔ táwo tɔ̃ ɔtɔ. Yesu Bi Yudafɔ Banɔkɔɛ̃ a Kĩ Bɛláapuli Bɛnaa Awã Kĩ Yanaa a.

english_verse: Jesus also told them, “I am going away, and you will look for me. But you cannot go where I am going, and you will die with your sins unforgiven.”
translation_verse: Yesu buki ebi be kĩ, “Maadzakũ, ade míawɛ yĩ, lɛmɛ míaku nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ. Miláapuli minaa awã kĩ manaa a.”

english_verse: The people asked, “Does he intend to kill himself? Is that what he means by saying we cannot go where he is going?”
translation_verse: Ade ke Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a via kĩ, “Ye akũ yanaakɔ sũ mɔ ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Miláapuli miya nɛ awã kĩ manaa a’?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You are from below, but I am from above. You belong to this world, but I don't.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Tite kĩĩ akũ mito, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ode nto ĩya. Katinya kĩĩ kamɛ bati mianɛ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ oti manɛ.

english_verse: This is why I said you will die with your sins unforgiven. If you don't have faith in me for who I am, you will die, and your sins will not be forgiven.”
translation_verse: Ade foesũ mbi mi kĩ míaku nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ a. Míaku nɛ mi tɔkpa kamɛ ntɛ mitátɛ mido kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ye manɛ a.”

english_verse: “Who are you?” they asked Jesus. Jesus answered, “I am exactly who I told you at the beginning.
translation_verse: Bɛdani bivia ye kĩ, “Owei anɛ?” Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Lɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi kito anɛ kayɔkayi a, ade foe mɔapɛ a.

english_verse: There is a lot more I could say to condemn you. But the one who sent me is truthful, and I tell the people of this world only what I have heard from him.”
translation_verse: Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kĩ maalɛ nɛ mi akũ nkɔa nkɔ mi kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a adi ɔnɔkɔali, ade lɛtsa a kĩ nnu ntomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ a odi mabi katinya kamɛ bati a.”

english_verse: No one understood that Jesus was talking to them about the Father.
translation_verse: Bati a tánu foe kayɔ kĩ Ɔlɛga akũ fɔlɛtsa Yesu kabi be.

english_verse: Jesus went on to say, “When you have lifted up the Son of Man, you will know who I am. You will also know that I don't do anything on my own. I say only what my Father taught me.
translation_verse: Foesũ ebi be kĩ, “Ntɛ midɛla Otidziwa Obi a nɛ ode a fɔmɔ míanyi kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ye manɛ a. Ade ke míanyi kĩ maákɛna lɛtsama nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ, mbom lɛtsa a kĩ Nda tsa yĩ kĩ nlɛ a odi malɛ.

english_verse: The one who sent me is with me. I always do what pleases him, and he will never leave me.”
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ edo yĩ a deĩ nɛ yĩ ɔwɛ̃. Ɛtáfɔnɛ yĩ odi eyi, kitonɛkĩ makɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lawo ye anɛ a daa.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, many of the people put their faith in him. The Truth Will Set You Free
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, bati pii tɛ ye bido. Bati a Kĩ Bɛnyɛ Abraham Babi.

english_verse: Jesus told the people who had faith in him, “If you keep on obeying what I have said, you truly are my disciples.
translation_verse: Yesu bi Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a kĩ, “Ntɛ mitɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a midomɔ akũ ni, kekɔ̃ yĩ fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ wĩ mianɛ.

english_verse: You will know the truth, and the truth will set you free.”
translation_verse: Míanyi ɔnɔkɔali a, ade ɔnɔkɔali a aakpa mi akũ akũ kadzi a.”

english_verse: They answered, “We are Abraham's children! We have never been anyone's slaves. How can you say we will be set free?”
translation_verse: Bati a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Abraham babi mɔ bawa bɔanɛ, ade bɔtánya tɔ̃ odima basate a. Nde sũ alɛ kĩ, ‘Míana akũ akũ kadzi’?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: I tell you for certain that anyone who sins is a slave of sin!
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mabi mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔsate.

english_verse: And slaves don't stay in the family forever, though the Son will always remain in the family.
translation_verse: Ɔsate lánya kɔla obi daa, lɛmɛ obinyole kɔ̃ nyɛ kɔla obi daa.

english_verse: If the Son gives you freedom, you are free!
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ Obi a kpa mi akũ akũ kadzi ni, lɔkɔa mina akũ akũ kadzi wĩ.

english_verse: I know that you are from Abraham's family. Yet you want to kill me, because my message isn't really in your hearts.
translation_verse: Ĩnyina kĩ Abraham babi mɔ bawa mianɛ, lɛmɛ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a táwo nɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: I am telling you what my Father has shown me, just as you are doing what your father has taught you. Your Father Is the Devil
translation_verse: Fɔtsa a kĩ mmɔ́ nɛ Nda sɛkɛ̃ a, ade foe akũ malɛ kɔdzɛla a, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ miakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ mi ɔlɛga bi mi a.”

english_verse: The people said to Jesus, “Abraham is our father!” Jesus replied, “If you were Abraham's children, you would do what Abraham did.
translation_verse: Bibi ye kĩ, “Boe ɔlɛga nyɛ Abraham.” Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ Abraham babi mɔ bawa paa mianɛ ni, kufɛ míakɛna fɔtsa ndɛ ayekĩ ɛkɛna a.

english_verse: Instead, you want to kill me for telling you the truth that God gave me. Abraham never did anything like that.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ yĩ oti a kĩ mbi mi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ntɛ ntomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a. Abraham tákɛna fukĩĩ odu.

english_verse: But you are doing exactly what your father does.” “Don't accuse us of having someone else as our father!” they said. “We just have one father, and he is God.”
translation_verse: Mi miakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ mi ɔlɛga a kɛna a.” Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔlɛga mɔapɛ budeĩ, ade ye nyɛ Baguma a. Bɔnyɛ́ adɔpaa kamɛ babi.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: If God were your Father, you would love me, because I came from God and now I am here. He sent me. I did not come on my own.
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Ntɛ Baguma liti ɛnyɛ mi Ɔlɛga ni, kufɛ míawɛ yĩ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ nto ĩya. Ntáya nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ akũ, mbom Baguma lido yĩ.

english_verse: Why can't you understand what I am talking about? Can't you stand to hear what I am saying?
translation_verse: Nde sũ miánu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a kayɔ? Kitonɛkĩ miáwɛ kĩ miatse yĩ fɔlɛtsa a.

english_verse: Your father is the devil, and you do exactly what he wants. He has always been a murderer and a liar. There is nothing truthful about him. He speaks on his own, and everything he says is a lie. Not only is he a liar himself, but he is also the father of all lies.
translation_verse: Mi ɔlɛga Abonsam bade mianɛ, ade miawɛ kĩ miakɛna nɛ mi ɔlɛga a fɔwɛtsa akũ a. Owudini yanɛ kito anɛ kayɔkayi, ade yaátomɔ ɔnɔkɔali liti a, kitonɛkĩ ɔnɔkɔali lɛláa ye kamɛ da. Ntɛ ɛma fɔvã ni, ye kutitse ɛnyɛ yatsa, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ ɔvãlɛvã mɔ fɔvã ɔlɛga.

english_verse: Everything I have told you is true, and you still refuse to have faith in me.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔali a mabi mi, ade foesũ miátɛ yĩ mido a.

english_verse: Can any of you accuse me of sin? If you cannot, why won't you have faith in me? After all, I am telling you the truth.
translation_verse: Mi kamɛ owei aapuli ɛkɔ yĩ kɔtɔ kĩ nkɛna tɔkpa? Ntɛ nlɛ ɔnɔkɔali a ni, nde sũ mitátɛ yĩ mido?

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to God will listen to his message. But you refuse to listen, because you don't belong to God. Jesus and Abraham
translation_verse: Oti kĩ eto Baguma kamɛ a, atse Baguma fɔlɛtsa. Lɛmɛ ayekĩ mitáto Baguma kamɛ sũ ni, miátɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa.” Yesu Mɔ Abraham.

english_verse: The people told Jesus, “We were right to say that you are a Samaritan and that you have a demon in you!”
translation_verse: Yudafɔ a via Yesu kĩ, “Ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ Samariani anɛ, ade hũhũ kpa lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a ni, bɔtálɛ ɔnɔkɔali?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I don't have a demon in me. I honor my Father, and you refuse to honor me.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa adima lɛláa yĩ kamɛ. Makpa Nda obu lɛmɛ mi miasupa yĩ.

english_verse: years old!” they said. “How could you have seen Abraham?”
translation_verse: Maáwɛ kĩ mado yĩ akũ obu, lɛmɛ odi deĩ kĩ yawɛ foe ade ye adzɛ kakpa yĩ a.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you obey my words, you will never die.”
translation_verse: Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a akũ a, lɛláaku da.”

english_verse: Then the people said, “Now we are sure that you have a demon. Abraham is dead, and so are the prophets. How can you say that no one who obeys your words will ever die?
translation_verse: Yudafɔ a bi ye kĩ, “Ade owi bɔmɔ́ pefee kĩ hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ nɔ kamɛ a! Abraham ku, Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a lɛmɛ ku. Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ alɛ kĩ, ‘Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ yĩ fɔtsa katsa a akũ a, lɛláaku da.’

english_verse: Are you greater than our father Abraham? He died, and so did the prophets. Who do you think you are?”
translation_verse: Mbɔɛɛ nɔ bɛ̃ boe ɔwanyɔ Abraham kĩ eku a? Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a lɛmɛ ku. Owei abu kĩ ye anɛ?”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “If I honored myself, it would mean nothing. My Father is the one who honors me. You claim that he is your God,
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ mado yĩ mɔawɛ akũ obu ni, yĩ obu a lɛláana nfasɔ. Oti a kĩ ye ado yĩ obu a nyɛ Nda, oti kĩ mialɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ mi Baguma a.

english_verse: even though you don't really know him. If I said I didn't know him, I would be a liar, just like all of you. But I know him, and I do what he says.
translation_verse: Minyína Nda a, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ĩnyina ye. Ntɛ nlɛ kĩ ĩnyína ye ni, maakɛna ɔvãlɛvã ndɛ mi aye. Lɛmɛ nti ĩnyina ye ade makɛna nɛ ye kalɛ a akũ a.

english_verse: Your father Abraham was really glad to see me.”
translation_verse: Mi ɔwanyɔ Abraham mɔ́ kawɔlɛ kĩ yaamɔ yĩ kaya. Ɛmɔ́ ke lɛmɛ ade kawɔlɛ de ye a.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “I tell you for certain that even before Abraham was, I was, and I am.”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, yĩ ndeĩ fɔmɔ bɛma Abraham.”

english_verse: The people picked up stones to kill Jesus, but he hid and left the temple.
translation_verse: Ade ke bati a fila boe kĩ bata bɛbɔa ye a, lɛmɛ Yesu bɛla, ade ɛnɛ́ nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kamɛ a.

english_verse: As Jesus walked along, he saw a man who had been blind since birth.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu anaa a, ɛmɔ́ onyole odi kĩ bɛma ye ɔnɛkunɛ.

english_verse: Jesus' disciples asked, “Teacher, why was this man born blind? Was it because he or his parents sinned?”
translation_verse: Ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a via ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, owei tɔkpa sũ bɛma onyole kĩĩ ɔnɛkunɛ? Ye mɔawɛ tɔkpa mbɔɛɛ ye bamanɛ tɔkpa sũ?”

english_verse: “No, it wasn't!” Jesus answered. “But because of his blindness, you will see God work a miracle for him.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ onyole kĩĩ ĩye ye bamanɛ lɛkɛna tɔkpa, mbom bɛma ye ɔnɛkunɛ, ayekĩ baanyɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ adzuma bɛtsãmɛna ye akũ.

english_verse: As long as it is day, we must do what the one who sent me wants me to do. When night comes, no one can work.
translation_verse: Ntɛ budeĩ nɛ kade kanyina kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔakɛna adzuma bɔkpa oti a kĩ edo yĩ a. Kade aya kadɔkɔ̃ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna adzuma.

english_verse: While I am in the world, I am the light for the world.”
translation_verse: Kĩ ndeĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ kĩĩ ni, yĩ nyɛ katinya kamɛ ɔhaĩ a.”

english_verse: After Jesus said this, he spit on the ground. He made some mud and smeared it on the man's eyes.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, etua tanɛ eyi nɛ tite, ɛfɔnɛ te ɛkɔa ɛtsɛla onyole a nɛ banebi.

english_verse: Then he said, “Go wash off the mud in Siloam Pool.” The man went and washed in Siloam, which means “One Who Is Sent.” When he had washed off the mud, he could see.
translation_verse: Ade ebi ye kĩ, “Naavɔlɛ anɛ nɛ Siloam Lutubu a kamɛ.” Dĩ Siloam kayɔ nyɛ, bido ye. Ade onyole a navɔlɛ anɛ, ade ɛmɔ́ fɔkɔ kĩ emuniki yaya a.

english_verse: The man's neighbors and the people who had seen him begging wondered if he really could be the same man.
translation_verse: Ye badzikɔba mɔ bikĩ bɛkamɔ ye kĩ ɛkawã fɔtsa a via kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ oti kĩĩ adzi kawã fɔtsa a?”

english_verse: Some of them said he was the same beggar, while others said he only looked like him. But he told them, “I am that man.”
translation_verse: Badi lɛ kĩ, “Ade ye a.” Lɛmɛ babɛbã lɛ kĩ, “Oowo, nnɛ́ ye yanɛ, kanɛ ɛnɛ́ ye.” Nɛ foesũ oti a mɔawɛ lɛ kĩ, “Ye manɛ.”

english_verse: “Then how can you see?” they asked.
translation_verse: Bivia ye kĩ, “Nde fɔya mɔ finyaa kɔ̃ mɔ amɔ fɔkɔ?”

english_verse: He answered, “Someone named Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. He told me to go and wash it off in Siloam Pool. When I did, I could see.”
translation_verse: Ɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Onyole a kĩ bavɛ Yesu lɛfɔnɛ tite ekputa yĩ banebi ade ebi yĩ kĩ naavɔlɛ anɛ nɛ Siloam Lutubu a kamɛ. Foesũ nnaa adeke, kĩ nsila nvɔlɛ anɛ pɛ, mpuli mmɔ́ fɔkɔ.”

english_verse: “Where is he now?” they asked. “I don't know,” he answered. The Pharisees Try To Find Out What Happened
translation_verse: Bivia ye kĩ, “Nɛ ndia edeĩ?” Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ĩnyína.” Farisifɔ Via Oti a Kĩ Ye Anɛ Bibinya a Fɔlɛtsa.

english_verse: The day when Jesus made the mud and healed the man was a Sabbath. So the people took the man to the Pharisees.
translation_verse: Luwi a kĩ de akũ Yesu fɔnɛ tite ɛkɔa ebinya ye anɛ a nyɛ Kawɛya Luwi.

english_verse: They asked him how he was able to see, and he answered, “Jesus made some mud and smeared it on my eyes. Then after I washed it off, I could see.”
translation_verse: Foesũ Farisifɔ a lɛmɛ via ye ayekĩ fɔkɛna fɔmɔ bibinya ye anɛ. Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɛkɔa tite fɔnɛwa ekputa yĩ banebi. Ɛfɔ̃ nnavɔlɛ anɛ, ade finyaakĩĩ mpuli mamɔ fɔkɔ a.”

english_verse: Some of the Pharisees said, “This man Jesus doesn't come from God. If he did, he would not break the law of the Sabbath.” Others asked, “How could someone who is a sinner work such a miracle?” Since the Pharisees could not agree among themselves,
translation_verse: Farisifɔ a badi lɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛkɛna fukĩĩ táto Baguma sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ yaákɛna nɛ Kawɛya Luwi mbla a akũ.” Ade babɛbã lɛmɛ via kĩ, “Nde fɔ́aya kĩ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ aapuli ɛkɛna nsɛntsɛlɛni kĩĩ odu?” Nɛ foesũ kasɛ̃ wo nɛ be kamɛ.

english_verse: they asked the man, “What do you say about this one who healed your eyes?” “He is a prophet!” the man told them.
translation_verse: Farisifɔ a buki bivia onyole a kĩ, “Kĩ ɔlɛ kĩ ye libinya nɔ anɛ a ni, nɔ malo litsa odeĩ kĩ alɛ nɛ ye akũ?” Onyole a kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Baguma onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ yanɛ.”

english_verse: But the Jewish leaders would not believe that the man had once been blind. They sent for his parents
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yudafɔ a táwɛ kĩ batɛ bido kĩ onyole a nya tɔ̃ ɔnɛkunɛ fɔmɔ ye anɛ binya, kɛnawo kĩ bɛvɛ ye bamanɛ bɛyamɛna.

english_verse: and asked them, “Is this the son that you said was born blind? How can he now see?”
translation_verse: Ade bivia be kĩ, “Mi obi a kĩ milɛ kĩ mima ye ɔnɛkunɛ a nɛ awĩ a? Nde fɔya mɔ finyaa kɔ̃ yamɔ fɔkɔ?”

english_verse: The man's parents answered, “We are certain that he is our son, and we know that he was born blind.
translation_verse: Ye bamanɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bunyina kĩ boe obi yanɛ, ade bunyina kĩ bɔma ye ɔnɛkunɛ a.

english_verse: But we don't know how he got his sight or who gave it to him. Ask him! He is old enough to speak for himself.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ayekĩ fɔkɛna fɔmɔ yamɔ fɔkɔ a ni, bunyína foe kɔ̃, ade bunyína oti a kĩ ye libinya ye anɛ a lɛmɛ a. Mivia ye mɔawɛ a, ebo anɛ, yaapuli ɛnyɛ ye akũ onukpɛ̃.”

english_verse: The leaders called the man back and said, “Swear by God to tell the truth! We know that Jesus is a sinner.”
translation_verse: Banɔkɔɛ̃ a vɛ onyole a kĩ bɛma ɔnɛkunɛ a lɛyade ade bibi ye kĩ, “Lɛ ɔnɔkɔali a nɛ Baguma anɛ! Bunyina kĩ onyole a kĩ ɛtsa nɔ a nyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ.”

english_verse: The man replied, “I don't know if he is a sinner or not. All I know is that I used to be blind, but now I can see!”
translation_verse: Onyole a lɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ o-o, ĩye ɛnyɛ́ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ o-o, ĩnyína. Lɛtsa mɔapɛ kĩ ĩnyina nyɛ kĩ ĩnya tɔ̃ ɔnɛkunɛ, lɛmɛ finyaa mamɔ fɔkɔ.”

english_verse: “What did he do to you?” they asked. “How did he heal your eyes?”
translation_verse: Banɔkɔɛ̃ a via ye kĩ, “Litsa ɛkɛna nɔ? Nde ɛkɛna ebinya nɔ anɛ?”

english_verse: The man answered, “I have already told you once, and you refused to listen. Why do you want me to tell you again? Do you also want to become his disciples?”
translation_verse: Ɛkpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mbi mi foe kɔkɔɛ lɛmɛ miáwɛ kĩ miatse foe. Nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miabuki mitse foe? Mbɔɛɛ mi malo miawɛ kĩ minya ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ?”

english_verse: The leaders insulted the man and said, “You are his follower! We are followers of Moses.
translation_verse: Bivũna ye bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nɔ odi nyɛ ye fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ, lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ Mose fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ bɔanɛ.

english_verse: We are sure God spoke to Moses, but we don't even know where Jesus comes from.”
translation_verse: Bunyina kĩ Baguma bi Mose fɔlɛtsa, lɛmɛ oti a naa kɔ̃ bunyína awã kĩ eto malo!”

english_verse: “How strange!” the man replied. “He healed my eyes, and yet you don't know where he comes from.
translation_verse: Ade onyole a bi be kĩ, “Litsa awãwã fɔlɛtsa a? Minyína awã kĩ eto, lɛmɛ ade ye libinya yĩ anɛ a!

english_verse: We know that God listens only to people who love and obey him. God doesn't listen to sinners.
translation_verse: Bunyina kĩ Baguma látse tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ, lɛmɛ yatse bati a kĩ bakpa ye obu, kakɛna nɛ ye yawɛ akũ a.

english_verse: And this is the first time in history anyone has ever given sight to someone born blind.
translation_verse: Kito anɛ katinya kayɔkayi a, bɔtánu tɔ̃ kĩ odi puli ebinya oti kĩ bɛma ɔnɛkunɛ anɛ.

english_verse: Jesus could not do anything unless he came from God.”
translation_verse: Ntɛ ɛtato Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ni, kufɛ ɛláapuli ɛkɛna lɛtsama.”

english_verse: The leaders told the man, “You have been a sinner since the day you were born! Do you think you can teach us anything?” Then they said, “You can never come back into any of our synagogues!”
translation_verse: Banɔkɔɛ̃ a via ye kĩ, “Katsa atsa kĩ nɔ a kĩ bɛma bɛdɔɔla nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ a, nɔ mbom awɛ kĩ atsa boe fɔtsa?” Ade bɛblɔmɛna ye nɛ Yudafɔ katsɛnakɔ̃ a. Yesu Tsá Bati a Kĩ Biku Anɛ Nɛ Hũhũ Kamɛ.

english_verse: When Jesus heard what had happened, he went and found the man. Then Jesus asked, “Do you have faith in the Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Yesu nu kĩ bɛblɔmɛna onyole a nɛ be kamɛ, foesũ kĩ ɛmɔ́ onyole a, evia ye kĩ, “Ɔtɛ Otidziwa Obi a odo?”

english_verse: He replied, “Sir, if you will tell me who he is, I will put my faith in him.”
translation_verse: Onyole a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, bi yĩ oti a kĩ yanɛ, ayekĩ maapuli ntɛ ye ndo!”

english_verse: “You have already seen him,” Jesus answered, “and right now he is talking with you.”
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ɔmɔ́ ye kɔkɔɛ, ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ ɛlamɛna kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ nɔ finyaakĩĩ a.”

english_verse: The man said, “Lord, I put my faith in you!” Then he worshiped Jesus.
translation_verse: Onyole a lɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ ndo!” Ade ke eke aduli nɛ Yesu anɛ a.

english_verse: Jesus told him, “I came to judge the people of this world. I am here to give sight to the blind and to make blind everyone who can see.”
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Ĩya nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kĩ mayaadzɛmɔ bati, ayekĩ banɛkunɛ aamɔ fɔkɔ, ade bikĩ bamɔ fɔkɔ a aadani banɛkunɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “If you were blind, you would not be guilty. But now that you claim to see, you will keep on being guilty.”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ kaku mi anɛ eku ni, kufɛ bɛláakɔ mi kɔtɔ, lɛmɛ kĩ mialɛ kĩ miamɔ fɔkɔ sũ ni, tɔkpa deĩ nɛ mi akũ.”

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain only thieves and robbers climb over the fence instead of going in through the gate to the sheep pen.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ, oti kĩ ɛtátsã onyukpɛ̃ a ewo nɛ baveli kɔbã kamɛ, mbom ede ɛtsã kɔbã a akũ ewo ni, ɛnyɛ oyekpanɛ mɔ ɔblɔfɔ.

english_verse: But the gatekeeper opens the gate for the shepherd, and he goes in through it. The sheep know their shepherd's voice. He calls each of them by name and leads them out.
translation_verse: Ade ye mɔ kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ ɔdzɔlɛnɛ a abinya kakpa ye, ade baveli a anu ye odo a. Yavɛ ye bade a buĩ a kĩ ete be a, kakpã be kanɛmɛna kanya.

english_verse: When he has led out all of his sheep, he walks in front of them, and they follow, because they know his voice.
translation_verse: Ntɛ ɛkpã be ɛnɛmɛna a, yanya be lɔtɔ, ade baveli a atomɔ ye, kitonɛkĩ binyina ye odo.

english_verse: The sheep will not follow strangers. They don't recognize a stranger's voice, and they run away.
translation_verse: Bɛláatomɔ oti bɛbã, mbom baalo nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ binyína ye odo.”

english_verse: Jesus told the people this story. But they did not understand what he was talking about. Jesus Is the Good Shepherd
translation_verse: Yesu bɔa be lɛgbã kĩĩ, lɛmɛ bɛtánu lɛtsa a kĩ yatsa a kayɔ. Yesu Nyɛ́ Baveli Ɔkpãnɛ Wĩ a.

english_verse: Jesus said: I tell you for certain that I am the gate for the sheep.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mabi mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ yĩ nyɛ baveli a kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Everyone who came before me was a thief or a robber, and the sheep did not listen to any of them.
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã a kĩ bɛnya yĩ lɔtɔ bɛya flee a nyɛ bayekpanɛ mɔ bablɔfɔ, foesũ baveli a tátse be fɔlɛtsa.

english_verse: I am the gate. All who come in through me will be saved. Through me they will come and go and find pasture.
translation_verse: Yĩ nyɛ kɔbã onyukpɛ̃ a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtsã yĩ akũ ewo ni, yaana katɛ. Yaawo ɛnɛ, ade yaana funitsã kanyakɔ̃ a.

english_verse: A thief comes only to rob, kill, and destroy. I came so everyone would have life, and have it fully.
translation_verse: Oyekpanɛ aya kĩ yayaaye, edi awu, ebula fɔtsa kade. Yĩ kɔ̃ ĩya ayekĩ bati aana nkpã kĩ ɛkpɔla nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ.

english_verse: I am the good shepherd, and the good shepherd gives up his life for his sheep.
translation_verse: “Yĩ nyɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ wĩ a, baveli ɔkpãnɛ wĩ a akɔa ye nkpã kakpa nɛ baveli a lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Hired workers are not like the shepherd. They don't own the sheep, and when they see a wolf coming, they run off and leave the sheep. Then the wolf attacks and scatters the flock.
translation_verse: Ntɛ ɔpaani kĩ ɛnyɛ́ baveli ɔkpãnɛ, ade ɛnyɛ́ baveli a ɔlate lɛmɛ mɔ́ kalikii kaya ni, yalo kafɔnɛ baveli a. Foesũ kalikii a apili baveli a kapansam be.

english_verse: Hired workers run away because they don't care about the sheep.
translation_verse: Ɔpaani a alo kadzakũ kitonɛkĩ kabɔɛ bɛbɔɛ ye kĩ ɛkɛna adzuma a, ade ɛtsɛ́la baveli a lɛtsama akũ a.

english_verse: Just as the Father knows me, I know the Father, and I give up my life for my sheep.
translation_verse: “Yĩ nyɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ wĩ a. Ndɛ ayekĩ Nda nyina yĩ, yĩ malo ĩnyina Nda a ni, ade aye ĩnyina yĩ mɔawɛ baveli ade be malo binyina yĩ a. Nkɔa yĩ nkpã nkpa nɛ be lɔlɔ.

english_verse: I have other sheep that are not in this sheep pen. I must also bring them together, when they hear my voice. Then there will be one flock of sheep and one shepherd.
translation_verse: Ndeĩ baveli bɛbã kĩ bɛláa baveli kɔbã kĩĩ kamɛ. Kɛnɛ kĩ nkpã be malo ĩyamɛna, bitse yĩ odo lɔkɔa be flee baanya baveli katsu mɔa, bɛna nɛ baveli ɔkpãnɛ mɔa kayɔ.

english_verse: The Father loves me, because I give up my life, so I may receive it back again.
translation_verse: “Nda awɛ yĩ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ nkɔa yĩ nkpã nkpa, kĩ maabuki ntɛ ye.

english_verse: No one takes my life from me. I give it up willingly! I have the power to give it up and the power to receive it back again, just as my Father commanded me to do.
translation_verse: Odima lɛláatɛ ye nɛ yĩ awɛ, mbom yĩ mɔawɛ lɛkɔa ye nkpa. Ndeĩ osi kĩ makɔa ye nkpa, ade ndeĩ osi kĩ mabuki ntɛ ye a. Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Nda do yĩ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna a.”

english_verse: The people took sides because of what Jesus had told them.
translation_verse: Nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ sũ kasɛ̃ buki kiwo nɛ Yudafɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: Many of them said, “He has a demon in him! He is crazy! Why listen to him?”
translation_verse: Be pii, bɛkalɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ! Ye lɔlɔ kamɛ bu kade! Nde sũ koũ miatse ye?”

english_verse: But others said, “How could anyone with a demon in him say these things? No one like this could give sight to a blind person!” Jesus Is Rejected
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ babɛbã lɛ kĩ, “Oti kĩ hũhũ kpa deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ lɛláapuli ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla lɔmɔ! Nde koũ hũhũ kpa aapuli ebinya banɛkunɛ anɛ?” Yudafɔ a Sĩ Yesu.

english_verse: That winter, Jesus was in Jerusalem for the Temple Festival.
translation_verse: Osili lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ, ade Yudafɔ kanya Baguma Asɔli Kɔla Akũ kakpalɛ Luwi nɛ Yerusalem a.

english_verse: One day he was walking in the part of the temple known as Solomon's Porch,
translation_verse: Yesu kamini nɛ Baguma Asɔli Kɔla a kakɔ a kĩ bavɛ Salomo Ablanda a kamɛ.

english_verse: and the people gathered all around him. They said, “How long are you going to keep us guessing? If you are the Messiah, tell us plainly!”
translation_verse: Ade Yudafɔ a nakpɔta nɛ ye akũ, ade bivia ye kĩ, “Nde sũ ɔfɔ̃ bɔlamɛna anɛ kadã kavia? Ntɛ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a ni, bi boe ɔnɔkɔali a faa.”

english_verse: Jesus answered: I have told you, and you refused to believe me. The things I do by my Father's authority show who I am.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Mbi mi kɔkɔɛ, lɛmɛ miátɛ yĩ mido. Fɔtsa a kĩ makɛna nɛ Nda kɔbɛ̃ akũ a, adi yĩ akũ adansiɛ.

english_verse: But since you are not my sheep, you don't believe me.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ miátɛ kado kitonɛkĩ minyɛ́ yĩ baveli.

english_verse: My sheep know my voice, and I know them. They follow me,
translation_verse: Yĩ baveli atse yĩ ɔlɛdo, ĩnyina be ade batomɔ yĩ a.

english_verse: and I give them eternal life, so that they will never be lost. No one can snatch them out of my hand.
translation_verse: Makpa be nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, ade bɛláaku bɛwɔ da. Odima lɛláapuli ɛwãnɛ be ɛtɛ nɛ yĩ awɛ.

english_verse: My Father gave them to me, and he is greater than all others. No one can snatch them from his hands,
translation_verse: Fɔtsa a kĩ Nda kɔa edo nɛ yĩ awɛ a deĩ kɔbɛ̃ fɔbɛ̃ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade odima lɛláapuli ɛwãnɛ foe ɛtɛ nɛ Nda awɛ a.

english_verse: and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Bɔmɔ́ Nda ni, ɔmɔa bɔanɛ.”

english_verse: Once again the people picked up stones in order to kill Jesus.
translation_verse: Foesũ Yudafɔ a buki bifila boe kĩ batalɛ Yesu.

english_verse: But he said, “I have shown you many good things my Father sent me to do. Which one are you going to stone me for?”
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nkɛna fɔtsa wĩ pii kĩ Nda do yĩ kĩ nkɛna nɛ mi anɛ. Foe kamɛ fɔɔdabe sũ miawɛ kĩ miatalɛ yĩ boe?”

english_verse: They answered, “We are not stoning you because of any good thing you did. We are stoning you because you did a terrible thing. You are just a man, and here you are claiming to be God!”
translation_verse: Bɛkpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ ɔkɛna a sũ bɔawɛ kĩ bɔatalɛ nɔ boe, mbom nɛ mbusuo fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɔlɛ a sũ! Otidziwa kɛkɛ anɛ, lɛmɛ awɛ kĩ akɛna nɔ akũ Baguma!”

english_verse: Jesus replied: In your Scriptures doesn't God say, “You are gods”?
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ mi mbla ovoli a kamɛ kĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ, ‘Minyɛ baguma amɛ.’

english_verse: You can't argue with the Scriptures, and God spoke to those people and called them gods.
translation_verse: Bunyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa lɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali daa. Baguma vɛ bati a kĩ ɛkpa be ye ɔlɛdo a kĩ baguma amɛ.

english_verse: So why do you accuse me of a terrible sin for saying that I am the Son of God? After all, it is the Father who prepared me for this work. He is also the one who sent me into the world.
translation_verse: Yĩ kɔ̃, Ɔlɛga a lɛpau yĩ edo yĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ. Lɔkɔa nde sũ miti mialɛ kĩ nlɛ fubusuotsa nɛ ayekĩ nlɛ kĩ Baguma Obi manɛ a sũ?

english_verse: If I don't do as my Father does, you should not believe me.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ nlámɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Nda do yĩ kĩ nkɛna a kakɛna ni, mitatɛ yĩ mido.

english_verse: But if I do what my Father does, you should believe because of that, even if you don't have faith in me. Then you will know for certain that the Father is one with me, and I am one with the Father.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ makɛna foe, titɔ kĩ miátɛ yĩ kado malo ni, mitɛ fɔtsa a kĩ makɛna a mido, ayekĩ míanyi, minu foe kayɔ yededeede kĩ Ɔlɛga a deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ Ɔlɛga a kamɛ a.”

english_verse: Again they wanted to arrest Jesus. But he escaped
translation_verse: Yudafɔ a buki bɛwɛ kĩ bapi Yesu, lɛmɛ ɛnɛ́ nɛ be kamɛ ɛdzakũ.

english_verse: and crossed the Jordan to the place where John had earlier been baptizing. While Jesus was there,
translation_verse: Ade Yesu muniki enyina Yordan Ɔwɔ a ɛnaa awã kĩ Yohanes wɔla bati mui tɔ̃ a, ɛnadzi nɛ awã.

english_verse: many people came to him. They were saying, “John didn't work any miracles, but everything he said about Jesus is true.”
translation_verse: Bati pii ya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃, ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Yohanes tákɛna awãwã fɔtsa fudima, lɛmɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ nɛ oti kĩĩ akũ a flee nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali.”

english_verse: A lot of those people also put their faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Bati pii nɛ awã tɛ ye bido.

english_verse: The sisters sent a message to the Lord and told him that his good friend Lazarus was sick.
translation_verse: Bawaɛ̃tsole a do lɔtɔ nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɔ ɔkɔba a kĩ aátunɔ ye kalɛ a asɔ.”

english_verse: When Jesus heard this, he said, “His sickness won't end in death. It will bring glory to God and his Son.”
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu nu fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ a, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Fɔsɔ kĩĩ lɛnyɛ wuda fɔsɔ, mbom fɔnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ baatsã foe akũ bɛdɛla Baguma dĩ nɛ ode, ade baadɛla Baguma Obi a lɛmɛ dĩ nɛ ode a.”

english_verse: But he stayed where he was for two more days.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kĩ Yesu nu Lazaro fɔsɔ a, ebuki ɛkahɔ nɛ awã kĩ edeĩ a fuwi nviã.

english_verse: Then he said to his disciples, “Now we will go back to Judea.”
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ebi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ bumuniki bɔnaa Yudea.”

english_verse: “Teacher,” they said, “the people there want to stone you to death! Why do you want to go back?”
translation_verse: Ade ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ, wádzɔ nɛ awĩ mɔ Yudafɔ a wɛ kĩ batalɛ nɔ boe, mɔ obuki anaa awã a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “Aren't there twelve hours in each day? If you walk during the day, you will have light from the sun, and you won't stumble.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Nnɛ́ dɔũhuilɛ ewua-nviã deĩ nɛ kade kanyina kamɛ? Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ suwa ni, ɛláatula kitonɛkĩ katinya kamɛ ɔhaĩ a afɔ̃ yamɔ fɔkɔ.

english_verse: But if you walk during the night, you will stumble, because you don't have any light.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi tsɛ̃ nɛ lɛnyɛ ni, yatula kitonɛkĩ ɔhaĩ lɛláa.”

english_verse: Then he told them, “Our friend Lazarus is asleep, and I am going there to wake him up.”
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe ɔkɔba Lazaro wa tida, lɛmɛ maanaadzɛla ye.”

english_verse: They replied, “Lord, if he is asleep, he will get better.”
translation_verse: Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kpa mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ tida ɛwaa kɔ̃ ni, yaasaɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus really meant that Lazarus was dead, but they thought he was talking only about sleep.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu atsa a nyɛ kĩ Lazaro ku, lɛmɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kɔ̃ kɔna kĩ tida pupulidza kawa ɛlɛ.

english_verse: I am glad I wasn't there, because now you will have a chance to put your faith in me. Let's go to him.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɛ mi sũ ni, kawɔlɛ de yĩ kĩ ntána nɛ awã ayekĩ míatɛ mido. Mifɔ̃ bɔnaa ye sɛkɛ̃.”

english_verse: Thomas, whose nickname was “Twin,” said to the other disciples, “Come on. Let's go, so we can die with him.” Jesus Brings Lazarus to Life
translation_verse: Ade Toma kĩ bavɛ Ata a bi ye bakɔba fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Mifɔ̃ boe malo butomɔ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ a bɔnaa, bɔnaaku mɔ ye!” Yesu Nyɛ́ Kayidza Kadzi Nkpã Mɔ Nkpã a.

english_verse: When Jesus got to Bethany, he found that Lazarus had already been in the tomb four days.
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu wo awã a, ɛmɔ́ kĩ fɔtɛ fuwi ɛna kĩ bibila Lazaro.

english_verse: Bethany was less than three kilometers from Jerusalem,
translation_verse: Kito Betania kɛnaa Yerusalem aana ndɛ fusikũ nviã,

english_verse: and many people had come from the city to comfort Martha and Mary because their brother had died.
translation_verse: ade Yudafɔ pii ya kĩ bayaadzam Maria mɔ Marta nɛ be ɔwaɛ̃nyole wuda a sũ.

english_verse: When Martha heard that Jesus had arrived, she went out to meet him, but Mary stayed in the house.
translation_verse: Kĩ Marta nu kĩ Yesu aya a, ɛnɛ́ ɛnaatsɛlamɔ ye, lɛmɛ Maria kɔ̃ kahɔ nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: Martha said to Jesus, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.
translation_verse: Ade Marta bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ kana ɔna nɛ awĩ kufɛ nwaɛ̃nyole táku!

english_verse: Jesus told her, “Your brother will live again!”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awaɛ̃nyole a aabuki eyidza edzi nkpã.”

english_verse: Martha answered, “I know he will be raised to life on the last day, when all the dead are raised.”
translation_verse: Ade Marta bi ye kĩ, “Ĩnyina kĩ yaabuki eyidza edzi nkpã nɛ Luwi Nkaɛ a kĩ banɔkpa aayidza a akũ.”

english_verse: Jesus then said, “I am the one who raises the dead to life! Everyone who has faith in me will live, even if they die.
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ kayidza kadzi nkpã mɔ nkpã a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo, ntɛ eku malo ni, yaayidza edzi nkpã.

english_verse: “Yes, Lord!” she replied. “I believe you are the Christ, the Son of God. You are the one we hoped would come into the world.”
translation_verse: Marta kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Oo, boe Ɔlate! Ntɛ ndo kĩ nɔ nyɛ Kristo a, Baguma Obi a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ yaaya nɛ katinya kamɛ a.” Yesu Be.

english_verse: After Martha said this, she went and privately said to her sister Mary, “The Teacher is here, and he wants to see you.”
translation_verse: Kĩ Marta lɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, emuniki ɛnaa kɔla ɛnavɛ ɔwaɛ̃tsole Maria pɛtɛɛ. Ebi ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ a ya nɛ awĩ, ade evia nɔ akũ a.”

english_verse: As soon as Mary heard this, she got up and went out to Jesus.
translation_verse: Kĩ Maria nu foe pɛ, ɛta eyidza ewula atsɛ ɛnaatsɛlamɔ ye.

english_verse: He was still outside the village where Martha had gone to meet him.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a naa Yesu táwo tɔ̃ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, mbom ebuki ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã kĩ Marta yatsɛlamɔ ye a.

english_verse: Many people had come to comfort Mary, and when they saw her quickly leave the house, they thought she was going out to the tomb to cry. So they followed her.
translation_verse: Kĩ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ bɛkadzam Maria a mɔ́ kĩ ɛta eyidza ɛnɛ a, bitomɔ ye, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔna kĩ yanaa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ ɛnaabe.

english_verse: Mary went to where Jesus was. Then as soon as she saw him, she knelt at his feet and said, “Lord, if you had been here, my brother would not have died.”
translation_verse: Maria yawo awã kĩ Yesu dzɛ̃ a, ade kĩ esila ɛmɔ́ ye pɛ ɛtɔ nɛ Yesu abɔa kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ ɔna nɛ awĩ kufɛ nwaɛ̃nyole a táku.”

english_verse: When Jesus saw that Mary and the people with her were crying, he was terribly upset
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu mɔ́ ayekĩ ɛkabe, mɔ ayekĩ bati a kĩ bitomɔ ye kabe a, fɔkɛna adzuma nɛ ye kamɛ ade ɛwɛya eke hũũ a.

english_verse: and asked, “Where have you put his body?” They replied, “Lord, come and you will see.”
translation_verse: Evia be kĩ, “Nɛ ndia mibila ye?” Bɛkpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, yaadã.”

english_verse: Jesus started crying,
translation_verse: Nɛ awã naa, Yesu be.

english_verse: and the people said, “See how much he loved Lazarus.”
translation_verse: Ade Yudafɔ a lɛ kĩ, “Midã tɔ̃ ayekĩ yawɛ ye kalɛ!”

english_verse: Some of them said, “He gives sight to the blind. Why couldn't he have kept Lazarus from dying?”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ badi lɛ kĩ, “Ebinya ɔnɛkunɛ anɛ. Kapuli ɛláapuli ɛfɔ̃ kĩ onyole kĩĩ ɛtaku?” Yesu Dzɛla Lazaro Etomɛna Kanɔkpa.

english_verse: Jesus was still terribly upset. So he went to the tomb, which was a cave with a stone rolled against the entrance.
translation_verse: Kalɔɛ a buki kɛna nɛ Yesu kamɛ ade ɛnaa linikɛ a ɔwɛ̃ a. Linikɛ a nyɛ de ɔkɛ kĩ bɛkɔa de bisua de onukpɛ̃.

english_verse: Then he told the people to roll the stone away. But Martha said, “Lord, you know that Lazarus has been dead four days, and there will be a bad smell.”
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mibɔɛ de a nɛ lɛkɛ a onukpɛ̃.” Ade Marta, ɔnɔkpa a ɔwaɛ̃tsole, bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, finyaa kɔ̃ edo kakũ awɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade fuwi ɛna kĩ bibila ye a.”

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Didn't I tell you that if you had faith, you would see the glory of God?”
translation_verse: Yesu bi Marta kĩ, “Mbɔɛɛ ntábi nɔ kĩ ntɛ ɔtɛ odo ni, aamɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a?”

english_verse: After the stone had been rolled aside, Jesus looked up toward heaven and prayed, “Father, I thank you for answering my prayer.
translation_verse: Bati a bɔɛ de a bɛnyɛ. Yesu dɛla anɛ nɛ ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Nda, manyɛ nɔ kɔlɛ kĩ atse yĩ.

english_verse: I know that you always answer my prayers. But I said this, so the people here would believe you sent me.”
translation_verse: Ĩnyina kĩ atse yĩ daa, lɛmɛ bikĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awĩ a sũ malɛ fukĩĩ, ayekĩ baatɛ bido kĩ nɔ lido yĩ.”

english_verse: When Jesus had finished praying, he shouted, “Lazarus, come out!”
translation_verse: Kĩ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ eyua a, ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Lazaro, nɛ́ kaya!”

english_verse: The man who had been dead came out. His hands and feet were wrapped with strips of burial cloth, and a cloth covered his face. Jesus then told the people, “Untie him and let him go.” The Plot To Kill Jesus (Matthew
translation_verse: Ade ɔnɔkpa a nɛ́ ɛya a. Lima a kĩ bɛkɔa bisuli ye akpɔ mɔ abɔa a buki lɛna nɛ ye akũ, ade duku a kĩ bɛkɔa bisuli ye anɛ a lɛmɛ na nɛ ye akũ a. Yesu bi be kĩ, “Miwũnya tilima a nɛ ye akũ mifɔ̃ ɛnaa.” Yudafɔ a Nasui Kĩ Baakɔ Yesu.

english_verse: Many of the people who had come to visit Mary saw the things Jesus did, and they put their faith in him.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛya nɛ Maria sɛkɛ̃ mɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna a, ade be pii tɛ ye bido a.

english_verse: Others went to the Pharisees and told what Jesus had done.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ be kamɛ badi muniki bɛnaa Farisifɔ a sɛkɛ̃ bɛnabi be lɛtsa a kĩ Yesu kɛna a.

english_verse: Then the chief priests and the Pharisees called the council together and said, “What should we do? This man is working a lot of miracles.
translation_verse: Foesũ Farisifɔ a mɔ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a natsa fɔlɔ mɔ Yudafɔ ɔmaĩ banɔkɔɛ̃ a ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Litsa bɔ́akɛna? Kitonɛkĩ oti kĩĩ lamɛna awãwã fɔtsa pii kakɛna!

english_verse: If we don't stop him now, everyone will put their faith in him. Then the Romans will come and destroy our temple and our nation.”
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɔkpa ye osi lɔmɔ ni, odi nyɛ odi aayatɛ ye edo, ade Roma abãã ayabubuli boe Asɔli Kɔla a, ɛwɔla boe ɔmaĩ lɛmɛ.”

english_verse: One of the council members was Caiaphas, who was also high priest that year. He spoke up and said, “You people don't have any sense at all!
translation_verse: Be kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ bavɛ Kaiafa, kĩ ɛnyɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ kateli a na kamɛ a bi be kĩ, “Minyína lɛtsama kɔlaa!

english_verse: Don't you know it is better for one person to die for the people than for the whole nation to be destroyed?”
translation_verse: Minyína kĩ fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa mi kĩ oti mɔa aaku nɛ bati a flee lɔlɔ kɛba kĩ baawɔla ɔmaĩ a flee a?”

english_verse: Caiaphas did not say this on his own. As high priest that year, he was prophesying that Jesus would die for the nation.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ ye mɔawɛ kakɔna ɛkɔa ɛlɛ fukĩĩ, mbom ndɛ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee nɛ kateli a kamɛ ni, ɛlɛ eyi kĩ Yesu aaku nɛ Yudafɔ a lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Yet Jesus would not die just for the Jewish nation. He would die to bring together all of God's scattered people.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ Yudafɔ a odi yaku ɛkpa, mbom kĩ yaakpɔta Baguma bade a kĩ bɛgba biko nɛ katinya kamɛ a bɛkɛna ɔmɔa.

english_verse: From that day on, the council started making plans to put Jesus to death.
translation_verse: Kito luwi a kanaa a, Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ kapi adzuni kĩ baakɔ Yesu.

english_verse: Because of this plot against him, Jesus stopped going around in public. He went to the town of Ephraim, which was near the desert, and he stayed there with his disciples.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ Yesu tábuki ɛkanɛ kanya Yudafɔ a lɛmɔ ye. Ɛdzakũ ɛnaa ɔmatɔ odi kĩ bavɛ Efrayim kamɛ nɛ kɔsa kudi kamɛ, ade awã bɛmɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a bidzi nɛ awã a.

english_verse: It was almost time for Passover. Many of the Jewish people who lived out in the country had come to Jerusalem to get themselves ready for the festival.
translation_verse: Finyaa Yudafɔ Wuda Katɛ̃ luwi kanya a fuã, ade bati pii to ɔmaĩ a fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ bɛya nɛ Yerusalem, kĩ bayaakpalɛ be akũ fɔmɔ luwi a aawo ɔtɔ.

english_verse: They looked around for Jesus. Then when they were in the temple, they asked each other, “You don't think he will come here for Passover, do you?”
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛna nɛ Asɔli Kɔla kamɛ a, bɛkawɛ Yesu, ade bɛkavia akũ kĩ, “Nde akɔna? Mbɔɛɛ ɛláaya nɛ luwi a kanyakɔ̃?”

english_verse: The chief priests and the Pharisees told the people to let them know if any of them saw Jesus. This is how they hoped to arrest him.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ Farisifɔ a si mbla kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ enyina awã kĩ Yesu deĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛyaakpa kanyi lɔkɔa bɛnaapi ye.

english_verse: If you serve me, you must go with me. My servants will be with me wherever I am. If you serve me, my Father will honor you.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yasum yĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ etomɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ awã kĩ ndeĩ a, ade awã yĩ ɔsumunɛ lɛmɛ ana a. Ade Nda aado obu nɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yasum yĩ akũ. Yesu Lɛ Kɔdzɛla Nɛ Ye Wuda Akũ.

english_verse: Judas did not really care about the poor. He asked this because he carried the moneybag and sometimes would steal from it.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ kĩ ɛtsɛla ahiãfɔ akũ sũ ɛlɛ fukĩĩ, mbom oyekpanɛ yanɛ. Ye nɛɛ sika kuvũ a ade yado awɛ nɛ koe kamɛ a.

english_verse: they took palm branches and went out to greet him. They shouted, “Hooray! God bless the one who comes in the name of the Lord! God bless the King of Israel!”
translation_verse: Foesũ bɛbɔɛ tuko bɛnɛ kĩ banaatsɛlamɔ ye, ade bɛkabɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Mimu Baguma! Baguma hila oti a kĩ yaya nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a! Baguma hila Israel Lɛgã a!”

english_verse: Jesus found a donkey and rode on it, just as the Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yesu mɔ́ aflimu adi, ade ede edzi nɛ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ,

english_verse: Mary took a very expensive bottle of perfume and poured it on Jesus' feet. She wiped them with her hair, and the sweet smell of the perfume filled the house.
translation_verse: Ade Maria bɔɛ kugua mɔ ɔlɛ̃ baũ, kĩ bavɛ koe nard, kĩ kudeĩ kɔya paa lita sɛkɛ ɛyatsɛla Yesu fɔnɛta, ade ɛkɔa ye lɔlɔ tɔlɔ ɛyɔ foe akũ a. Kugua a ɔlɛ̃ tɛ tɔtɔ a flee kamɛ.

english_verse: A lot of people came when they heard that Jesus was there. They also wanted to see Lazarus, because Jesus had raised him from death.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ pii nu kĩ Yesu deĩ nɛ Betania, foesũ bɛya nɛ awã. Nnɛ́ Yesu odi sũ bɛya, mbom kĩ bayaadã Lazaro a kĩ Yesu dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa a.

english_verse: A meal had been prepared for Jesus. Martha was doing the serving, and Lazarus himself was there.
translation_verse: Bɛtɔ olobe funitsã bɛkpa ye nɛ awã. Marta sum nɛ opunu akũ, ade Lazaro lɛmɛ na nɛ bati a kĩ bidzi bɛkanya mɔ Yesu a kamɛ a.

english_verse: A disciple named Judas Iscariot was there. He was the one who was going to betray Jesus, and he asked,
translation_verse: Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa, Yuda Iskariot, kĩ ye aanyɛ Yesu ɛkpa a lɛ kĩ,

english_verse: Jesus replied, “Leave her alone! She has kept this perfume for the day of my burial.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Mifɔnɛ ye awɛ! Mifɔ̃ ɛmanɛ koe eyi ɛkpa yĩ kabila.

english_verse: You will always have the poor with you, but you won't always have me.” A Plot To Kill Lazarus
translation_verse: Ahiãfɔ deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ luwi nyɛ luwi, lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ nláana nɛ mi kamɛ daa.” Yudafɔ a Sui Nɛ Lazaro Akũ.

english_verse: So the chief priests made plans to kill Lazarus.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ basɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a pi adzuni kĩ baakɔ Lazaro lɛmɛ,

english_verse: Philip from Bethsaida in Galilee was there too. So they went to him and said, “Sir, we would like to meet Jesus.”
translation_verse: Ade bɛnaa Filipo, kĩ eto Betsaida a nɛ Galilea sɛkɛ̃, ade bibi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔamɔ Yesu.”

english_verse: But the Pharisees said to each other, “There is nothing we can do! Everyone in the world is following Jesus.” Some Greeks Want To Meet Jesus
translation_verse: Foesũ Farisifɔ a bi akũ kĩ, “Midã kĩ bɔlámɔ kadzakɔ̃ kana kɔlaa. Midã, katinya kamɛ bati a flee nɛ́ bitomɔ ye!” Helafɔ Badi Wɛ Kĩ Bamɔ Yesu.

english_verse: So Father, bring glory to yourself. A voice from heaven then said, “I have already brought glory to myself, and I will do it again!”
translation_verse: Nda, do nɔ dĩ akũ obu.” Adeke odo odi to ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ndo de obu kɔkɔɛ, ade maabuki ndo de a.”

english_verse: “The Lord has blinded the eyes of the people, and he has made the people stubborn. He did this so that they could not see or understand, and so that they would not turn to the Lord and be healed.”
translation_verse: “Baguma kɔ be anɛ ade esua be adzuni ayekĩ be anɛ lɛláamɔ fɔkɔ, ade be adzuni lɛláanu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ a. Baguma lɛ kĩ, ‘Bɛláamuniki bɛya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔa ntsa be.’ ”

english_verse: The next day a large crowd was in Jerusalem for Passover. When they heard that Jesus was coming for the festival,
translation_verse: Kĩ kade nyina a, bati kɔdabu a kĩ bɛya nɛ Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi kanyakɔ̃ a nu kĩ Yesu aya nɛ Yerusalem.

english_verse: “People of Jerusalem, don't be afraid! Your King is now coming, and he is riding on a donkey.”
translation_verse: “Zion ɔmatɔ, tavila! Amɔ nɔ Lɛgã kĩ laya! Edzi nɛ aflimu obi akũ.”

english_verse: At first, Jesus' disciples did not understand. But after he had been given his glory, they remembered all this. Everything had happened exactly as the Scriptures said it would.
translation_verse: Ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a tánu fukĩĩ kayɔ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ, lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma dzɛla Yesu ɛkpalɛ ye akũ a, bɛyate anɛ kĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛkɛna bɛkpa ye a nɛ ye akũ.

english_verse: A crowd had come to meet Jesus because they had seen him call Lazarus out of the tomb. They kept talking about him and this miracle.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ bati kɔdabu a natsɛlɛmɔ Yesu a, kitonɛkĩ binu kĩ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa kĩĩ.

english_verse: Some Greeks had gone to Jerusalem to worship during Passover.
translation_verse: Helafɔ badi na nɛ bati a kĩ bɛnaa Yerusalem kĩ baasum Baguma nɛ luwi a kanya kamɛ a kamɛ.

english_verse: Jesus said: The time has come for the Son of Man to be given his glory.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bi be kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ kĩ baadɛla Otidziwa Obi a nɛ ode.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that a grain of wheat that falls on the ground will never be more than one grain unless it dies. But if it dies, it will produce lots of wheat.
translation_verse: Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ ntɛ ligbanɔbi táwo nɛ tite kamɛ lɛvɔ̃ ni, libi mɔapɛ keĩ a lanɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ lɛvɔ̃ ni, lado babi beblebee.

english_verse: If you love your life, you will lose it. If you give it up in this world, you will be given eternal life.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ ye nkpã kalɛ ni, yaayɛla ye, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ekesĩ ye nkpã nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ni, ɛkɔla ye ɛkpa nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: Now I am deeply troubled, and I don't know what to say. But I must not ask my Father to keep me from this time of suffering. In fact, I came into the world to suffer.
translation_verse: “Yĩ ɔwɔlɛ aha yĩ finyaa. Lɛmɛ litsa maalɛ? Kalɛ maalɛ kĩ, ‘Nda, nyɛ yĩ katomɛna lubo kamɔ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ mbɔɛɛ’? Oowo, ade foesũ ĩya nɛ katinya kamɛ a, ayekĩ maatsã lubo kamɔ lɔkɔ kĩĩ kamɛ.

english_verse: When the crowd heard the voice, some of them thought it was thunder. Others thought an angel had spoken to Jesus.
translation_verse: Bati kɔdabu a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ awã nu odo a, ade be kamɛ badi lɛ kĩ, ɔplala lɛnyɛ onukpɛ̃, lɛmɛ badi lɛ kĩ, “Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi lɛlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ ye!”

english_verse: Then Jesus told the crowd, “That voice spoke to help you, not me.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Yesu bi be kĩ, “Nnɛ́ yĩ sũ odo a lɛ́ kɔdzɛla, mbom mi sũ.

english_verse: This world's people are now being judged, and the ruler of this world is already being thrown out!
translation_verse: “Finyaa nyɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma aadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ. Finyaa mɔ baablɔmɛna katinya kĩĩ kamɛ akũ ɔnyanɛ a.

english_verse: If I am lifted up above the earth, I will make everyone want to come to me.”
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɛdɛla yĩ nɛ ode nɛ asendua akũ ni, maavɛlɛ bati flee ĩyamɛna nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃.”

english_verse: Jesus was talking about the way he would be put to death.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ fukĩĩ yakɔa ɛtsa wuda odu a kĩ yaaku.

english_verse: The crowd said to Jesus, “The Scriptures teach that the Messiah will live forever. How can you say that the Son of Man must be lifted up? Who is this Son of Man?”
translation_verse: Adeke bati kɔdabu a kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Mbla Ovoli a atsa boe kĩ Kristo a aadzi nkpã daa. Nde fɔya mɔ alɛ kĩ baadɛla Otidziwa Obi a nɛ ode nɛ asendua akũ? Owei nyɛ Otidziwa Obi kĩĩ a?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “The light will be with you for only a little longer. Walk in the light while you can. Then you won't be caught walking blindly in the dark.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa be mbuayɛ kĩ, “Ɔhaĩ a aabuki ɛna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ lɔkɔ lukũ lidi pɛ. Lɔkɔ kĩ ɔhaĩ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ ni, mitsã nɛ ye kamɛ ayekĩ ɔtũ lɛláake edo mi, kitonɛkĩ oti kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ linyína awã kĩ yanaa.

english_verse: Have faith in the light while it is with you, and you will be children of the light.” The People Refuse To Have Faith in Jesus After Jesus had said these things, he left and went into hiding.
translation_verse: Kĩ ɔhaĩ a deĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ kĩĩ ni, mitɛ ɔhaĩ mido ayekĩ míakɛna ɔhaĩ a kamɛ bati.” Bati a Katatɛ Kado. Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, ɛdzakũ nɛ be sɛkɛ̃ ɛnabɛla.

english_verse: He had worked a lot of miracles among the people, but they were still not willing to have faith in him.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ Yesu kɛna awãwã fɔtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ be anɛ kamɛ malo ni, bɛtátɛ ye bido.

english_verse: This happened so that what the prophet Isaiah had said would come true, “Lord, who has believed our message? And who has seen your mighty strength?”
translation_verse: Ayekĩ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma Onukpɛ̃ Ɔnyɛnɛ Yesaya lɛ eyi a, aaya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei lɛtɛ nɔ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔlɛ a edo? Owei ɛnyɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛtsa?”

english_verse: The people could not have faith in Jesus, because Isaiah had also said,
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ bɛtápuli bɛtɛ bido, kitonɛkĩ Yesaya buki ɛlɛ kĩ,

english_verse: Isaiah said this, because he saw the glory of Jesus and spoke about him.
translation_verse: Yesaya lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kitonɛkĩ ɛmɔ́ Yesu kukũkpalɛ a, ade ɛlɛ kalɛ nɛ foe akũ eyi a.

english_verse: Even then, many of the leaders put their faith in Jesus, but they did not tell anyone about it. The Pharisees had already given orders for the people not to have anything to do with anyone who had faith in Jesus.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ fɔla lɔmɔ malo a, Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a pii tɛ Yesu bido, lɛmɛ nɛ Farisifɔ a sũ bɛtálɛ foe akũ kɔdzɛla nɛ kanade, ayekĩ bɛláablɔmɛna be nɛ be katsɛnakɔ̃ a.

english_verse: And besides, the leaders liked praise from others more than they liked praise from God. Jesus Came To Save the World
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ bawɛ kĩ batidziwa bimu be kɛba kĩ Baguma aamu be. Yesu Fɔlɛtsa a Aakɔ Bati Kɔtɔ.

english_verse: In a loud voice Jesus said: Everyone who has faith in me also has faith in the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Ade Yesu bɔa fɔwɔla ɛlɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, nnɛ́ yĩ odi ɛtɛ edo, mbom mɔ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a ɛtɛ edo.

english_verse: And everyone who has seen me has seen the one who sent me.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yamɔ yĩ ni, yamɔ oti a kĩ edo yĩ a lɛmɛ.

english_verse: I am the light that has come into the world. No one who has faith in me will stay in the dark.
translation_verse: Ĩya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ ɔhaĩ aye, ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, ɛláana nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ.

english_verse: I am not the one who will judge those who refuse to obey my teachings. I came to save the people of this world, not to be their judge.
translation_verse: “Ntɛ odi nu yĩ fɔlɛtsa a mɔ́ ɛtákɛna nɛ foe akũ ni, nláadzɛmɔ ye. Ntáya kĩ mayaadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ bati, mbom ĩya kĩ mayaanyɛ be.

english_verse: But everyone who rejects me and my teachings will be judged on the last day by what I have said.
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ esĩ yĩ, kĩ ɛtátɛ yĩ fɔlɛtsa a deĩ oti kĩ yaadzɛmɔ ye. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a aadzɛmɔ ye nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ!

english_verse: I don't speak on my own. I say only what the Father who sent me has told me to say.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali, kitonɛkĩ ntálɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ otumi akũ, mbom Nda a kĩ edo yĩ a lɛkpa yĩ otumi kĩ nlɛ kɔdzɛla, nlɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ nlɛ a.

english_verse: I know that his commands will bring eternal life. This is why I tell you exactly what the Father has told me.
translation_verse: Ade ĩnyina kĩ ye mbla a akpa nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Nɛ foesũ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a nyɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ Nda bi yĩ kĩ nlɛ.”

english_verse: It was before Passover, and Jesus knew that the time had come for him to leave this world and to return to the Father. He had always loved his followers in this world, and he loved them to the very end.
translation_verse: Luwi a kĩ lɛnyaa Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi lɔtɔ a, Yesu nyi kĩ lɔkɔ kpɔla ye kĩ yaadzakũ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ɛnaa Ɔlɛga sɛkɛ̃. Ɛwɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade nɛ katinya kamɛ a kalɛ, ade ɛwɛ be kalɛ kɛnawo kawũnakɔ̃ a.

english_verse: Even before the evening meal started, the devil had made Judas, the son of Simon Iscariot, decide to betray Jesus.
translation_verse: Yesu mɔ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a dzi nɛ opunu akũ bɛkanya olobe funitsã. Abonsam kɔa edo nɛ Yuda kĩ ɛnyɛ Simon Iskariot obi a adzuni kamɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ Yesu ɛkpa.

english_verse: Jesus knew he had come from God and would go back to God. He also knew that the Father had given him complete power.
translation_verse: Yesu nyina kĩ Ɔlɛga kpa ye kɔbɛ̃ flee. Enyina kĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ eto ɛya, ade Baguma sɛkɛ̃ yaabuki ɛnaa a.

english_verse: So during the meal Jesus got up, removed his outer garment, and wrapped a towel around his waist.
translation_verse: Foesũ eyidza nɛ opunu a akũ, ɛnyɛ ye atadiɛ wulaa eyi nɛ ɔɔwɛ̃, ade ɛkɔa ɔsa efili nɛ kate a.

english_verse: He put some water into a large bowl. Then he began washing his disciples' feet and drying them with the towel he was wearing.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, eko mui nɛ lɔɔda kamɛ, eyi ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a abɔa kavɔlɛ kayɔ, ade ɛkɔa ɔsa a kĩ efili nɛ kate a ɛyɔ mui a.

english_verse: But when he came to Simon Peter, this disciple asked, “Lord, are you going to wash my feet?”
translation_verse: Kĩ ewo Petro sɛkɛ̃ a, Petro bi ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ayaavɔlɛ yĩ abɔa?”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “You don't really know what I am doing, but later you will understand.”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Finyaa ɔláanu lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna a kayɔ, lɛmɛ ke liti aanu foe kayɔ.”

english_verse: “You will never wash my feet!” Peter replied. “If I don't wash you,” Jesus told him, “you don't really belong to me.”
translation_verse: Petro bi ye kĩ, “Owoo, ɔláavɔlɛ yĩ abɔa da.” Ade Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Ntɛ ntávɔlɛ nɔ abɔa ni, ke kɔ̃ ɔláabuki ɔnya yĩ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ.”

english_verse: Peter said, “Lord, don't wash just my feet. Wash my hands and my head.”
translation_verse: Petro kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, ntɛ aye kɔ̃ ni, tavɔlɛ yĩ abɔa odi, mbom vɔlɛ yĩ awɛ mɔ lɔlɔ lɛmɛ!”

english_verse: Jesus answered, “People who have bathed and are clean all over need to wash just their feet. And you, my disciples, are clean, except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Oti kĩ ewo mui ɛnɛ́ yededeede tábuki esĩ ɛkpa mui kawo, kɛba abɔa odi kavɔlɛ. Mi kɔ̃ mi flee akũ nɛ́, mbɔɛntɛ oti mɔapɛ.”

english_verse: Jesus knew who would betray him. That is why he said, “except for one of you.”
translation_verse: Yesu nyina oti a kĩ yaanyɛ ye ɛkpa a kɔkɔɛ, ade foesũ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Mi a flee akũ nɛ́, mbɔɛntɛ oti mɔapɛ a.”

english_verse: After Jesus had washed his disciples' feet and had put his outer garment back on, he sat down again. Then he said: Do you understand what I have done?
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu vɔlɛ ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a abɔa eyua a, ɛbɔɛ ye atadiɛ wulaa a edo, emuniki ɛnadzi nɛ ye kadzikɔ̃ nɛ opunu akũ. Evia ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Minu lɛtsa a kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi a finyaa kayɔ mbɔɛɛ?

english_verse: You call me your teacher and Lord, and you should, because that is who I am.
translation_verse: Miavɛ yĩ kĩ Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ mɔ Ɔlate. Ade aye fɔla pɛpɛɛpɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ade lɛtsa a kĩ manɛ a.

english_verse: I have set the example, and you should do for each other exactly what I have done for you.
translation_verse: Nfantuhũ fɔanɛ nkpa mi kĩ mi malo mikɛna lɛtsa mɔapɛ a kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi a.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that servants are not greater than their master, and messengers are not greater than the one who sent them.
translation_verse: Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ ɔsumunɛ lɛbɛ́ ye ɔlate, ade ayea fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ lɛbɛ́ oti a kĩ edo ye fɔtɔ a.

english_verse: I am not talking about all of you. I know the ones I have chosen. But what the Scriptures say must come true. And they say, “The man who ate with me has turned against me!”
translation_verse: “Nnɛ́ mi flee malɛ, ĩnyina bati a kĩ mpau a. Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi a fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, ‘Oti a kĩ bɔmɔ ye budo awɛ bɔanya a yidza ɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ.’

english_verse: I am telling you this before it all happens. Then when it does happen, you will believe who I am.
translation_verse: “Mabi mi fukĩĩ ĩyi finyaa, fɔmɔ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ lɔkɔa míatɛ mido kĩ yĩ nyɛ oti a kĩ ye manɛ a.

english_verse: So the disciple leaned toward Jesus and asked, “Lord, which one of us are you talking about?”
translation_verse: Foesũ fɔtsa ɔkɔlɛnɛ a fuã Yesu tsɛmɛtsɛmɛ evia ye kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, owei yanɛ?”

english_verse: After Jesus had said these things, he was deeply troubled and told his disciples, “I tell you for certain that one of you will betray me.”
translation_verse: Kĩ Yesu lɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ eyua a, fɔha ye ɔwɔlɛ paa ade ɛlɛ yededeede kĩ, “Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ mi kamɛ odi aanyɛ yĩ ɛkpa.”

english_verse: Jesus' favorite disciple was sitting next to him at the meal,
translation_verse: Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ Yesu awɛ kalɛ a dzi ɛmɛnamɔ Yesu.

english_verse: and Simon motioned for this disciple to find out which one Jesus meant.
translation_verse: Adeke Simon Petro baa ye sɛnɛ kĩ, “Via ye owula a kĩ yalɛ a.”

english_verse: But because Judas was in charge of the money, some of them thought that Jesus had told him to buy something they needed for the festival. Others thought that Jesus had told him to give some money to the poor.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ Yuda nɛɛ be sika kuvũ sũ ni, fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a badi kɔna kĩ kabi Yesu bi ye kĩ ɛnaaya fɔtsa a kĩ baakɔa bɛnya luwi a, ĩye kĩ ɛnaakɔa litsedi ete ahiãfɔ.

english_verse: Judas took the piece of bread and went out. It was already night. The New Command
translation_verse: Kĩ Yuda tɛ funitsã a, deedimɔapɛ ɛnɛ́ ɛdzakũ. Kade dɔ paa. Yesu Kpa Mbla Vɔɛ̃.

english_verse: Then, after God is given glory because of him, God will bring glory to him, and God will do it very soon.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɛdɛla Baguma dĩ nɛ ode bɛtsãmɛna Otidziwa Obi a akũ ni, lɔkɔa Baguma aadɛla Otidziwa Obi a dĩ nɛ ode nɛ ye mɔawɛ kamɛ lɛtalɛta.

english_verse: My children, I will be with you for only a little while longer. Then you will look for me, but you won't find me. I tell you just as I told the people, “You cannot go where I am going.”
translation_verse: “Yĩ babi, nláabuki nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ owi libuna pii. Míawɛ yĩ, lɛmɛ finyaa mabi mi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi Yudafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ, ‘Miláapuli minaa awã kĩ manaa a.’

english_verse: Simon Peter asked, “Lord, where are you going?” Jesus answered, “You can't go with me now, but later on you will.”
translation_verse: Ade Simon Petro via kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nɛ ndia akpa?” Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Awã kĩ manaa, ɔláapuli otomɔ yĩ finyaa bɔnaa, lɛmɛ ke liti ni, aatomɔ yĩ liti.”

english_verse: Peter asked, “Lord, why can't I go with you now? I would die for you!”
translation_verse: Petro via ye kĩ, “Nde sũ nláapuli ntomɔ nɔ finyaa? Mmanɛ akũ kĩ maaku nɛ nɔ lɔlɔ!”

english_verse: “Would you really die for me?” Jesus asked. “I tell you for certain before a rooster crows, you will say three times that you don't even know me.”
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Kalɛ alɛ kĩ ɔmanɛ akũ kĩ aaku nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ? Mabi nɔ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ fɔmɔ ɔkɔkɔ aabe ni, aalɛ titi ɛlalɛ kĩ onyína yĩ.”

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples, “Don't be worried! Have faith in God and have faith in me.
translation_verse: Yesu bi be kĩ, “Mitafɔ̃ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɛha mi. Mitɛ Baguma mido, mitɛ yĩ malo mido.

english_verse: There are many rooms in my Father's house. I wouldn't tell you this, unless it was true. I am going there to prepare a place for each of you.
translation_verse: Fɔla beblebee deĩ nɛ Nda tɔtɔ kamɛ. Manaamanɛ kakɔ kadi ĩyi mi. Ntɛ fɔlá lɔmɔ ni, kufɛ nláabi mi kĩ manaamanɛ kadzikɔ̃ ĩyi mi.

english_verse: After I have done this, I will come back and take you with me. Then we will be together.
translation_verse: Ade ntɛ nnaa nnamanɛ kadzikɔ̃ ĩyi mi ĩyua ni, maamuniki ĩyaakpã mi nnamɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ awã kĩ ndeĩ a mi malo míana nɛ awã.

english_verse: You know the way to where I am going.”
translation_verse: Minyina osi a kĩ ɛwaa ɛnaa awã kĩ manaa a.”

english_verse: Thomas said, “Lord, we don't even know where you are going! How can we know the way?”
translation_verse: Ade Toma bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, bunyína awã kĩ anaa, foesũ nde bɔ́akɛna bɔmɔ́ osi a kĩ yanaa awã a?”

english_verse: “I am the way, the truth, and the life!” Jesus answered. “Without me, no one can go to the Father.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ osi a, ɔnɔkɔali a mɔ nkpã a. Odima láya nɛ Nda sɛkɛ̃ mbɔɛntɛ ɛtsã yĩ akũ.

english_verse: If you had really known me, you would have known the Father. But from now on, you do know him, and you have seen him.”
translation_verse: Ntɛ kanyina minyina yĩ ni, kufɛ minyina Nda lɛmɛ. Lɛmɛ kito finyaa kanaa ni, minyina ye ade mimɔ́ ye lɛmɛ a.”

english_verse: Philip said, “Lord, show us the Father. That is all we need.”
translation_verse: Ade Filipo bi Yesu kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, tsa boe Ɔlɛga a, ade lɛtsa a kĩ liti lisĩ boe a.”

english_verse: Jesus replied: Philip, I have been with you for a long time. Don't you know who I am? If you have seen me, you have seen the Father. How can you ask me to show you the Father?
translation_verse: Yesu bi ye kĩ, “Filipo, owi buna kĩ ndeĩ nɛ mi flee sɛkɛ̃, lɛmɛ onyína yĩ? Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔ́ yĩ ni, ɛmɔ́ Nda lɛmɛ. Nde sũ obuki avia kĩ, ‘Tsa boe Ɔlɛga a’?

english_verse: Don't you believe that I am one with the Father and that the Father is one with me? What I say isn't said on my own. The Father who lives in me does these things.
translation_verse: Filipo, mbɔɛɛ ɔtátɛ odo kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Nda kamɛ ade kĩ ye malo edeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ? Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ mbi mi a flee táto yĩ sɛkɛ̃, mbom Nda a kĩ edeĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a lamɛna ye adzuma kakɛna.

english_verse: Have faith in me when I say that the Father is one with me and that I am one with the Father. Or else have faith in me simply because of the things I do.
translation_verse: Mitɛ yĩ mido ntɛ nlɛ kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Nda kamɛ, ade Nda lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ a. Ntɛ mitátɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ mido ni, ke kɔ̃ mitɛ mido nɛ adzuma a kĩ makɛna a sũ.

english_verse: I tell you for certain that if you have faith in me, you will do the same things I am doing. You will do even greater things, now that I am going back to the Father.
translation_verse: Mabi mi nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ yĩ edo ni, yaakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna a. Nuwĩ yaapuli ɛkɛna fɔtsa ɛba yĩ fude a, kitonɛkĩ manaa Nda sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: Ask me, and I will do whatever you ask. This way the Son will bring honor to the Father.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ míavia nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ ni, maakɛna foe nkpa mi ayekĩ baatsã Obi a akũ bɛdɛla Nda dĩ nɛ ode.

english_verse: I will do whatever you ask me to do. The Holy Spirit Is Promised
translation_verse: Ntɛ mivia litsedi nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ ni, maakɛna foe.” Yesu Lɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a Kayamɛna Eyi.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: If you love me, you will do as I command.
translation_verse: Yesu buki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ miawɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, míakɛna nɛ yĩ tɛbla a akũ.

english_verse: Then I will ask the Father to send you the Holy Spirit who will help you and always be with you.
translation_verse: Maake Nda aduli ɛkpa mi Obumɛnanɛ bɛbã kĩ yaana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ daa.

english_verse: The Spirit will show you what is true. The people of this world cannot accept the Spirit, because they don't see or know him. But you know the Spirit, who is with you and will keep on living in you.
translation_verse: Ade ye nyɛ Hũhũ a kĩ yanyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ nɛ Baguma akũ a katsa a. Katinya kamɛ bati kɔ̃ lɛláapuli bɛtɛ ye, kitonɛkĩ bɛláapuli bɛmɔ́ ye mɔ baanyi ye. Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ minyina ye kitonɛkĩ yaana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ade edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a.

english_verse: I won't leave you like orphans. I will come back to you.
translation_verse: “Nláafɔnɛ mi awɛ ĩyi ndɛ banɔkpabi aye. Maamuniki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: In a little while the people of this world won't be able to see me, but you will see me. And because I live, you will live.
translation_verse: Kite sukuloo katinya kamɛ bati lɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ yĩ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ míamɔ yĩ. Ayekĩ ndzi nkpã sũ ni, mi malo míadzi nkpã.

english_verse: Then you will know I am one with the Father. You will know you are one with me, and I am one with you.
translation_verse: Ntɛ luwi a wo ɔtɔ ni, míanyi kĩ ndeĩ nɛ Nda kamɛ ade mi mideĩ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ade yĩ malo ndeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a.

english_verse: If you love me, you will do what I have said, and my Father will love you. I will also love you and show you what I am like.
translation_verse: “Oti a kĩ epini yĩ tɛbla, yakɛna nɛ te akũ ni, ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ a. Oti a kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, Nda aawɛ ye kalɛ. Yĩ malo maawɛ ye kalɛ ade maanyɛ yĩ akũ ntsa ye a.”

english_verse: The other Judas, not Judas Iscariot, then spoke up and asked, “Lord, what do you mean by saying that you will show us what you are like, but you will not show the people of this world?”
translation_verse: Ade Yuda, nnɛ́ ekĩ ɛnyɛ Iskariot a, via kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate, nde sũ aanyɛ nɔ akũ ɔtsa boe, mɔ nnɛ́ katinya kamɛ bati a?”

english_verse: Jesus replied: If anyone loves me, they will obey me. Then my Father will love them, and we will come to them and live in them.
translation_verse: Yesu kpa ye mbuayɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, yaapi yĩ fɔlɛtsa edomɔ akũ. Nda aawɛ ye kalɛ ade bɔmɔ Nda bɔ́aya nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ bɔkɛna kadzikɔ̃ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: But anyone who doesn't love me, won't obey me. What they have heard me say doesn't really come from me, but from the Father who sent me.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, yaápi yĩ fɔlɛtsa kadomɔ akũ. Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ minu a lɛnyɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ fude, mbom futo Ɔlɛga a kĩ edo yĩ a fude fɔanɛ.

english_verse: I have told you these things while I am still with you.
translation_verse: “Mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ mbuki ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: But the Holy Spirit will come and help you, because the Father will send the Spirit to take my place. The Spirit will teach you everything and will remind you of what I said while I was with you.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Obumɛnanɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kĩ Baguma aado nɛ yĩ dĩ akũ a, aatsa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade yaate mi anɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ mbi mi a akũ a.

english_verse: I give you peace, the kind of peace only I can give. It isn't like the peace this world can give. So don't be worried or afraid.
translation_verse: “Lukudɔ nkɔa mayi mi. Yĩ lukudɔ nkɔa makpa mi, nnɛ́ ndɛ ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati akpa a aye. Mitafɔ̃ mi ɔwɔlɛ lɛha mi ĩye mifɔ̃ libe liwo mi.

english_verse: You have already heard me say I am going and I will also come back to you. If you really love me, you should be glad I am going back to the Father, because he is greater than I am.
translation_verse: Minu ayekĩ mbi mi kĩ, ‘Madzakũ, lɛmɛ maamuniki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.’ Ntɛ miwɛ yĩ kalɛ ni, kufɛ kawɔlɛ de mi kĩ manaa Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ ye ɛbɛ̃ yĩ.

english_verse: I am telling you this before I leave, so when it does happen, you will have faith in me.
translation_verse: Finyaa mbi mi fukĩĩ ĩnyamɛna lɔtɔ fɔmɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa aaya nɛ foe kamɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ ni, míatɛ mido.

english_verse: I cannot speak with you much longer, because the ruler of this world is coming. But he has no power over me.
translation_verse: Nláabuki nlɛ mɔ mi kɔdzɛla nnamɛna lɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ katinya kamɛ akũ ɔnyanɛ a aya, ade ɛlá kɔbɛ̃ nɛ yĩ akũ a.

english_verse: I obey my Father, so everyone in the world might know that I love him. It is time for us to go now.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ katinya kamɛ bati binyi kĩ mawɛ Ɔlɛga a kalɛ, ade makɛna nɛ ye ɔlɛdo akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ a. “Finyaa, miyidza bɔdzakũ nɛ awĩ.

english_verse: Jesus said to his disciples: I am the true vine, and my Father is the gardener.
translation_verse: “Yĩ nyɛ kutse wĩ a, ade Nda nyɛ futse kɔba ɔnɛnɛ a.
