english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Nkɛna tuwĩ tidi nkpa tɛsɔli bɛbã a mba mi mbɔɛɛ? Nnɛ́ foe nyɛ kĩ ntákɔa yĩ akũ kadã nte nɛ mi akũ sũ mbɔɛɛ? Make mi aduli kĩ mikɔa mite yĩ, nɛ ayekĩ ntákɛna mi kakɛna wĩ sũ!

english_verse: So I will gladly give all I have and all I am. Will you love me less for loving you too much?
translation_verse: Maamɔ kawɔlɛ ntɛ mbula yĩ kɔbɛ̃ flee a kĩ ndeĩ a kade, nkɔa mbumɛna mi. Ntɛ mawɛ mi kalɛ paa a ni, nde sũ kɛnɛ kĩ mi ɔdɔ a kĩ mideĩ mikpa yĩ a akũ etinya?

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: Foesũ mitɛ foe kĩ ntánya fɔlɔtsa nte nɛ mi akũ. Lɛmɛ badi aalɛ kĩ ndeĩ tɛdake, ade nkɛ mi nɛ nyansã kamɛ ntɛ fɔtsa a.

english_verse: Were you cheated by any of those I sent to you?
translation_verse: Ntsã batɔ a kĩ ndo nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a kamɛ odi akũ nsisi mi mbɔɛɛ?

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: Nke Tito aduli kĩ ɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ade ndo ɔtɛ odonɛ bɛbã lɛmɛ kĩ etomɔ ye a. Míalɛ kĩ Tito sisi mi mbɔɛɛ? Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ kakɔna mɔapɛ a bɔmɔ ye bɔnɛɛ, bɔtsɛ̃ osi mɔapɛ a lɛmɛ akũ bɔakɛna adzuma?

english_verse: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
translation_verse: Ɔsa miakɔna kĩ nɛ foe kamɛ a, bɔbɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔapili boe lɔlɔ nɛ mi anɛ. Oowo, fɔlá lɔmɔ! Bɔalɛ kɔdzɛla ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo awɛ kĩ bɔlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ Baguma anɛ. Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɔakɛna ni, bɔakɛna foe kĩ fubumɛna mi mibo anɛ nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ.

english_verse: I am afraid when I come, we won't be pleased with each other. I fear that some of you may be arguing or jealous or angry or selfish or gossiping or insulting each other. I even fear that you may be proud and acting like a mob.
translation_verse: Mavila kĩ ntɛ ĩyawo awã ni, maamɔ mi kĩ miláana ndɛ ayekĩ maawɛ kĩ mina, ade ayea mi malo miláamɔ yĩ ndɛ ayekĩ miawɛ kĩ nna a. Mavila kĩ maayamɔ ɔdzɛ kakɛna, mɔ lineke kanɔ, mɔ kalɔkpa kana mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ, mɔ akũ odi fude kawɛ, mɔ fuvũnatsa, mɔ bati buĩ kanyɛ, mɔ lukũta mɔ onukpɛ̃ mɔa katakɛna nɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
translation_verse: Mavila lɛmɛ kĩ ntɛ mbuki ĩya ni, yĩ Baguma aadɔla yĩ nɛ mi anɛ, ade maabe nko nɛ bati pii a kĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa bɛtɛ̃ a akũ. Kitonɛkĩ bɛtádani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ nɛ efĩĩ fɔtsa mɔ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kakɛna kamɛ, mɔ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ akũ a.

english_verse: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, “Any charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.”
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɛlalɛde kĩ maayasɛla mi a. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ bɛbɔɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ odi akũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ adansifɔ nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ bɛlɛ kĩ fɔlɛtsa a deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ fɔmɔ baakɔ ye kɔtɔ.”

english_verse: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
translation_verse: Kĩ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ lɛyade a, ndɛ bati a kĩ bɛkɛna titikpa nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ lɛtɛ̃ kamɛ, mɔ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ. Lɛmɛ maabuki nlɛ foe finyaa, kĩ nláa mi sɛkɛ̃ malo. Ntɛ mbuki ĩya ni, odima lɛláanɛ nɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
translation_verse: Míamɔ yĩ kadzakɔ̃ a kĩ miawɛ a, kĩ fɔatsa kĩ Kristo alɛ kɔdzɛla katsãmɛna yĩ akũ a. Ntɛ yakɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ ni, ye kɔ̃ ɛtádɔ, mbom yanyɛ ye kɔbɛ̃ katsa nɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛbɔa ye nɛ asendua akũ a, ɛdɔ lɛmɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ fɔ̃ edzi nkpã. Ade ayea boe a kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo a bɔlá ɔsĩ a, lɛmɛ Baguma aado boe kɔbɛ̃ ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bɔkɛna adzuma a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔkɛna nɛ mi kamɛ a.

english_verse: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
translation_verse: Minaa mi kamɛ, misɔ mi akũ midã ntɛ midzi nɛ mi katɛkado onukpɛ̃. Mitámɔ miyi ɔsũ kĩ Yesu Kristo deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ mbɔɛɛ? Minyina kĩ edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, mbɔɛntɛ mitákpɔla nɛ mi akũ kasɔkadã a kamɛ.

english_verse: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
translation_verse: Matɛ kado kĩ míayanyi kĩ boe kɔ̃ bɔnya akũ nɛ kasɔkadã a kamɛ.

english_verse: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
translation_verse: Bɔake Baguma aduli kĩ mitakɛna nfumusu adima, nnɛ́ kĩ bati aamɔ kĩ bɔnya akũ nɛ boe akũ kasɔkadã a kamɛ, mbom kĩ miakɛna fɔtsa wĩ titɔ kĩ fɔadã ndɛ boe adzuma kakɛna tákpɔla malo.

english_verse: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ bɔláapuli bɔkɛna lɛtsama butia ɔnɔkɔali a, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bɔadza pintii bɔkpa ɔnɔkɔali a.

english_verse: Even though we are weak, we are glad that you are strong, and we pray you will do even better.
translation_verse: Kawɔlɛ ade boe ntɛ bɔdɔ, mɔ mi kɔ̃ midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Nɛ foesũ bɔabɔa mpaɛ kĩ mibo anɛ mikpɔla flefle.

english_verse: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
translation_verse: Ade foesũ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli kĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ndzakũ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a. Nkɛna foe lɔmɔ ayekĩ ntɛ ĩyawo awã ni, nláakɔa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ boe Ɔlate kpa yĩ a nvɛlɛ mi mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Ɛkpa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ nkɔa ndɔɔla mi mibo anɛ nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ, nnɛ́ kĩ makɔa mbula mi kade.

english_verse: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ kawũna ni, midzi kadzi wĩ. Mibo anɛ mikpɔla flefle nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Mibɔa mbɔdi mikɛna nɛ yĩ kɔdɛ a akũ, mikɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa, midzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ lɛmɛ. Baguma kĩ yawɛ bati kalɛ, mɔ ye lukudɔ lɛmɛ litomɔ mi flee.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
translation_verse: Miwɔ̃na akũ flee nɛ Baguma lukudɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ.

english_verse: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo kɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe tɔkpa lɔlɔ, ayekĩ yaanyɛ boe etomɛna nviã katinya kpa kĩĩ kamɛ, nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kawɛ onukpɛ̃.

english_verse: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma kito finyaa kanaa daa! Fɔya lɔmɔ. Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ Mɔapɛ Deĩ.

english_verse: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
translation_verse: Mi fɔlɛtsa kɛna yĩ wãwã, kitonɛkĩ owi tábuna kɔlaa kĩ mimuniki nɛ oti a kĩ ɛtsã Kristo kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ ɛvɛ mi a liti, ade minaatɛ kalɛ wĩ bɛbã a.

english_verse: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, kalɛ wĩ bɛbã kadima buki kɛláa, mbom bati badi tsɛ̃ babula mi atɔ kade, ade bawɛ kĩ badani Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a bɛkɛna lɛtsa bɛbã a.

english_verse: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ boe, ĩye Baguma fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi malo to ode ɛyalɛ kalɛ wĩ kĩ kɛvɛmɛna nɛ kikĩ ke akũ bude lɛtsã bɔkpa mi a ni, Baguma edumu ye ɛkpa lubo kamɔ!

english_verse: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
translation_verse: Kalɛ a kĩ bɔlɛ bɔtɛ̃ a, ade ke a finyaa mbuki malɛ a. Nlɛ kĩ ntɛ odi aato ode ɛyaabi mi kalɛ wĩ kĩ kɛvɛmɛna nɛ kikĩ mitɛ a akũ ni, Baguma edumu ye ɛkpa lubo kamɔ!

english_verse: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
translation_verse: Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ a ni, kalɛ malɛ foe nwo bati ĩye Baguma anɛ mbɔɛɛ? Oowo! Kawɛ mawɛ kĩ fuwo Baguma anɛ. Ntɛ mbuki makɛna foe fuwo batidziwa anɛ ni, kufɛ nláabuki ĩnya Kristo ɔsumunɛ. Ayekĩ Paulo Yadani Fɔtɔ Ɔnyanɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mifɔ̃ mbi mi yededeede kĩ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ ke akũ made lɛtsã a lɛnyɛ́ otidziwa kade.

english_verse: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
translation_verse: Ntátɛ ke ntomɛna otidziwa odima sɛkɛ̃ ade odima lɛmɛ tátsa yĩ ke a, mbom Yesu Kristo mɔawɛ lɛnyɛ ke ɛtsa yĩ.

english_verse: You know how I used to live as a Jew. I was cruel to God's church and even tried to destroy it.
translation_verse: Minu ayekĩ ndzi nkpã tɔ̃ a, kĩ mpi Yudafɔ ɔsum a ndomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Minu lɛmɛ ayekĩ nkɔa kɔnɛyɔɔlɛ ntomɛna asɔli bati a liti, mbɔa mbɔdi kĩ mawɔla be dzɔrɔbii.

english_verse: I was a much better Jew than anyone else my own age, and I obeyed every law our ancestors had given us.
translation_verse: Nnaa lɔtɔ mba yĩ bakɔba Yudafɔ pii a kĩ bɔmɔ́ be bɔnyɛ lɛtsã nɛ boe Yudafɔ ɔsum a kamɛ, ade ntomɔ boe bawanyɔ tɛmaniɛ a liti mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a.

english_verse: I didn't say a word, not even to the men in Jerusalem who were apostles before I was. Instead, I went at once to Arabia, and afterwards I returned to Damascus.
translation_verse: Ntánaa Yerusalem lɛmɛ kĩ manaamɔ bikĩ bɛnya fɔtɔ banyanɛ bɛnyaa yĩ lɔtɔ, mbom lɛtalɛta nnaa Arabia tite akũ. Ke liti a, mmuniki nto awã ntɛ̃ nnaa Damasko.

english_verse: Three years later I went to visit Peter in Jerusalem and stayed with him for
translation_verse: Futeli ɛlalɛ liti fɔmɔ nnaa Yerusalem kĩ manaamɔ Petro. Ndzi nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ tɛkwansieda nviã.

english_verse: The only other apostle I saw was James, the Lord's brother.
translation_verse: Ntámɔ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kamɛ odima kɛba Yakobo, boe Ɔlate ɔwaɛ̃nyole a.

english_verse: And in the presence of God I swear I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ matsɛlɛ kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Baguma nyina kĩ nnɛ́ fɔvã mama.

english_verse: Later, I went to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ndzakũ nnaa fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ nɛ Siria mɔ Kilikia tite akũ.

english_verse: But no one who belonged to Christ's churches in Judea had ever seen me in person.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ a, Kristo batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Yudea linyína yĩ anɛ mɔ anɛ.

english_verse: They had only heard that the one who had been cruel to them was now preaching the message that he had once tried to destroy.
translation_verse: Kanu binu nɛ bati tunukpɛ̃ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛkatomɔ boe liti kɔkɔɛ a ni, finyaa kɔ̃ ɛlamɔ lɛtsã kade nɛ katɛkado a kĩ ɛwɛ kĩ yawɔla a akũ!”

english_verse: And because of me, they praised God.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ bimu Baguma nɛ yĩ sũ.

english_verse: Fourteen years later I went to Jerusalem with Barnabas. I also took along Titus.
translation_verse: Nɛ futeli ewuana liti a, bɔmɔ́ Barnaba bubuki bumuniki bɔnaa Yerusalem, ade nkpã Tito lɛmɛ nnamɛna a.

english_verse: But I went there because God had told me to go, and I explained the good news I had been preaching to the Gentiles. Then I met privately with the ones who seemed to be the most important leaders. I wanted to make sure my work in the past and my future work would not be for nothing.
translation_verse: Nnaa awã kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ nnaa. Nɛ bɔmɔ́ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a odi katsɛna kamɛ ni, nkpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ ntsa be nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ lɛtsã a kĩ nlamɛna kade kakpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a akũ. Ntáwɛ kĩ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna ntɛ̃ a, mɔ ekĩ makɛna finyaa a, ɛkɛna fɔtsa pupulidza.

english_verse: Titus went to Jerusalem with me. He was a Greek, but still he wasn't forced to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ yĩ obumɛnanɛ Tito lɛnyɛ́ Yudani malo ni, odima táhɛ ye kĩ etsua lɛkpati.

english_verse: We went there because of those who pretended to be followers and had sneaked in among us as spies. They had come to take away the freedom Christ Jesus had given us, and they were trying to make us their slaves.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bavãlɛvã batɛ badonɛ badi tsã tɛdake osi akũ biwo nɛ asɔli bati a kamɛ kĩ banaĩ bɛmɔ boe akũ akũ kadzi a kĩ bɔna nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu a. Bɛwɛ kĩ bakɛna boe basate bɛkpa be tɛmaniɛ a kĩ bɛnɛɛ a.

english_verse: But we wanted you to have the true message. This is why we didn't give in to them, not even for a second.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ayekĩ bɔwɛ kĩ kalɛ wĩ a ɔnɔkɔali a ɛdza pintii kɛkpa mi sũ ni, bɔtákpa be osi kɔlaa.

english_verse: Some of them were supposed to be important leaders, but I didn't care who they were. God doesn't have any favorites! None of these so-called special leaders added anything to my message.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ badã ndɛ be nyɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a tákpa yĩ kɔdɛ kudima. Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɛnyɛ bati titiliwu badi malo ni, yĩ kɔ̃ ntsɛ́la, kitonɛkĩ Baguma ládã oti anɛ. Mbuki malɛ kĩ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a tákpa yĩ kɔdɛ vɔɛ̃ kudima.

english_verse: They realized God had sent me with the good news for Gentiles, and he had sent Peter with the same message for Jews.
translation_verse: Mbom bɛmɔ́ kĩ adzuma a kĩ Baguma do yĩ nɛ awɛ nyɛ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nkpã bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, ndɛ ayekĩ edo ye nɛ Petro lɛmɛ awɛ kĩ ede lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ɛkpa Yudafɔ a.

english_verse: God, who had sent Peter on a mission to the Jews, was now using me to preach to the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsã Baguma kɔbɛ̃ akũ, bɛkɛna yĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛkɛna Petro fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛkpa Yudafɔ a.

english_verse: James, Peter, and John realized that God had given me the message about his gift of undeserved grace. And these men are supposed to be the backbone of the church. They even gave Barnabas and me a friendly handshake. This was to show that we would work with Gentiles and that they would work with Jews.
translation_verse: Yakobo, mɔ Petro mɔ Yohanes, kĩ bɛkɛna ndɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ a mɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ Baguma lido yĩ adzuma pɔtii kĩĩ nɛ awɛ. Foesũ bigua bɔmɔ́ Barnaba bɛkɔa bɛtsa kĩ boe flee bɔnyɛ adzuma mɔa bakɛnanɛ. Bɔkɛna onukpɛ̃ mɔa kĩ bɔmɔ́ Barnaba bɔ́akɛna adzuma nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kamɛ, lɔkɔa be malo bɛkɛna adzuma nɛ Yudafɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: They only asked us to remember the poor, and this was something I had always been eager to do. Paul Corrects Peter at Antioch
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ bivia bitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ nyɛ kĩ bute anɛ nɛ batɛ badonɛ ahiãfɔ a akũ, kĩ fɔnyɛ lɛtsa titiliwu a kĩ fɔasĩ yĩ akũ kĩ nkɛna. Paulo Yidza Ɛdza Nɛ Petro Akũ Nɛ Antiokia.

english_verse: When Peter came to Antioch, I told him face to face that he was wrong.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kĩ Petro ya nɛ Antiokia a, ĩyidza ndza nɛ ye akũ nɛ kanade, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɛna lɛtsa kĩ lɛtáfɛta.

english_verse: He used to eat with Gentile followers of the Lord, until James sent some Jewish followers. Peter was afraid of the Jews and soon stopped eating with Gentiles.
translation_verse: Fɔmɔ batɔ a kĩ Yakobo do a ayawo awã ni, Petro kado awɛ kanya mɔ batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a. Lɛmɛ kĩ bati a ya liti a, Petro vɛlɛ ye akũ nɛ be akũ, esĩ kanya mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, kitonɛkĩ evila be a kĩ batsa kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ oti ɛtsua lɛkpati a.

english_verse: He and the others hid their true feelings so well that even Barnabas was fooled.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ batɛ badonɛ bɛbã a do kakɛna awɛ ndɛ babelibe bitomɔ Petro nɛ liti, ade Barnaba malo fɔ̃ libe lɛkɛnana kĩĩ nya ye akũ a.

english_verse: But when I saw they were not really obeying the truth that is in the good news, I corrected Peter in front of everyone and said: Peter, you are a Jew, but you live like a Gentile. So how can you force Gentiles to live like Jews?
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kĩ mmɔ́ kĩ bɛtsɛ́ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali Kalɛ Wĩ a osi kpĩĩ akũ ni, mbi Petro nɛ bati a flee anɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ nɔ a kĩ ɔnyɛ Yudani, odzi nkpã ndɛ oti kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Yudani a ni, nde sũ mɔ finyaakĩĩ kɔ̃ ahɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ bidzi ndɛ Yudafɔ aye?” Yudafɔ Mɔ Bikĩ Bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ Na Nkpã Katɛ Bɛtsãmɛna Katɛkado Kamɛ.

english_verse: We are Jews by birth and are not sinners like Gentiles.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Yudafɔ bɔanɛ kito nɛ kama kamɛ, ade ke nnɛ́ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a bɔanɛ.

english_verse: But we know that God accepts only those who have faith in Jesus Christ. No one can please God by simply obeying the Law. So we put our faith in Christ Jesus, and God accepted us because of our faith.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bunyina kĩ nnɛ́ oti a kĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ nyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ, mbom oti kĩ ɛtɛ Kristo edo. Boe malo bɔtɛ Kristo Yesu budo, ayekĩ bɔ́akpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ kĩ bɔtɛ Kristo budo sũ, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ nɛ mbla akũ kakɛna sũ. Kitonɛkĩ odima lɛláakpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ, nɛ ayekĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ.

english_verse: When we Jews started looking for a way to please God, we discovered that we are sinners too. Does this mean that Christ is the one who makes us sinners? No, it doesn't!
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ bɔabɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔakɛna bati kĩ bɛkpalɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ boe ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo sũ, mɔ bɛmɔ́ kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ bɔanɛ ndɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a aye ni, katsa fɔatsa kĩ Kristo lɛmɛ tomɔ tɔkpa liti? Oowo, fɔlá lɔmɔ!

english_verse: But if I tear down something and then build it again, I prove that I was wrong at first.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mbuki madzɛla mbla a akũ kakɛna a kĩ nfɔnɛ awɛ a ni, ke kɔ̃ ĩnyɛ yĩ akũ kanya ndɛ odi kĩ yaádi mbla a akũ.

english_verse: I have died, but Christ lives in me. And I now live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave his life for me.
translation_verse: Bɛbɔa bɔmɔ́ Kristo nɛ asendua akũ. Foesũ finyaa ni, nnɛ́ yĩ mɔawɛ a ndzi nkpã, mbom Kristo dzi nkpã nɛ yĩ kamɛ. Nkpã a kĩ ndzi finyaa nɛ sukɛna kamɛ a, ndzi ye nɛ Baguma Obi a kĩ yawɛ yĩ kalɛ, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ a nɛ katɛkado kamɛ.

english_verse: I don't turn my back on God's gift of undeserved grace. If we can be acceptable to God by obeying the Law, it was useless for Christ to die.
translation_verse: Maáwɛ kĩ masĩ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a. Lɛmɛ ntɛ oti akpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ ayekĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla akũ sũ ni, kekɔ̃ fɔatsa kĩ Kristo ku pupulidza!

english_verse: You stupid Galatians! I told you exactly how Jesus Christ was nailed to a cross. Has someone now put an evil spell on you?
translation_verse: Mi Galatiafɔ kĩ minyína kadi! Owei koũ libula mi lɔlɔ kamɛ kade lɔmɔ? Mi mɔawɛ anɛ kamɛ bɛnyɛ bɛtsa mi yededeede ayekĩ bɛbɔa Yesu Kristo nɛ asendua akũ a!

english_verse: I want to know only one thing. How were you given God's Spirit? Was it by obeying the Law of Moses or by hearing about Christ and having faith in him?
translation_verse: Mikpa yĩ kalɛ mɔa kĩĩ mbuayɛ. Baguma Hũhũ a kĩ mitɛ a ni, mbla a akũ mikɛna sũ, mbɔɛɛ kĩ Kalɛ Wĩ a mitse, mitɛ mido sũ mitɛ Hũhũ a?

english_verse: How can you be so stupid? Do you think that by yourself you can complete what God's Spirit started in you?
translation_verse: Nde mitɛnɛ kadzimbi lɔmɔ! Mikɔa Baguma Hũhũ a miyi adzuma kayɔ a ni, finyaakɔ̃ miawɛ kĩ miwũna ye mɔ miawɛ kɔbɛ̃?

english_verse: Have you gone through all of this for nothing? Is it all really for nothing?
translation_verse: Mbɔɛɛ fɔtsa flee a kĩ foe kamɛ mitsã mitɛ̃ a dani fɔtsa pupulidza? Fɔláanya fɔtsa pupulidza da!

english_verse: God gives you his Spirit and works miracles in you. But does he do this because you obey the Law of Moses or because you have heard about Christ and have faith in him?
translation_verse: Ayekĩ miakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ Baguma kpa mi Hũhũ yakɛna awãwã fɔtsa nɛ mi kamɛ, mbɔɛɛ nɛ ayekĩ mitse Baguma fɔlɛtsa a mitɛ foe mido sũ?

english_verse: And so, you should understand that everyone who has faith is a child of Abraham.
translation_verse: Foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ mianyi kĩ bati kĩ bɛtɛ bido nyɛ Abraham babi mɔ bawa.

english_verse: Long ago the Scriptures said God would accept the Gentiles because of their faith. This is why God told Abraham the good news that all nations would be blessed because of him.
translation_verse: Bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ biyi kĩ Baguma aakɛna bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a bati kpĩĩ nɛ be katɛkado sũ. Ade foesũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a bi Abraham Kalɛ Wĩ a kɔkɔɛ eyi kĩ, “Baguma aatsã nɔ akũ ehila katinya kamɛ fude flee.”

english_verse: This means everyone who has faith will share in the blessings given to Abraham because of his faith.
translation_verse: Abraham tɛ edo ade Baguma hila ye a. Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ edo ni, Baguma ahila ye ndɛ Abraham aye.

english_verse: Anyone who tries to please God by obeying the Law is under a curse. The Scriptures say, “Everyone who doesn't obey everything in the Law is under a curse.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ bipi mbla a akũ kakɛna bido mɔ akũ ni, bidum be, kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaákɛna nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lideĩ nɛ mbla a kamɛ ni, Baguma dumu ye!”

english_verse: No one can please God by obeying the Law. The Scriptures also say, “The people God accepts because of their faith will live.”
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ finyaa foe kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ nɛ mbla a akũ kakɛna sũ. Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Oti a kĩ ɛtsã katɛkado kamɛ ɛkɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ a, odi aadzi nkpã.”

english_verse: The Law isn't based on faith. It promises life only to people who obey its commands.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mbla a lɛtsɛ́la oti katɛkado akũ. Mbom Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a flee akũ ni, yaatsã foe kamɛ edzi nkpã.”

english_verse: But Christ rescued us from the Law's curse, when he became a curse in our place. This is because the Scriptures say that anyone who is nailed to a tree is under a curse.
translation_verse: Kĩ Kristo yadani fudumutsa nɛ boe lɔlɔ sũ ni, ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna mbla kadumu a kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ bɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ bɛvɛla ye nɛ asendua akũ ni, Baguma dumu ye.”

english_verse: And because of what Jesus Christ has done, the blessing promised to Abraham was taken to the Gentiles. This happened so that by faith we would be given the promised Holy Spirit. The Law and the Promise
translation_verse: Kristo kɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ Baguma nhila a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa Abraham a aata mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a, ade fɔtsãmɛna Kristo Yesu akũ, bɔ́atsã katɛkado kamɛ bɔtɛ Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a. Ntsitsemu Deĩ Nɛ Mose Mbla a Mɔ Baguma Nhihiɛ a Kayite.

english_verse: My friends, I will use an everyday example to explain what I mean. Once someone agrees to something, no one else can change or cancel the agreement.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mawɛ kĩ makpa mi kadzi kamɛ nfantuhũ adi. Ntɛ bati nviã kɛna nhihiɛ adi, mɔ bɛtsɛlɛ ovoli bido awɛ nɛ kayɔ ni, odima lɛláapuli ɛnyɛ lɛtsama ĩye ɛkɔa lɛtsa bɛbã ebu.

english_verse: That is how it is with the promises God made to Abraham and his descendant. The promises were not made to many descendants, but only to one, and that one is Christ.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ kĩ Abraham mɔ ye obi Baguma kɛna nhihiɛ ɛkpa. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a tálɛ kĩ, “Abraham babi” kĩ fɔatsa kĩ bati beblebee, mbom ɛlɛ kĩ, “obi” kĩ fɔatsa kĩ oti mɔapɛ. Ade oti kĩĩ nyɛ Kristo a.

english_verse: If we have to obey the Law in order to receive God's blessings, those blessings don't really come to us because of God's promise. But God was kind to Abraham and made him a promise.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ Baguma futetsa a tsã mbla akũ ni, kekɔ̃ fubuki fɔtsɛ́ ye nhihiɛ a akũ. Lɛmɛ Baguma mɔawɛ nhihiɛ yanɛ sũ ɛkɔa futetsa a ɛkpa Abraham.

english_verse: What is the use of the Law? It was given later to show that we sin. But it was only supposed to last until the coming of that descendant who was given the promise. In fact, angels gave the Law to Moses, and he gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Kekɔ̃, litsa sũ bɛkɛna mbla a? Bɛkɛna mbla a bibu ayekĩ oti aamɔ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ tɔkpa, ade fɔwaa kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Abraham obi a kĩ bɛkpa nhihiɛ a aaya. Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛkɔa mbla a bɛma oti a kĩ edeĩ nɛ bati mɔ Baguma kayite.

english_verse: There is only one God, and the Law did not come directly from him. Slaves and Children
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kayite ɔnanɛ tásĩ ntɛ fɔnyɛ kĩ oti mɔapɛ akɛna nhihiɛ, ade Baguma mɔapɛ yanɛ a. Lɛtsa Sũ Kĩ Bɛkpa Mbla a.

english_verse: Does the Law disagree with God's promises? No, it doesn't! If any law could give life to us, we could become acceptable to God by obeying that law.
translation_verse: Katsa fukĩĩ atsa kĩ mbla a tia Baguma nhihiɛ a? Oowo. Fɔlá lɔmɔ! Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ batidziwa tɛ mbla adi kĩ yaapuli ɛkpa oti nkpã ni, kufɛ odi nyɛ odi aapuli ɛkɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ, ntɛ ɛkɛna nɛ ye akũ.

english_verse: But the Scriptures say that sin controls everyone, so that God's promises will be for anyone who has faith in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ katinya kamɛ flee deĩ nɛ tɔkpa kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ, foesũ futetsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi nɛ Yesu Kristo katɛkado kamɛ a waa fɔkpa bikĩ bɛtɛ bido.

english_verse: The Law controlled us and kept us under its power until the time came when we would have faith.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ fɔmɔ Kristo katɛkado ya ni, mbla a pili boe flee edo nɛ kɔla ndɛ kɔla bawanɛ aye, kɛnawo lɔkɔ a kĩ baanyɛ Kristo katɛkado kĩĩ kanya.

english_verse: In fact, the Law was to be our teacher until Christ came. Then we could have faith and be acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Foesũ mbla a lɛkadãmɛna boe akũ kɛnawo kĩ Kristo ya, ayekĩ fɔ́atsã boe katɛkado kamɛ bɛkɛna boe bati kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ.

english_verse: But once a person has learned to have faith, there is no more need to have the Law as a teacher.
translation_verse: Finyaakĩĩ, kĩ katɛkado a yawo boe kamɛ a, mbla a buki ɛnyɛ́ boe ɔdãmɛnanɛ.

english_verse: All of you are God's children because of your faith in Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ mi flee mitɛ Kristo Yesu mido sũ ni, mi flee midani Baguma babi.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was as though you had put on Christ in the same way you put on new clothes.
translation_verse: Mi a kĩ bɛwɔla mi mui, kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo a, mido Kristo ndɛ atadiɛ aye.

english_verse: Faith in Christ Jesus is what makes each of you equal with each other, whether you are a Jew or a Greek, a slave or a free person, a man or a woman.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ntsitsemu adima buki ɛláa Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ kayite, mɔ basate ĩye bikĩ bidzi be akũ akũ, mɔ batsole ĩye banyole, mbom mi flee mikɛna ɔmɔa nɛ Kristo Yesu kamɛ.

english_verse: So if you belong to Christ, you are now part of Abraham's family, and you will be given what God has promised.
translation_verse: Ntɛ minyɛ Kristo bade ni, kekɔ̃ minyɛ Abraham babi mɔ bawa, ade míakɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a banyanɛ a.

english_verse: Children who are under age are no better off than slaves, even though everything their parents own will someday be theirs.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ matsa nyɛ kĩ obinyole a kĩ ɛtábo tɔ̃ anɛ kĩ yaanya ɔlɛga adzapadiɛ ni, babu ye ndɛ ɔsate aye, titɔ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ ye fude malo.

english_verse: This is because children are placed in the care of guardians and teachers until the time their parents have set.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ a kĩ ɛnyɛ obisɛ̃ a, bati deĩ kĩ badãmɛna ye mɔ ye fɔtsa a akũ kanaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔlɛga yi ɛkpa ye fɔtsa a katɛ.

english_verse: This is how it was with us. We were like children ruled by the powers of this world.
translation_verse: Ade ayea boe malo bɔna nɛ hũhũ kĩ yanya katinya kamɛ akũ kayɔ ndɛ basate aye, kɛyawo kĩ bubo anɛ nɛ hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ.

english_verse: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kĩ lɔkɔ wĩ a wo ɔtɔ a, Baguma do ye mɔawɛ Obi ɛya. Ɛya ndɛ otidziwa kĩ otsole ma aye, edzi nkpã nɛ Yudafɔ mbla a kayɔ.

english_verse: so he could set us free from the Law, and we could become God's children.
translation_verse: Baguma do ye kĩ ɛyaase kɔtɔ ɛnyɛ bikĩ bideĩ nɛ mbla a kayɔ, ayekĩ bɔ́adani bɔkɛna ye Baguma babi.

english_verse: Now that we are his children, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts. And his Spirit tells us that God is our Father.
translation_verse: Kĩ Baguma wɛ kĩ yatsa kĩ minyɛ ye babi sũ ni, ɛkɔa ye Obi Hũhũ a edo nɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Hũhũ kĩĩ abɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Ao Nda!”

english_verse: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ obuki ɔnyɛ́ ɔsate, mbom ɔnyɛ obi. Kĩ ɔnyɛ ye obi sũ ni, Baguma aakɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa ye babi a ɛkpa nɔ. Galatiafɔ Fɔlɛtsa Kaha Paulo.

english_verse: Before you knew God, you were slaves of gods that are not real.
translation_verse: Kɔkɔɛ a kĩ minyína Baguma a, minya basate mikpa fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ́ Baguma.

english_verse: But now you know God, or better still, God knows you. How can you turn back and become the slaves of those weak and pitiful powers?
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ minyina Baguma, ĩye maalɛ kĩ Baguma nyina mi a, nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miamuniki minaa hũhũ a kĩ ɛla kɔbɛ̃, kĩ ye akũ akɔ kɔnya a sɛkɛ̃? Nde sũ miawɛ kĩ miabuki mikɛna be basate?

english_verse: You even celebrate certain days, months, seasons, and years.
translation_verse: Minyɛ fuwi fudi, tidetɔ tidi, fɔkɔ́ fudi mɔ futeli fudi koũ miyi miakɛna tɛmaniɛ nɛ foe akũ.

english_verse: I am afraid I have wasted my time working with you.
translation_verse: Mi fɔlɛtsa aha yĩ ɔwɔlɛ paa! Fɔakɛna ndɛ yĩ adzuma a kĩ nkɛna nɛ mi kamɛ a flee kɛna pupulidza.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to be like me, just as I once tried to be like you. Did you mistreat me
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, make mi aduli kĩ midani mikɛna ndɛ yĩ aye, kitonɛkĩ yĩ malo nkɛna yĩ akũ ndɛ mi aye. Mitákɛna tɔkpa tidima nɛ yĩ akũ.

english_verse: when I first preached to you? No you didn't, even though you knew I had come there because I was sick.
translation_verse: Míate anɛ kĩ kĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ĩyade lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a akũ nkpa mi a, nna nɛ fɔsɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: My illness must have caused you some trouble, but you didn't hate me or turn me away because of it. You welcomed me as though I were one of God's angels or even Christ Jesus himself.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ ayekĩ yĩ akũ na a nya sɔhuiɛ baũ fɔkpa mi malo ni, yĩ akũ tákɔ mi kɔwɛ̃ misĩ yĩ katɛ, mbom mitɛ yĩ ndɛ Baguma ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye, ĩye ndɛ ayekĩ míatɛ Kristo Yesu mɔawɛ a.

english_verse: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.
translation_verse: Kawɔlɛ a kĩ mimɔ́ mɔ ɔmɛnɛ a kĩ mido nɛ yĩ akũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ a ni, nɛ ndia fudeĩ finyaa? Yĩ mɔawɛ maapuli nlɛ kĩ ntɛ kapuli míapuli kufɛ mibɔlɛ mi mɔawɛ banebi malo mikpa yĩ.

english_verse: Am I now your enemy, just because I told you the truth?
translation_verse: Kadani ndani mi okesĩnɛ finyaa kɔ̃, nɛ ayekĩ mbi mi ɔnɔkɔali a sũ?

english_verse: Those people may be paying you a lot of attention, but it isn't for your good. They only want to keep you away from me, so you will pay them a lot of attention.
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã kĩĩ a amɔ kawɔlɛ paa nɛ mi akũ, lɛmɛ baákɔna fɔtsa wĩ nɛ mi akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bawɛ nyɛ kĩ banyɛ mi nɛ yĩ akũ, ayekĩ míadani mimɔ́ kawɔlɛ nɛ be akũ ndɛ ayekĩ be malo bamɔ nɛ mi akũ a.

english_verse: It is always good to give your attention to something worthwhile, even when I am not with you.
translation_verse: Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ bati amɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ mi fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna akũ, ntɛ be botaɛ a nɛnɛ daa, nnɛ́ ntɛ ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ odi.

english_verse: My children, I am in terrible pain until Christ may be seen living in you.
translation_verse: Yĩ babi kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ! Mbuki manu kalɔɛ nɛ yĩ kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ sɛmɛ api ɔmatsɔ̃ kakpa mi, kɛnaawo kĩ Kristo ɔbla a aatɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
translation_verse: Nwɛ kĩ mana nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ finyaakĩĩ kufɛ, ayekĩ maadɔla yĩ odo nɛ mi akũ ĩnyɛ ayekĩ mila a ntsa. Mi fɔlɛtsa aha yĩ ɔwɔlɛ paa! Paulo Kɔa Hagar Mɔ Sara Ɛkpa Nfantuhũ.

english_verse: Some of you would like to be under the rule of the Law of Moses. But do you know what the Law says?
translation_verse: Mi a kĩ miawɛ kĩ mbla a ɛnya mi akũ a, mikpa yĩ kalɛ kĩĩ mbuayɛ. Mbɔɛɛ mitánu lɛtsa a kĩ mbla a lɛ a?

english_verse: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
translation_verse: Ɛlɛ kĩ Abraham ma babinyole nviã, ɔmɔa nyɛ ye ɔsatetsole a obi, ade ɔyade a nyɛ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a obi a.

english_verse: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
translation_verse: Bɛma ɔsate obinyole a ndɛ ayekĩ otidziwa ama obi aye, lɛmɛ obinyole a kĩ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a ma a kɔ̃ ni, bɛma ye bɛtsãmɛna nɛ Baguma kalɛ kayi a onukpɛ̃.

english_verse: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
translation_verse: Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛ nfantuhũ. Batsole nviã kĩĩ dzɛ̃ bɛkpa apam atsu nviã. Be kamɛ ɔmɔa a kĩ ɛnyɛ Hagar dzɛ̃ ɛkpa apam a kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ Sinai ɔtɔ a akũ a, ade ye babi a kĩ ɛma a nyɛ basate a.

english_verse: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
translation_verse: Hagar dzɛ̃ ɛkpa Sinai ɔtɔ nɛ Arabia tite akũ. Ade ye nyɛ nviã Yerusalem ɔmatɔ a, kitonɛkĩ ye mɔ ye bati a flee buki bideĩ nɛ tɛsate kamɛ.

english_verse: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ode Yerusalem a nyɛ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a, ade ye nyɛ boe ɔma a.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about her, “You have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Nɔ oduko, mɔ kawɔlɛ! Bɔa fɔwɔla, kamɔ kawɔlɛ, nɔ a kĩ ɔtámɔ tɔ̃ kama lubo. Kitonɛkĩ otsole kĩ ɔnyɔ lɛtsɛ́la ye akũ a, babi aapɔ bɛba otsole a kĩ ɔnyɔ deĩ nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ daa a bade.”

english_verse: My friends, you were born because of this promise, just as Isaac was.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, finyaa ni, mi malo minyɛ Baguma babi nɛ ye nhihiɛ a onukpɛ̃ ndɛ Isak aye.

english_verse: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, obinyole a kĩ bɛma ndɛ ayekĩ otidziwa ama obi kɛkɛ a yidza ɛdza nɛ ekĩ bɛma nɛ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ a akũ. Ade aye fubuki fɔla nviã kĩĩ malo a.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Get rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ litsa Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ? Kɛlɛ kĩ, “Blɔmɛna ɔsatetsole a mɔ ye obinyole a bɛdzakũ, kitonɛkĩ ɔsate a obi a mɔ otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ obi lɛláasɛ̃ be ɔlɛga adzapadiɛ.”

english_verse: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔnyɛ́ ɔsatetsole a babi, mbom otsole a kĩ edzi ye akũ akũ a babi bɔanɛ.

english_verse: Christ has set us free! This means we are really free. Now hold on to your freedom and don't ever become slaves of the Law again.
translation_verse: Akũ akũ kadzi Kristo awɛ kĩ bɔna ade foesũ ɛnyɛ boe a. Nɛ foesũ midza pintii ndɛ bati kĩ bidzi be akũ akũ aye, mitafɔ̃ bibuki bɛkɛna mi basate.

english_verse: I, Paul, promise you that Christ won't do you any good if you get circumcised.
translation_verse: Mitse fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ katse wĩ! Yĩ Paulo mabi mi kĩ ntɛ mifɔ̃ bitsua mi fɔkpati ni, fɔatsa kĩ Kristo buki ɛlá nfasɔ adima ɛkpa mi.

english_verse: If you do, you must obey the whole Law.
translation_verse: Mbuki masipi kĩ ntɛ odi tunɔ bitsua ye lɛkpati ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla a flee akũ.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Mi a kĩ miawɛ kĩ miakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ lɔkɔa minya bati kĩ bɛkpɔla nɛ Baguma anɛ ni, minyɛ mi akũ nɛ Kristo akũ. Minɛ́ nɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Boe kɔ̃ ni, kĩ bɔtɛ budo Baguma Hũhũ a sũ ni, bɔna ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kĩ Baguma aakɛna boe bati kĩ bɛkpɔla.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu ni, lɛkpati katsua ĩye de katatsua távɛmɛna lɛtsama. Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nyɛ kĩ bɔ́alɛ katɛkado a kĩ kakɛna adzuma nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Mikabɔa mbɔdi paa kufɛ! Owei lisua mi osi kĩ mitakɛna nɛ ɔnɔkɔali osi a akũ?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a lɛdani mi adzuni.

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: Balɛ kĩ, “Fuyilatsa kabii bakɔa kado nɛ mbɔli kamɛ fɔmɔ yayila.”

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɛ boe ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate sũ ni, matɛ kado kĩ miláabuki mitɛ oti bɛbã adzuni kɛba yĩ ade. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛlamɛna mi adzuni kadani a ni, nde eti ɛla o-o, Baguma aavɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ kokooko.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, yĩ kɔ̃ ntɛ mbuki made lɛtsã kĩ lɛkpati katsua sĩ ni, nde sũ bati buki biyidza bɛdza nɛ yĩ akũ? Ntɛ fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ni, kekɔ̃ yĩ lɛtsã kade nɛ Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a lɛláayamɛna ɔhau odima.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Mawɛ kĩ bati a kĩ batutulu mi a bipi akũ bɛnaa lɔtɔ bɛnyɛ be akũ tɛsaɛ lɔkɔa kalɛ kiwoli!

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kɔ̃ bɛvɛ mi kĩ mina mi akũ akũ kadzi. Lɛmɛ mitafɔ̃ mi akũ akũ kadzi kĩĩ lɛkpa mi osi mikɛna sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa, mbom mikɔa ɔdɔ misum mi akũ akũ.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ mbla a ɔlɛdo flee nyɛ kĩ, “Wɛ nɔ ɔkɔba kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ nɔ akũ a.”

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ miakɛna mi akũ awɔda ndɛ bayaɛ kpa aye ni, midã kadã wĩ, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye míawɔla akũ. Ntsitsemu Deĩ Nɛ Baguma Hũhũ Mɔ Oti Kutidu Kayite.

english_verse: If you are guided by the Spirit, you won't obey your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ malɛ nyɛ kĩ mifɔ̃ Hũhũ a ɛkpã mi nɛ mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ, ayekĩ miláakɔa akũ mikpa sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kakɛna.

english_verse: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ oti kutidu awɛ a ayidza kadza nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a awɛ a akũ. Ade lɛtsa a kĩ Hũhũ a awɛ a lɛmɛ ayidza kadza nɛ oti kutidu fɔwɛtsa a akũ a. Fɔtsa nviã kĩĩ akesĩ akũ, ade fɔatsa kĩ miláapuli mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ miawɛ a.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ Hũhũ akpã mi ni, mibuki miláa mbla a kayɔ.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: Fɔtsa a kĩ oti kutidu akɛna a anɛ kawa yedede. Ade foe nyɛ litsolewɛ mɔ linyolewɛ, fɔtsa a kĩ fɔado akũ efĩĩ, kɔkɔbato,

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: baviɔ̃ kasum, mɔ kabɔ katsɔ. Fɔbɛbã nyɛ likesĩ, ɔdzɛ kakɛna, anɛngbã, kalɔkpa kana, yĩ odi fude kalɛ, bati kayalɛ mɔ kasɛ̃ nɛ kutsu kutsu kamɛ,

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: lineke kanɔ, bavɛ kawuga, kawɔlɛ kamɔ mɔ kuto kpa katɛ̃ ɔbɛ̃, mɔ fɔtsa bɛbã ndɛ fukĩĩ bamɛ. Mbuki madɛ mi finyaa ndɛ ayekĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ndɛ mi a, kĩ bikĩ bakɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ odu a lɛláanaa Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: akũ kadɔla mɔ akũ akũ kanya. Mbla adima lɛláa kĩ etia fukĩĩ flee kamɛ fudima.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ Kristo Yesu bade a, kɔa be sukɛna bɛbɔa bɛmɛna nɛ asendua akũ, mɔ sɛ fɔwɛtsa mɔ ɔbla kpa flee.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Ntɛ Hũhũ a akpã boe ni, kekɔ̃ mifɔ̃ ye ɛkpã boe nɛ boe kadzi kamɛ.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ bɔdɛla akũ nɛ ode, ĩye budo akũ kalɔkpa, ĩye bɔna anɛngbã nɛ boe akũ akũ.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mi kamɛ odi kɛna tɔkpa tidi ni, mi a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a, mikɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ midɛ ye ɛdani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Midã mi mɔawɛ a akũ kadã wĩ ayekĩ mi malo bɛláasɔ mi bɛdã.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Mibumɛna akũ akũ nɛ ɔhau adi nyɛ adi kamɛ, lɔkɔa nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ ni, míakɛna nɛ Kristo mbla a akũ.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi abu ye akũ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti odi odu lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ɛnyɛ́ lɛtsama a, ye odi akũ yakɛ.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi ɛdzɛmɔ ye mɔawɛ akũ ɛdã. Ntɛ fɔnɛnɛ ni, owula aapuli epia nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a akũ, kɛtánɛ kĩ yakɔa ye fɔkɛlatsa ɛkɔna mɔ oti bɛbã fude.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi aalɔ ye mɔawɛ fɔlɔtsa.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Ntɛ batsa odi Kristo fɔlɛtsa a ni, kɛnɛ kĩ oti a ɛkpa ye fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ a ye fɔtsa wĩ flee a kĩ edeĩ a fudi.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Mitakɛ mi akũ, kitonɛkĩ odima lɛmɛ lɛláapuli ebu Baguma tɛkɔasia. Lɛtsa a kĩ oti du a, ade foe mɔapɛ a yaana a.

english_verse: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
translation_verse: Ntɛ edu fɔtsa nɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kamɛ ni, lɛtsa a kĩ yaana etomɛna foe kamɛ nyɛ wuda. Lɛmɛ ntɛ edu fɔtsa nɛ Hũhũ a fɔwɛtsa kamɛ ni, yaana nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a etomɛna ye kamɛ.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli boe nɛ tuwĩ kakɛna kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ akpɔ táveli boe ni, lɔkɔ aaya kĩ bɔ́ana foe akũ nfasɔ.

english_verse: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ kĩ lɔkɔ buki lideĩ lɛkpa boe sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔkɛna tuwĩ bɔkpa odi nyɛ odi, titiliwu bikĩ bɔmɔ́ be bɛkɛna ɔmɔa nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ a. Paulo Kɔdɛ Mɔ Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Midã ayekĩ yĩ mɔawɛ nkɔa katsɛlɛ baũ baũ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli finyaa!

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Bati a kĩ bawɛ kĩ bahɛ mi mitsua fɔkpati a nyɛ bikĩ bata akũ, kawɛ kĩ bawo bati anɛ. Lɛtsa a sũ kĩ bakɛna fukĩĩ nyɛ kĩ bɛtáwɛ kĩ bana liti katomɛna nɛ Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: Bati a kĩ batsua fɔkpati a malo lákɛna nɛ mbla a akũ. Bawɛ kĩ mitsua fɔkpati ayekĩ baapuli bipia kĩ miakɛna nɛ be amaniɛ akũ.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ yĩ kɔ̃ ni, maapia nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a odi akũ. Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsã Kristo wuda kamɛ ni, bɛbɔa katinya kamɛ nɛ asendua akũ bɛkpa yĩ, ade nɛ Kristo wuda kamɛ lɛmɛ fɔtsã bɛbɔa yĩ malo nɛ asendua akũ bɛkpa katinya kamɛ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bitsua odi lɛkpati ĩye bɛtátsua ye ni, fɔnyɛ́ lɛtsama. Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nyɛ kĩ oti a dani ɛkɛna oti vɔɛ̃.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Baguma ɛmɔ bati a kĩ bitomɔ osi kĩĩ nɛ be nkpã kamɛ a kɔnya, ɛkpa be lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Ɛkɛna foe lɔmɔ lɛmɛ ɛkpa Baguma bati a flee.

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Kito finyaa kanaa ni, odima ɛtabuki ɛkpa yĩ ɔhau odima, kitonɛkĩ fuloi nɛ yĩ akũ a atsa kĩ ĩnyɛ Yesu ɔsate.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi hũhũ flee kɔnya. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Yĩ Paulo kĩ ĩyadani Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃, lɛtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mamɛna mi Baguma bati nɛ Efeso a kĩ miadi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ, mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Baguma Hila Bati a Kĩ Bɛkɛna Ɔmɔa Mɔ Kristo a.

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a kɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ nɛ ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo sũ ni, ɛkpa boe hũhũ kamɛ nhila adi nyɛ adi kĩ edeĩ nɛ ode katinya a kamɛ a.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: Fɔmɔ Baguma labɔa katinya malo ni, ɛpau boe eyi kɔkɔɛ kĩ bɔ́anya ye bade fɔtsã ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo akũ, ayekĩ bɔ́akɛna bati kpalɛwa kĩ nfumusu adima lɛláa be akũ nɛ ye anɛ.

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ Baguma awɛ boe kalɛ sũ ni, ehihiɛ kɔkɔɛ kĩ fɔ́atsã Kristo akũ yaakɛna boe ye babi. Ade fukĩĩ koũ nyɛ ye kakɔna mɔ kawɔlɛ a.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma, nɛ kɔnya baũ a kĩ ɛmɔ boe faa ɛtsãmɛna ye Obi kĩ yaátunɔ kalɛ a akũ!

english_verse: Christ sacrificed his life's blood to set us free, which means our sins are now forgiven. Christ did this because of God's gift of undeserved grace to us. God has great wisdom and understanding,
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ fɔtsã Kristo babɔanɛ kawula kamɛ sũ ni, bɔna katɛ, ade foe nyɛ kĩ Baguma kɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe. Midã ayekĩ Baguma kɔnya a kĩ ɛmɔ́ boe, ɛkpa boe nyansã mɔ fɔtsa kayɔkanu a pɔnɛ!

english_verse: and by what Christ has done, God has shown us his own mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Baguma fɔ̃ bunyi nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna ɛkɔla eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ, kĩ yaawũna ɛtsãmɛna Kristo akũ a.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: Nhihiɛ a nyɛ kĩ ntɛ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ ni, Baguma aakpɔta lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa nɛ tite mɔ ode a ɛkɔa edo nɛ Kristo kayɔ.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ boe a kĩ bɔnya lɔtɔ bɔadã Kristo anɛ a, bumu Baguma kukũkpalɛ a.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Ade mi malo, kĩ minu ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a kĩ kɛnyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a, kĩ kɛma mi nkpã katɛ a, midani Baguma bati. Ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo mido sũ ni, Baguma kɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a eyi mi ɔsũ kĩ minya ye bade.

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kĩĩ nyɛ kasipi kĩ bɔ́atɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi ɛkpa ye bati a. Kasipi kĩĩ akpa boe anɛ kate kĩ Baguma aakpa bati a kĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade a akũ akũ kadzi. Mifɔ̃ bumu ye kukũkpalɛ a! Mpaɛ Kĩ Paulo Bɔa.

english_verse: I have heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all God's people.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, kito anɛ kĩ nnu kĩ mitɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu mido, miawɛ Baguma bati a flee kalɛ a,

english_verse: So I never stop being grateful for you, as I mention you in my prayers.
translation_verse: ntáfɔ̃ Baguma kɔlɛ kanyɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ. Mate anɛ nɛ mi akũ nɛ yĩ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ,

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: ade mawã Baguma, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga, kĩ ɛnyɛ kukũkpalɛ flee a, kĩ ɛkpa mi Hũhũ a kĩ yaakpa mi nyansã, ɛnyɛ Baguma ɛtsa mi ayekĩ míanyi ye kanyi wĩ.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Make Baguma aduli kĩ ebinya mi anɛ mipuli mimɔ ye ɔhaĩ a, ayekĩ míanyi lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ ɛvɛ mi ɛkpa kĩ midã anɛ a. Ye awãwã nhila a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa ye bati a kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ a atɛ kɔya paa.

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: Midã ayekĩ ye kɔbɛ̃ kpale a akɛna adzuma nɛ boe a kĩ bɔtɛ ye budo a kamɛ. Kɔbɛ̃ kĩĩ kĩ kɔakɛna adzuma nɛ boe kamɛ a,

english_verse: when he raised Christ from death and let him sit at his right side in heaven.
translation_verse: ketimɔ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kɔa ɛdzɛla Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa, ɛkɔa ye edzina nɛ ye sɔmɔna nɛ ode flee a.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Ade awã Kristo anya lɛgã nɛ ode fɔgã flee, bati kĩ bideĩ otumi flee, bati kĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ flee mɔ balate flee akũ a. Ye lɛgã kadzakɔ̃ bɛ̃ lɛgã nyɛ lɛgã kadzakɔ̃ nɛ katinya kĩĩ mɔ kikĩ kaaya a kamɛ.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Baguma kɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa edo nɛ Kristo abɔa kayɔ ade ɛkɔa ye ɛkpa asɔli a ndɛ ye lɔlɔ nɛ fɔtsa flee kamɛ a.

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: Asɔli kĩĩ nyɛ Kristo sukɛna, kĩ sɛfɔ̃ asɔli a kpɔla, ade Kristo mɔawɛ lɛmɛ afɔ̃ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akpɔla nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ a.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Kɔkɔɛ a, nɛ mi atɔ ɔsĩ mɔ tɔkpa sũ ni, miku nɛ hũhũ kamɛ.

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ na kamɛ a, midzi nkpã nɛ katinya kamɛ tisi akũ. Mikɔa akũ mikpa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔanya lɛgã nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ hũhũ a akũ a. Ade koe nyɛ hũhũ a kĩ finyaa yakɛna adzuma nɛ bati a kĩ baátse Baguma ɔlɛdo a kamɛ a.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, boe flee bɔna ndɛ be, budzi nkpã nɛ boe sukɛna fɔwɛtsa onukpɛ̃, bɔkakɛna fɔtsa a kĩ boe sukɛna mɔ adzuni awɛ a. Nɛ katinya kamɛ ɔbla kpa a kĩ edeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ sũ ni, Baguma na kalɔkpa nɛ boe akũ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛna nɛ batidziwa kasinu flee a akũ a.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: titɔ kĩ boe tɔkpa fɔ̃ buku nɛ hũhũ kamɛ malo a, ɛfɔ̃ bɔna nkpã nɛ Kristo kamɛ. Baguma sɛmɛkalɛ odi sũ mina nkpã katɛ.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Yesu Kristo sũ ni, Baguma dzɛla boe mɔ ye etomɛna kanɔkpa kĩ bɔnya lɛgã mɔ ye nɛ ode.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Baguma kɛna fukĩĩ kĩ yanyɛ ye sɛmɛkalɛ baũ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe nɛ lɔkɔ flee kamɛ a, nɛ ayekĩ edeĩ ɔdɔ ɛkpa boe nɛ Kristo sũ a.

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: Baguma sɛmɛkalɛ odi, mɔ mi katɛkado akũ fɔtsã sũ mina katɛ. Nnɛ́ mi mɔawɛ mbɔdi kabɔa kamɛ futo, mbom Baguma futetsa fɔanɛ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛkɔa foe epia.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Baguma lɛbɔa boe mɔ ye mɔawɛ awɛ, kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu, budzi nkpã bɔkɛna adzuma wĩ a kĩ ye mɔawɛ a ɛkɔa eyi kĩ bɔyaakɛna a. Batɛ Badonɛ a Flee Kɛna Ɔmɔa Mɔ Kristo.

english_verse: Don't forget that you are Gentiles. In fact, you used to be called “uncircumcised” by those who take pride in being circumcised.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ kĩ kɔkɔɛ a, nnɛ́ Yudafɔ babi mianɛ. Yudafɔ a kĩ bitsua fɔkpati a avũna mi kĩ bati kĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati. Lɛmɛ lɛkpati katsua nyɛ sukɛna katsua kɛkɛ, kĩ otidziwa lɛkɔa awɛ ɛkɛna foe.

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Mite anɛ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ na kamɛ a, mina mɔ lugo nɛ Kristo sɛkɛ̃. Minya banɔvɔɛ̃ kĩ bɛtána nɛ bati a kĩ Baguma pau a kamɛ. Mitána nɛ apam a kĩ Baguma kɛna mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa ye bati a kamɛ. Midzi nɛ katinya kamɛ kĩ mitána anɛ kate nɛ lɛtsama akũ, ade mitána Baguma adima a.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ fɔtsã Kristo Yesu wuda kamɛ bɛkpã mi a kĩ mina mɔ lugo a mifuã miyakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Kristo mɔawɛ a lɛkɔa lukudɔ ɛma boe, ɛkɛna bikĩ bɛnyɛ Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a ɔmɔa. Ɛkɔa ye mɔawɛ sukɛna ɛnyɛ likesĩ ndɛ seebi a nɛ be kayite.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: Ɛwɔla Yudafɔ mbla mɔ ye akũ tɛmaniɛ a, ayekĩ yaakpɔta bati kutsu nviã a bɛkɛna oti vɔɛ̃ mɔa mɔ ye, lɔkɔa lukudɔ lɛya.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Kristo tsã ye wuda nɛ asendua akũ a kamɛ ɛwɔla likesĩ a kĩ lideĩ nɛ be kamɛ a. Eboomu fude nviã a, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa ade bɛdani bɛya nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: Foesũ Kristo yade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a lukudɔ akũ ɛkpa bati flee, bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛna mɔ lugo nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a, mɔ Yudafɔ a kĩ bifuã Baguma a.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Kristo akũ fɔtsã mɔ boe a kĩ bɔnyɛ Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a bɔ́apuli bɔtsã Hũhũ a akũ bɔya nɛ Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ni, mi a kĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ a mibuki minyɛ́ basitsãnɛ ĩye banɔvɔɛ̃, mbom finyaa mimɔ Baguma bati a midani kade mɔa bati mɔ Baguma kɔla babi.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: Bike mi malo mite nɛ seebi sɛyɔde a kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a ke a akũ, ade Kristo Yesu mɔawɛ nyɛ́ kɔla a akũ de titiliwu a.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ade ye pini kɔla akũ fɔtsa a flee ɛkpɔta a, kafɔ̃ kɔabo anɛ kakɛna ndɛ afɔliɛ kɔla kpalɛwa kakpa Baguma a.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Nɛ mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kamɛ a, bɛkɔa mi malo bibumɔ be nkaɛ a bake kɔla a kĩ Baguma aadzi nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ a.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: Matɛ kado kĩ minu ayekĩ Baguma mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya, ɛkpa yĩ adzuma kĩĩ kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi kalɛ.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ ntsɛlɛ foe lukũ mma mi ĩyatɛ̃ a, Baguma nyɛ ye nhihiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna ɛkɔla a ɛtsa yĩ.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Ntɛ miakã ovoli a ni, míapuli mimɔ́ ayekĩ nnu Kristo fɔtsa kɔlawa a kayɔ.

english_verse: No one knew about this mystery until God's Spirit told it to his holy apostles and prophets.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɔkɔɛ lɔkɔ a, Baguma tányɛ nhihiɛ kɔlawa kĩĩ ɛtsa batidziwa, lɛmɛ finyaa ni, Baguma nyɛ foe ɛtsa ɛtsãmɛna Hũhũ a akũ ɛkpa ye fɔtɔ banyanɛ kpalɛwa mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Nhihiɛ kɔlawa a nyɛ kĩ fɔtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a lɛmɛ kɛna ndɛ Yudafɔ aye. Bɛkɛna sukɛna mɔapɛ a bati, kĩ bɛna tsɛfã nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi ɛtsãmɛna Kristo Yesu akũ a kamɛ.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Baguma tsã ye kɔbɛ̃ akũ ɛmɔ yĩ kɔnya ɛkɔa yĩ ɛkɛna Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ ɔsumunɛ.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ ĩnyɛ obisɛ̃de kɔlaa nɛ Baguma bati a kamɛ malo ni, Baguma mɔ yĩ kɔnya kĩ nkɔa fɔtsa wĩ beblebee a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ Kristo kamɛ, kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya baũ lɛmɛ a nde lɛtsã nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a.

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: Ade edo yĩ kĩ nfɔ̃ bati flee binyi ayekĩ Baguma nhihiɛ kɔlawa a aanɛ kanya ɛkɛna adzuma. Baguma kĩ ye nyɛ fɔtsa flee ɔbɔanɛ a, kɔa fɔtsa ɛkɔla anɛ kɔkɔɛ,

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: ayekĩ nɛ finyaa lɔkɔ kamɛ, baatsã asɔli bati a akũ bɛnyɛ Baguma nyansã ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ a bɛtsa fɔgã mɔ otumifɔ a kĩ banya akũ nɛ ode katinya kamɛ a.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ nyɛ Baguma nhihiɛ kĩ ɛlá kawũna a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ, ade fɔtsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ a.

english_verse: Christ now gives us courage and confidence, so we can come to God by faith.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo, bɔtɛ ye budo lɛmɛ sũ ni, budeĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado kĩ bɔ́apuli bɔnaa Baguma anɛ faa.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ make mi aduli, mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi nɛ lubo a kĩ mamɔ nɛ mi lɔlɔ a sũ, kitonɛkĩ foe flee fɔ́anya mi nfasɔ. Ayekĩ Kristo Awɛ Boe Kalɛ.

english_verse: I kneel in prayer to the Father.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, nke aduli mabɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe Ɔlɛga a,

english_verse: All beings in heaven and on earth receive their life from him.
translation_verse: kĩ ɛla katete kadi nyɛ kadi nɛ tite mɔ ode anɛ. Ade ye ate ke dĩ lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: Mabaɔ mpaɛ kĩ Baguma ɛtsã ye Hũhũ akũ edo mi ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kudeĩ nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ beblebee kamɛ a.

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: Mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ mi katɛkado kɛfɔ̃ Kristo ɛna nɛ mi kamɛ. Mabɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ kĩ midza pintii nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ,

english_verse: I pray that you and all God's people will understand what is called wide or long or high or deep.
translation_verse: ayekĩ mi mɔ Baguma bati a flee míana kɔbɛ̃ minu Kristo ɔdɔ a kadzɛlɛ mɔ ye lugo, ye kade mɔ kadzũ a kayɔ.

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: Baguma ɛfɔ̃ miyaanyi Kristo ɔdɔ a, titɔ kĩ otidziwa lɛláapuli enu foe kayɔ dzununuunu eyua malo, ayekĩ Baguma kutidu a aatɛ mi kamɛ flee.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: ade ye kade nyɛ kamu nɛ asɔli bati a mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ, fɔnaa kasinu flee kamɛ, kito finyaakĩĩ kanaa daa daa! Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Foesũ yĩ a kĩ nwaa kɔla nɛ ayekĩ masum boe Ɔlate sũ a, makpa mi kɔdɛ kĩ midzi nkpã a kĩ yaaketi mɔ ayekĩ Baguma vɛ mi kĩ midzi a.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Midɔla mi akũ, minya bati dɔwa, mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ. Minyɛ mi ɔdɔ mitsa nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana kamɛ.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Nɛ ayekĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Hũhũ a sũ ni, mibɔa mbɔdi mipi ɔmɔa kakɛna midomɔ akũ nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Sukɛna mɔapɛ mɔ Hũhũ mɔapɛ deĩ, ade ayea budeĩ kɔnɛte nɛ lɛtsa mɔapɛ a kĩ Baguma vɛ boe ɛkpa a akũ a.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: Ɔlate mɔapɛ mɔ katɛkado mɔapɛ deĩ, ade mui kawɔla mɔapɛ lɛmɛ deĩ a.

english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Ade ayea budeĩ Baguma mɔapɛ, batidziwa flee Ɔlɛga kĩ ɛnyɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa Ɔlate a. Yakɛna adzuma katsãmɛna boe flee akũ, ade edeĩ nɛ boe flee kamɛ a.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Boe kamɛ odi nyɛ odi tɛ futetsa pɔtii fudi kĩ fuketimɔ kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ Kristo kpa a.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Kĩ ede ɛnaa ode flee a, ɛkpã bati pii a kĩ bideĩ nɛ ndom kamɛ a ebumɔ ye akũ, ɛsɛ̃ futetsa ɛkpa batidziwa.”

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: Finyaa, kĩ bɛlɛ kĩ ede ɛnaa ode flee a ni, foe kayɔ nyɛ litsa? Foe kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ ɛnya lɔtɔ ɛka ɛnaa tite ɔda flee a.

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Foesũ oti a kĩ ɛka ɛnaa tite ɔda flee a, ade ye mɔapɛ a lide ɛnaa ode flee a, ayekĩ yaatɛ katinya flee a kamɛ.

english_verse: Christ chose some of us to be apostles, prophets, missionaries, pastors, and teachers,
translation_verse: Ade ye lite batidziwa futetsa, ɛpau bati kĩ bɛnya fɔtɔ banyanɛ, babɛbã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, badi lɛtsã badenɛ, badi bɛnya batɛ badonɛ akũ badãmɛnanɛ mɔ fɔtsa batsanɛ.

english_verse: so his people would learn to serve and his body would grow strong.
translation_verse: Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ ayekĩ yaalɔla Baguma bati a flee ɛkpa Kristo adzuma kakɛna, lɔkɔa bido Kristo sukɛna a kĩ sɛnyɛ asɔli bati a kɔbɛ̃.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: Foesũ boe flee bɔ́akɛna ɔmɔa nɛ boe katɛkado kamɛ, lɔkɔa bunyi Baguma Obi a lɛmɛ. Fɔ́afɔ̃ bubo anɛ buketi mɔ Kristo, bɔna ye kutitse flee a.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔa bɔláabuki bɔnya ndɛ babisɛ̃ kĩ bavãlɛvã fɔtsa katsa vɔɛ̃ fudi nyɛ fudi abɔa be katomɛna katɛ̃mɛna ndɛ ɔwɛ aye, ade tɛdake bati akɛ be kado nɛ be adzuni tɔkpa kamɛ a.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ ni, ntɛ bɔalɛ ɔnɔkɔali nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bubo anɛ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ nɛ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ lɔlɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: of the body. Christ holds it together and makes all of its parts work perfectly, as it grows and becomes strong because of love. The Old Life and the New Life
translation_verse: Ade ye pini sukɛna fɔtsakɔ̃ fɔtsakɔ̃ mɔ tisĩ fɔatsa mɔ akũ kakɛna adzuma a. Foesũ ntɛ sukɛna kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ akɛna se adzuma ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta ni, oti mɔawɛ a abo anɛ kana ɔsĩ nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ. Nkpã Vɔɛ̃ Kadzi Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.

english_verse: As a follower of the Lord, I order you to stop living like stupid, godless people.
translation_verse: Foesũ mabi mi nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ kĩ mitabuki midzi nkpã ndɛ bati a kĩ binyína Baguma, kĩ be adzuni adã faa faa,

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: ade be lɔlɔ kamɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a. Ayekĩ binyína lɛtsama, bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ lɛmɛ sũ ni, nkpã a kĩ bidzi a táketi mɔ nkpã a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ ye bati bidzi a.

english_verse: and they are so greedy they do all kinds of indecent things.
translation_verse: Bibuki bɛlá kɔnyɔã nɛ lɛtsama akũ, foesũ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa tɔkpa mɔ fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ a kĩ fɔado akũ efĩĩ kakɛna.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ minu Yesu nkã, ade ndɛ bati kĩ bitomɛna ye ni, bɛtsa mi ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Foesũ mifɔnɛ mi ɔbla kpa kɔɛ a kĩ midzi mitɛ̃ a awɛ. Fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɛ bati libula mi nkpã a kĩ midzi tɔ̃ a kade.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Midani mi tɔwɔlɛ mɔ mi adzuni kamɛ fɔkɛna fɔtsa vɔɛ̃,

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: mibɔa ɔbla vɔɛ̃ kĩ ɛla ndɛ Baguma kutidu a, kĩ yanyɛ akũ katsa nɛ nkpã wĩ kĩ ɛkpalɛ kamɛ a aye. Ɛna nɛ mi akũ ndɛ atadiɛ aye.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Foesũ mifɔ̃ fɔvã kama! Kɛnɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi edi ɔnɔkɔali ɛkpa ye ɔkɔba ɔtɛ odonɛ, kitonɛkĩ boe flee bɔnyɛ Kristo sukɛna a akũ sɛkɛ sidi.

english_verse: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
translation_verse: Ntɛ mina kalɔkpa ni, mitafɔ̃ kalɔkpa lɛfɔ̃ mikɛna tɔkpa, ade mitafɔ̃ kade lɛdɔ nɛ mi kalɔkpa a akũ.

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Mitakpa Abonsam osi odima.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ ɛkaye a ɛfɔ̃ kaye. Ɛkɔa awɛ ɛkɛna adzuma ayekĩ yaana ɛnya nɛ foe kamɛ, ete ahiãfɔ lɛmɛ fɔtsa.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ tuwuli kpa lɛnɛ nɛ mi onukpɛ̃, mbom milɛ tuwuli wĩ kĩ taabumɔ bati a kĩ batse mi nɛ lɔkɔ a odu kamɛ a, lɔkɔa fɔvɛlɛ nhila fɔma be.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Mitakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ laawo Baguma Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kalɔɛ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a Baguma kɔa eyi mi ɔsũ, esipi kĩ Baguma aatɛ mi nɛ Luwi nkaɛ a akũ.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Mifɔnɛ kako katɛ awɛ, minyɛ kalɔkpa mɔ likesĩ nɛ mi kamɛ. Ade ayea mifɔ̃ awũni mɔ bati buĩ kanyɛ, mɔ adzuni kpa kakɛna nɛ bati akũ a.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ ni, mikɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa akũ. Mikɔa tɔkpa mite akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma lɛmɛ kɔa ete mi ɛtsãmɛna Kristo akũ a.

english_verse: Do as God does. After all, you are his dear children.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ minyɛ Baguma babi kĩ yawɛ kalɛ sũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ miabɔa mbɔdi mina ndɛ ye aye.

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ ɔdɔ ɛnya mi kadzi kamɛ akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo wɛ boe kalɛ, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa nɛ boe lɔlɔ ndɛ futetsa mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bɛkɔa bɛbɔa bɛkpa Baguma, fuwo ye anɛ.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Nɛ ayekĩ minyɛ babi kĩ bɛkpalɛ be akũ sũ ni, kɛtáfɛta kĩ adɔpaa, efĩĩ fɔtsa mɔ anɛngbã lɛkɛnana anɛ nɛ mi kamɛ malo.

english_verse: Don't use dirty or foolish or filthy words. Instead, say how thankful you are.
translation_verse: Ade ayea kɛtánɛ kĩ mialɛ okendze tuwuli, tuwuli kĩ taálɛ katse, ĩye kĩ takɔ kɔnyɔã. Nɛ fukĩĩ kadokɔ̃ ni, mikaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Minu foe kayɔ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yabɔa adɔpaa, yado ye akũ efĩĩ, mɔ edeĩ anɛngbã, kitonɛkĩ anɛngbã keti mɔ baviɔ̃ kasum a, ɛláana tsɛfã nɛ Kristo mɔ Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ da.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɔa tɔkɔsia tuwuli ɛkɛ mi, kitonɛkĩ ade foe bamɛ sũ Baguma sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ aaya nɛ bikĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ a akũ a.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Foesũ mimɔ bati a na odu mitakɛna ɔmɔa.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ, mi mɔawɛ a mina nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ tɔ̃, lɛmɛ finyaa kĩ midani boe Ɔlate bati sũ ni, mideĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. Foesũ midzi nkpã ndɛ bati kĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ,

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ nkpã kadzi nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ ayamɛna nyɛ tuwĩ kakɛna, kadzi nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kadi.

english_verse: as you try to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Mibɔa mbɔdi mikɔlɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lawo boe Ɔlate a anɛ.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Mitado akũ nɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ bati akɛna nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a kamɛ, mbom minyɛ foe miwɛla,

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ kɔnyɔã kĩ balɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bakɛna nɛ kabɛla kamɛ a akũ malo.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Ade ntɛ bɛnyɛ fɔtsa flee biko nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ ni, bamɔ foe kutidu kamɔ wĩ,

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɛnyɛ kanya ni, liwo nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ. Ade foesũ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Nyinya, nɔ kĩ ɔwaa tida a, yidza kato kanɔkpa, lɔkɔa Kristo ɔhaĩ a aako nɛ nɔ akũ.”

english_verse: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
translation_verse: Foesũ midã kadã wĩ nɛ ayekĩ midzi nkpã akũ. Mitadzi ndɛ bati kĩ binyína kadi, mbom midzi ndɛ anyansãfɔ aye.

english_verse: These are evil times, so make every minute count.
translation_verse: Mikɛna osi nyɛ osi kĩ mina finyaa akũ adzuma kakɛna wĩ, kitonɛkĩ budeĩ nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna fuwi kamɛ.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mitakɛna mi akũ badzimbifɔ, mbom mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ míanu lɛtsa a kĩ boe Ɔlate awɛ kĩ mikɛna a kayɔ.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Mitamɔa bavɛ miwuga, kitonɛkĩ fɔafɔ̃ oti akɛna fɔtsa kpa, mbom mifɔ̃ Hũhũ a ɛtɛ mi kamɛ flee.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Mikɔa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ Psalomo Ovoli, asɔli tɔnɔ mɔ hũhũ kamɛ tɔnɔ milɔmɛna mɔ akũ. Misã kamu tɔnɔ mɔ kawɔlɛ tɔnɔ mikpa boe Ɔlate nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Minyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kɔlɛ daa nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ. Batsɔ̃ Mɔ Banyɔ Bidzi Ndɛ Batɛ Badonɛ Aye.

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi batsole kĩ bidzi fɔnyɔ, midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banyɔ ndɛ ayekĩ miadɔla akũ kakpa boe Ɔlate a,

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ onyole nyɛ lɔlɔ ɛkpa ɔtsɔ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo lɛmɛ nyɛ asɔli a lɔlɔ. Asɔli bati a nyɛ Kristo sukɛna, ade Kristo mɔawɛ a nyɛ ye Ɔtɛnɛ a.

english_verse: Wives should always put their husbands first, as the church puts Christ first.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ batsole bɛdɔla be akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ bɛkpa banyɔ, ndɛ ayekĩ asɔli bati a lɛmɛ adɔla be akũ kakpa Kristo a.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Mi banyɔ, miwɛ mi batsɔ̃ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo wɛ asɔli bati a kalɛ, ɛkɔa ye nkpã ɛkpa nɛ ye lɔlɔ.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ yakɔa ɛkpalɛ asɔli bati a akũ, nɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ye kalɛ ɛkpalɛ be akũ, ndɛ ayekĩ bawɔla oti mui a aye.

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: Ɛwɛ kĩ asɔli bati a kĩ yaakɔa ɛkpa ye a akũ bɛkpalɛ yededeede, bɛlɛ kadã, ĩye tuduli, ĩye katsĩĩtsĩĩ, mɔ efĩĩ adima ɛtana nɛ be akũ.
