english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ banyole bɛwɛ be batsɔ̃ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bawɛ be mɔawɛ sukɛna kalɛ a. Onyole kĩ yawɛ ɔtsɔ̃ kalɛ ni, ye mɔawɛ akũ ɛwɛ kalɛ.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Odima lákesĩ ye mɔawɛ sukɛna, mbom yadɔɔla se, kadã se kadã wĩ, ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo lɛmɛ adãmɛna asɔli bati a akũ,

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ ye sukɛna a akũ fɔkɔ fudi bɔanɛ.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ onyole aafɔnɛ ɔlɛga mɔ ɔma eyi ɛkɔa akũ ɛmɛna mɔ ɔtsɔ̃, lɔkɔa be nviã a bɛkɛna oti mɔa.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ ɛbɛla nɛ Baguma kalɛ kĩĩ kamɛ a dzũ paa. Manu foe kayɔ kĩ Kristo mɔ asɔli bati a ɔmɔa kakɛna balɛ.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ fɔatamɔ mi malo. Mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi ɛwɛ ɔtsɔ̃ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ yawɛ ye akũ kalɛ, ade ayea mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi lɛmɛ ebu ɔnyɔ a.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Mi babisɛ̃, mibu mi bamanɛ, kitonɛkĩ Kristo kamɛ lɛkɛnana wĩ fɔanɛ kĩ miakɛna.

english_verse: and you will have a long and happy life.”
translation_verse: ayekĩ nɔ kadzi kamɛ aalɛ, odzi nkpã gɛlɛɛlɛ nɛ tite akũ.”

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Mi balɛga, mitakado mi babi kalɔkpa, mbom midɔɔla be kadɔɔla wĩ, mivɛlɛ be, mikpa be kɔdɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate osi a akũ. Kɛnɛ Kĩ Basate Mɔ Balate Bidzi Kadzi Wĩ.

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Mi basate, mibu mi tite akũ balate nɛ libe mɔ kukũtila kamɛ. Mikɛna foe mɔ mi tɔwɔlɛ flee ndɛ ayekĩ míasum Kristo.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Mitakɛna foe anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ kasum, ayekĩ baamu mi sũ, mbom ndɛ Kristo basumunɛ aye ni, mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma awɛ a futo mi tɔwɔlɛ flee kamɛ.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Mikɛna mi basate tudzuma nɛ kawɔlɛ kamɛ ndɛ boe Ɔlate miasum, kĩ nnɛ́ batidziwa miasum.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate aase odi nyɛ odi kɔtɔ nɛ adzuma wĩ a kĩ ɛkɛna a akũ, ntɛ ɛnyɛ ɔsate ĩye edzi ye akũ akũ.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Mi balate lɛmɛ, kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna foe lɔmɔ mikpa mi basate, lɔkɔa mifɔ̃ be libe kado. Mite anɛ kĩ mi atsu nviã a flee Ɔlate mɔapɛ mideĩ nɛ ode, kĩ yaadzɛmɔ odi nyɛ odi, ade ɛláadã odima anɛ a. Mido Hũhũ Kamɛ Kawũkanɔ Fɔtsa.

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Ke kawũna kamɛ a, mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ boe Ɔlate ɛna ɔsĩ ebu, fɔtsã ye kɔbɛ̃ kpale akũ.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Mibla kawũkanɔ fɔtsa flee a kĩ Baguma kpa mi a, ayekĩ míapuli miyidza midza nɛ Abonsam tɛdake tisi a akũ.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ bɔmɔ́ batidziwa lamɛna kawũ kanɔ, mbom bɔmɔ́ ablɔ hũhũ kpa kĩ edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ, hũhũ kĩ yanya akũ, hũhũ kĩ edeĩ otumi, mɔ hũhũ kpa kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔtũ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ lamɔ kanɔ.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Foesũ mibla Baguma kawũkanɔ fɔtsa flee a finyaa, ayekĩ ntɛ Luwi kpa a ya ni, míapuli midza minɔ kawũ a minaawũna, mibuki mina kɔbɛ̃ nɛ mi kamɛ.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Foesũ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, mikɔa ɔnɔkɔali mibɔa abɔsɔ, mikɔa tuwĩ kakɛna misua mi ɔwɔlɛ ndɛ tɔwɔlɛ libĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ aye.

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: Ade mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ milɛ lukudɔ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ kɛnyɛ mi kawũkanɔ tɛpambua kĩ miado.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ni, milɛ katɛkado ndɛ fubĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade foe bɔakɔa budina fubĩĩ mɔ fi a kĩ Okesĩnɛ a atalɛ a.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Mitsa Baguma nkpã katɛ a ndɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ lɔbɔɛ aye, milɛ Baguma kalɛ a ndɛ lɛpamɛ gɛlɛɛlɛ kĩ Hũhũ a kɔa edo nɛ mi awɛ.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ yĩ malo lɔlɔ kĩ Baguma edo yĩ fɔlɛtsa wĩ nɛ onukpɛ̃, ayekĩ ntɛ maalɛ kɔdzɛla ni, maapuli ndo ɔwɔlɛ ĩnyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa a ntsa bati.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ manɛ sũ, ade foesũ nwaa kɔla malo a. Mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa yĩ kĩ mpuli ndo ɔwɔlɛ nlɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a ndɛ ayekĩ fɔfɛta. Paulo Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛkpa boe bawaɛ̃ a flee lukudɔ, ɔdɔ mɔ katɛkado.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Baguma ɛmɔ be flee a kĩ bɛkɔa ɔdɔ kĩ ɛla kawũna a bawɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kalɛ a kɔnya.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, mɔ Timoteo kĩ bɔnyɛ Kristo Yesu basumunɛ sɛkɛ̃. Bɔtsɛlɛ ye bɔama mi Baguma bade a kĩ mideĩ nɛ Filipi, kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a, mɔ asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babumɛnanɛ a flee.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul's Prayer for the Church in Philippi
translation_verse: Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Paulo Bɔa Mpaɛ Nɛ Ye Ovoli a Bakãnɛ a Lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: Manyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ nte anɛ nɛ mi akũ,

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: ade lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ mabɔa mpaɛ nɛ mi flee lɔlɔ ni, mabɔa ye mɔ kawɔlɛ,

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: nɛ ayekĩ mibumɔ yĩ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ, kito luwi lɛtɔnyade a kɛyawo nviã kĩĩ.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ matɛ kado kĩ Baguma a kĩ eyi adzuma wĩ kĩĩ kakɛna kayɔ nɛ mi kamɛ a, aafɔ̃ mikɛna ye ɛnaawũna nɛ Kristo Yesu luwi a akũ.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Yĩ anɛ teĩ nɛ mi akũ daa! Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ nkaakɔna mi akũ lɔmɔ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma mɔ bɔmɔ mi flee kɔnya kĩ miamɔ lubo mɔ yĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nwaa kɔla a. Lɛtsa a kĩ libu nyɛ kĩ mibumɔ yĩ bɔlamɛna Kalɛ Wĩ a lɔlɔ kapili, kĩ kitim lɛmɛ.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Baguma nyɛ yĩ ɔdansini kĩ ɔnɔkɔali malɛ, kĩ makɔna mi flee mɔ ɔdɔ a kĩ eto Kristo Yesu kamɛ a.

english_verse: I pray that your love will keep on growing and you will fully know and understand
translation_verse: Mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ mi ɔdɔ a ebu ebo anɛ nɛ kadikanyi mɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu dzununuunu kamɛ,

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: ayekĩ míapuli misa fɔtsa wĩ mikpa mi akũ, lɔkɔa míanya bati kpalɛwa kĩ efĩĩ mɔ nfumusu adima lɛláana nɛ be akũ nɛ Kristo Luwi a akũ.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ aayi mɔ ɔbla wĩ kabɔa a kĩ Yesu Kristo odi aapuli ɛkpa a, fɔnya kukũkpalɛ mɔ kamu fɔkpa Baguma. Ɔmɔa Kakɛna Mɔ Kristo Kamɛ Nkpã Wĩ a Deĩ.

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mawɛ kĩ mianyi kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔya nɛ yĩ akũ a bumɛna Kalɛ Wĩ a kɛnaa lɔtɔ.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ sodzafɔ a kĩ badzɔlɛ lɛgã tɔtɔ akũ a flee, mɔ bati bɛbã a kĩ bideĩ nɛ awĩ a mɔ́ biyi ɔsũ kĩ Kristo sũ mɔ nwaa kɔla.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, be kamɛ badi ade lɛtsã nɛ Kristo akũ kitonɛkĩ banɔ yĩ lineke kawɛ yĩ sɔwã, lɛmɛ badi kɔ̃ ade lɛtsã a mɔ adzuni wĩ.

english_verse: They love Christ and know I am here to defend the good news about him.
translation_verse: Bati katsu kayade kĩĩ akɛna adzuma mɔ ɔdɔ kitonɛkĩ binyina kĩ Baguma lɛkpa yĩ adzuma kĩ mpili ye Kalɛ Wĩ a lɔlɔ.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã a láde lɛtsã nɛ Kristo akũ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ, mbom bade de nɛ be odi kawɛ onukpɛ̃. Bɛkɔna kĩ bakɛna foe bɛkɔa bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa bɛkpa yĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nwaa kɔla, lɔkɔa lubo kamɔ lɛna ɔsĩ libu.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ lɛnyɛ́ latsama! Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bide lɛtsã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ĩye nɛ fɔvã kama osi akũ malo ni, kĩ Kristo akũ bide lɛtsã a sũ ni, kawɔlɛ de yĩ.

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina kĩ mi mpaɛbɔ nɛ yĩ lɔlɔ mɔ Yesu kabumɛna a kĩ kito Kristo Hũhũ a sũ ni, baanyɛ yĩ nɛ kɔla.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Yĩ kawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ madã anɛ nyɛ kĩ kɔnyɔã kɔtakɔ yĩ nɛ yĩ adzuma kamɛ, titiliwu nɛ lɔkɔ kĩĩ, mbom nna ɔwɔlɛ ayekĩ maakɔa yĩ sukɛna flee ndo Kristo obu ntɛ ndzi nkpã ĩye nku malo.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Litsa nyɛ nkpã? Nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ kɔ̃ ni, Kristo ndzi nkpã nkpa, lɛmɛ ntɛ maaku ni, maana foe akũ nfasɔ mba.

english_verse: I don't know what to choose. I could keep on living and doing something useful.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ maadzi nkpã mpuli nkɛna adzuma kĩ edeĩ nfasɔ ni, kekɔ̃ maáti ĩnyi foe kamɛ fukĩ ĩnyɛ ntɛ nkpã ĩye wuda.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Ndeĩ nɛ fɔtsa atsu nviã kayite. Mawɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ manɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ nnaa Kristo sɛkɛ̃, kĩ lɛnɛnɛ lɛbɛ̃.

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Ntɛ fukĩĩ ndo, foesũ ĩnyina kĩ maadzi nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, mbuki nkɛna adzuma mɔ mi flee minamɛna lɔtɔ, mimɔ́ kawɔlɛ nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ kĩ ntɛ mbuki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ni, míapuli mipia nɛ yĩ akũ kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ finyaa nyɛ kĩ, midzi nkpã ndɛ bati kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a, ayekĩ ntɛ ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ ĩye ntápuli ĩya malo ni, maanu kĩ midzɛ̃ pintii, nɛ hũhũ mɔa adzuni mɔa kamɛ, miapili katɛkado a Kalɛ Wĩ a lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: Mitavila mi bakesĩnɛ, mbom mido ɔwɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ binyi kĩ Baguma aawɔla be kokooko, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ yaakpa mi nkpã, kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛfɔ̃ minya akũ.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kpa mi osi kĩ misum Kristo nnɛ́ nɛ ayekĩ mitɛ ye mido a odi sũ, mbom nɛ ayekĩ miamɔ lubo nɛ ye lɔlɔ a sũ.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Finyaakĩĩ míapuli minɔ kawũ a mɔ yĩ. Ade kawũ mɔapɛ a kĩ mimɔ́ kĩ nnɔ ntɛ̃ a, ndɛ ayekĩ minu a, ade ke mɔapɛ a nlamɛna kanɔ a.

english_verse: Christ encourages you, and his love comforts you. God's Spirit unites you, and you are concerned for others.
translation_verse: Nkpã a kĩ midzi nɛ Kristo kamɛ a ado mi kɔbɛ̃, ade ye ɔdɔ adɔla mi ɔwɔlɛ a. Mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Hũhũ a, ade miakɛna mi akũ sɛmɛ kalɛ, kamɔ akũ kɔnya a.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kĩ mideĩ adzuni mɔa. Miawɛ akũ kalɛ, kakɛna ɔmɔa nɛ hũhũ mɔ adzuni mɔa kamɛ nɛ lɛtsa mɔapɛ akũ.

english_verse: Don't be jealous or proud, but be humble and consider others more important than yourselves.
translation_verse: Mitakɛna lɛtsama nɛ mi odi kawɛ onukpɛ̃, ĩye miwɛ kĩ miapia akũ. Midɔla akũ mikpa akũ, mibu bati bɛbã kĩ bɛnɛnɛ bɛbɛ̃ mi.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Odima ɛtakɔna fɔtsa wĩ ɛkpa ye odi akũ, mbom ɛwɛ bati bɛbã lɛmɛ fude.

english_verse: and think the same way that Christ Jesus thought:
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ ɔbla a kĩ ɛna nɛ Kristo Yesu kamɛ a, ɛna nɛ mi malo kamɛ.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ edeĩ nɛ Baguma kutidu kamɛ malo ni, ɛtákɔna kĩ yakɔa ye kɔbɛ̃ ɛtsa kĩ bɛmɔ Baguma biketi.

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: Mbom ɛfɔnɛ ye obu kadzakɔ̃ a awɛ faa, ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkɛna osumunɛ. Bɛma ye ndɛ otidziwa aye, ade ɛya nɛ oti kutidu kamɛ a.

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ɛdɔla ye akũ, etse Baguma kɛnawo wuda nɛ asendua akũ.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ Baguma dɛla ye nɛ ode flee, ade ete ye dĩ kĩ lɛbɛ̃ dĩ lidi nyɛ lidi a.

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ bɛbɔa Yesu dĩ ni, kɛfɛta kĩ fɔtsa a kĩ fudzi nkpã nɛ tite mɔ ode, mɔ tite ɔda fɔ́ake aduli.

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: Ade foe flee aanyɛ onukpɛ̃ kĩ Yesu Kristo nyɛ boe Ɔlate, bɛkɔa bimu Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a. Mivɔlɛ Ndɛ Fusibii Aye Nɛ Katinya Kamɛ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ miatse yĩ ɔlɛdo lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ kĩ nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, ade ayea fusĩ kĩ ntɛ nláa mi sɛkɛ̃ malo ni, miakɛna miba ayekĩ ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a. Mikɔa libe mɔ kukũtila mikɛna adzuma miwũna mitsa kĩ mina nkpã katɛ,

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ Baguma lamɛna adzuma kakɛna nɛ mi kamɛ daa ayekĩ míafɔnɛ akũ awɛ mikɛna nɛ ye kawɛ wĩ akũ.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: ayekĩ míanya bati kĩ bɛtákɔ be kɔtɔ, kĩ be akũ kpalɛ ndɛ Baguma babi kĩ bɛkpɔla, kĩ bidzi nɛ katinya kpa kĩ kiyi mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ kamɛ, lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ tɔkpa lɛláa mi akũ. Kɛnɛ kĩ miavɔlɛ nɛ be kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ fusibii avɔlɛ nɛ ode,

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: ntɛ miatsa be nkpã kalɛ a. Nɛ Kristo Luwi a akũ ni, maapuli mpia nɛ mi akũ kĩ yĩ mbɔdibɔ mɔ adzuma tákɛna pupulidza.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ baako yĩ babɔanɛ nɛ tite nɛ mi katɛkado akũ ndɛ afɔliɛ fɔtsa aye ni, kawɔlɛ aade yĩ, ade fɔ́anya bɔmɔ mi flee kawɔlɛ a.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo kawɔlɛ kide mi, mimɔ kawɔlɛ mɔ yĩ a. Paulo Mu Timoteo Mɔ Epafrodito.

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Ntɛ fɔnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu kawɛ ni, matɛ kado kĩ owi lɛláabuna mɔ maado Timoteo nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ mi akũ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ yayabi yĩ a aado yĩ kawɔlɛ.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Ye odi keĩ nyɛ oti kĩ yanu yĩ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ mɔ oti kĩ mi fɔlɛtsa tsɛla ye.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã a kɔ̃ ni, be odi kalɛ liti bitomɛna, kĩ nnɛ́ fukĩ fɔnyɛ Yesu Kristo fude.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Mi mɔawɛ minyina ayekĩ Timoteo nyɛ oti titiliwu mɔ ayekĩ ndɛ obi mɔ ɔlɛga aye ni, bɔmɔ ye bɔkɛna adzuma nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Foesũ madã anɛ kĩ ntɛ nsila mmɔ́ ayekĩ yĩ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ la ni, maado ye nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Matɛ kado nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ kĩ yĩ mɔawɛ a maapuli ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nkɔna kĩ fusĩ kĩ mado boe ɔwaɛ̃ Epafrodito nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ bɔmɔ ye bɔkɛna adzuma, bɔnɔ kawũ, ade ɛnya mi fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ yĩ obumɛnanɛ a.

english_verse: but now he is eager to see you. He is worried, because you heard he was sick.
translation_verse: Akũ asĩ ye kĩ ɛmɔ mi flee, ade ewo ɔblɔ kĩ minu kĩ ye fukɛna kamɛ bu kade.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, ɛsɔ paa kĩ ɛna nɛ wuda mɔ nkpã kayite, lɛmɛ Baguma mɔ́ bɔmɔ ye kɔnya. Ntɛ fɔtana lɔmɔ ni, kufɛ yĩ kalɔɛ aaba yĩ kalɔ.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Ade foesũ akũ asĩ yĩ kĩ mado ye nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, ayekĩ ntɛ mimɔ́ ye ni, kawɔlɛ aabuki kide mi lɔkɔa yĩ malo yĩ ɔwɔlɛ lɛka edzi yĩ.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mitɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ ndɛ ɔwaɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ. Mikpa bati kĩ bɛla ndɛ ye aye a obu,

english_verse: He almost died working for Christ, and he risked his own life to do for me what you could not.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa kĩ yakɛna Kristo adzuma ebumɔ yĩ nɛ mi kadokɔ̃, ade kite sukuloo kufɛ eku nɛ foe kamɛ a.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ kawũna kamɛ a, kawɔlɛ kide mi kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe Ɔlate a. Fɔtápiã yĩ kĩ mbuki matsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ĩnya lɔtɔ ntsɛlɛ mma mi a mma mi. Ntɛ nkɛna foe lɔmɔ malo ni, fɔ́afɔ̃ lɛtsama lɛláakɛna mi.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Midã kadã wĩ nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ akũ! Midã kadã wĩ nɛ bakpete a kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ mi akũ kĩ mitsua mi sukɛna a.

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ boe a kĩ bɔasum Baguma nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ a, mbom bitsua boe nɛ osi wĩ akũ, foesũ bɔamɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ bɔakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu. Boe kɔ̃ bɔáte anɛ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ tɛmaniɛ akũ.

english_verse: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
translation_verse: Yĩ aapuli nkɔa anɛ ntɛ nɛ tɛmaniɛ a na akũ kufɛ. Ntɛ odi kɔna kĩ yaapuli ɛkɔa anɛ ete nɛ te akũ ni, ndeĩ kadzakɔ̃ kĩ makɔna lɔmɔ mbɛ̃ oti a na kɔlaa.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Bitsua yĩ lɛkpati kĩ bɛma yĩ ke luwi lɛlɛ̃de a. Israelni manɛ, nto Benyamin katete a kamɛ. Ĩnyɛ Hebrini kpanunuunu, ade ke nɛ Yudafɔ mbla a onukpɛ̃ ni, Farisini manɛ.

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: Mpi mbla a ndo mɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ade foesũ ĩyidza ndza nɛ asɔli a akũ a. Ntɛ oti kakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ akɛna ye oti kpĩĩ nɛ Baguma anɛ ni, maapuli nlɛ kĩ nfumusu adima tána nɛ yĩ akũ.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩĩ bamɛ a kĩ nkɔna kĩ fudeĩ yĩ nfasɔ a, finyaakĩĩ nɛ Kristo sũ mabu foe fɔtsa pupulidza.

english_verse: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ fɔtsa a na odi, mbom mabu lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛnyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛlá nfasɔ, kitonɛkĩ fɔtátɛ kɔya fuwo Kristo Yesu kanyi ndɛ yĩ Ɔlate. Nɛ ye sũ nfɔnɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa awɛ, ade mabu foe flee ndɛ fukluku, ayekĩ Kristo aanya yĩ ode sũ,

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: lɔkɔa nkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye. Ade ke nláabuki nna kadzi kpĩĩ nɛ yĩ mɔawɛ akũ akũ nɛ ayekĩ makɛna nɛ mbla a akũ sũ, mbom maakɛna oti kpĩĩ nɛ Kristo katɛkado sũ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ kadzi kpĩĩ kĩ kito Baguma sɛkɛ̃ nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ nti mawɛ nyɛ kĩ manyi Kristo, mmɔ́ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔdzɛla ye kutomɛna kanɔkpa a, mmɔ́ mɔ ye lubo, lɔkɔa nkɛna ndɛ ye aye nɛ ye wuda kamɛ,

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: mɔ katɛkado kĩ yĩ malo Baguma aadzɛla yĩ etomɛna kanɔkpa ndzi nkpã. Paulo Lamɔ Atsɛ Yanaa Kawũnakɔ̃ a.

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Nlámɔ kalɛ kĩ yĩ awɛ tá lɛtsa a kĩ mawɛ ĩye kĩ nkpɔla kɔkɔɛ. Lɛmɛ nlamɛna kapili mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ yĩ awɛ ɛta fɔtsa a kĩ foesũ Kristo Yesu kɔa yĩ ɛkɛna ye ode a.

english_verse: My friends, I don't feel I have already arrived. But I forget what is behind, and I struggle for what is ahead.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, maákɔna kĩ yĩ awɛ ta fɔtsa a kɔkɔɛ. Mbom lɛtsa a kĩ makɛna nyɛ kĩ nlɛla fɔtsa a kĩ fɔya fɔtɛ̃ a, lɔkɔa nkɔa yĩ kɔbɛ̃ flee ntomɔ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛwaa nɛ lɔtɔ a liti.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: Ade foesũ nlamɛna atsɛ kawula kɔɔba kĩ maawo akũ kanyakɔ̃ a lɔkɔa ntɛ futelitsa a kĩ Baguma vɛ yĩ ɛtsãmɛna Kristo Yesu akũ kĩ ĩyaatɛ nɛ ode a.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ boe flee a kĩ bubo anɛ nɛ Baguma Hũhũ kamɛ a bɔna adzuni kĩĩ odu. Lɛmɛ ntɛ mi kamɛ badi deĩ adzuni bɛbã ni, Baguma aakpalɛ foe malo kamɛ ɛtsa mi.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Ntɛ nde aye fɔla malo ni, mifɔ̃ bubuki bɔkɛna nɛ osi a kĩ ye akũ bɔtsɛ̃ kɛyawo finyaakĩĩ a akũ.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi a flee midã yĩ ɔbla mibɔa ye odu, midã bikĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ osi wĩ akũ ndɛ ayekĩ budzi bɔtsa mi a.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Mbi mi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɔkɔ pii kɛyatɛ̃, lɛmɛ mbuki malɛ foe finyaa mɔ babe malo. Bati pii deĩ kĩ be nkpã kadzi kamɛ a fɔ̃ bɛdani bakesĩnɛ bɛkpa Kristo wuda nɛ asendua akũ a.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Nɛ kawũna kamɛ a, bati kĩĩ aawɔ nɛ fi luwotu kpale kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ be baguma nyɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kakɛna. Bamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ be fɔnyɔãtsa kakɛna akũ, ade katinya kĩĩ kamɛ fɔtsa odi akũ bakɔna a.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ ni, boe ɔtɔ nyɛ ode, ade budzi bɔadã boe Ɔtɛnɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo anɛ kĩ eto ode ɛya a.

english_verse: has power over everything, and he will make these poor bodies of ours like his own glorious body.
translation_verse: Yaakɔa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔfɔ̃ yapuli kanya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ a, ɛdani boe sukɛna kĩ sɛlá kɔbɛ̃ kĩĩ siketi mɔ ye sukɛna kpalɛwa a.

english_verse: Dear friends, I love you and long to see you. Please keep on being faithful to the Lord. You are my pride and joy. Paul Encourages the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bati kĩ mawɛ kalɛ, kĩ makɔna mi akũ, miado yĩ kawɔlɛ. Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ midza pintii nɛ mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ akũ a.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Make Ewodia mɔ Sinteke aduli kĩ bɛbɔa mbɔdi binu akũ kayɔ ndɛ bawaɛ̃tsole aye nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Nɔ malo yĩ ɔkɔba adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali, mawɛ kĩ bumɛna batsole kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ be mɔ Klemens mɔ asɔli bati bɛbã a bɛkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ bibumɔ yĩ bɔlɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ bati kĩĩ buĩ bido nɛ Baguma ovoli a kĩ nkpã badzinɛ buĩ deĩ a kamɛ.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Kawɔlɛ kide mi luwi daa kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe Ɔlate a. Mbuki malɛ kĩ kawɔlɛ kide mi!

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa odi nyɛ odi. Boe Ɔlate kaya wo ɔtɔ kiyua.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Mitaha akũ nɛ lɛtsama akũ, mbom nɛ mi mpaɛbɔ kamɛ ni, mivia Baguma lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ mi, minyɛ ye kɔlɛ luwi daa.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Ade Baguma lukudɔ a kĩ lide lɛba otidziwa kayɔkanu a, lɛdãmɛna mi tɔwɔlɛ mɔ adzuni akũ nɛ Kristo Yesu dĩ akũ.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Midzi nkpã nɛ yĩ fɔtsa a kĩ mikɔlɛ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, fukĩ mitɛ, fukĩ minu mɔ ɔbla a kĩ mimɔ́ nɛ yĩ akũ a onukpɛ̃. Ade Baguma a kĩ yakpa boe lukudɔ a aadzi nɛ mi kamɛ. Paulo Nyɛ Filipifɔ Kɔlɛ Nɛ Be Futelitsa a Akũ.

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Nɛ boe Ɔlate a sũ ni, kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ gɛlɛɛlɛ liti a, mibuki mina osi miatsa kĩ miakɔna yĩ akũ. Maátsa kĩ mifɔ̃ yĩ akũ kadãmɛna, mbom kana mitána osi kĩ mianyɛ foe mitsa.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Ade nlámɛna katsa kĩ nsĩ litsedi, kitonɛkĩ nkɔlɛ nɛ kadzi kadi nyɛ kadi kamɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ndeĩ liwo yĩ anɛ.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: Ĩnyina lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ ohiã ade ĩnyina lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnyɛ akũ kana fɔtsa lɛmɛ a. Nɛ kadzi osi nyɛ osi akũ ni, nkɔlɛ ayekĩ kɛnɛ kĩ fɔtsa fuwo yĩ anɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ntɛ fɔnyɛ kɔlɛ ĩye funitsã kabɔ lɔkɔ, ntɛ ndeĩ foe sukuloo ĩye fɔbɔ yĩ malo.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mikɛna foe kakɛna wĩ paa kĩ mibumɔ yĩ nɛ yĩ kasuli kamɛ.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Mi Filipifɔ minyina yededeede kĩ ndzakũ nɛ Makedonia nɛ kayɔkayi, kĩ nkade lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ a, mi odi nyɛ asɔli bati a kĩ bɛkabumɛna yĩ.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ lɔkɔ kĩ nna nɛ Tesalonika malo ni, ntɛ nsĩ kabumɛna miamɛna yĩ futelitsa.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ futelitsa mawɛ kufɛ, mbom nfasɔ a kĩ míana mibu mitomɛna mi fɔtsa kate kamɛ a mawɛ.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Finyaa mise yĩ kɔtɔ minyina malo. Futelitsa a kĩ mimɛna mitsãmɛna Epafrodito akũ a yawo yĩ sɛkɛ̃, foesũ finyaa nna fɔtsa a kĩ fusĩ a flee. Futelitsa a na kɛna ndɛ afɔliɛ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bɛbɔa bɛkpa Baguma, kĩ fuwo ye anɛ fudo ye kawɔlɛ lɛmɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: Yĩ Baguma a kĩ masum a, aakpa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ misĩ a etomɛna ye kukũkpalɛ beblebee nɛ Yesu Kristo kamɛ a.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bumu boe Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kito finyaa kanaa daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ. Paulo Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Mawɔ̃na Baguma bati a kĩ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo Yesu a. Boe bawaɛ̃ Kristofɔ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ awɔ̃na mi a flee.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Baguma bati kpalɛwa nɛ awĩ a awɔ̃na mi, titiliwu bikĩ bideĩ nɛ Romafɔ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ tɔtɔ kamɛ a lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi flee.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and from Timothy, who is also a follower.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ndani Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃, kĩ bɔmɔ Timoteo lɛtsɛlɛ ye bɔama mi.

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: Bɔtsɛlɛ ye bɔamɛna boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ be akũ, kĩ bideĩ nɛ Kolose, kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye a. Baguma, boe Ɔlɛga ɛmɔ mi kɔnya, ɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Paulo Nyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ Nɛ Kolosefɔ Lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɔabɔa mpaɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ daa ni, bɔanyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a kɔlɛ,

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ bunu ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo Yesu mido, mɔ ayekĩ miawɛ Baguma bade a flee kalɛ.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkɔa ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, Kalɛ Wĩ a bɛma mi a, minu kɔnɛte a kĩ kudeĩ kɔkpa mi a. Foesũ mi katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ dzɛ̃ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ miadã anɛ a, kĩ bɛmanɛ biyi nɛ ode bɛkpa mi a akũ.

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: Kalɛ Wĩ a lamɛna anɛ kabo kawũ babi wĩ, ade kɛlamɛna kagba nɛ katinya kamɛ flee, ndɛ ayekĩ kɛgba nɛ mi kamɛ kito luwi a kĩ minya lɔtɔ minu ayekĩ Baguma amɔ bati kɔnya, ade minu ke kayɔ kanu wĩ a.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Epafra lɛtsa mi fɔtsa nɛ Baguma bati kɔnyakamɔ akũ. Ɛnyɛ boe ɔkɔba adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kĩ bɔawɛ kalɛ paa, kĩ yakɛna Kristo adzuma a nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ nɛ boe kadokɔ̃.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: Ye libi boe mi ɔdɔ a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a kɔa edo nɛ mi kamɛ a.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ bɔabɔa mpaɛ daa nɛ mi lɔlɔ, kito luwi a kĩ bunu mi nkã a. Bɔake Baguma aduli kĩ ebinya mi adzuni kamɛ mipuli minyi ye, mina nyansã mɔ fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu flee a kĩ Baguma Hũhũ a akpa a.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ mipuli midzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ Boe Ɔlate awɛ, mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ fɔ́awo ye anɛ daa, lɔkɔa mi adzuma wĩ adi nyɛ adi aawũ babi, mibo anɛ nɛ Baguma kanyi kamɛ.

english_verse: His glorious power will make you patient and strong enough to endure anything, and you will be truly happy.
translation_verse: Baguma ɛkɔa ye kɔbɛ̃ flee a kĩ kuto ye kukũkpalɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kamɛ epi mi, ayekĩ míapuli mido ɔwɔlɛ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ lɛmɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: Mikɔa kawɔlɛ minyɛ Ɔlɛga a kɔlɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kitonɛkĩ ye lɛfɔ̃ mikpɔla, kĩ mimɔ bati a kĩ Baguma kpalɛ be akũ a, míana tsɛfã nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Baguma lɛnyɛ boe sɔũ etomɛna ɔtũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ, ɛkɔa edo nɛ ye Obi kĩ yaátunɔ ye kalɛ a lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ.

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Kristo nyɛ Baguma a kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ a kutidu. Ade ye nyɛ Baguma Obi ɔtɔnyade kĩ yanya fɔtsa flee a kĩ bɛbɔa nɛ katinya kamɛ a akũ a.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tsã Kristo akũ ɛbɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lideĩ nɛ tite mɔ ode, fukĩ bɔamɔ mɔ fukĩ bɔámɔ, mɔ hũhũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃, kĩ fɔnyɛ fɔgã, abãã mɔ otumifɔ. Baguma tsã ye akũ ɛbɔa katinya kamɛ fɔtsa flee edo nɛ ye awɛ.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Kristo deĩ katinya fɔmɔ bɛbɔa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade fɔtsɛ̃ ye akũ fɔtsa flee akɛna ɔmɔa a.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: Ye nyɛ asɔli a lɔlɔ, ade asɔli a lɛmɛ nyɛ ye sukɛna a. Asɔli a nɛ́ eto ye kamɛ, ade ɛnyɛ Baguma Obi ɔtɔnyade kĩ eyidza eto kanɔkpa, ayekĩ ye odi aanya lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ kĩ Obi ɛna ye Baguma kutidu a flee odu.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: Baguma tsã obi akũ, ɛlɔla bɛmɔ katinya kamɛ flee kayite. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ ɛtsã ye Obi a kĩ ewula babɔanɛ nɛ asendua akũ a akũ, ɛyamɛna lukudɔ nɛ ye mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ tite mɔ ode a flee kayite.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, mina mɔ lugo nɛ Baguma akũ, ade minya ye bakesĩnɛ nɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ mikakɛna mɔ tɔkpa a kĩ mikakɔna a sũ.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ finyaa, nɛ Obi wuda nɛ asendua akũ a sũ ni, Baguma kɛna mi ye bakɔba ayekĩ yaakpã mi ɛyamɛna nɛ ye anɛ ndɛ bati kĩ mi akũ kpalɛ, kĩ nfumusu lɛláa mi akũ, kĩ odima lɛmɛ lɛláapuli ɛkɔ mi kɔtɔ.

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: Foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ midza pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ, mitafɔnɛ mi kɔnɛte a kĩ mideĩ nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ a kĩ bubi mi minu a awɛ. Ade Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ akũ bide lɛtsã bɛkpa katinya kamɛ flee a. Ade Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ osumunɛ yĩ, Paulo, ndani a. Paulo Kɛna Adzuma Ndɛ Asɔli a Ɔsumunɛ Aye.

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Finyaa, kawɔlɛ ade yĩ kĩ mmɔ́ lubo nɛ mi lɔlɔ. Mamɔ lubo nɛ yĩ sukɛna kamɛ nkɔa nwũna lubo a kĩ lite kĩ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ asɔli a lɔlɔ ɛmɔ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Baguma kɛna yĩ asɔli a ɔsumunɛ, kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ nkpa mi, ayekĩ bati flee aanyi Baguma fɔlɛtsa a flee kanyi wĩ.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: Ade fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa kĩĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkɔla batidziwa kasinu flee kito anɛ kɔkɔkɔɛ a. Lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma nyɛ foe kanya ɛtsa ye bati a kĩ bɛtɛ ye bido a.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Baguma kawɛ nyɛ kĩ yanyɛ ye fɔtsa kɔlawa mɔ kɔya a, mɔ foe kukũkpalɛ a ɛtsa bati flee. Fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa a nyɛ kĩ, Kristo deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, foesũ mideĩ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a kudi.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: Ade foesũ bɔade lɛtsã nɛ Kristo akũ kakpa odi nyɛ odi a. Bɔnɛɛ boe nyansã flee bɔadɛ odi nyɛ odi katsa be fɔtsa lɛmɛ, ayekĩ bɔ́akpã be bɔnamɛna Baguma anɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bibo anɛ bɛkpɔla, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo lɛmɛ.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ nlamɛna kapili mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kakɛna adzuma a, mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kpale a kĩ Kristo ado yĩ a.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Mawɛ kĩ minyi adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a kĩ nkɛna nkpa mi, mɔ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea, mɔ bati nkaɛ flee a kĩ binyína yĩ mɔ anɛ a.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: Malɛ fukĩĩ ayekĩ baado ɔwɔlɛ, bɛkɛna ɔmɔa nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ. Fɔfɔ̃ bɛna fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu yededeede a kĩ bike otse nɛ foe akũ a, binyi Baguma fɔtsa kɔlawa a kĩ foe fɔnyɛ Kristo mɔawɛ a. Fukĩĩ nyɛ akũ kana fɔtsa kpale.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: Kristo kamɛ Baguma kɔa ye fɔtsa mɔ kɔya a, kĩ foe nyɛ ye nyansã mɔ kadikanyi a ɛkɔla.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: Foesũ mabi mi kĩ mitafɔ̃ odima kĩ edeĩ sɛmɛ lɛkɛ mi mɔ fɔvã fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanyɛ.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ nláa mi kamɛ nɛ sukɛna kamɛ malo ni, ndeĩ nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ, ade kawɔlɛ ade yĩ kĩ mmɔ́ kĩ mitsɛ̃ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, ade midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ Kristo katɛkado kamɛ lɛmɛ a. Oti Nkpã Flee Kana Deĩ Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo Yesu ndɛ Ɔlate aye sũ ni, mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ ye nɛ mi nkpã kadzi kamɛ.

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Minɛ tunu nɛ ye kamɛ, midzi nkpã ndɛ ye aye, lɔkɔa midza pintii nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ bɔtsa mi a. Nɛ foe kawũna a ni, mikaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ daa.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Foesũ midã kadã wĩ kĩ odima ɛtakɔa katinya kamɛ kadikanyi mɔ kakɛ pupulidza ɛkɛ mi miyɛla osi wĩ a. Kitonɛkĩ kadikanyi a na to batidziwa tɛmaniɛ katsa kĩ bɛnyɛ bitomɛna hũhũ kĩ yanya ɔwɛ akũ a kamɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ Kristo sɛkɛ̃ futo.

english_verse: God lives fully in Christ.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Kristo kamɛ Baguma kutidu a flee deĩ,

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: ade mi ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo kpa mi nkpã kĩ ɛkpɔla flee nɛ ye kamɛ a. Kristo deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kpale nɛ hũhũ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi adi nyɛ adi akũ.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ, kĩ bɛwɔla mi mui a, mimɔ Kristo bibila, ade nɛ mui kawɔla kamɛ a, mimɔ Kristo Baguma dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɛkɔa ɛdzɛla ye a mido.

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, minyɛ bati kĩ biku nɛ hũhũ kamɛ, nɛ mi tɔkpa mɔ ayekĩ minyɛ́ Yudafɔ kĩ milá mbla a lɛmɛ sũ. Lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma kpa mi mɔ Kristo nkpã, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa boe tɔkpa flee ete boe.

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: Baguma wɔla nhihiɛ a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi kĩ esui boe, ɛkɔ boe kɔtɔ nɛ mbla a onukpɛ̃ a, ade ɛkɔa ɛbɔa nɛ asendua a akũ a.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Nɛ asendua akũ a, Kristo tɛ kɔbɛ̃ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ fɔgã mɔ hũhũ kamɛ batumifɔ a flee awɛ, ade edo be kɔnyɔã nɛ kanade, ade ɛkpã be ndɛ bati kĩ bipili be ndom aye nɛ ye kawɔlɛ kamɛ ɛnamɛna a.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Foesũ mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkã mi anɛ nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ mianya ĩye miamɔa a akũ, ĩye luwi kpalɛwa kanya, odetɔ vɔɛ̃ kade fuwi kanya mɔ Kawɛya Luwi kanya akũ.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ bamɛ flee nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lideĩ nɛ liti laya a kuyo kɛkɛ. Lɛtsa mɔawɛ a nyɛ Kristo.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ odima kĩ ɛbɔɛ ye akũ kĩ ɛbɛ̃ mi, kitonɛkĩ ɛna kanyɛkatsa titiliwu sũ lɛkɔ mi kɔtɔ, lɔkɔa ɛkɛ mi kĩ midɔla mi akũ nɛ tɛdake kamɛ misum ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ. Oti kĩĩ odu adɛla ye akũ nɛ ode pupulidza, kitonɛkĩ batidziwa adzuni odi edeĩ.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Oti kĩĩ odu wai akũ nɛ Kristo a kĩ ye nyɛ lɔlɔ a akũ. Lɛmɛ ade Kristo a kĩ ɛnyɛ lɔlɔ a sɛkɛ̃ sukɛna a flee ana funitsã katomɛna a. Ade Kristo pini sukɛna fɔtsakɔ̃ fɔtsakɔ̃ mɔ tisĩ flee ɛkpɔta, fɔabo anɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma awɛ a. Ayekĩ Bɔ́adzi Nkpã Vɔɛ̃ Nɛ Kristo Kamɛ.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Ayekĩ mimɔ Kristo liku sũ ni, minɛ́ nɛ hũhũ a kĩ yanya katinya kamɛ akũ a kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ. Lɔkɔa nde sũ midzi nkpã ndɛ katinya kĩĩ bati mianɛ? Nde sũ miadi tɛbla ndɛ,

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: “Takɛna fukĩĩ akũ adzuma, tata fukĩĩ onukpɛ̃,” ĩye “takɔa awɛ ɔta fɔbɛbã lɛmɛ”?

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Tɛbla kĩĩ flee nyɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔawɔ ntɛ bakɛna foe akũ adzuma, kitonɛkĩ batidziwa tɛbla mɔ fɔtsa katsa fɔanɛ.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Nɛ kamɔ kamɛ ni, ntɛ odi pi tɛbla kĩĩ edomɔ akũ, ɛdɔla ye akũ, mɔ ɛmɔna ye sukɛna lubo ni, nyansã baũ adi deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ, lɛmɛ fukĩna kakɛna lábumɔ oti yapuli kanya ye sukɛna kamɛ fɔwɛtsa akũ kɔlaa.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Baguma dzɛla mimɔ Kristo etomɛna kanɔkpa, foesũ mikɔa mi anɛ mite nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ode, awã kĩ Kristo dzi nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna a akũ.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ mi adzuni ete nɛ ode fɔtsa akũ, kĩ nnɛ́ nɛ tite kĩĩ fɔtsa akũ,

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ kĩ miku a, bɛkɔa mi nkpã mɔ Kristo bɛkɔla nɛ Baguma kamɛ.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Ntɛ Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ mi nkpã a, nyɛ ye akũ katinya ni, mi malo míanɛ kanya mɔ ye, nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ. Nkpã Kɔɛ a Mɔ Avɔɛ̃ Kadzi.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Foesũ mikɔ tite akũ fɔwɛtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a. Ade foe nyɛ, adɔpaa kabɔa, fɔtsa kpa kĩ fɔado oti efĩĩ, sukɛna odo fɔwɛtsa kpa, odo fɔtsa kpa mɔ anɛ ngbã. Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, anɛ ngbã nyɛ baviɔ̃ kasum.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ bamɛ aafɔ̃ Baguma kalɔkpa lɛya nɛ bati a kĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ akũ a.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Nɛ nkpã kĩ midzi mitɛ̃ a kamɛ a, mi malo mibɔa ɔbla kpa a na odu.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ finyaa kɛnɛ kĩ miafɔnɛ fukĩĩ flee awɛ. Ade foe nyɛ kalɔkpa kana, ɔwɔlɛ kahulu, likesĩ, bati kavũna, fubusuotsa mɔ fɔnyɔãtsa kalɛ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ fukĩĩ flee anɛ nɛ mi onukpɛ̃.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Mitakama fɔvã kakpa akũ, kitonɛkĩ mifɔnɛ mi tɛbla kɔɛ a awɛ.

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: Mibɔɛ ɔbla vɔɛ̃ kĩĩ mido. Baguma lamɛna tɛbla kɔɛ kadani lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ nɛ ye kutidu onukpɛ̃, ayekĩ míanyi ye kanyi wĩ.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, ntsitsemu adima lɛláa Yudafɔ mɔ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ, ĩye bikĩ bitsua fɔkpati mɔ bikĩ bɛtátsua fɔkpati a kayite. Ade ayea ntsitsemu buki ɛláa banɔvɔɛ̃, bikĩ be anɛ tábinya, mɔ bikĩ bidzi be akũ akũ mɔ basate kayite. Be flee bɛnyɛ ɔmɔa nɛ Kristo kamɛ ade Kristo lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ be flee kamɛ a.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Kĩ minyɛ Baguma bati kpalɛwa kĩ ɛpau, yawɛ kalɛ lɛmɛ sũ ni, mibɔa ɔbla vɔɛ̃ a kĩ eketimɔ foe a. Ade ye nyɛ oti kɔnyakamɔ, sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna, kadɔ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana.

english_verse: Put up with each other, and forgive anyone who does you wrong, just as Christ has forgiven you.
translation_verse: Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa akũ. Ntɛ odi fum odi ni, miakɔa mite ye ndɛ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate lɛmɛ kɔa mi tɔkpa ete mi a.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Fukĩ fɔbɛ̃ nyɛ kĩ ɔdɔ ɛna nɛ mi kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɔdɔ aboomu fɔtsa flee kakpɔta mɔ fɔakpɔla kakpɔla wĩ.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ Kristo lukudɔ a lɛnya akũ nɛ mi kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade lukudɔ kĩĩ sũ Baguma vɛ mi ɛkpɔta ndɛ oti mɔa aye a. Minya kɔlɛ banyɛnɛ.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a, mɔ ke kɔyakatɛ a flee kidzi nɛ mi kamɛ. Mitsa akũ fɔtsa, mikpa kɔdɛ nɛ nyansã flee kamɛ. Misã Psalomo tɔnɔ, asɔli tɔnɔ, mɔ Hũhũ kamɛ tɔnɔ mikɔa minyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ flee kamɛ.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Foesũ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ míakɛna ĩye míalɛ ni, mikɛna foe nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ, mitsã ye dĩ akũ minyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kɔlɛ. Batɛ Badonɛ Kadzi Nɛ Nkpã Vɔɛ̃ a Kamɛ.

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi fɔnyɔ badzinɛ, midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banyɔ, ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta Kristofɔ.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Mi batsɔ̃ bakɔãnɛ miwɛ mi batsɔ̃ kalɛ, mitakɛna be aũkani.

english_verse: Children must always obey their parents. This pleases the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi babisɛ̃, mitse mi bamanɛ ɔlɛdo nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade foe awo Baguma anɛ a.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Mi balɛga, mitado mi babi kalɔkpa, ayekĩ akpɔ lɛláaveli be.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Mi basumunɛ, mibu mi balate nɛ tite akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, mitakɛna anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa kĩ bati bimu mi. Mbom misum be nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bavila Baguma.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Adzuma adi nyɛ adi kĩ miakɛna ni, mikɛna ye mɔ mi tɔwɔlɛ flee, ndɛ boe Ɔlate miakɛna mikpa, kĩ nnɛ́ batidziwa miakɛna mikpa.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate aakpa mi ndɛ kɔtɔkase aye, lɛtsa a kĩ ɛmanɛ eyi ye bati, kitonɛkĩ Kristo, boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ a bɔasum.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Baguma aase tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a tɔkpa a kĩ bɛkɛna a kɔtɔ, kĩ oti anɛ kadã lɛláana nɛ foe kamɛ.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Mi balate mikɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛfɛta, mɔ likĩ lɛnɛnɛ lɛmɛ mikpa mi basumunɛ, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ mideĩ Ɔlate nɛ ode. Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ.

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: Mina nɛ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Ntɛ miabɔa mpaɛ ni, mi adzuni ɛdza nɛ lɛtsa mɔa akũ, mikaanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ luwi daa.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe malo lɔlɔ, ayekĩ Baguma aabinya osi ɛkpa boe bude lɛtsã nɛ Kristo kalɛ kɔlawa a akũ, kĩ ke sũ finyaa malo nwaa kɔla a.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa yĩ mpuli nkpalɛ fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa kĩĩ kamɛ ntsa yededeede ndɛ ayekĩ kɛfɛta kĩ nkɛna a.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Milɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ obu kamɛ, ayekĩ fɔ́alɛ bati katse, lɔkɔa minyi ayekĩ kɛfɛta kĩ miakpa odi nyɛ odi mbuayɛ. Kukũwɔ̃na Nkaɛ.

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Tihiko, boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ bɔátunɔ kalɛ, aayabi mi yĩ akũ fɔlɛtsa flee. Ɛnyɛ boe ɔkɔba ɔsumunɛ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ boe Ɔlate adzuma a kamɛ.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Ade foesũ nlamɛna ye kado nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ kĩ ɛyaabi mi boe akũ fɔlɛtsa, lɔkɔa edo mi kɔbɛ̃.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Onesimo, boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali, kĩ ɛnyɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa a, aatomɔ ye bɛya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃. Baabi mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛlamɛna kaya nɛ awĩ a flee.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Aristarko, kĩ bɔmɔ ye waa kɔla a, awɔ̃na mi. Ade ayea Marko, Barnaba ɔwaɛ̃nyole lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi a. Ĩnya lɔtɔ nkpa mi kanyi kĩ ntɛ Marko ya ni, mitɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Yosua kĩ bibuki bavɛ Yusto lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi. Bati ɛlalɛ kĩĩ odi nyɛ Yudafɔ kĩ bɛdani Kristofɔ bakɛna mɔ yĩ adzuma a bɔkpa Baguma lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a. Ade ye alɛ kado yĩ a.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Epafra, Kristo ɔsumunɛ, kĩ ɛnyɛ mi kamɛ ɔmɔa a lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi. Yabɔa mpaɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ luwi daa nɛ mi lɔlɔ kĩ midza pintii, mibo anɛ mikpɔla nɛ katɛkado kamɛ, lɔkɔa mikɛna Baguma kawɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: Yĩ mɔawɛ a maapuli ndi ye akũ adansiɛ kĩ yakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kakpa mi, mɔ bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea mɔ Hierapoli.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Boe ɔwaɛ̃ Luka, tutsonu ɔkɛnanɛ a kĩ bɔátunɔ kalɛ a, mɔ Dema awɔ̃na mi.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Miwɔ̃na boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea mikpa boe. Ade ayea miwɔ̃na boe ɔwaɛ̃ Nimfa mɔ asɔli bati a kĩ batsɛna nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ a lɛmɛ mikpa boe a.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mikã ovoli kĩĩ miyua ni, midã kĩ bɛnakã ye bɛkpa asɔli bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea lɛmɛ. Ade ayea kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo miakã ovoli a kĩ asɔli bati a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Laodikea aakɔa bɛma mi a.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Nɛ kawũna a, mibi Arkipo kĩ boe Ɔlate ɔsum adzuma a kĩ bɛkɔa bido nɛ ye awɛ a ni, ɛdã kĩ ɛkɛna ye ewũna pɛpɛɛpɛ.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Yĩ Paulo mɔawɛ lɛkɔa yĩ awɛ ntsɛlɛ kawɔ̃na fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ. Mite anɛ kĩ mbuki nwaa kɔla! Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a, kitomɔ mi.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Yĩ Paulo, Silvano mɔ Timoteo, bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔama mi a kĩ minyɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bade a nɛ Tesalonika a. Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Bɔanyɛ Baguma Kɔlɛ Kĩ Mikɔa Mi Akũ Mikpa Ye.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi flee lɔlɔ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ ade daa ntɛ bɔabɔa mpaɛ ni, bɔakɔa mi fɔlɛtsa kayi nɛ ye anɛ.

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: Bɔálɛla Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kabi ayekĩ mipini mi katɛkado miakɔa kakɛna adzuma. Bɔalɛ lɛmɛ ayekĩ miabumɔ bati nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ, mɔ ayekĩ mikɔa anɛ mite nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bunyina kĩ Baguma awɛ mi kalɛ paa, ade ɛpau mi kĩ minya ye bati lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ bɔyabi mi a ni, nnɛ́ kalɛ pupulidza kanɛ, mbom nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ ni, mitɛ foe kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa fɔanɛ. Mimɔ́ ayekĩ bupi boe akũ nɛ mi kamɛ kĩ fɔnya kabumɛna fɔkpa mi.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, mitomɔ boe mɔ boe Ɔlate ɔbla a, foesũ titɔ kĩ mimɔ́ lubo pii malo ni, mitɛ kalɛ a mɔ kawɔlɛ kĩ kito Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, midani nfantuhũ mikpa batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Makedonia mɔ Akaia.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nnɛ́ boe Ɔlate kalɛ kĩĩ odi lɛgba kito mi sɛkɛ̃ kɛnaa Makedonia mɔ Akaia flee, mbom mi Baguma katɛkado lɛmɛ gba nɛ kakɔ nyɛ kakɔ. Foesũ fɔtásĩ kĩ bɔlɛ kadi nɛ foe akũ.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Be mɔawɛ a balɛ ayekĩ mitɛ boe nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, mɔ ayekĩ mifɔ̃ baviɔ̃ kasum, mikɔa mi akũ mikpa Baguma kĩ ye odi dzi nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: Ade midzi miadzɔlɛ ye Obi Yesu a kĩ ɛdzɛla etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ, kĩ yaabuki eto ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ ɛya a. Ade Yesu kĩĩ odi aapuli ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna kalɔkpa a kĩ Baguma aana nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ flee akũ a kamɛ a.

english_verse: My friends, you know our time with you wasn't wasted.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, miawɛ minyina kĩ boe kaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a tánya kɔa.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Minyina ayekĩ bɛmɔna boe lubo, bivũna boe nɛ Filipi fɔmɔ bɔyawo mi sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Tesalonika. Lɛmɛ titɔ kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ boe akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ awã malo ni, Baguma do boe kɔbɛ̃ bubi mi ye Kalɛ Wĩ a.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
translation_verse: Kɔdɛ a kĩ bɔakpa mi a táto bati kakɛ, adzuni kpa ĩye tɛdake tisi kamɛ,

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Minyina pefee kĩ nnɛ́ onukpɛ̃ mɛnɛmɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa bɔkɔa bɔma mi, ade ke bɔtábɛɛlɛ anɛ nɛ odima fɔtsa akũ da a. Baguma odi nyɛ boe ɔdansini.

english_verse: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
translation_verse: Bɔtáwɛ kamu butomɛna mi ĩye bati bɛbã sɛkɛ̃. Titɔ kĩ boe ndɛ Kristo fɔtɔ banyanɛ aye budeĩ osi kĩ bɔavia fɔtsa butomɛna mi sɛkɛ̃ malo ni,

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Nɛ ayekĩ bɔawɛ mi kalɛ paa sũ ni, bɔawɛ kĩ mi malo minu Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ. Ade fɔnyɛ́ Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ kĩĩ odi, mbom bɔkɔa boe mɔawɛ akũ bɔkpa mi, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ kɔya mikpa boe paa.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mite anɛ ayekĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, bɔkabi mi Baguma Kalɛ Wĩ a, bɔkɛna adzuma lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa bɔdã boe akũ, ayekĩ bɔláakɔa fɔlɔtsa fudima bute nɛ odima akũ.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Mi mɔawɛ a mɔ Baguma míapuli midi boe akũ adansiɛ kĩ, kĩ budzi nɛ mi batɛ badonɛ kamɛ a, bupi boe akũ kapi wĩ. Bɔkɛna fɔtsa wĩ, ade odima támɔ nfumusu nɛ boe akũ a.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Minyina lɛmɛ kĩ bɔlɛ odi nyɛ odi ndɛ ayekĩ obilɛga alɛ ye babi.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: Budo mi kɔbɛ̃, bɔkadɔla mi tɔwɔlɛ, ade bɔkadɛ mi kĩ midzi nkpã kĩ yaadɔ Baguma sɛmɛ. Ye mɔawɛ lɛvɛ mi kĩ mina nkpã katɛ nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ mɔ kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Ade lɛtsa bɛbã sũ kĩ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ daa nyɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bubi mi Baguma kalɛ wĩ kĩĩ a, mitákɔa ke mikɛna batidziwa kalɛ, mbom mibu ke, mitɛ ke ndɛ Baguma kalɛ aye, kĩ kɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ. Baguma kalɛ kĩĩ akɛna adzuma nɛ mi batɛ badonɛ a nkpã kadzi kamɛ.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ mi akũ nɛ awĩ a, ade foe mɔapɛ a lɛya nɛ Baguma bati akũ nɛ Yudea tite akũ a. Lubo a kĩ mimɔ́ mitomɛna mi bati mɔawɛ kamɛ a, ade de Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ Yesu bido a lɛmɛ mɔ́ bitomɛna Yudafɔ mɔawɛ kamɛ a.

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ kĩĩ lɛkɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, bɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu lɛmɛ, ade be tomɔ boe malo liti a. Be fɔkɛlatsa do Baguma kalɔkpa ade biyidza bɛdza nɛ bati flee akũ a.

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Bɛbɔa mbɔdi kĩ basua boe osi kĩ bɔtabi bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a kalɛ wĩ a kĩ kaafɔ̃ bɛna nkpã a kĩ ɛlá kawũna a. Nɛ fukĩĩ kakɛna kamɛ ni, bɛkakɛna tɔkpa pii kabu be tɔkpa. Finyaa Baguma kalɔkpa yidza nɛ be akũ. Paulo Kawɛ Kĩ Yanaasɛla Asɔli a.

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ade fuwi sukuloo kĩ bɔdzakũ bɔfɔnɛ mi a. Titɔ kĩ bɔámɔ akũ anɛ mɔ anɛ malo ni, bɔakɔna mi akũ paa. Bɔwɛ paa ade bɔbɔa mbɔdi kĩ bɔayaamɔ mi a.

english_verse: We really wanted to come. I myself tried several times, but Satan always stopped us.
translation_verse: Bɔwɛ kĩ bubuki bɔyaasɛla mi. Yĩ Paulo kɔ̃ ɔnɔkɔali mbɔa mbɔdi pii kĩ maya, lɛmɛ Abonsam tákpa osi.

english_verse: After all, when the Lord Jesus appears, who else but you will give us hope and joy and be like a glorious crown for us?
translation_verse: Fɔnyɛ yĩ kawɛ paa kĩ ĩyaasɛla mi kitonɛkĩ mi akũ bute anɛ, minyɛ boe kawɔlɛ lɛmɛ. Ade minyɛ boe nfasɔ a kĩ foesũ bɔ́ata akũ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu aabuki ɛya a.

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Ɔnɔkɔali ni, minyɛ boe obu mɔ kawɔlɛ a.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Nɛ ayekĩ bɔláapuli bubuki budo ɔwɔlɛ sũ ni, buke otse kĩ bɔakahɔ nɛ Atene,

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: ade ke budo Timoteo kĩ ɛyaado mi kɔbɛ̃, ebumɛna mi nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ. Ɛnyɛ boe ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ yabumɛna boe nɛ Baguma adzuma mɔ Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a kalɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: Bɔkɛna foe lɔmɔ kitonɛkĩ bɔtáwɛ kĩ bati liti katomɛna kĩĩ kiveli odima akpɔ. Mi mɔawɛ minyina kĩ bati liti katomɛna kĩĩ waa kɛkpa boe a kĩ butomɔ Kristo.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Míate anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, bɔkpa kanyi bɔnyamɛna lɔtɔ kĩ bati liti katomɛna aaya. Ade ndɛ ayekĩ minyina a, fɔya lɔmɔ pɛpɛɛpɛ.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: Nɛ ayekĩ maápuli mbuki ndo ɔwɔlɛ sũ ni, ndo Timoteo kĩ ɛyaadã ayekĩ mi katɛkado la. Nkavila kĩ ɔsa okesĩnɛ a yasɔ mi ɛdã, lɔkɔa boe adzuma kakɛna a flee kɛna pupulidza. Mi Katɛkado Ade Boe Kawɔlɛ.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Timoteo muniki ɛya mɔ kawɔlɛ ɛyabi boe kĩ mi katɛkado mɔ tɔwaɛ̃ kawɛ távɛmɛna. Ɛlɛ kĩ miate anɛ nɛ boe akũ daa, ade miawɛ osi kĩ míamɔ boe ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔawɛ kĩ bɔamɔ mi a.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, nɛ boe lubo kamɔ mɔ kasuli kamɛ malo ni, mi katɛkado do boe kɔbɛ̃,

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ ntɛ midzɛ̃ kɔɔba nɛ boe Ɔlate kamɛ ni, nkpã vɔɛ̃ awo nɛ boe kamɛ.

english_verse: How can we possibly thank God enough for all the happiness you have brought us?
translation_verse: Bɔ́apuli bɔnyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ fuwo ye anɛ? Kawɔlɛ baũ ade boe nɛ Baguma anɛ, nɛ mi sũ.

english_verse: Day and night we sincerely pray that we will see you again and help you to have an even stronger faith.
translation_verse: Lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa bɔake boe Ɔlate aduli mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ ɛfɔ̃ bubuki bɔmɔ́ akũ lɔkɔa bɔkpa mi lɛtsa a kĩ lisĩ nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Finyaakĩĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu bibinya osi bɛkpa boe lɔkɔa bɔya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate ɛfɔ̃ mi akũ kalɛkawɛ mɔ bati bɛbã kalɛkawɛ a kide nɛ ode kibu, ndɛ ayekĩ bɔwɛ mi a.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ fɔfɔ̃ edo mi kɔbɛ̃, ɛkɛna mikpɔla, ɛkɛna mi bati kpalɛwa nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga anɛ, kɛnaawo luwi a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu mɔ ye bade a flee kĩ bɛkpalɛ a aabuki bɛya.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ke kawũna a, mikɔlɛ mitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ ayekĩ míadzi nkpã kĩ yaawo Baguma anɛ. Ade aye midzi kɔkɔɛ a, lɛmɛ bɔado mi fi, nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ kĩ mikɛna fɔba lɔmɔ.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Minyina fɔtsa a kĩ foe bɔtsa mi nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ akũ a.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Baguma awɛ kĩ mi akũ ɛkpalɛ nɛ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ akũ.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: ɛtatomɔ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa ɔmɛnɛ liti ndɛ bikĩ binyína Baguma aye.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ ni, odima ɛtakɛna tɔkpa nɛ ɔkɔba akũ ĩye esisi ye. Bubi mi fukĩĩ tɔ̃, buke mi awɛ nɛ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ boe Ɔlate aavɛlɛ bikĩ bakɛna fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ a sɔtɔ.

english_verse: God didn't choose you to be filthy, but to be pure.
translation_verse: Baguma távɛ boe kĩ bɔnya bati kĩ be akũ deĩ efĩĩ, mbom bɔnya bikĩ be akũ kpalɛ.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ntɛ odi sĩ nhihiɛ kĩĩ akũ kakɛna ni, nnɛ́ otidziwa esĩ, mbom eyidza ɛdza nɛ Baguma kĩ yakɔa ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kakpa mi a akũ.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Nɛ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ akũ kalɛkawɛ akũ kɔ̃ ni, fɔtásĩ kĩ matsɛlɛ litsedi nɛ foe akũ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma tsa mi kɔkɔɛ kĩ miwɛ mi akũ kalɛ.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ miawɛ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ bideĩ nɛ Makedonia flee a kalɛ, lɛmɛ bɔake mi aduli kĩ mikɛna foe fɔba lɔmɔ.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Mi botaɛ fɔnya kĩ miadzi nkpã nɛ akũ kadɔla kamɛ, odi nyɛ odi ɛdã ye adzuma. Mikɔa awɛ mikɛna mi mɔawɛ adzuma minya ndɛ ayekĩ bubi mi a.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ batɛ badonɛ a lɛkpa mi obu, lɔkɔa miláakɔa anɛ mite nɛ odima lɛtsama akũ. Mitakabe Kɔnya Ndɛ Bati Kĩ Bɛlá Kɔnɛte.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔabi mi lɛtsa kĩ laaya nɛ bati kĩ biku bɛtɛ̃ a akũ, ayekĩ miláadzi nɛ ayɔlɔhɔ kamɛ ndɛ bati kĩ bɛlá kɔnɛte.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Bɔtɛ budo kĩ Yesu ku ade ebuki eyidza edzi nkpã a. Foesũ bɔtɛ budo kĩ batɛ badonɛ flee a kĩ biku a ni, Baguma aafɔ̃ Yesu lɛkpã be ɛyamɛna nɛ ye kaya kamɛ.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔatsa mi finyaakĩĩ nyɛ boe Ɔlate fɔtsa katsa, kĩ boe a kĩ bɔ́adzi nkpã nɛ luwi a kĩ boe Ɔlate aaya akũ a ni, bɔláanya bikĩ biku a lɔtɔ mɔ ode kanaa.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ a na ni, bɔ́anu boe Ɔlate kaya a mɔ fɔwɔla kɔɔba. Bɔ́anu ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a odo. Baguma kagbulɛɛ aanɛ, lɔkɔa boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ aato ode ɛya. Bati a kĩ bɛtɛ Kristo bido fɔmɔ biku a aanya lɔtɔ biyidza.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, Baguma aakpɔta boe a kĩ bute budzi nkpã a ɛnaabumɔ bikĩ biyidza a, bɔnaatsɛlamɔ boe Ɔlate nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ. Lɔkɔa bɔ́adzi nɛ boe Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃ daa.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Foesũ mikɔa fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ mikaadɔla mi bawaɛ̃ tɔwɔlɛ.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, fɔtásĩ kĩ matsɛlɛ lɛtsama mma mi futomɛna lɔkɔ ĩye fuwi a kĩ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ aaya a akũ,

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
