translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ mi mɔawɛ minyina yededeede kĩ boe Ɔlate Kaya Luwi a aaya ndɛ ayekĩ oyekpanɛ afuta oti mɔ lɛnyɛ.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ a kĩ bati alɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa yamɔ lukudɔ mɔ kadzi wĩ a, ade lɔkɔ a na kamɛ pɛpɛɛpɛ mɔ baawɔla be deedimɔapɛ a. Fɔ́aya ndɛ ayekĩ sɛmɛ api ɔmatsɔ̃, ade kalo lɛláana a.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kɔ̃ miláa ɔtũ kamɛ. Foesũ luwi a na lɛtayaafuta mi ndɛ oyekpanɛ aye,

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ mi flee minyɛ ɔhaĩ bati. Ade bɔnyɛ́ bati kĩ bakɛna fɔtsa nɛ lɛnyɛ ĩye ɔtũ kamɛ a.

english_verse: Others may sleep, but we should stay awake and be alert.
translation_verse: Foesũ mitawa tida ndɛ bati bɛbã, mbom mina nɛ kukũmanɛ mɔ kɔnɛte kamɛ.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Lɛnyɛ bati awa tida, ade bikĩ bavɛ bamɔa kawuga ni, lɛnyɛ bawugɛla be.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kĩ ɔhaĩ kamɛ bati bɔanɛ sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa boe katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ bɔkɛna ɔwɔlɛ libĩĩ katɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ, mɔ boe kɔnɛte nɛ boe nkpã akũ bɔkɛna sɔbɔtsaɛ lɔbɔɛ.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma tápau boe kĩ yaakɔa ye kawũnaba a ɛwɔla boe, mbom kĩ bɔ́atsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ bɔna nkpã katɛ.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Yesu ku nɛ boe lɔlɔ, kĩ ntɛ budzi o-o, ĩye ntɛ buku o-o, bɔ́adzimɔ ye nɛ ye kabuki kaya kamɛ.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ni, mikaado akũ fi, mikaabumɛna akũ ndɛ ayekĩ milamɛna kakɛna finyaa a. Minyɛ Mi Akũ Nɛ Osi Kpa a Akũ.

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔake mi aduli kĩ mikɔa obu wĩ mikpa mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bakɛna adzuma nɛ mi kamɛ, kakpã mi nɛ Kristo nkpã kadzi kamɛ a.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Miwɛ be kalɛ, mikpa be obu paa nɛ adzuma a kĩ bakɛna a sũ. Ade midzi mɔ akũ nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ a.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ midɛ banyɔnɛpo, mido bikĩ bideĩ libe a ɔwɔlɛ, mibumɛna bikĩ akpɔ veli be a. Mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mikpa odi nyɛ odi.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Midã kadã wĩ kĩ odima ɛtakɔa tɔkpa ese tɔkpa kɔtɔ, mbom mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ miakɛna tuwĩ mikpa akũ mɔ odi nyɛ odi.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Mimɔ kawɔlɛ luwi daa.

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: Mikaabɔa mpaɛ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ.

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Minyɛ boe Ɔlate kɔlɛ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ade fukĩĩ bamɛ Baguma awɛ etomɛna be a kĩ bitomɔ Yesu Kristo a.

english_verse: Don't turn away God's Spirit
translation_verse: Mitasua Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ a osi.

english_verse: or ignore prophecies.
translation_verse: Mitasupa Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa a.

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Mbom misɔ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa midã lɔkɔa mipi fuwĩ a midomɔ akũ.

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: Milo nɛ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi ɔwɛ̃.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Bɔwɛ kĩ Baguma kĩ yakpa boe lukudɔ a, ɛkpalɛ mi akũ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ, ɛdã mi hũhũ, mi tɛkla mɔ mi sukɛna flee. Ɛnyɛ mi nɛ mfumsu flee kamɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kabuki kaya a kamɛ.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a aakɛna foe, kitonɛkĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mikaabɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe malo lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Bɔawɔ̃na batɛ badonɛ a flee nɛ ɔdɔ mɔ kawɔlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Mawã mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔbɛ̃ akũ kĩ mikã ovoli kĩĩ mitsa batɛ badonɛ a flee.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Yĩ, Paulo, Silvano mɔ Timoteo, bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔama mi a kĩ minyɛ Baguma mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo bade a nɛ Tesalonika.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! When Christ Returns
translation_verse: Bɔwɛ kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Bɔawã Baguma Kĩ Mi Kadzi Kamɛ Kiketimɔ Ye Kavɛ a.

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛnɛ kĩ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ. Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ bɔanyɛ ye kɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ mi katɛkado abo anɛ, ade mi bawaɛ̃ akũ kawɛ lɛmɛ lamɛna lɔtɔ kanaa a.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ bɔapia nɛ mi akũ katsa Baguma tɛsɔli a. Bɔapia lɛmɛ nɛ ayekĩ midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ mi katɛkado a akũ, titɔ kĩ bitomɔ mi liti ade miamɔ lubo lɛmɛ.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ flee atsa kĩ Baguma kadzɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, nɛ foesũ yaamɔ mi kĩ mikpɔla mikpa kadzikɔ̃ nɛ ye lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ de akũ miamɔ lubo a kamɛ.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Baguma aakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnɛnɛ nɛ de osi akũ, ade yaavɛlɛ lubo kamɔ eko nɛ bikĩ bɛmɔna mi lubo akũ a.

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: Yaafɔ̃ mi a kĩ mimɔ́ lubo a, mɔ boe a flee bɔna kawɛya. Baguma aakɛna fukĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu mɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ anɛ nɛ odetɔ́ kamɛ nɛ fi mɔ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: Yaavɛlɛ bati a kĩ binyína Baguma, mɔ bikĩ bisĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Kalɛ Wĩ a sɔtɔ.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate aablɔmɛna be nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ mɔ ye awã kĩ ye kukũkpalɛ mɔ ye kɔbɛ̃ deĩ a. Yaawɔla be mɔ odu mɔ odu,

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: ntɛ ɛya nɛ Luwi kpale a akũ. Yaatɛ obu mɔ kamu etomɛna ye batɛ badonɛ a flee sɛkɛ̃. Mi malo míana nɛ be kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ mitɛ ye fɔlɛtsa wĩ a kĩ bubi mi a mido.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ bɔabɔa mpaɛ nɛ mi lɔlɔ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ a. Bɔawã Baguma kĩ ɛfɔ̃ mi kadzi kamɛ kiketimɔ kavɛ a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a. Ye kɔbɛ̃ kɔfɔ̃ mi tuwĩ kakɛna flee nɛ mi katɛkado kamɛ a fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: Fɔ́atsã fukĩĩ akũ boe Ɔlate Yesu dĩ aade nɛ ode, mi malo mina dĩ kadɛla nɛ ode mitomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Baguma mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ sũ.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔawɛ kĩ bɔabi mi fɔlɛtsa fudi nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kabuki kaya mɔ boe kakpɔta nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ a akũ.

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: Ntɛ minu kĩ boe Ɔlate kaya luwi a ya kɔkɔɛ ni, mitafɔ̃ mi kakɔna litutulu ĩye libe liwo mi. Ɔsa míakɔna kĩ boe lɛlɛ fukĩĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔnyɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃, ĩye kĩ bɔlɛ Baguma kalɛ a, ĩye kĩ bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli odi bɔma mi.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ oti odima lɛkɛ mi nɛ osi odima akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate luwi a lɛláaya mbɔɛntɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bati pii aayidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma akũ a ya, ade oti kpa a kĩ Baguma nyɛ eyi kĩ yaawɔla a aanɛ ɛdza a.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Miáte anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ nna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a mbi mi fukĩĩ bamɛ?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ kɔbɛ̃ kudi sua foe kaya osi finyaakĩĩ. Mi mɔawɛ a minyina lɛtsa kĩ fɔanɛ. Oti Kpa a aanyɛ ye akũ kanya ntɛ ye lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Tɔkpa kakɛna kɔbɛ̃ lamɛna adzuma kakɛna nɛ kabɛla kamɛ kɔkɔɛ. Lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya a ni, fɔláaya nɛ foe kamɛ tɔ̃ kɛnaawo kĩ Baguma nyɛ oti a kĩ yasua foe osi.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ liti ni, Baguma aanyɛ oti kpa a kanya, lɛmɛ ntɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu ya ni, yaakɔa ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ otutuo ɛkɔ ye lɔkɔa ɛkɔa ye kukũkpalɛ ɛwɔla ye.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Oti Kpa a na aaya mɔ Abonsam kɔbɛ̃, lɔkɔa ɛkɛna awãwã mɔ fɔvã nsɛntsɛlɛni fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Ade bati a kĩ baya kawɔkɔ̃ a ni, oti kpa a aatsã ablɔ tɛdake tisi nyɛ tisi akũ ɛkɛ be. Baawɔ kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ wĩ a kĩ fɔ́afɔ̃ Baguma lɛkpa be nkpã a bido.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, Baguma aakɔa hũhũ kĩ yaafɔ̃ bɛyɛla osi edo nɛ be kamɛ ayekĩ baatɛ fɔvã kama fɔlɛtsa bido.

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: Foe kawũna aanya kĩ, Baguma aakɔ be flee kɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ bɛtátɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a bido, mbom bamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ tɔkpa kakɛna akũ. Bɛpau Mi Kĩ Mina Nkpã.

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛfɛta kĩ bɔanyɛ Baguma kɔlɛ daa nɛ mi lɔlɔ, kitonɛkĩ yawɛ mi kalɛ paa. Kito anɛ kayɔkayi a, Baguma nyɛ mi kĩ mina katɛ. Ɛkɔa ye Hũhũ Kpalɛwa ɛkpalɛ mi akũ nɛ ayekĩ mitɛ kalɛ wĩ a mido sũ.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ade fɔtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ bubi mi a akũ sũ ni, Baguma vɛ mi kĩ miyaana tsɛfã nɛ boe Ɔlate Kristo kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, midza kɔɔba, mipi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔtsa mi nɛ boe fɔtsa katsa, mɔ boe tuvoli kamɛ a midomɔ akũ.

english_verse: God our Father loves us. He treats us with undeserved grace and has given us eternal comfort and a wonderful hope. We pray that our Lord Jesus Christ and God our Father
translation_verse: Bɔawã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, mɔ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga kĩ yawɛ boe kalɛ a, kĩ nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ ni, ɛkpa boe ɔwɔlɛ kado mɔ kɔnɛte pii,

english_verse: will encourage you and help you always to do and say the right thing.
translation_verse: ɛkpa mi kɔbɛ̃, edo mi tɔwɔlɛ fi nɛ kɔdzɛla wĩ kalɛ, mɔ tudzuma wĩ kakɛna kamɛ.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Yĩ kalɛ kawũnade nyɛ kĩ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a aagba nɛ fɔkɔ kumɛkumɛ, lɔkɔa bɛtɛ ke mɔ obu ndɛ ayekĩ fɔna nɛ mi kamɛ a.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Mibɔa mpaɛ lɛmɛ kĩ Baguma ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna tɔkpa mɔ bati kpa awɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ nnɛ́ bati flee lɛtɛ kalɛ a bido.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate nyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini, ade yaado mi kɔbɛ̃, ɛdã mi akũ ayekĩ okesĩnɛ a lɛláanya mi akũ.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate akpa boe katɛkado nɛ mi akũ kĩ míakɛna nɛ fukĩ bɔtsa mi a akũ, ade bɔatɛ kado kĩ míakɛna nɛ foe akũ lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Bɔawã Baguma kĩ ɛkpa mi ye ɔdɔ a kayɔkanu baũ, mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado a kĩ Kristo akpa a. Mikɛna Mi Tudzuma.

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, bɔasi mi mbla nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ kĩ mivɛlɛ mi akũ nɛ batɛ badonɛ banyɔnɛpo a kĩ baákɛna nɛ fɔtsa kĩ bɔtsa mi akũ a ɔwɛ̃.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Mi mɔawɛ minyina yededeede kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ miakɛna adzuma ndɛ ayekĩ boe malo bɔkɛna a, kitonɛkĩ bɔtákɛna ɔnyɔnɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: Bɔtákɔa boe kanya bute nɛ odima akũ kĩ bɔtáse kɔtɔ. Mbom bɔkɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa ayekĩ odima lɛláabɔa kɔtɔ nɛ boe akũ kadã kamɛ.

english_verse: We had the right not to work, but we wanted to set an example for you.
translation_verse: Budeĩ osi kufɛ kĩ bɔakɔa boe akũ kadã bute nɛ mi akũ, lɛmɛ bɔkɛna foe kĩ mikɔlɛ mitomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Míate anɛ kĩ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ a, bɔkabi mi kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ kĩ yaakɛna adzuma ni, ɛtanya lɛmɛ.

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Bɔabi mi fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ kitonɛkĩ bɔanu kĩ banyɔnɛpo badi deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, kĩ baákɛna lɛtsama kɛba bakɔba akũ fɔlɛtsa katsã kalɛ.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Bɔasi bati kĩĩ mbla bɔkpa be kɔdɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo dĩ akũ, kĩ bidzi kadzi wĩ lɔkɔa bɛkɛna adzuma bɛdã be mɔawɛ akũ.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi nɛ tuwĩ kakɛna kamɛ.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Ade ntɛ odi lákɛna nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɔabi mi nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ akũ ni, miyi ye ɔsũ lɔkɔa mifɔnɛ ye awɛ, kɔnyɔã kuwo ye.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mitabɔɛ ye likesĩ, mbom midɛ ye ndɛ ɔwaɛ̃ aye. Bɔakla Mi.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Bɔawã boe Ɔlate mɔawɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ lukudɔ oti a, kĩ ɛkpa mi lukudɔ daa nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ. Boe Ɔlate ɛdãmɛna mi flee akũ.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Bɔawã kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɛmɔ mi flee kɔnya.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ĩnyɛ Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, kĩ Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ a pau, mɔ Kristo Yesu kĩ ye akũ budeĩ kɔnɛte a sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: Nkɔa mmɛna nɔ Timoteo, kĩ ɔnyɛ yĩ obi nɛ katɛkado kamɛ. Mawã kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga, mɔ Kristo Yesu boe Ɔlate bɛmɔ mi kɔnya, bɛkɛna mi sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ Nɛ Fɔvã Fɔlɛtsa Batsanɛ a Akũ.

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: Mawɛ kĩ buki kadzi nɛ Efeso ndɛ ayekĩ nwɛ ntomɛna nɔ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ndzakũ manaa Makedonia a. Bati badi deĩ nɛ awã kĩ batsa fɔvã fɔtsa nɛ Kristo katɛkado a akũ, ade kɛnɛ kĩ ate awɛ nɛ be akũ a.

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Bi be kĩ bɛfɔ̃ lɔkɔ kade kabula nɛ atitifɔ fɔlɛtsa mɔ bawanyɔ bawanyɔ kasinu katokɔ̃ fɔtsa katsa awɛ. Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ bamɛ katsa ayamɛna fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ nɛ bati kayite. Foe bamɛ lɛnyɛ́ Baguma nhihiɛ kĩ ɛkɛna. Katɛkado odi kamɛ bɔatsã kanyi foe.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ de sũ makpa nɔ mbla kĩĩ nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔanyi ɔdɔ a kĩ eto ɔwɔlɛ kpalɛwa, adzuni kpalɛwa mɔ katɛkado wĩ kamɛ.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati badi muniki nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ liti, foesũ bɛyɛla osi wĩ a, ade bɛkɔa be lɔkɔ bɛkpa fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔ fɔkɔasiatsa kalɛ a.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Bawɛ kĩ banya Mose mbla fɔtsa batsanɛ. Lɛmɛ baánu be mɔawɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ balɛ, ĩye fukĩ bɛtɛ bido mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a kayɔ malo.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Boe flee bunyina kĩ Mose mbla a nɛnɛ, ntɛ bɔakɛna nɛ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔfɛta a.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔate anɛ kĩ bɛtákɛna mbla bɛkpa bati wĩ, mbom bikĩ bafum Baguma mbla, bikĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ, bikĩ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ, bikĩ binyína Baguma, mɔ bikĩ tɔkpa yi be kamɛkamɛ. Badi lɛmɛ nyɛ bikĩ bɛláa katɛkado kadima kamɛ, bikĩ bakɔ be balɛga mɔ bama, mɔ awudifɔ.

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã lɛmɛ nyɛ bikĩ bɛkɔa akũ bɛkpa linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, banyole kĩ bawamɔ akũ, bati kĩ bapili bati kanɔ, bavãlɛvã, bikĩ balɔ fubo kama fɔvã, mɔ be flee a kĩ bitómɔ fɔtsa wĩ a katsa.

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: Nláapuli ĩnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔlɛ nɛ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ nnɛɛ makɛna adzuma wĩ kĩĩ akũ. Manyɛ ye kɔlɛ kĩ ɛmɔ́ kĩ nkpɔla sũ ɛpau yĩ kĩ nkɛna ye adzuma,

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: titɔ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, nsupa ye, ntomɔ ye liti, nvũna ye malo. Lɛmɛ Baguma mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya, kitonɛkĩ nɛ lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, ntátɛ ye ndo ade ntányi lɛtsa a kĩ de nkakɛna a.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Ade boe Ɔlate mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya pii, ɛfɔ̃ nna katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ boe fude nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ malɛ nɛ awĩ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ paa, kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bati bɛtɛ ke bido. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ Kristo Yesu ya nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ kĩ yayaatɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ. Yĩ nyɛ ɔkpade flefle nɛ be kamɛ.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Baguma mɔ́ yĩ kɔnya ayekĩ Kristo Yesu aapuli ɛkɔa yĩ a kĩ ĩnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ flee a, ɛtsa bati bɛmɔ́ ayekĩ edeĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ, lɔkɔa bikĩ bayatɛ ye bido a bɛna nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa obu mɔ kamu bɔkpa boe Lɛgã kĩ edzi kito titiiti a, kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ, kĩ ye odi keĩ nyɛ Baguma a daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: Yĩ obi Timoteo, kɔdɛ a kĩ makpa nɔ nɛ awĩ a tsɛ̃ nɛ katɛ mɔ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ lɛ nɛ nɔ akũ biyi a akũ. Kɔa fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kakɛna ndɛ kawũkanɔ fɔtsa lɔkɔa kanɔ kawũ a kanɔ wĩ.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Pi nɔ katɛkado nɛ Kristo kamɛ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kakpalɛ kalɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ. Bati badi tátse be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔdɛ ade bɛyɛla be katɛkado a.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Be kamɛ badi nyɛ Himenaio mɔ Aleksandro, kĩ nvɛlɛ be sɔtɔ, nkɔa be ndo nɛ Abonsam awɛ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛfɔ̃ fubusuotsa kalɛ nɛ Baguma akũ.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Fɔtsa fɔtɔnyade kĩ mawɛ kĩ mikɛna nyɛ kĩ mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ bati flee lɔlɔ. Mikaavia mi fɔtsa sĩwa mɔ be fude flee katomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃, mikaanyɛ ye kɔlɛ nɛ be flee lɔlɔ.

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: Mikaabɔa mpaɛ kakpa fɔgã mɔ bikĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ bati onukpɛ̃, ayekĩ bɔ́adzi kulokulo nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, lɔkɔa bupuli busum Baguma nɛ obu kamɛ.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ nɛnɛ, fɔade Baguma boe Ɔtɛnɛ a kawɔlɛ,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ yawɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi ɛna katɛ lɔkɔa enu ɔnɔkɔali a kayɔ.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, Baguma mɔapɛ deĩ, ade ayea lɛmɛ lɛma ɔkplanɛ mɔapɛ deĩ nɛ Baguma mɔ batidziwa kayite a. Ade ye nyɛ Kristo Yesu a.

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ Baguma do yĩ ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ nɛ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ sɛkɛ̃ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ katɛkado mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a akũ. Nnɛ́ fɔvã mama, ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ malɛ.

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Nɛ asɔli adi nyɛ adi kamɛ ni, banyole a bɛnya bikĩ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ kĩ baapuli bɛdɛla akpɔ nɛ ode bɛbɔa mpaɛ kĩ kalɔkpa ĩye ɔdzɛ lɛláa be kamɛ.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: Mawɛ lɛmɛ kĩ batsole bɛdɔla be akũ, bidzi tilima nɛ osi kĩ fɔláatsɔlɛ anɛ akũ. Fɔnɛ́nɛ kĩ basui tɔlɔ nɛ kahɛhɛ kamɛ, bido sika ngbã mɔ fɔtsa kĩ fɔtɛ kɔya. Bɛtado tɛtadiɛ kĩ tatɛ kɔya lɛmɛ.

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: Mbom be fɔtsakɛlawa fɔnya fɔtsa wĩ ndɛ batsole kĩ bɛkɔa be akũ bɛkpa Baguma.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ batsole bɛdɔla be akũ, bitse kulokulo bɛkɔlɛ fɔtsa.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: Ntákpa be osi kĩ batsa banyole fɔtsa ĩye kĩ bɛnya banyole akũ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bisua onukpɛ̃ bidzi kulokulo.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Adam Baguma nya lɔtɔ ɛbɔa fɔmɔ ɛyakɛna Eva.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Ade nnɛ́ Adam Abonsam kɛ, mbom otsole a ɛkɛ ade ɛfɔ̃ efum Baguma mbla a.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ otsole aana nkpã nɛ ye kɔma kamɛ ntɛ edzi nɛ katɛkado mɔ ɔdɔ kamɛ, ɛkɛna ye akũ yedede nɛ akũ kadɔla kamɛ lɛmɛ.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ ntɛ oti odi awɛ kĩ yanya asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ni, adzuma wĩ liti etomɛna.

english_verse: That's why officials must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. They must be self-controlled, sensible, well-behaved, friendly to strangers, and able to teach.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ ɛnya oti kĩ nfumusu lɛláa ye akũ, kĩ ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ mɔapɛ, ye adzuni waa yedede, yapi ye akũ ade bati akpa ye obu a. Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ yapuli katɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ ade yapuli katsa fɔtsa a.

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: Kɛtánɛ kĩ ɛnya bavɛ owuganɛ ĩye oti kĩ ye anɛ kamɛ tádɔ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ɛdɔ, kĩ yaákɛna ɔdzɛ, ade ɛlá anɛngbã nɛ sika akũ a.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ epuli ɛdãmɛna ye tɔtɔ akũ kadãmɛna wĩ, lɔkɔa ye babi bibu fɔkɔ nɛ osi nyɛ osi akũ.

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ onyole lápuli ɛdãmɛna ye tɔtɔ akũ ni, nde yaapuli ɛkpã Baguma asɔli a?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ebuna owi nɛ asɔli a kamɛ, ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni yaadɛla ye akũ nɛ ode, lɔkɔa fɔtsã lukũta kamɛ ɛyaatɔ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔya fɔkpa okesĩnɛ a.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ batɛ badonɛ a malo abɔa ye dĩ wĩ, ayekĩ ɛláado ye akũ kɔnyɔã lɔkɔa ewo nɛ okesĩnɛ a awɛ kamɛ. Paulo Tsa Bikĩ Be Kɛnɛ Kĩ Bɛnya Babumɛnanɛ Nɛ Asɔli Kamɛ.

english_verse: Church officers should be serious. They must not be liars, heavy drinkers, or greedy for money.
translation_verse: Ade aye lɛmɛ kɛnɛ kĩ asɔli lɔtɔ banyanɛ babumɛnanɛ a malo banya bati kĩ bideĩ ɔbla wĩ mɔ ɔnɔkɔali a. Bɛnya bati kĩ baáwuga bavɛ ade bɛlá anɛngbã nɛ sika lɛmɛ akũ.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ bapi katɛkado fɔlɛtsa wĩ a kĩ bɛnyɛ bɛtsa a bidomɔ akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ, bidzi mɔ tɔwɔlɛ kpalɛwa.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Ade kɛnɛ kĩ basɔ be bɛdã nɛ asɔli tudzuma tidi kakɛna kamɛ. Ntɛ bɛkpɔla ni, baapuli bɛkɛna adzuma ndɛ lɔtɔ banyanɛ babumɛnanɛ aye.

english_verse: Women must also be serious. They must not gossip or be heavy drinkers, and they must be faithful in everything they do.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ batsɔ̃ malo bɛna tɛbla wĩ, kĩ bɛtanya bati kĩ balɛ bati akũ fɔlɛtsa. Bɛnya batsole kĩ baámɔa bavɛ kawuga, kĩ badi ɔnɔkɔali nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kakɛna kamɛ.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Dã kĩ babumɛnanɛ kĩĩ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi deĩ ɔtsɔ̃ mɔapɛ, epuli yadãmɛna ye babi mɔ tɔtɔ kamɛ bati flee akũ kadã wĩ.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Babumɛnanɛ a kĩ bakɛna be adzuma kakɛna wĩ a deĩ kadzakɔ̃ wĩ nɛ bati anɛ, ade baapuli bɛna ɔwɔlɛ kɔbɛ̃ bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ be Kristo Yesu katɛkado akũ a. Miyi Kalɛ Bɛlawa Kpale a Ɔsũ.

english_verse: so if I am delayed, you will know how everyone who belongs to God's family ought to behave. After all, the church of the living God is the strong foundation of truth.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ matsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mma nɔ malo ni, nlamɛna osi kadã kĩ maayasɛla nɔ nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ matsɛlɛ ye ayekĩ ntɛ nkpa liti ni, aanyi ayekĩ bati bipi be akũ nɛ Baguma asɔli a kamɛ. Ade asɔli a nyɛ bikĩ bɛtɛ Baguma a kĩ edzi nkpã daa bido, kĩ fɔnyɛ luku kĩ lɛnɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔali a.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, kalɛ a kĩ bɛkɔa bɛkɔla nɛ Baguma ɔsum kamɛ a nyɛ kalɛ kpale kĩ odima lɛláapuli esĩ ke. Ade foe nyɛ kĩ, “Kristo ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ otidziwa aye Baguma Hũhũ a nyɛ ɛtsa kĩ oti kpalɛwa yanɛ. Ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ́ ye, ade bide lɛtsã nɛ ye akũ nɛ fude fude kamɛ a. Bɛtɛ ye bido nɛ katinya kamɛ flee, ade Baguma bɔɛ ye ɛnamɛna ode nɛ kukũkpalɛ kamɛ a.”

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a nyɛ ɛtsa yededeede kĩ, nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni, bati badi aafɔnɛ ɔnɔkɔali katɛkado kĩĩ awɛ bitse hũhũ kpa a kĩ yakɛ bati, mɔ hũhũ kpa fɔtsa katsa.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Fɔvã bati kĩĩ aagbamɛna fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ odu. Bɛnyɛ bikĩ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kakɔna ku ndɛ sɔbɔtsaɛ mɔ ovio bɛkɔa bipila te.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Batsa fɔtsa kĩ kɔtsɔ̃ mɔ kɔnyɔ kadzi lɛnɛ́nɛ. Balɛ lɛmɛ kĩ kɛtánɛ kĩ bati anya funitsã fudi odu. Lɛmɛ Baguma lɛkɛna funitsã a na bamɛ, kĩ bikĩ bɛtɛ bido mɔ binyi ɔnɔkɔali a, bɛbɔa mpaɛ nɛ foe akũ bɛnya.

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kalɛ a mɔ boe kɔlɛkanyɛ a akpalɛ funitsã a akũ. Paulo Tsa Bati Kĩ Bɛnyɛ Kristo Yesu Basumunɛ Wĩ.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: Ntɛ atsa awaɛ̃ amɛ batɛ badonɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ ni, lɔkɔa aanya Kristo Yesu ɔsumunɛ wĩ, kĩ bɛdɔɔla mɔ katɛkado fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ mɔ boe fɔtsa katsa wĩ a kĩ opini a.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ bɔapuli kakɛna adzuma kɔɔba, kitonɛkĩ boe anɛ teĩ nɛ Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a akũ. Ye nyɛ bati flee a kĩ titiliwu bikĩ bɛtɛ bido a Ɔtɛnɛ.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ atsa be fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ flee, ɔdã kĩ odi nyɛ odi kɔlɛ foe.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Tafɔ̃ oti odima lɛdã nɔ ndɛ obisɛ̃ nɛ ayekĩ ɔnyɛ opopo sũ. Mbom kɔa nɔ akũ kakɛna nfantuhũ wĩ kakpa batɛ badonɛ a nɛ nɔ kɔdzɛla, nɔ ɔbla, nɔ bati kawɛ, nɔ katɛkado, mɔ nɔ kadzi yedede kamɛ.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Fɔmɔ maaya ni, kaakã Baguma kalɛ a katsa be nɛ asɔli, kakaanyɛ foe kayɔ katsa be, katsa be fɔtsa lɛmɛ.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Tafɔ̃ hũhũ kamɛ futetsa a kĩ Baguma kɔa edo nɛ nɔ kamɛ a akũ adzuma kakɛna. Bɛkpa nɔ foe bɛtsãmɛna Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a kamɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ te awɛ nɛ nɔ akũ a.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Kɔa nɔ akũ flee kakpa nɛ tudzuma kĩĩ flee kakɛna kamɛ. Pi te kadomɔ akũ ayekĩ bati flee aamɔ nɔ adzuma lɔtɔ kanaa biyi ɔsũ.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Di nɔ akũ oni nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ atsa a akũ. Pi nɔ adzuma a kadomɔ akũ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ ɔkɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, aatɛ nɔ mɔawɛ a akũ mɔ bikĩ batse nɔ kalɛ a nkpã.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Tawũni nɛ onyolenɔkɔɛ̃ akũ, mbom dɛ ye nɛ obu kamɛ ndɛ aga aye. Bi bapopo tuwuli ndɛ awaɛ̃nyole amɛ aye.

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: Bi batsolenɔkɔɛ̃ tuwuli ndɛ ama amɛ, mɔ bayitsɔ̃ lɛmɛ ndɛ awaɛ̃tsole amɛ nɛ akũ yedede kamɛ.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: Kɔa obu kakpa bakunawa kĩ bɛlá babumɛnanɛ.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ okunawa odi deĩ babi ĩye bawa ni, babi a bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkɔlɛ be ɔsum kamɛ adzuma kakɛna kakpa be akũ bati, lɔkɔa fɔtsã foe akũ bɛdã be bamanɛ akũ bɛkɔa biyi be ayɛ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lawo Baguma anɛ a.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Okunawa kĩ ɛlá odima kĩ yadãmɛna ye akũ kɔa ye anɛ ete nɛ Baguma akũ, yabɔa mpaɛ lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa kavia ye kabumɛna.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ okunawa kĩ ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa nkpã kanya ni, eku kɔkɔɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ titɔ kĩ edzi nkpã malo.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Kpa be kɔdɛ nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ bamɛ akũ ayekĩ odima lɛláamɔ mfumsu nɛ be akũ.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ade ntɛ mi kamɛ odi ládãmɛna ye akũ bati akũ, titiliwu ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bade akũ ni, ade emuniki nɛ katɛkado a liti a. Oti kĩĩ nyɛ oti kpa ɛbɛ̃ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido malo a.

english_verse: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
translation_verse: Takɔa okunawa odima kĩ ɛtátɛ futeli aduesia tɔ̃ dĩ obumɔ bakunawa kĩ bideĩ a. Lɛtsa kĩ libu nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ okunawa ɛnya otsole kĩ bɛkɔã deedimɔapɛ,

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: ade kɛnɛ kĩ ɛna dĩ wĩ nɛ ye sɛmɛ kalɛ kakɛna sũ, ɛnya otsole kĩ ɛdɔɔla ye babi kadɔɔla wĩ, yatɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ lɛmɛ. Ɛnya otsole kĩ yasum ye bakɔba batɛ badonɛ, yabumɔ bati kĩ bideĩ nɛ lubokamɔ kamɛ, ade ɛkɔa ye akũ ɛkpa tuwĩ kakɛna a.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Takɔa bakunawa kĩ bɛtábo anɛ buĩ odo nɛ katsu a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ntɛ kɔnyɔ kadzi kɔ be odo ni, baafɔnɛ Kristo awɛ,

english_verse: and become guilty of breaking their promise to him.
translation_verse: ade baatu fubo a kĩ bɛlɔ bɛkpa ye a lɔkɔa ɛkɔ be kɔtɔ.

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ, babula be lɔkɔ kade, katsã kamini nɛ bati tɔtɔ kamɛ, kadani banyɔnɛpo, kĩ balɛ bati akũ fɔlɛtsa, mɔ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta kalɛ.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Foesũ, mawɛ kĩ bakunawa kĩ bɛtábo anɛ a bidzi fɔnyɔ bɛma babi, lɔkɔa bɛdãmɛna be tɔtɔ akũ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛláakɛna fɔtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta kĩ fɔ́akpa boe bakesĩnɛ osi bɛkalɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ boe akũ.

english_verse: Look what's already happened to some of the young widows! They have turned away to follow Satan.
translation_verse: Malɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ bakunawa pii yɛla osi kɔkɔɛ bitomɔ Abonsam.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ bakunawa deĩ nɛ otsole ɔtɛ odonɛ odi awɛ nɛ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛdã be akũ, ɛtakɔa fɔlɔtsa a ete nɛ asɔli a akũ. Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ batɛ badonɛ a lɛdã bakunawa a kĩ bɛlá babumɛnanɛ a akũ.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ bɛkpa batɛ badonɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bakpã bati kakpã wĩ a obu mɔ kɔtɔkase kutsu nviã, titiliwu bikĩ bakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ fɔtsa katsa mɔ fɔtsa kayɔ kanyɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Tasui ɔyaɛ kĩ yabumɔ nɔ kamɔnɛ kagɔlɛ onukpɛ̃.” ade, “Kɛnɛ kĩ bise adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ kɔtɔ bɛkpa adzuma a kĩ ɛkɛna a.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi bɔɛ kalɛ nɛ asɔli ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ akũ ni, tatɛ foe ɔkpa ye mbɔɛntɛ otse kalɛ otomɛna adansifɔ nviã ĩye be ɛlalɛ sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Kã bati a kĩ bakɛna tɔkpa anɛ nɛ batɛ badonɛ flee anɛ kamɛ, ayekĩ fɔ́ado babɛbã a libe.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: Ndzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma, mɔ Kristo mɔ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ anɛ kamɛ mabi nɔ nɛ kudulike kamɛ kĩ pi fɔtsa katsa a kadomɔ akũ, tadã oti anɛ nɛ nɔ tudzuma kakɛna kamɛ.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Tawɛ sɔwa kĩ ate awɛ nɛ odi akũ ɔkpa ye boe Ɔlate adzuma kĩ ɛkɛna. Tado akũ nɛ bati bɛbã tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ. Pi nɔ akũ yededeede.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: Nɛ sɛmɛ kpa kĩ odeĩ sũ ni, takamɔa mui odi mbom kaamɔa bavɛ sukuloo sukuloo fubumɛna nɔ.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Bati badi titikpa anɛ kanya mɔatsɛ kanya be lɔtɔ kanamɛna kadzɛ kamɛ, lɛmɛ badi kɔ̃, liti liti fɔmɔ be tɔkpa anɛ kanya.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Ade aye a tuwĩ kakɛna lɛmɛ lábɛla a, ade fukĩ fɔbɛla a malo fɔ́anɛ kanya.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ bi batɛ badonɛ a kĩ bɛnyɛ basumunɛ a kĩ bɛkɔa obu bɛkpa be balate ayekĩ odima lɛláalɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ Baguma dĩ mɔ boe fɔtsa katsa a akũ.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Ade kɛtáfɛta kĩ basumunɛ a kĩ be balate nyɛ batɛ badonɛ bɛkɔa be katɛkado kamɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna sũ bisupa be balate a. Mbom kɛnɛ kĩ bisum be kasum wĩ bɛba, kitonɛkĩ balate a kĩ bana be akũ nfasɔ a nyɛ be batɛ badonɛ mɔ bawɛnɛ. Kɛnɛ kĩ atsa be ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ lɔkɔa odo be fi bɛkɛna nɛ foe akũ. Misĩ Fɔvã Fɔtsa Katsa Mitomɔ Baguma Liti.

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatsa fɔtsa kĩ fɔtáketi mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa, mɔ boe katɛkado fɔtsa katsa a ni, oti a naa dɛla ye akũ nɛ ode, ade enyína lɛtsama a. Edeĩ ɔdɔ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔ ɔdzɛ kakɛna mɔ bati akũ. Fukĩĩ ayamɛna lineke kanɔ, ɔdzɛ kakɛna, bati kavũna mɔ adzuni kpa kakɔna nɛ oti akũ.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Foe lɛmɛ fɔayamɛna fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ. Bati kĩĩ be lɔlɔ kamɛ lɛ́waa yedede ade bɛyɛla ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a lɛmɛ a. Bakɔna kĩ Baguma ɔsum nyɛ akũ kana fɔtsa osi odi.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Fɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ ntɛ oti yɔɔla anɛ nɛ Baguma liti katomɛna akũ, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ edeĩ a fuwo ye anɛ ni, ɛdani osikani,

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ awɛ pupulidza bɔkɔa bɔya nɛ katinya kamɛ, ade bɔ́adzakũ mɔ awɛ pupulidza a.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ budeĩ tilima mɔ funitsã ni, mifɔ̃ fuwo boe anɛ.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati a kĩ anɛ ayɔɔla be nɛ akũ kana fɔtsa akũ ni, bawo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ ade batɔ a. Fɔkɔasiatsa mɔ fɔwɛtsa kpa tɔwɛ̃ pini be fɔavɛlɛ be kanamɛna lubo kamɔ mɔ kawɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ sika anɛngbã kamɛ tɔkpa kumɛkumɛ flee anɛ kato. Badi tomɔ sika kawɛ liti limii kĩ bɛyɛla katɛkado a, ade biwo nɛ ayɔlɔhɔ pii kĩ ɛfɔ̃ be tɔwɔlɛ tɛ kaakpa kamɛ a. Dza Pintii Nɛ Katɛkado Adzuma a Akũ.

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Timoteo, Baguma oti anɛ sũ vɛlɛ nɔ akũ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa kĩĩ flee ɔwɛ̃. Pili kakpa tuwĩ kakɛna, katomɔ Baguma liti nɛ katɛkado, ɔdɔ mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado, mɔ akũ kadɔla kamɛ.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Pili kɔɔba kanya nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a kakpa nɔ akũ. Ade nkpã kĩĩ sũ Baguma pau nɔ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ ɔnyɛ nɔ katɛkado ɔtsa pefee nɛ adansifɔ pii anɛ a.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Ade makpa nɔ mbla kĩĩ nɛ Baguma kĩ yakpa lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nkpã, mɔ Kristo Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ ye katɛkado ɛtsa pefee nɛ Pontio Pilato anɛ kamɛ a dĩ akũ kĩ,

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: pi fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kadomɔ akũ pɛpɛɛpɛ ayekĩ odima lɛláamɔ tɔkpa nɛ nɔ akũ, kɛnaawo Luwi a kĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo aabuki ɛya.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Baguma fɛta ɛkpa obu, yanya lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa akũ, ɛnyɛ fɔgã flee Lɛgã. Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa avɛ ye kĩ Baguma Kpale. Ade ye aanyɛ Kristo kanya nɛ lɔkɔ wĩ a kĩ eyi ɛkpa a kamɛ a.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Ye odi keĩ dzi nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna dadaada, edzi nɛ ɔhaĩ kĩ odima lɛláapuli efuã ɛdã ye a kamɛ. Odima támɔ tɔ̃ ye ade odima lɛláapuli ɛmɔ́ ye da. Ye fude nyɛ kamu, obu mɔ otumi daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: Dɛ bikĩ bideĩ katinya kamɛ akũ fɔtsa kĩ bɛtapia be akũ, ade bɛtakɔa anɛ bite nɛ akũ kana fɔtsa a kĩ fɔláawa daa akũ, mbom bɛkɔa anɛ bite nɛ Baguma kĩ ye akpa boe lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa mɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ ayekĩ bɔ́amɔ kawɔlɛ a akũ.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: Bi be kĩ bɛkakɛna tuwĩ bɛnya asikafɔ nɛ tudzuma wĩ kakɛna kamɛ, bɛkɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkaate ahiãfɔ fɔtsa faa.

english_verse: This will lay a solid foundation for the future, so they will know what true life is like.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɛkɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, baakpɔta fɔtsa kĩ fɔáwɔ biyi bɛkpa be akũ nɛ kunya kamɛ, lɔkɔa be awɛ aata nkpã wĩ a.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: Timoteo, dã fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma kɔa edo nɔ nɛ awɛ a akũ kadã wĩ. Tado akũ nɛ kɔlɔmɛna pupulidza mɔ fɔkɔasiatsa kavɛlɛ kamɛ. Ade fukĩĩ badi nɛɛ bakɛ bati kĩ kadikanyi fɔlɛtsa fɔanɛ a.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ badi bɔɛ be akũ kĩ binyina fukĩna bamɛ, lɛmɛ fɔtsɛ̃ foe akũ bɛyɛla katɛkado osi a. Mawã Baguma kĩ ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ Baguma kawɛ sũ ĩnyɛ Kristo Yesu fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃. Bido yĩ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ nkpã a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi kĩ budeĩ nɛ boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu sɛkɛ̃, mɔ bɔmɔ ye ɔmɔa kakɛna a kamɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: Matsɛlɛ mma yĩ obi Timoteo kĩ maátunɔ ye kalɛ. Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu bɛmɔ nɔ kɔnya, bɛkɛna nɔ sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkpa nɔ lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Dza Pintii Nɛ Katɛkado a Akũ.

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: Manyɛ Baguma a kĩ masum mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛwa ndɛ ayekĩ boe bawanyɔ kakɛna a kɔlɛ. Ntɛ mabɔa mpaɛ makai nɔ daa. Manyɛ ye kɔlɛ lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa ntɛ nkai nɔ nɛ yĩ mpaɛbɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: Mate anɛ nɛ nɔ babe a akũ, ade mawɛ kĩ mbuki mmɔ́ nɔ ayekĩ kawɔlɛ aade yĩ.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Mate anɛ nɛ nɔ katɛkado wĩ a kĩ odeĩ a akũ. Ade katɛkado kĩ kɛna nɛ nɔ ɔwatsɔ̃ Lois mɔ ama Eunike amɛ kamɛ a. Matɛ kado kĩ ade ke odu nɔ malo odeĩ a.

english_verse: So I ask you to make full use of the gift God gave you when I placed my hands on you. Use it well.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ makai nɔ kĩ pi futetsa a kĩ Baguma kpa nɔ nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ nte awɛ nɛ nɔ akũ a kɔɔba.

english_verse: God's Spirit doesn't make cowards out of us. The Spirit gives us power, love, and self-control.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma kpa boe a láfɔ̃ bɔavila, mbom ye Hũhũ a afɔ̃ kɔbɛ̃ awo nɛ boe kamɛ, kawɛ bati kalɛ, kapuli kanya boe akũ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Foesũ tafɔ̃ kɔnyɔã lɔkɔ nɔ nɛ boe Ɔlate fɔlɛtsa kalɛ kamɛ, ĩye kɔnyɔã lɔkɔ nɔ nɛ yĩ kĩ nwaa kɔla nɛ Kristo sũ. Mbom nɔ malo dza kɔɔba nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ, nɛ boe Ɔlate Kalɛ Wĩ a sũ, ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma kpa nɔ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ kɛna a.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Baguma lɛkpa boe nkpã ɛvɛ boe kĩ bɔnya ye bade. Nnɛ́ ayekĩ bɔfɛta sũ, mbom fɔnyɛ ye mɔawɛ nhihiɛ mɔ kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe a sũ. Ɛkpa boe kɔnyakamɔ kĩĩ ɛtsãmɛna boe Ɔlate Kristo Yesu akũ, fɔmɔ katinya yi kayɔ.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ finyaakĩĩ ni, Baguma nyɛ foe kanya ɛtsa boe pefee fɔtsã boe Ɔtɛnɛ Kristo Yesu kaya kamɛ. Ade ye lɛwɔla wuda kɔbɛ̃ a. Ɛtsã Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ɛtsa boe nkpã a kĩ ebuki ɛlá kawũna dadaada a osi a.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Baguma pau yĩ ndɛ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ, mɔ fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ kĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ mamɔ lubo kĩĩ a. Lɛmɛ kɔnyɔã lákɔ yĩ, kitonɛkĩ ĩnyina oti a kĩ ye ntɛ ndo. Ade ĩnyina kĩ yaapuli ɛdãmɛna lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɔa edo nɛ yĩ awɛ kɛnaawo Luwi nkaɛ a akũ.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: Pi ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ntsa nɔ a kalɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ fɔkɛna lɛtsa kĩ de liti otomɛna. Na nɛ katɛkado kĩĩ mɔ ɔdɔ a kĩ fɔnyɛ boe fude nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu kamɛ pintii.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Baguma Hũhũ kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kudeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ a kudo nɔ kɔbɛ̃, kapi fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ bɛkɔa bido nɛ nɔ awɛ a kapi wĩ.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: Onyina kĩ Asiafɔ batɛ badonɛ a flee dzakũ bɛfɔnɛ yĩ, ade ayea Figelo mɔ Hermogene lɛmɛ dzakũ a.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Mawã Baguma kĩ ɛmɔ Onesiforo mɔ ye tɔtɔ kamɛ bati kɔnya, kitonɛkĩ ɛkado yĩ ɔwɔlɛ lɔkɔ pii. Kɔnyɔã tákɔ ye kĩ nwaa kɔla sũ.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Kĩ esila ewo Roma a, ɛtsã emini ɛwɛ yĩ flee kɛnawo kĩ ɛmɔ́ yĩ.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Mawã Baguma kĩ ɛmɔ ye kɔnya nɛ Kadzɛ Luwi a akũ. Ade nɔ mɔawɛ onyina pefee kabumɛna a kĩ ɛkpa yĩ nɛ Efeso a.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Yĩ obi, do nɔ akũ kɔbɛ̃ mɔ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo Yesu a kĩ bɛkpa boe a kamɛ.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: Kɔa fɔtsa a kĩ onu kĩ ntsa nɛ adansifɔ pii anɛ kamɛ a kado nɛ bikĩ ɔtɛ odo kĩ baapuli bɛtsa bati bɛbã lɛmɛ a awɛ.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Do ɔwɔlɛ kamɔ lubo ndɛ sodzani wĩ kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ ɛkpa Kristo Yesu.

english_verse: Soldiers on duty don't work at outside jobs. They try only to please their commanding officer.
translation_verse: Sodzani kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ye adzuma akũ ni, yawɛ kĩ yakɛna fɔtsa fuwo ye lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ anɛ, foesũ ɛláado akũ nɛ adzuma kĩ ɛnyɛ́ sodzafɔ adzuma kamɛ.

english_verse: No one wins an athletic contest without obeying the rules.
translation_verse: Ade ayea fɔmɔ atsɛ owulanɛ aanya akũ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ atsɛ kalo mbla akũ.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Okuani kĩ yanɛ kɔba mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ni, ade ye anya lɔtɔ kanya funitsã a kĩ fubo a.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Kɔna fɔtsa a kĩ mbi nɔ a akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate aabumɔ nɔ onu foe flee kayɔ.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Te anɛ nɛ Yesu Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ Lɛgã Dawid kasinu obi a kĩ Baguma dzɛla ye etomɛna banɔkpa kamɛ a akũ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsa a. Ade foe nyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ made lɛtsã nɛ ke akũ a.

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: Ade Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ malɛ a sũ nlamɛna lubo kamɔ, ade ke bido yĩ nɛ nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ kamɛ ndɛ oti kĩ efum a. Lɛmɛ Baguma kalɛ kɔ̃ bɛtádo ke nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ!

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ mado ɔwɔlɛ kamɔ lubo nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ nɛ Baguma bati a kĩ ɛpau a sũ, ayekĩ nɛ Kristo Yesu akũ be malo baana katɛ mɔ kawɔlɛ nkpã a kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali fɔlɛtsa kĩ balɛ, “Ntɛ buku mɔ boe Ɔlate ni, bɔ́adzi nkpã lɛmɛ mɔ ye.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Ntɛ budo ɔwɔlɛ bɔmɔ́ lubo ni, bɔ́anya lɛgã lɛmɛ mɔ ye. Ade ntɛ busĩ ye ni, ye malo yaasĩ boe.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Ntɛ boe bɔákɛna nɛ boe katɛkado akũ malo ni, ye kɔ̃ yakɛna nɛ ye kalɛ akũ daa, kitonɛkĩ ɛláapuli esĩ ye akũ da.” Pi Nɔ Akũ Kapi Wĩ Ayekĩ Baguma Aatsa Nɔ Lɛgãbɔɛ.

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Te bati a fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ anɛ, lɔkɔa kasi be mbla nɛ Baguma anɛ kĩ bɛtakavɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa, kitonɛkĩ nfasɔ adima lɛláa foe kamɛ, mbom kabula fɔabula bati a kĩ batse foe a katɛkado kade.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Bɔa mbɔdi kakɛna adzuma mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ayekĩ fɔ́awo Baguma anɛ. Kɛna adzuma ndɛ oti kĩ ye adzuma lákɔ ye kɔnyɔã mbom yatsa Baguma ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a pɛpɛɛpɛ.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Tado nɔ akũ nɛ kɔlɔmɛna kĩ fɔátsa Baguma kavila kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ fɔakpã bati kanɛlitimɛna nɛ Baguma akũ.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Fɔtsa katsa a na la ndɛ kaakpa kĩ kasa kaba sukɛna. Bati nviã kĩ bɛtsa foe odu nyɛ Himenaio mɔ Fileto.

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: Bimuniki nɛ ɔnɔkɔali osi a akũ, ade badani batɛ badonɛ a badi katɛkado a. Bɛkatsa fɔtsa kĩ banɔkpa kabuki kayidza kadzi nkpã ya kɛtɛ̃ kɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ, Baguma kɔla kayɔkayi litekũ a kĩ eke a ni, lɛtsama lɛláapuli likuna de. Ade kayɔkayi litekũ kĩĩ akũ bɛtsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate nyina bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye bade a.” ade “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate a ode ni, kɛnɛ kĩ emuniki nɛ tɔkpa liti.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: Nɛ tɔtɔ kpale kamɛ ni, fɔɔdaɛ mɔ titsensi kumɛkumɛ deĩ. Fudi nyɛ sika ngbã fude, fudi lɛmɛ nyɛ sika ovoe fude. Ade fudi lɛmɛ nyɛ tite ĩye titse fude a. Bɛkɔa fukĩ fudeĩ kɔya biyi bɛkpa fuwi titiliwu kanya, ade bɛkɔa fɔbɛbã biyi bɛkpa luwi daa akũ a.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ oti odi vɔlɛ ye akũ ɛkɛna ye akũ yedede, ɛnɛ nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ ni, yaanya adzuma titiliwu ɔkɛnanɛ kitonɛkĩ bɛkpalɛ ye akũ ade edeĩ nfasɔ ɛkpa boe Ɔlate a.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Takɔa nɔ akũ ɔkpa fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ foe kakɛna akɔ bapopo odo. Pili katɛkado, nkpã wĩ kadzi, mɔ bati kawɛ. Mimɔ bati a mikɛna fukĩĩ mɔ kadzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, mibɔa mpaɛ mivia boe Ɔlate kabumɛna mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ yedede.

english_verse: Stay away from stupid and senseless arguments. These only lead to trouble,
translation_verse: Tado onukpɛ̃ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ kĩ nyansã lɛláa foe kamɛ. Nɔ mɔawɛ a onyina kĩ fɔlɛtsa kavɛlɛ naa bamɛ ayamɔ ɔdzɛ.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Kɛtánɛ kĩ boe Ɔlate ɔsumunɛ akɛna ɔdzɛ, mbom kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ ɛkpa odi nyɛ odi, ɛnya fɔtsa ɔtsanɛ wĩ kĩ edeĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɛkpa bikĩ bideĩ ɔsĩ a.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Ade ke kɛnɛ kĩ ɛkɔa ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɛkaanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ katsa bati a kĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ kalɛ wĩ a akũ a. Ɔsa Baguma aafɔ̃ bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa bɛyaanyi ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Nɛ foe kamɛ a, be adzuni kamɛ aabinya lɔkɔa bɛnɛ nɛ Abonsam kpeĩ kĩ bɛtɔ a, kĩ ɛkɔa be ɛkɛna ye fɔwɛtsa bakɛnanɛ a kamɛ.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: Te anɛ kĩ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kamɛ ni, kadzi kamɛ aana ɔsĩ.

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: Bati aawɛ be odi kalɛ fɔtsa bawɛnɛ, bɛna sika anɛngbã, bɛkabɔa tɔwɔlɛ, bɛkapia akũ. Baanya bati kĩ be akũ awo be anɛ, kĩ bavũna bati, kĩ baákɔa obu kakpa be bamanɛ. Baanya bati kĩ baáyi bati ayɛ, mɔ bikĩ bɛlá katɛkado.

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: Baanya bati kĩ bideĩ sɛmɛ ɔnyɛ, bikĩ baámɔ bati kɔnya, bikĩ bama fɔvã kate nɛ bati akũ, mɔ bikĩ baápuli kanya be mɔawɛ akũ. Baanya bati kĩ bideĩ aũkani, baáwɛ kĩ bakɛna tuwĩ.

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
translation_verse: Ade badi lɛmɛ aanya bati liti osi batsãnɛ, bati kĩ baakɛna fɔtsa kĩ badɛla be akũ nɛ ode, mɔ bikĩ bawɛ katinya kamɛ kawɔlɛ kamɔ fɔtsa kaba Baguma kawɛ.

english_verse: Even though they will make a show of being religious, their religion won't be real. Don't have anything to do with such people.
translation_verse: Bati kĩĩ odu aakɛna be akũ ndɛ bati wĩ, lɛmɛ baasĩ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ kɔ́akpa be nkpã wĩ kadzi a. Vɛlɛ akũ nɛ bati kĩĩ odu ɔwɛ̃.

english_verse: Some men fool whole families, just to get power over those women who are slaves of sin and are controlled by all sorts of desires.
translation_verse: Bati kĩĩ odu kamɛ badi atsã nɛ bati tɔtɔ kamɛ kakɛ batsole kĩ baápuli kapi be adzuni. Be titikpa kĩĩ odu kakɛna fɔ̃ batsole a kakɔna láwa kpĩĩ ade bitomɔ fɔwɛtsa pii liti a.

english_verse: These women always want to learn something new, but they never can discover the truth.
translation_verse: Batsole kĩĩ odu akɔlɛ fɔtsa vɔɛ̃ luwi daa lɛmɛ baápuli binu ɔnɔkɔali a kayɔ.

english_verse: Just as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, these people are enemies of the truth. Their minds are sick, and their faith isn't real.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Yane mɔ Yambi yidza bɛdza nɛ Mose akũ a, ade aye fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ lɛmɛ yidza bɛdza nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a akũ a. Be tɔkpa kakɛna bula be adzuni kade, ade bɛyɛla be katɛkado lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: But they won't get very far with their foolishness. Soon everyone will know the truth about them, just as Jannes and Jambres were found out. Paul's Last Instructions to Timothy
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ lɛláanaa lɔtɔ mɔ foe kakɛna, kitonɛkĩ be fudzimbitsa a aanɛ fɔwa odi nyɛ odi lɛmɔ. Ade aye pɛpɛɛpɛ fɔya nɛ Yane mɔ Yambi akũ a. Paulo Kpa Kɔdɛ Nkaɛ.

english_verse: Timothy, you know what I teach and how I live. You know what I want to do and what I believe. You have seen how patient and loving I am, and how in the past I put up with
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ otomɔ yĩ fɔtsa katsa, yĩ ɔbla, yĩ kakɔna mɔ yĩ katɛkado, yĩ bati kalɛ kawɛ, yĩ ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana mɔ yĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: trouble and suffering in the cities of Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. Yet the Lord rescued me from all those terrible troubles.
translation_verse: Onyina ayekĩ bitomɔ yĩ liti, bɛmɔna yĩ lubo nɛ Antiokia, Ikonio mɔ Listra, mɔ bati liti katomɛna pii a kĩ mpuli ndza nɛ foe kamɛ a. Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate nyɛ yĩ nɛ foe flee kamɛ.

english_verse: In fact, anyone who belongs to Christ Jesus and wants to live right will have trouble from others.
translation_verse: Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yadzi nkpã wĩ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna nɛ Kristo Yesu kamɛ ni, baatomɔ ye liti.

english_verse: But evil people who pretend to be what they are not will become worse than ever, as they fool others and are fooled themselves.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati kpa mɔ bati bakɛnɛ kɔ̃ ni, be tɔkpa aakade nɛ ode kaba, ade baakakɛ bati, bati bɛbã lɛmɛ lɛkɛ be a.

english_verse: Keep on being faithful to what you were taught and to what you believed. After all, you know who taught you these things.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ ni, pi ɔnɔkɔali fɔtsa a kĩ bɛtsa nɔ, kĩ ɔtɛ odo lɛmɛ a kadomɔ akũ, kitonɛkĩ onyina bati a kĩ be sɛkɛ̃ ɔkɔlɛ foe otomɛna.

english_verse: Since childhood, you have known the Holy Scriptures that are able to make you wise enough to have faith in Christ Jesus and be saved.
translation_verse: Kito anɛ nɔ tibisɛ̃ kamɛ kĩ bɛtsa nɔ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa, kĩ fɔkpa nɔ kadikanyi a kĩ fɔ́akpa nɔ nkpã ntɛ ɔtɛ Kristo Yesu odo.

english_verse: Everything in the Scriptures is God's Word. All of it is useful for teaching and helping people and for correcting them and showing them how to live.
translation_verse: Baguma kɔbɛ̃ liwo nɛ bati kamɛ kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa, foesũ fɔnɛnɛ fɔkpa fɔtsa katsa, oti anɛ kakã, kɔdɛ kakpa, mɔ oti kavɛlɛ kakpa nkpã wĩ kadzi.

english_verse: The Scriptures train God's servants to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Bɛtsɛlɛ foe ayekĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yasum Baguma ni, yaakpɔla, epuli ɛna nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ ɛkpa fɔtsa wĩ fudi nyɛ fudi kakɛna.

english_verse: When Christ Jesus comes as king, he will be the judge of everyone, whether they are living or dead. So with God and Christ as witnesses, I command you
translation_verse: Ndzɛ̃ nɛ Baguma mɔ Kristo Yesu kĩ yayadzɛmɔ batidziwa mɔ banɔkpa, mɔ ye a kĩ yayanya akũ ndɛ lɛgã aye a anɛ kamɛ, makpa nɔ kɔdɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ,

english_verse: to preach God's message. Do it willingly, even if it isn't the popular thing to do. You must correct people and point out their sins. But also cheer them up, and when you instruct them, always be patient.
translation_verse: ntɛ odeĩ aya ĩye ɔtána aya malo ni, bɔa mbɔdi kade lɛtsã nɛ fɔlɛtsa wĩ a akũ. Dã kĩ atsa bati a fɔtsa, kakã be anɛ lɔkɔa kakaado be kɔbɛ̃. Na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kanyɛ fɔlɛtsa kayɔ katsa bati nɛ fukĩĩ flee kakɛna kamɛ. Tafɔ̃ fɔtsa katsa lɛmɛ.

english_verse: The time is coming when people won't listen to good teaching. Instead, they will look for teachers who will please them by telling them only what they are itching to hear.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ lidi aaya kĩ bati lɛláabuki bitse fɔtsa katsa wĩ kĩĩ a. Mbom baatomɛna be mɔawɛ fɔwɛtsa, ade baawɛ fɔtsa batsanɛ bɛbã kĩ baabi be fɔtsa a kĩ akũ asĩ be kĩ binu a.

english_verse: They will turn from the truth and eagerly listen to senseless stories.
translation_verse: Bɛláawɛ kĩ batse ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, mbom baayi atɔ bitse fɔlɛtsa mɛwa.

english_verse: But you must stay calm and be willing to suffer. You must work hard, telling the good news and to do your job well.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɔ kɔ̃ kɛnɛ kĩ api nɔ akũ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ, kaado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ lubo lidi nyɛ lidi kamɛ. Kɛna Kalɛ Wĩ a ɔlɛnɛ kawũna ndɛ Baguma ɔsumunɛ aye.

english_verse: Now the time has come for me to die. My life is like a drink offering being poured out on the altar.
translation_verse: Yĩ kɔ̃ ni, lɔkɔ kpɔla liyua kĩ baakɔa yĩ bɛbɔa ndɛ afɔliɛ bɛkpa Baguma, ade lɔkɔ lɛmɛ wo ɔtɔ kĩ manɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ a.

english_verse: I have fought well. I have finished the race, and I have been faithful.
translation_verse: Nvũ lɛma wĩ a kavũ wĩ, nlo atsɛ a flee ĩyua ade mpini yĩ katɛkado a nɛ Kristo kamɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a.

english_verse: So a crown will be given to me for pleasing the Lord. He judges fairly, and on the day of judgment he will give a crown to me and to everyone else who wants him to appear with power. Personal Instructions
translation_verse: Ade kito finyaa ni, futetsa wĩ a kĩ bakpa akũ banyanɛ nɛ nkpã wĩ kadzi kamɛ a adzɔlɛ yĩ. Ade futetsa kĩĩ boe Ɔlate kĩ ɛnyɛ fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ wĩ a, aakɔa ɛkpa yĩ nɛ luwi nkaɛ a akũ a. Ade ke nnɛ́ yĩ odi keĩ aatɛ de, mbom mɔ bati flee a kĩ bidzi nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ badã boe Ɔlate kabu kaya a anɛ. Wɛ Sɔwa Kayaamɔ Yĩ.

english_verse: Come to see me as soon as you can.
translation_verse: Bɔa mbɔdi kaya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ,

english_verse: Demas loves the things of this world so much that he left me and went to Thessalonica. Crescens has gone to Galatia, and Titus has gone to Dalmatia.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ Dema dzakũ ɛfɔnɛ yĩ, ɛnɛ etomɛna katinya kamɛ fɔtsa kawɛ liti nɛ Tesalonika. Kreske dzakũ ɛnaa Galatia, ade Tito lɛmɛ naa Dalmatia a.

english_verse: Only Luke has stayed with me. Mark can be very helpful to me, so please find him and bring him with you.
translation_verse: Luka odi lite nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃. Kpã Marko kayamɛna kitonɛkĩ yaanya obumɛnanɛ paa ɛkpa yĩ nɛ adzuma a kamɛ.

english_verse: I sent Tychicus to Ephesus.
translation_verse: Ndo Tihiko ɛnaa Efeso.

english_verse: When you come, bring the coat I left at Troas with Carpus. Don't forget to bring the scrolls, especially the ones made of leather.
translation_verse: Ntɛ aya ni, bɔɛ yĩ osili atadiɛ wulaa a kĩ nkɔa ĩyi nɛ Karpo sɛkɛ̃ nɛ Troa kama yĩ. Bɔɛ yĩ tuvoli lɛmɛ, titiliwu tikĩ bɛkɛna mɔ ɔyaɛ ovoli a kayamɛna.

english_verse: Alexander, the metalworker, has hurt me in many ways. But the Lord will pay him back for what he has done.
translation_verse: Aleksandro kĩ ɛnyɛ otumfɔ a kɛna yĩ fɔlɔɛwotsa paa. Boe Ɔlate aase ye lɛtsa kĩ ɛkɛna yĩ a kɔtɔ.

english_verse: Alexander opposes what we preach, so you had better watch out for him.
translation_verse: Foesũ dã nɔ akũ kadã wĩ nɛ ye akũ, kitonɛkĩ eyidza ɛdza nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ bɔatsa a akũ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ.

english_verse: When I was first put on trial, no one helped me. In fact, everyone deserted me. I hope it won't be held against them.
translation_verse: Kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛkpã yĩ bɛnamɛna fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ anɛ a, odima tátomɔ yĩ, be flee bilo bɛfɔnɛ yĩ. Lɛmɛ mawã Baguma kĩ ɛtase be foe kɔtɔ.

english_verse: But the Lord stood beside me. He gave me the strength to tell his full message, so that all Gentiles would hear it. And I was kept safe from hungry lions.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate dza nɛ yĩ liti, edo yĩ kɔbɛ̃ ɛfɔ̃ mpuli nlɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a nkpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ́ Yudafɔ a nɛ awã, ade ɛnyɛ yĩ etomɛna wuda awɛ kamɛ a.

english_verse: The Lord will always keep me from being harmed by evil, and he will bring me safely into his heavenly kingdom. Praise him forever and ever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate aanyɛ yĩ etomɛna tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi kamɛ, ade yaakpã yĩ bɔɛɛ bɔɛɛ nnaawo nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kamɛ a. Kamu mɔ kukũkpalɛ bɔakpa Baguma kito finyaa kanaa daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ. Makla Mi a Flee.

english_verse: Give my greetings to Priscilla and Aquila and to the family of Onesiphorus.
translation_verse: Mawɔ̃na Priska mɔ Akwila, mɔ Onesiforo tɔtɔ kamɛ bati a flee.

english_verse: Erastus stayed at Corinth. Trophimus was sick when I left him at Miletus.
translation_verse: Erasto kahɔ nɛ Korinto ade nfɔnɛ Trofimo kĩ yasɔ awɛ nɛ Mileto a.

english_verse: Do your best to come before winter. Eubulus, Pudens, Linus, and Claudia send you their greetings, and so do the rest of the Lord's followers.
translation_verse: Bɔa mbɔdi kĩ ayawo yĩ sɛkɛ̃ nɛ awĩ fɔmɔ osili lɔkɔ aawo ɔtɔ. Eubolo, Pude, Lino, Klaudia, mɔ batɛ badonɛ, batsole mɔ banyole, flee awɔ̃na nɔ!

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will bless your life and will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate ɛnamɔ nɔ hũhũ. Baguma ɛmɔ mi kɔnya.

english_verse: From Paul, a servant of God and an apostle of Jesus Christ. I encourage God's own people to have more faith and to understand the truth about religion.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Paulo, kĩ ĩnyɛ Baguma ɔsumunɛ, mɔ Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Baguma pau yĩ ade edo yĩ kĩ mbumɛna bati a kĩ ɛpau a, ntsa be ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ boe katɛkado ɔsum atsa a.

english_verse: Then they will have the hope of eternal life God promised long ago. And God never tells a lie!
translation_verse: Ade ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ nɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a akũ a. Baguma kĩ yaáma fɔvã a mɔawɛ lɛma boe kalɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi fɔmɔ ɛkɛna katinya kamɛ a.

english_verse: Titus, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and Christ Jesus our Savior will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! What Titus Was To Do in Crete
translation_verse: Yĩ obi wĩ Tito, matsɛlɛ nɔ ovoli kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ bɔnyɛ ɔmɔa nɛ boe katɛkado a kamɛ. Boe Ɔlɛga Baguma mɔ Kristo Yesu boe Ɔtɛnɛ, bɛmɔ nɔ kɔnya, bɛkpa nɔ lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Paulo Kpa Tito Adzuma Adi Nɛ Kreta.

english_verse: I left you in Crete to do what had been left undone and to appoint leaders for the churches in each town. As I told you,
translation_verse: Nkɔa nɔ ndzina nɛ Kreta ayekĩ aalɔla fɔtsa a kĩ fute a kakɛna. Mawɛ kĩ pau asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ odi nyɛ odi kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ntsa nɔ a.

english_verse: they must have a good reputation and be faithful in marriage. Their children must be followers of the Lord and not have a reputation for being wild and disobedient.
translation_verse: Kɛtánɛ kĩ bamɔ mfumsu nɛ batɛ badonɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ akũ. Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ ɛkɔã ɔtsɔ̃ mɔapɛ, ade kɛnɛ kĩ ye babi lɛmɛ bɛnya batɛ badonɛ, bɛtanya bati kĩ bideĩ atɔ ɔsĩ ĩye baábu fɔkɔ.

english_verse: Church officials are in charge of God's work, and so they must also have a good reputation. They must not be bossy, quick-tempered, heavy drinkers, bullies, or dishonest in business.
translation_verse: Nɛ ayekĩ asɔli batɛ badonɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ adã Baguma adzuma akũ sũ ni, kɛtánɛ kĩ bɛmɔ mfumsu nɛ ye akũ. Kɛtánɛ kĩ yata akũ, ĩye ɛkana kalɔkpa mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ, ĩye ɛkamɔa bavɛ kawuga, ĩye ɛnya oti kĩ yadã kitikiti, ĩye ɛyɔɔla anɛ nɛ sika akũ.

english_verse: Instead, they must be friendly to strangers and enjoy doing good things. They must also be sensible, fair, pure, and self-controlled.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ epuli ɛtɛ banɔvɔɛ̃, ɛwɛ lɛtsa kĩ lɛnɛnɛ, epi ye akũ kapi wĩ. Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ edeĩ ɔbla wĩ, kĩ efĩĩ lɛláa ye akũ ade yapuli kanya ye akũ lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: They must stick to the true message they were taught, so their good teaching can help others and correct everyone who opposes it.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ yapi ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a kĩ bɔtɛ budo a, kĩ fuketi mɔ fɔtsa katsa a ɛlɛ. Ade osi kĩĩ akũ yaatsã epuli ɛtsa fɔtsa wĩ, ɛkado bati bɛbã kɔbɛ̃, lɔkɔa ɛnyɛ bikĩ biyidza bɛdza nɛ kalɛ a akũ nfumusu ɛtsa be.

english_verse: There are many who don't respect authority, and they fool others by talking nonsense. This is especially true of some Jewish followers.
translation_verse: Malɛ fukĩĩ kitonɛkĩ bati pii, titiliwu Yudafɔ a kĩ bɛtɛ bido a, deĩ atɔ ɔsĩ, bɛtsɛ̃ balɛ tuwuli pupulidza, kakɛ bati lɛmɛ.

english_verse: But you must make them be quiet. They are after money, and they upset whole families by teaching what they should not.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ asua be osi bɛfɔ̃ foe odu katsa, kitonɛkĩ bɛlamɛna bati adzuni kade kabula nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ. Bɛtsɛ̃mɔ fɔtsa kpa kĩ kɛtáfɛta kĩ bɛtsa a katsa, nɛ sika fuu sũ.

english_verse: It is like one of their own prophets once said, “The people of Crete always tell lies. They are greedy and lazy like wild animals.”
translation_verse: Kretani odi kĩ ɛnyɛ be onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ lɛlɛ kĩ, “Kretafɔ nyɛ bavãlɛvã bati daa, bayaɛ kpa kĩ bideĩ ablɔ, banyakpanɛ mɔ banyɔnɛpo lɛmɛ.”

english_verse: This surely is a true saying. And you should be hard on such people, so you can help them grow stronger in their faith.
translation_verse: Fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali. Nɛ foesũ kã be anɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ayekĩ baana katɛkado kĩ kideĩ ɔsĩ.

english_verse: Don't pay any attention to any of those senseless Jewish stories and human commands. These are made up by people who won't obey the truth.
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ aafɔ̃ bɛnyɛ atɔ nɛ Yudafɔ fɔlɛtsa mɛwa mɔ mbla a kĩ bikĩ bisĩ kalɛ wĩ a atsa a.

english_verse: Everything is pure for someone whose heart is pure. But nothing is pure for an unbeliever with a dirty mind. That person's mind and conscience are destroyed.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa adã yedede kakpa bikĩ be mɔawɛ tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, lɛmɛ bikĩ be mɔawɛ akũ tákpalɛ, kĩ bɛtátɛ bido lɛmɛ ni, lɛtsama ládã yedede kakpa be, kitonɛkĩ be adzuni mɔ tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ tákpalɛ.

english_verse: Such people claim to know God, but their actions prove they really don't. They are disgusting. They won't obey God, and they are too worthless to do anything good.
