translation_verse: Baguma bi ye kɔkɔɛ kĩ, “Isak akũ fɔ́atsã mɔ aana babi mɔ bawa a kĩ nlɛ ĩyi a.”

english_verse: because he was sure that God could raise people to life. This was just like getting Isaac back from death.
translation_verse: Abraham kɔna kĩ Baguma aapuli ɛdzɛla Isak etomɛna kanɔkpa malo. Ade foesũ emuniki ɛtɛ ye obi ndɛ wuda kamɛ bɛdzɛla ye bitomɛna a.

english_verse: Isaac had faith, and he promised blessings to Jacob and Esau.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Isak hila Yakob mɔ Esau nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔ́aya a akũ a.

english_verse: Later, when Jacob was about to die, he leaned on his walking stick and worshiped. Then because of his faith he blessed each of Joseph's sons.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ Yakob aaku a, ehila Yosef babinyole a, ade kĩ ɛkɛna lɔlɔ ete nɛ ye otse kĩ yake katsã akũ a, esum Baguma.

english_verse: And right before Joseph died, he had faith that God would lead the people of Israel out of Egypt. So he told them to take his bones with them.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ Yosef aaku a, ɛlɛ eyi kĩ Israelfɔ aadzakũ nɛ Egipte tite akũ, ade ɛtsa ayekĩ bɛkɛna mɔ ye fɔtsɔ̃ a.

english_verse: Because Moses' parents had faith, they kept him hidden until he was three months old. They saw that he was a beautiful child, and they were not afraid to disobey the king's orders.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ bɛma Mose a, ye bamanɛ kɔla ye tidetɔ ɛlalɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɛmɔ́ kĩ yalɛ kadã paa, ade bɛtávila mbla a kĩ Egipte Lɛgã si a katu a.

english_verse: Then after Moses grew up, his faith made him refuse to be called the king's grandson.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ kĩ Mose bo anɛ a, esĩ kĩ bɛtavɛ ye kĩ Egipte Lɛgã obitsole obi.

english_verse: He chose to be mistreated with God's people instead of having the good time that sin could bring for a little while.
translation_verse: Mbom ɛwɛ kĩ yamɔ lubo mɔ Baguma bati kɛba kĩ yamɔ tɔkpa kamɛ ɔmɛnɛ lɔkɔ lukũ lidi.

english_verse: Moses knew that the treasures of Egypt were not as wonderful as what he would receive from suffering for the Messiah, and he looked forward to his reward.
translation_verse: Mose kɔna kĩ kɔnyɔã a kĩ baado ye nɛ Kristo sũ tɛ kɔya paa kɔba akũ kana fɔtsa flee a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ Egipte a, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa anɛ ete nɛ kɔtɔkase a kĩ Baguma aakpa ye nɛ lɔkɔ kĩ laaya a akũ.

english_verse: Because of his faith, Moses left Egypt. Moses had seen the invisible God and wasn't afraid of the king's anger.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Mose dzakũ nɛ Egipte, kĩ ɛtávila lɛgã kalɔkpa a. Edo ɔwɔlɛ ɛtámuniki liti, ɛkɛna ndɛ yamɔ Baguma a kĩ bɔámɔ mɔ anɛ a.

english_verse: His faith also made him celebrate Passover. He sprinkled the blood of animals on the doorposts, so that the first-born sons of the people of Israel would not be killed by the destroying angel.
translation_verse: Katɛkado Mose kɔa eyi Wuda Katɛ̃ Luwi a, ade ɛfɔ̃ bɛkɔa babɔanɛ bikputa nɛ be tunyukpɛ̃ titse akũ, ayekĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a lɛláakɔ Israelfɔ babinyole batɔnyade a.

english_verse: Because of their faith, the people walked through the Red Sea on dry land. But when the Egyptians tried to do it, they were drowned.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Israelfɔ puli bitsua Mpo Ngbã a binyina ndɛ tite akũ bɛtsɛ̃. Kĩ Egiptefɔ bɔa mbɔdi kĩ be malo banyina a ni, bɛkamu nɛ mui a kamɛ.

english_verse: God's people had faith, and when they had walked around the city of Jericho for seven days, its walls fell down.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ Yeriko ɔmatɔ foebi a kĩ Israelfɔ tsã bisinya foe fuwi evũkɔnɔ a veliveli.

english_verse: Rahab had been a prostitute, but she had faith and welcomed the spies. So she wasn't killed with the people who disobeyed.
translation_verse: Katɛkado lɛfɔ̃ bɛtákɔ Rahab ɔdɔpaani a bibumɔ bati a kĩ bɛtábu Baguma a, kitonɛkĩ ɛtɛ Israelfɔ a kĩ bɛbɛla bɛnadã tite a kamɛ mɔ kawɔlɛ.

english_verse: What else can I say? There isn't enough time to tell about Gideon, Barak, Samson, Jephthah, David, Samuel, and the prophets.
translation_verse: Litsa mbuki nlɛ mbu? Lɔkɔ lɛláa kĩ maalɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ Gideon, Barak, Samson, Yefta, Dawid, Samuel mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a akũ.

english_verse: Their faith helped them conquer kingdoms, and because they did right, God made promises to them. They closed the jaws of lions
translation_verse: Bɛtsã katɛkado kamɛ bɛnɔ mɔ fude pii bɛnya be akũ. Bɛnya akũ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ, ade bɛna fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi kĩ yaakpa be a. Badi sua dzata tunukpɛ̃,

english_verse: and put out raging fires and escaped from the swords of their enemies. Although they were weak, they were given the strength and power to chase foreign armies away.
translation_verse: badi dina fi gɛĩgɛĩ, ade fɔfɔ̃ kĩ badi lo nɛ kawũ onukpɛ̃ a. Katɛkado fɔ̃ bikĩ bɛkɛna kpɛtɛɛ a na kɔbɛ̃, ade bɛna ɔsĩ nɛ kawũ kamɛ bɛnɔ bɛnya banɔvɔɛ̃ kawũ banɔnɛ akũ a.

english_verse: Some women received their loved ones back from death. Many of these people were tortured, but they refused to be released. They were sure they would get a better reward when the dead are raised to life.
translation_verse: Katɛkado kamɛ fɔtsã mɔ batsole tɛ be akũ bati banɔkpa kĩ bɛdzɛla bidzi nkpã. Nɛ katɛkado sũ bati bɛbã kĩ bɛtáwɛ kĩ bɛnyɛ be nɛ kɔla fɔnɛ be akũ awɛ bɛkɛna be awɔda biku, ayekĩ baadzɛla be bidzi nkpã kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Others were made fun of and beaten with whips, and some were chained in jail.
translation_verse: Bidi badi nsekuo, bibo be mɔ mple, ade bido badi nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ bɛnado nɛ kɔla kamɛ a.

english_verse: Still others were stoned to death or sawed in two or killed with swords. Some had nothing but sheep skins or goat skins to wear. They were poor, mistreated, and tortured.
translation_verse: Bɛtalɛ badi boe, bɛbɛ̃ badi nɛ kayite mɔ ɔsaɛ, bɛkɔ badi mɔ apã. Badi na nɛ baveli ĩye kutukpã tuvoli kamɛ bɛtsã bɛkamini nɛ ohiã kamɛ, bitomɔ be liti ade bɛkɛna be awɔda a.

english_verse: The world did not deserve these good people, who had to wander in deserts and on mountains and had to live in caves and holes in the ground.
translation_verse: Nɛ be kalɛ sũ katinya kĩĩ tákpa be kadzi! Bɛtsã bɛkamini ndɛ bati kĩ bilo kawũ nɛ kɔsa kamɛ, bidzi nɛ tɔtɔ akũ, bɛbɛla nɛ tɔtɔ tɛkɛ mɔ tite fɔkɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: All of them pleased God because of their faith! But still they died without being given what had been promised.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ flee kĩ be katɛkado di adansiɛ nɛ be akũ malo ni, be kamɛ odima awɛ táta lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma lɛ eyi a,

english_verse: This was because God had something better in store for us. And he did not want them to reach the goal of their faith without us.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɛna nhihiɛ kĩ ɛnɛnɛ ɛbɛ̃ eyi ɛkpa boe. Ye botaɛ nyɛ kĩ ɛláanɛ boe liti ɛkɛna be bɛkpɔla.

english_verse: Such a large crowd of witnesses is all around us! So we must get rid of everything that slows us down, especially the sin that just won't let go. And we must be determined to run the race that is ahead of us.
translation_verse: Nɛ foe sũ ni, kĩ budeĩ bati kɔdabu kĩĩ odu kĩ bisinya boe, bado boe kɔbɛ̃ sũ ni, mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ fɔlɔtsa fudi nyɛ fudi kĩ futeĩ nɛ boe akũ, mɔ tɔkpa a kĩ tɛmanɛ nɛ boe akũ buwula, lɔkɔa buwula atsɛ a kĩ ɛwaa nɛ boe lɔtɔ a mɔ kɔnɛyɔɔlɛ.

english_verse: We must keep our eyes on Jesus, who leads us and makes our faith complete. He endured the shame of being nailed to a cross, because he knew later on he would be glad he did. Now he is seated at the right side of God's throne!
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa anɛ bute nɛ Yesu akũ daa, oti a kĩ ye akũ boe katɛkado dzɛ̃ a, kito kayɔkayi kɛnawo kawũna a. Kĩ enyina kawɔlɛ a kĩ kadzɔlɛ ye a sũ ni, edo ɔwɔlɛ ɛmɔ́ lubo nɛ asendua akũ, ade ɛtábu asendua akũ wuda kɔnyɔã lɛtsama a. Lɛmɛ finyaa ɛnɛ edzi nɛ Baguma lɛgãkpo a sɔmɔna.

english_verse: So keep your mind on Jesus, who put up with many insults from sinners. Then you won't get discouraged and give up.
translation_verse: Mikɔna lɛtsa a kĩ de kamɛ Yesu tsã ɛtɛ̃ a, mɔ ayekĩ ɛmɔ́ lubo kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ yidza bɛdza nɛ ye akũ pii a midã. Nɛ foesũ mitafɔ̃ akpɔ liveli mi mimuniki nɛ ye liti.

english_verse: None of you have yet been hurt in your battle against sin.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ nɛ mi kanɔ mɔ tɔkpa kamɛ a, mitánɔ miwo tɔ̃ awã kĩ baako mi babɔanɛ nɛ tite.

english_verse: But you have forgotten that the Scriptures say to God's children, “When the Lord punishes you, don't make light of it, and when he corrects you, don't be discouraged.
translation_verse: Mbɔɛɛ milɛla ɔwɔlɛ kado fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma abi mi ndɛ ye babi a? Ade foe nyɛ kĩ, “Yĩ obi, ntɛ Ɔlate a vɛlɛ nɔ sɔtɔ ni, tabu foe fɔtsa kabii. Ntɛ ɛkã nɔ anɛ ni, tafɔ̃ fɔha nɔ ɔwɔlɛ.

english_verse: The Lord corrects the people he loves and disciplines those he calls his own.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ oti a kĩ boe Ɔlate awɛ kalɛ ni, ade ye yavɛlɛ sɔtɔ a. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye tibi ni, yavɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ.”

english_verse: Be patient when you are being corrected! This is how God treats his children. Don't all parents correct their children?
translation_verse: Ntɛ miamɔ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ lubo ni, mido ɔwɔlɛ. Mi lubo kamɔ a atsa kĩ Baguma lamɛna mi kavɛlɛ ndɛ ye babi aye. Obisɛ̃ odi deĩ kĩ ɔlɛga lávɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ?

english_verse: God corrects all his children, and if he doesn't correct you, then you don't really belong to him.
translation_verse: Ntɛ baávɛlɛ mi ndɛ ayekĩ yavɛlɛ ye babi flee a ni, fɔatsa kĩ minyɛ́ ye babi kpanunu a, mbom minyɛ oti bɛbã babi.

english_verse: Our earthly fathers correct us, and we still respect them. Isn't it even better to be given true life by letting our spiritual Father correct us?
translation_verse: Fukĩ fubu nyɛ kĩ budeĩ tite akũ balɛga kĩ bavɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ, lɛmɛ bɔakɔa obu kakpa be. Nde sũ bɔláadɔla boe akũ bɔkpa boe hũhũ Ɔlɛga pii fɔba lɔkɔa budzi nkpã?

english_verse: Our human fathers correct us for a short time, and they do it as they think best. But God corrects us for our own good, because he wants us to be holy, as he is.
translation_verse: Boe balɛga a avɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ lɔkɔ lukũ odi ndɛ ayekĩ fɔnɛnɛ be. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔ̃ akɛna foe nɛ boe kalɛ sũ, ayekĩ bɔ́anya bati kpalɛwa ndɛ ye aye.

english_verse: It is never fun to be corrected. In fact, at the time it is always painful. But if we learn to obey by being corrected, we will do right and live at peace.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bavɛlɛ boe sɔtɔ a, fɔawo boe kalɔɛ nɛ lɔkɔ a kamɛ, ade kawɔlɛ láde boe a. Lɛmɛ ke liti a, fɔafɔ̃ be a kĩ bɛvɛlɛ be a akɛna bati kpĩĩ, kana lukudɔ nɛ nkpã kamɛ. Bɛkpa Kɔdɛ Bisi Mbla Lɛmɛ.

english_verse: Now stand up straight! Stop your knees from shaking
translation_verse: Foesũ mido akpɔ a kĩ ɛdɔ a, mɔ mi aduli a kĩ ɛdɔũdɔũ kɔbɛ̃.

english_verse: and walk a straight path. Then lame people will be healed, instead of getting worse. Warning against Turning from God
translation_verse: Mikaatsã tisi yedede akũ ayekĩ oti kĩ ɛnɛ lɛkpɛ̃ a kɔbɔa lɛláatɛ̃ ye, mbom kĩ yaana fɔsɔ katsa.

english_verse: Try to live at peace with everyone! Live a clean life. If you don't, you will never see the Lord.
translation_verse: Mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ míadzi nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ mɔ odi nyɛ odi, midzi nkpã kĩ ɛkpalɛ, kitonɛkĩ odi kĩ ɛtákpalɛ lɛláapuli ɛmɔ́ɔ boe Ɔlate a.

english_verse: Make sure no one misses out on God's wonderful kindness. Don't let anyone become bitter and cause trouble for the rest of you.
translation_verse: Midã kadã wĩ kĩ mitáyɛla Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a. Mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛna ndɛ tuwĩ mɔ ɔnyɛ tibo anɛ, tido ɔhau mɔ efĩĩ nɛ bati pii kamɛ.

english_verse: Watch out for immoral and ungodly people like Esau, who sold his future blessing for only one meal.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛna adɔpaa, ĩye ɛkɛna oti kĩ enyína Baguma ndɛ Esau, kĩ ɛnɔ ye tibinyole lɔnɔkɔɛ̃ ɛtɛ funitsã sɔɔdaɛ mɔapɛ a.

english_verse: You know how he later wanted it back. But there was nothing he could do to change things, even though he begged his father and cried.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ minyina a, ke liti a Esau wɛ kĩ ɔlɛga ɛkpa ye nhila a, lɛmɛ ɛtákpa ye, ade titɔ kĩ ɛkɔa kabe ɛwɛ kĩ yadani lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna a malo ni, ɛtána foe akũ osi.

english_verse: You have not come to a place like Mount Sinai that can be seen and touched. There is no flaming fire or dark cloud or storm
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ Sinai ɔtɔ a kĩ oti aapuli ɛkɔa awɛ ɛta a sɛkɛ̃ miya. Fɔlá ndɛ ayekĩ Israelfɔ mɔ́ fi gɛĩgɛĩ katɛ̃ nɛ ye akũ, kĩ ɔtũ ke, fɔkɛna kusuu, ade ɔwɛ kpale kavũ a,

english_verse: or trumpet sound. The people of Israel heard a voice speak. But they begged it to stop,
translation_verse: mɔ kĩ binu kagbulɛɛ kavɔ̃ mɔ odo a kĩ ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla a. Kĩ odo a nɛ a, bike aduli kĩ oti a ɛtabuki ɛlɛ kalɛ kadima ebu.

english_verse: because they could not obey its commands. They were even told to kill any animal that touched the mountain.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ bɛtápuli bɛdza nɛ mbla a kĩ bisi a onukpɛ̃ kĩ, “Ntɛ ɔyaɛ malo lɛta ɔtɔ a ni, kɛnɛ kĩ bɛtalɛ ye boe bɛkɔ.”

english_verse: The sight was so frightening that Moses said he shook with fear.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ bɛmɔ́ a deĩ libe paa kĩ Mose malo lɛ kĩ, “Libe wo yĩ, nkatila bliblibli!”

english_verse: You have now come to Mount Zion and to the heavenly Jerusalem. This is the city of the living God, where thousands and thousands of angels have come to celebrate.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ ni, Zion ɔtɔ a sɛkɛ̃ miya, Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã a ɔmatɔ kpale kĩ ɛnyɛ ode Yerusalem. Miya nɛ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ mpim mpim a ɔmatɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: Here you will find all of God's dearest children, whose names are written in heaven. And you will find God himself, who judges everyone. Here also are the spirits of those good people who have been made perfect.
translation_verse: Miyawo nɛ Baguma babi batɔnyade a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ be buĩ nɛ ode kawɔlɛ katsɛna a kamɛ. Miya nɛ Baguma kĩ ɛnyɛ batidziwa flee fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ, mɔ bati wĩ a kĩ bɛkɛna be hũhũ bɛkpɔla a sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: And Jesus is here! He is the one who makes God's new agreement with us, and his sprinkled blood says much better things than the blood of Abel.
translation_verse: Miya nɛ Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ apam vɔɛ̃ a ɔkplanɛ sɛkɛ̃, mɔ ye babɔanɛ a kĩ bɛsã a kĩ bɛdza bɛkpa bɔhɛ fɔtsa wĩ kaba Abel bade a.

english_verse: Make sure you obey the one who speaks to you. The people did not escape, when they refused to obey the one who spoke to them at Mount Sinai. Do you think you can possibly escape, if you refuse to obey the one who speaks to you from heaven?
translation_verse: Foesũ midã kadã wĩ kĩ mitásĩ oti a kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla a fɔlɛtsa katse. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ bikĩ bisĩ bɛtátse oti a kĩ ɛlɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa nɛ tite akũ a tápuli bilo a ni, nde bɔ́apuli bulo ntɛ busĩ kĩ bɔátse oti a kĩ yalɛ kɔdzɛla katomɛna ode a?

english_verse: When God spoke the first time, his voice shook only the earth. This time he has promised to shake the earth once again, and heaven too.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ a na kamɛ ni, ye odo kuna tite, lɛmɛ finyaa kɔ̃ ɛlɛ eyi kĩ, “Maakuna deedi bio, lɛmɛ nnɛ́ tite odi, mbom mɔ ode lɛmɛ.”

english_verse: The words “once again” mean that these created things will someday be shaken and removed. Then what cannot be shaken will last.
translation_verse: Fɔlɛtsa “deedi bio” a atsa pefee kĩ yaakuna fɔtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa a, ɛwɔla foe, lɛmɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛláakuna a aakahɔ.

english_verse: We should be grateful we were given a kingdom that cannot be shaken. And in this kingdom we please God by worshiping him and by showing him great honor and respect.
translation_verse: Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔnyɛ kɔlɛ kĩ lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ kɛláakuna a ta boe awɛ. Mifɔ̃ bɔkɔa obu mɔ kavila busum Baguma ayekĩ fɔ́awo ye anɛ,

english_verse: Our God is like a destructive fire!
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ boe Baguma a nyɛ fi kĩ fɔawɔla fɔtsa.

english_verse: Keep being concerned about each other as the Lord's followers should.
translation_verse: Mikaawɛ akũ kalɛ daa ndɛ Kristofɔ bawaɛ̃ aye.

english_verse: Be sure to welcome strangers into your home. By doing this, some people have welcomed angels as guests, without even knowing it.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ mikaatɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ nɛ mi awã. Badi kɛna foe lɔmɔ bɛtɛ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛmɛ binyína.

english_verse: Remember the Lord's people who are in jail and be concerned for them. Don't forget those who are suffering, but imagine you are there with them.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ nɛ bikĩ bɛwaa kɔla a akũ ndɛ mimɔ be waa kɔla. Mite anɛ nɛ bikĩ bamɔna be lubo akũ a ndɛ mimɔ be amɔ lubo.

english_verse: Have respect for marriage. Always be faithful to your partner, because God will punish anyone who is immoral or unfaithful in marriage.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ mi flee mido obu nɛ kɔtsɔ̃ mɔ kɔnyɔ kadzi kamɛ, ade kɛnɛ kĩ batsɔ̃ mɔ banyɔ bidi ɔnɔkɔali bɛkpa akũ a. Baguma aadzɛmɔ bati a kĩ bɛtsɛ̃mɔ linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, mɔ bikĩ babɔa adɔpaa.

english_verse: Don't fall in love with money. Be satisfied with what you have. The Lord has promised that he will not leave us or desert us.
translation_verse: Minyɛ sika anɛngbã nɛ mi kadzi kamɛ, lɔkɔa fɔtsa a kĩ mideĩ fuwo mi anɛ. Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ kĩ, “Nláadzakũ nfɔnɛ nɔ, ade nláafɔnɛ nɔ awɛ lɛmɛ a.”

english_verse: This should make you feel like saying, “The Lord helps me! Why should I be afraid of what people can do to me?”
translation_verse: Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔna ɔwɔlɛ bɔlɛ kĩ, “Boe Ɔlate nyɛ yĩ obumɛnanɛ, nláavila. Litsa otidziwa aapuli ɛkɛna yĩ?”

english_verse: Don't forget about your leaders who taught you God's message. Remember what kind of lives they lived and try to have faith like theirs.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ nɛ mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ kɔɛ a kĩ bide lɛtsã nɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a akũ bɛkpa mi a akũ. Midã ayekĩ be kadzi kamɛ na, lɔkɔa mitomɔ be katɛkado.

english_verse: Jesus Christ never changes! He is the same yesterday, today, and forever.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo mɔapɛ a lɛna kɔkɔɛ, edeĩ nviã kĩĩ, yaana daa.

english_verse: Don't be fooled by any kind of strange teachings. It is better to receive strength from God's gift of undeserved grace than to depend on certain foods. After all, these foods don't really help the people who eat them.
translation_verse: Mitafɔ̃ fɔtsa vɔɛ̃ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ katsa lɛkpã mi miyɛla osi wĩ a. Fɔnɛnɛ kĩ miatɛ ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔbɛ̃ mitomɛna Baguma kɔnyakamɔ kamɛ odi, kɛba kĩ míakɛna nɛ funitsã kanya tɛbla akũ, kitonɛkĩ fɔtábumɛna bikĩ bɛkɛna nɛ te akũ a.

english_verse: But we have an altar where even the priests who serve in the place of worship have no right to eat.
translation_verse: Budeĩ afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ kĩ Yudafɔ basɔfɔ a kĩ basum nɛ patampa kamɛ a lɛlá osi kĩ banya ye akũ afɔlibɔ lɛtsama.

english_verse: After the high priest offers the blood of animals as a sin offering, the bodies of those animals are burned outside the camp.
translation_verse: Yudafɔ Ɔsɔfɔnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee a akɔa bayaɛ babɔanɛ kawomɛna nɛ Kakɔ Kpalɛwa Flee a kabɔa bati tɔkpa akũ afɔliɛ, lɛmɛ bapila bayaɛ sɛkɛna a nɛ katsɛnakɔ̃ a ɔbaɛ̃.

english_verse: Jesus himself suffered outside the city gate, so his blood would make people holy.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ Yesu lɛmɛ mɔ́ lubo eku nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃, ayekĩ yaakɔa ye mɔawɛ babɔanɛ ɛkpalɛ bati akũ.

english_verse: This is why we should go outside the camp to Jesus and share in his disgrace.
translation_verse: Foesũ mifɔ̃ bɔnɛ bɔnaa ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃, bɔnaatɛ kɔnyɔã a kĩ bido ye a kudi.

english_verse: On this earth we don't have a city that lasts forever, but we are waiting for such a city.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ bɔlá ɔmatɔ odima nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ kĩ yaawa daa, mbom ɔmatɔ a kĩ yaaya a liti osi bɔlamɛna kawɛ.

english_verse: But don't forget to help others and to share your possessions with them. This too is like offering a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Mitalɛla fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna mɔ mi bawaɛ̃ fɔtsa kakpa, kitonɛkĩ ade fukĩĩ nyɛ afɔliɛ kĩ yawo Baguma anɛ a.

english_verse: Obey your leaders and do what they say. They are watching over you, and they must answer to God. So don't make them sad as they do their work. Make them happy. Otherwise, they won't be able to help you at all.
translation_verse: Mibu mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ, midɔla akũ mikpa be lɛmɛ. Be adzɔlɛ mi tɛkla akũ daa, ndɛ bati kĩ baakɛna akunta bɛkpa Baguma nɛ be adzuma kakɛna a akũ. Foesũ ntɛ mikpa be obu ni, baakɛna ye mɔ kawɔlɛ, lɛmɛ ntɛ nnɛ́ aye ni, baakɛna ye mɔ tuko kabe kĩ fɔláanya libi fɔkpa mi.

english_verse: Pray for us. Our consciences are clear, and we always try to live right.
translation_verse: Mikaabɔa mpaɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ. Bɔtɛ budo kĩ boe tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kpalɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɔawɛ kĩ bɔakɛna fɔtsa wĩ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ.

english_verse: I especially want you to pray that I can visit you again soon. Final Prayers and Greetings
translation_verse: Mibɔa mpaɛ kĩ Baguma ɛfɔ̃ mmuniki ĩya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ. Mpaɛbɔ Nɛ Hebrifɔ Lɔlɔ.

english_verse: God gives peace, and he raised our Lord Jesus Christ from death. Now Jesus is like a Great Shepherd whose blood was used to make God's eternal agreement with his flock.
translation_verse: Baguma, lukudɔ ɔkpanɛ a kĩ ɛdzɛla boe Ɔlate Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ Baveli Bakpãnɛ Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a etomɛna kanɔkpa ɛtsãmɛna apam babɔanɛ vɔɛ̃ a kĩ ɛlá kawũna kamɛ a,

english_verse: I pray God will make you ready to obey him and that you will always be eager to do right. May Jesus help you do what pleases God. To Jesus Christ be glory forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: ɛkɔa lɛtsa wĩ lidi nyɛ lidi kĩ lisĩ mi ɛkpa mi, ayekĩ miakɛna nɛ ye kawɛ akũ. Ade mawã kĩ ɛtsã Yesu Kristo akũ ɛkɛna lɛtsa a kĩ yawɛ a nɛ boe kamɛ. Kukũkpalɛ kɔnya ye fude! Fɔya lɔmɔ. Fɔlɛtsa Nkaɛ.

english_verse: My friends, I have written only a short letter to encourage you, and I beg you to pay close attention to what I have said.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, make mi aduli kĩ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ mitse kɔdɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ, kitonɛkĩ ovoli a kĩ ntsɛlɛ mma mi a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa lɛ́la lugo.

english_verse: By now you surely must know that our friend Timothy is out of jail. If he gets here in time, I will bring him with me when I come to visit you.
translation_verse: Mawɛ kĩ makpa mi kanyi kĩ bɛnyɛ boe ɔwaɛ̃ Timoteo nɛ kɔla. Ntɛ ewo yĩ sɛkɛ̃ mɔatsɛ ni, bɔmɔ ye bɔ́ayasɛla mi.

english_verse: Please give my greetings to your leaders and to the rest of the Lord's people. His followers from Italy send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Miwɔ̃na mi lɔtɔ banyanɛ a mɔ Baguma bade a flee mikpa boe. Boe bawaɛ̃ a kĩ bito Italia awɔ̃na mi.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Baguma ɛmɔ mi a flee kɔnya.

english_verse: From James, a servant of God and of our Lord Jesus Christ. Greetings to the twelve tribes scattered all over the world. Faith and Wisdom
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Yakobo, Baguma mɔ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo ɔsumunɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mama Yuda futete ewua-nviã a kĩ bɛgba biko nɛ katinya kamɛ flee a. Katɛkado Mɔ Nyansã.

english_verse: My friends, be glad, even if you have a lot of trouble.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ miwo nɛ sɔhuiɛ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kamɛ malo ni, mitɛ foe mɔ kawɔlɛ baũ,

english_verse: You know you learn to endure by having your faith tested.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ ntɛ bɛsɔ mi katɛkado bɛdã ni, fɔafɔ̃ miana kadza pintii mɔ ɔwɔlɛ kado.

english_verse: But you must learn to endure everything, so you will be completely mature and not lacking in anything.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ mi kadza pintii a kɛnyɛ ke akũ nɛ mi lɛkɛnana kamɛ, ayekĩ míanya bati kĩ be ɔbla kpɔla flee, kĩ bɛláabuki bisĩ lɛtsama.

english_verse: If any of you need wisdom, you should ask God, and it will be given to you. God is generous and won't correct you for asking.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ mi kamɛ odi sĩ nyansã ni, kɛnɛ kĩ evia Baguma, yaakpa ye, kitonɛkĩ Baguma akɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ faa kakpa odi nyɛ odi fɔtsa kĩ yaádã oti anɛ.

english_verse: But when you ask for something, you must have faith and not doubt. Anyone who doubts is like an ocean wave tossed around in a storm.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ yabɔa mpaɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ɛtɛ edo, kĩ ɛtatɛ atsindze nɛ ye kamɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatɛ atsindze nɛ ye kamɛ ni, ɛla ndɛ mpo anɛ mui kpale kĩ ɔwɛ abɔa kato katɛ̃mɛna.

english_verse: If you are that kind of person, you can't make up your mind, and you surely can't be trusted. So don't expect the Lord to give you anything at all. Poor People and Rich People
translation_verse: Oti a na odu kĩ ye adzuni adani mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ, kĩ yaápuli kasipi nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ yakɛna a akũ ni, ɛtakɔna kĩ yaana litsedi etomɛna boe Ɔlate sɛkɛ̃. Ohiã Mɔ Akũ Kana.

english_verse: Any of God's people who are poor should be glad he thinks so highly of them.
translation_verse: Okristoni ohiãni a kĩ Baguma dɛla nɛ ode ni, kɛnɛ kĩ epia ye akũ.

english_verse: But any who are rich should be glad when God makes them humble. Rich people will disappear like wild flowers
translation_verse: Ade ayea okristoni osikani kĩ Baguma kɛna nɛ kayɔ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ ye malo epia akũ. Kitonɛkĩ osikani nkpã aayatɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔgbangbã akpalɛ katɔ a.

english_verse: scorched by the burning heat of the sun. The flowers lose their blossoms, and their beauty is destroyed. This is how the rich will disappear, as they go about their business. Trials and Temptations
translation_verse: Ntɛ suwa de sɛta kɔɔba ni, sapila tuwĩ tavɛ, te fɔgbangbã a akpalɛ katɔ lɔkɔa tuwĩ a kalɛ ayɛla flefle. Ade aye osikani lɛmɛ aakapilipili nɛ ye tudzuma kamɛ flee ɛyaaku a. Sɔhuiɛ Mɔ Ɔhau Kamɛ Katsã.

english_verse: God will bless you, if you don't give up when your faith is being tested. He will reward you with a glorious life, just as he rewards everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Baguma hila oti a kĩ epuli edo ɔwɔlɛ nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ. Ntɛ epuli ɛnya sɔhuiɛ a akũ ni, Baguma aakpa ye nkpã a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa bati a kĩ bawɛ ye kalɛ a.

english_verse: Don't blame God when you are tempted! God cannot be tempted by evil, and he doesn't use evil to tempt others.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi wo nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ ni, ɛtalɛ kĩ, “Baguma sɛkɛ̃ sɔhuiɛ kĩĩ to.” Kitonɛkĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛsɔ Baguma ɛdã kĩ ɛkɛna tɔkpa, ade ye mɔawɛ a lɛmɛ yaásɔ odima kadã a.

english_verse: We are tempted by our own desires that drag us off and trap us.
translation_verse: Mbom oti mɔawɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa akɛ ye, kavɛlɛ ye kado nɛ sɔhuiɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: Our desires make us sin, and when sin is finished with us, it leaves us dead.
translation_verse: Lɔkɔa oti sukɛna fɔwɛtsa a atsamɔ kɔma kama tɔkpa, ade ntɛ tɔkpa a bo anɛ ni, tama wuda. Baguma Sɛkɛ̃ Fɔtsa Wĩ Flee Ato.

english_verse: Don't be fooled, my dear friends.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛ mi.

english_verse: Every good and perfect gift comes down from the Father who created all the lights in the heavens. He is always the same and never makes dark shadows by changing.
translation_verse: Futetsa wĩ flee mɔ futelitsa a kĩ fɔkpɔla a fudi nyɛ fudi to ode. Foe flee futo Baguma a kĩ lɛbɔa ode tɛsɛdza a sɛkɛ̃. Ɛnyɛ oti kĩ yaádani ade lɛtsama lɛmɛ ládani ɔtũ nɛ ye akũ a.

english_verse: He wanted us to be his own special people, and so he sent the true message to give us new birth. Hearing and Obeying
translation_verse: Baguma kɔa ye mɔawɛ kawɛ ɛtsã ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a akũ, ɛma boe kĩ bɔna ye fɔtsa a kĩ ɛbɔa flee a kamɛ ɔtɔnyade. Kalɛ Wĩ a Kanu Mɔ Ke Akũ Kakɛna.

english_verse: My dear friends, you should be quick to listen and slow to speak or to get angry.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mite anɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ! Odi nyɛ odi etse fɔlɛtsa mɔatsɛ, lɛmɛ ɛtawɛ sɔwa ɛlɛ kɔdzɛla mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ ĩye ɛna kalɔkpa mɔatsɛ mɔatsɛ.

english_verse: If you are angry, you cannot do any of the good things God wants done.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ oti kalɔkpa láfɔ̃ yakɛna tuwĩ a kĩ Baguma awɛ kĩ ɛkɛna a.

english_verse: You must stop doing anything immoral or evil. Instead be humble and accept the message planted in you to save you.
translation_verse: Foesũ mifɔnɛ ɔbla kĩ yado efĩĩ mɔ ablɔ kakɛna flee awɛ. Midɔla mi akũ mikpa Baguma, ayekĩ míapuli mitɛ ye kalɛ a kĩ edu nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ a, kĩ kaafɔ̃ mina nkpã katɛ a.

english_verse: Obey God's message! Don't fool yourselves by just listening to it.
translation_verse: Mitakatse Kalɛ Wĩ a kɛkɛ mikɔa mikakɛ mi akũ, mbom mikɛna nɛ ke akũ.

english_verse: If you hear the message and don't obey it, you are like people who stare at themselves in a mirror
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yatse kalɛ a lɛmɛ yaákɛna nɛ ke akũ ni, ɛla ndɛ oti kĩ ɛdã ahuhɔɛ kamɛ ɛmɔ́ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ ɛla a.

english_verse: and forget what they look like as soon as they leave.
translation_verse: Yadã ye akũ, lɛmɛ mɔ ye kadzakũ pɛ ɛla ayekĩ ɛla a.

english_verse: But you must never stop looking at the perfect law that sets you free. God will bless you in everything you do, if you listen and obey, and don't just hear and forget.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ oti a kĩ yadã mbla a kĩ ɛkpɔla a, kĩ yakpa bati akũ akũ kadzi, mɔ yakɛna nɛ ye akũ a, kĩ ɛnyɛ́ oti kĩ yatse kalɛ a kɛkɛ kalɛla ke a ni, Baguma aahila ye nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ yakɛna a kamɛ.

english_verse: If you think you are being religious, but can't control your tongue, you are fooling yourself, and your religion is useless.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi kɔna kĩ yasum Baguma lɛmɛ yaápuli ɛnya ye sɛmɛ akũ ni, kakɛ ye akũ, ade ye ɔsum a lɛmɛ nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza a.

english_verse: Religion that pleases God the Father must be pure and spotless. You must help needy orphans and widows and not let this world make you evil.
translation_verse: Ɔsum a kĩ ɛkpalɛ, kĩ efĩĩ adima lɛmɛ lɛláa ye akũ a nɛ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga anɛ nyɛ bibumɛna banɔkpabi mɔ bakunawa nɛ be kasĩ kamɛ, kĩ bati bɛnyɛ be akũ nɛ katinya efĩĩ fɔtsa kamɛ.

english_verse: My friends, if you have faith in our glorious Lord Jesus Christ, you won't treat some people better than others.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ndɛ bati kĩ bɛtɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo, kĩ ɛnyɛ kukũkpalɛ Ɔlate a bido sũ ni, mitadã bati anɛ nɛ mi fɔtsa kakɛna kamɛ.

english_verse: Suppose a rich person wearing fancy clothes and a gold ring comes to one of your meetings. And suppose a poor person dressed in worn-out clothes also comes.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bɔbɔɛ foe kĩ osikani sua lima wĩ akũ, edo sika lipetia, ɛya nɛ mi katsɛnakɔ̃, ade ohiãni odi lɛmɛ do tɛtadiɛ kpeliwa ɛya nɛ awã a.

english_verse: You must not give the best seat to the one in fancy clothes and tell the one who is poor to stand at the side or sit on the floor.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mikpalɛ anɛ mido oti a kĩ edo fɔtsa wĩ, mibi ye kĩ, “Ɔnɔkɔɛ̃, yaadzi nɛ awĩ,” lɛmɛ mibi ohiãni a kɔ̃ kĩ, “Naadza nɛ akĩĩ!” ĩye “Kɛna akũ kadzi nɛ ɔda nɛ yĩ abɔa kayɔ!”

english_verse: This is the same as saying that some people are better than others, and you would be acting like a crooked judge.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mikɛna foe lɔmɔ a, lɔkɔa fɔátsa kĩ adzuni kpa mikɔa miadzɛ mi fɔlɛtsa, kĩ miado ntsitsemu lɛmɛ nɛ mi kamɛ?

english_verse: My dear friends, pay attention. God has given a lot of faith to the poor people in this world. God has also promised them a share in his kingdom that he will give to everyone who loves him.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitse katse wĩ! Nnɛ́ kapau Baguma pau katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ahiãfɔ kĩ bɛkɛna katɛkado kamɛ asikafɔ, bɛna kanyakɔ̃ nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi ɛkpa bati a kĩ bawɛ ye kalɛ a kamɛ?

english_verse: You mistreat the poor. But isn't it the rich who boss you around and drag you off to court?
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi miasupa ohiãni! Mbɔɛɛ nnɛ́ asikafɔ amɛnana mi, kavɛlɛ mi kanamɛna fɔlɛtsa badzɛnɛ anɛ?

english_verse: Aren't they the ones who make fun of your Lord?
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ asikafɔ alɛ tuwuli kpa kasupa dĩ wĩ a kĩ Baguma te mi a?

english_verse: You will do all right, if you obey the most important law in the Scriptures. It is the law that commands us to love others as much as we love ourselves.
translation_verse: Ntɛ miakɛna nɛ ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ mbla a akũ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ miakɛna fɔtsa wĩ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ a nyɛ kĩ, “Wɛ nɔ ɔkɔba kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ awɛ nɔ akũ kalɛ a.”

english_verse: But if you treat some people better than others, you have done wrong, and the Scriptures teach that you have sinned.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ miadã bati anɛ ni, miakɛna tɔkpa, ade mbla a akɔ mi kɔtɔ ndɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a.

english_verse: If you obey every law except one, you are still guilty of breaking them all.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ mbla a flee akũ, mɔ efum nɛ amɔapɛ akũ ni, efum te flee.

english_verse: The same God who told us to be faithful in marriage also told us not to murder. So even if you are faithful in marriage, but murder someone, you still have broken God's Law.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ oti mɔapɛ a kĩ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Tanɛ kɔtsɔ̃ ĩye kɔnyɔ liti” a, ade ye lɛlɛ kĩ, “Takɔ oti” a. Foesũ ntɛ ɔtánɛ kɔtsɔ̃ ĩye kɔnyɔ liti malo, mɔ ɔkɔ oti ni, ofum mbla a.

english_verse: Speak and act like people who will be judged by the law that sets us free.
translation_verse: Foesũ milɛ kɔdzɛla mikɛna fɔtsa ndɛ bati kĩ mbla a kĩ yakpa boe akũ akũ kadzi a, Baguma aakɔa ɛdzɛmɔ be.

english_verse: Do this, because on the day of judgment there will be no pity for those who have not had pity on others. But even in judgment, God is merciful! Faith and Works
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ nɛ kadzɛ kamɛ ni, Baguma lɛláamɔ okĩ ɛtámɔ ɔkɔba kɔnya a kɔnya. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a lɛláadzɛmɔ ye. Mikɛna Fɔtsa Mikɔa Mitsa Kĩ Mitɛ Mido.

english_verse: My friends, what good is it to say you have faith, when you don't do anything to show you really do have faith? Can this kind of faith save you?
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mi kamɛ odi lɛ kĩ edeĩ katɛkado mɔ ye lɛkɛnana lányɛ katsa lɔmɔ a, nfasɔ wɔdabe deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ? Ye katɛkado aapuli kɛkpa ye nkpã mbɔɛɛ?

english_verse: If you know someone who doesn't have any clothes or food,
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bɔbɔɛ foe kĩ boe bawaɛ̃nyole ĩye bawaɛ̃tsole badi deĩ kĩ bɛlá tilima ade bɛlá funitsã kĩ banya malo a.

english_verse: you shouldn't just say, “I hope all goes well for you. I hope you will be warm and have plenty to eat.” What good is it to say this, unless you do something to help?
translation_verse: Ntɛ ɔtákpa bati fɔtsa a kĩ fusĩ be a, litsa nfasɔ deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ ntɛ obi be kĩ, “Baguma ehila mi. Akũ ede mi ovio, mina funitsã minya.”

english_verse: Faith that doesn't lead us to do good deeds is all alone and dead!
translation_verse: Ade ayea ntɛ odi deĩ katɛkado mɔ lɛkɛnana tábumɔ foe a, ye katɛkado a nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza.

english_verse: Suppose someone disagrees and says, “It is possible to have faith without doing kind deeds.” I would answer, “Prove that you have faith without doing kind deeds, and I will prove that I have faith by doing them.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ odi aalɛ kĩ, “Oti mɔa deĩ katɛkado, ade ɔbɛbã lɛmɛ akɛna adzuma a.” Yĩ mbuayɛ nyɛ kĩ, “Nyɛ nɔ katɛkado a kĩ lɛkɛnana lɛláa foe kamɛ a katsa yĩ. Yĩ malo maatsã yĩ tuwĩ kakɛna kamɛ ĩnyɛ yĩ katɛkado ntsa.”

english_verse: You surely believe there is only one God. That's fine. Even demons believe this, and it makes them shake with fear.
translation_verse: Ɔtɛ odo kĩ Baguma odi pɛ deĩ? Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ. Hũhũ kpa lɛmɛ tɛ bido ade bavila katila nɛ ye anɛ a.

english_verse: Does some stupid person want proof that faith without deeds is useless?
translation_verse: Ɔkɔasia anɛ! Awɛ kĩ ĩnyɛ ntsa nɔ kĩ katɛkado kĩ lɛkɛnana wĩ tábu nɛ foe kamɛ nyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza?

english_verse: Well, our ancestor Abraham pleased God by putting his son Isaac on the altar to sacrifice him.
translation_verse: Nde fɔya fɔmɔ Baguma mɔ boe ɔwanyɔ Abraham kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla? Fɔtsɛ̃ ye lɛkɛnana kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye mɔawɛ obi Isak ɛnamɛna afɔlibɔ atɛnyɛ akũ kĩ yakɔa ye ɛbɔa afɔliɛ ɛkpa Baguma.

english_verse: Now you see how Abraham's faith and deeds worked together. He proved his faith was real by what he did.
translation_verse: Mimɔ́ foe lɔmɔ? Ye katɛkado mɔ lɛkɛnana a kɛna adzuma fɔkpɔta, ade ye lɛkɛnana a fɔ̃ ye katɛkado a kpɔla a.

english_verse: This is what the Scriptures mean by saying, “Abraham had faith in God, and God accepted him.” That's how Abraham became God's friend.
translation_verse: Ade Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a ya nɛ foe kamɛ kĩ, “Abraham tɛ Baguma edo, ade nɛ ye katɛkado sũ ni, Baguma mɔ ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla.” Nɛ foesũ Baguma vɛ Abraham kĩ ye ɔkɔba.

english_verse: You can now see that we please God by what we do and not only by what we believe.
translation_verse: Foesũ miamɔ kĩ fɔtsɛ̃ oti lɛkɛnana wĩ kamɛ ade Baguma amɔ ye kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla, lɛmɛ fɔtsɛ́ ye katɛkado kamɛ odi.

english_verse: Anyone who doesn't breathe is dead, and faith that doesn't do anything is just as dead!
translation_verse: Foesũ ndɛ ayekĩ sukɛna nyɛ fɔtsa kuwa ntɛ kawɛya lɛláa se kamɛ a, ade aye katɛkado lɛmɛ nyɛ fɔtsa kuwa ntɛ lɛkɛnana lɛláa foe kamɛ a.

english_verse: My friends, we should not all try to become teachers. In fact, teachers will be judged more strictly than others.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mi kamɛ bati pii bɛtanya fɔtsa batsanɛ, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ boe a kĩ bɔatsa fɔtsa a ni, Baguma aadzɛmɔ boe mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ ɛba bati bɛbã.

english_verse: All of us do many wrong things. But if you can control your tongue, you are mature and able to control your whole body.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ boe flee bɔakɛna nfumusu pii. Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi táfum nɛ ye kɔdzɛla kalɛ kamɛ ni, ɛnyɛ oti kĩ ɛkpɔla ade yapuli kanya ye kutidu a flee akũ a.

english_verse: By putting a bit into the mouth of a horse, we can turn the horse in different directions.
translation_verse: Bɔado ɔpɔnkɔ sɔbɔtsaɛ nɛ onukpɛ̃ kamɛ kĩ ɛkɛna nɛ boe kawɛ akũ, kapuli kafɔ̃ yanaa awã kĩ bɔawɛ a.

english_verse: It takes strong winds to move a large sailing ship, but the captain uses only a small rudder to make it go in any direction.
translation_verse: Midã ɔkɔlɔ baũ lɛmɛ. Titɔ kĩ ɛpɔnɛ lububu, kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ abɔa ye kanamɛna malo a ni, sɔbɔtsaɛ kabii bakɔa kadanidani ye, yanaa awã kĩ ye ɔtanɛ a awɛ kĩ ɛnaa a.

english_verse: Our tongues are small too, and yet they brag about big things. It takes only a spark to start a forest fire!
translation_verse: Ade aye sɛmɛ lɛmɛ la a. Titɔ kĩ sukɛna akũ lɛtsa kabii sanɛ malo a, sapia nɛ fɔtsa baũ baũ akũ. Midã ayekĩ fi kabii kĩ fɔka fɔtɔ nɛ lupo baũ kamɛ apuli kapila de bubloo!

english_verse: The tongue is like a spark. It is an evil power that dirties the rest of the body and sets a person's entire life on fire with flames that come from hell itself.
translation_verse: Sɛmɛ la ndɛ fi. Sɛmɛ dzɛ̃ ndɛ katinya kĩ tɔkpa kakɛna tɛ ke kamɛ. Nɛ sukɛna akũ fɔtsa a flee kamɛ ni, sɛmɛ ado oti mɔa a flee tuduli, kado fi nɛ bati kadzi kamɛ mɔ kĩ futo Abonsam fi luwotu kamɛ a.

english_verse: All kinds of animals, birds, reptiles, and sea creatures can be tamed and have been tamed.
translation_verse: Batidziwa apuli kadɔla bayaɛ, ade bapuli kadɔla lupo kamɛ bayaɛ kpa, kɔvɔlabi, bayaɛ kĩ baboli nɛ tite mɔ kɔfɔabi lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: But our tongues get out of control. They are restless and evil, and always spreading deadly poison.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ sɛmɛ kɔ̃ odima lɛláapuli ɛdɔla se. Sɛmɛ nyɛ lɛtsa kpa kĩ odima lápuli kadɔla, ade otsonu kĩ yakɔ bati yi sɛ kamɛ tɛtɛɛtɛ a.

english_verse: My dear friends, with our tongues we speak both praises and curses. We praise our Lord and Father, and we curse people who were created to be like God, and this isn't right.
translation_verse: Onukpɛ̃ mɔapɛ a kamɛ nhila fɔlɛtsa mɔ fudumutsa flee anɛ kato. Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kɛtánɛ kĩ fukĩĩ fɔna lɔmɔ!

english_verse: Can clean water and dirty water both flow from the same spring?
translation_verse: Mui wĩ mɔ lɛdɛmɛ mui aapuli bɛnɛ nɛ lɔwɔkɛ mɔa kamɛ?

english_verse: Can a fig tree produce olives or a grapevine produce figs? Does fresh water come from a well full of salt water? Wisdom from Above
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, atɔ kutse aapuli kuwũ gowa babi, ĩye akateleku aapuli ewũ atɔ babi, mbɔɛɛ? Ade aye mɔ lɛdɛmɛ mui lɔwɔkɛ lɛláapuli lɛnyɛ mui wĩ a. Nyansã Kĩ Eto Ode.

english_verse: Are any of you wise or sensible? Then show it by living right and by being humble and wise in everything you do.
translation_verse: Mi kamɛ owei nyɛ nyansãni, kĩ yanu fɔlɛtsa kayɔ? Ɛkɔa ɔbla wĩ ɛnyɛ foe ɛtsa nɛ ye lɛkɛnana kamɛ, nɛ akũ kadɔla kĩ kito nyansã kamɛ.

english_verse: But if your heart is full of bitter jealousy and selfishness, don't brag or lie to cover up the truth.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ lineke kanɔ, kawũnaba mɔ yĩ odi fude fɔlɛ kawɛya deĩ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ ni, mitama fɔvã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a akũ, mipia nɛ mi nyansã akũ.

english_verse: This kind of wisdom doesn't come from above. It is earthly and selfish and comes from the devil himself.
translation_verse: Nyansã kĩĩ odu táto ode, mbom katinya kamɛ ade yanɛ, ɛnyɛ́ hũhũ kamɛ ade, hũhũ kpa kamɛ eto.

english_verse: Whenever people are jealous or selfish, they cause trouble and do all sorts of cruel things.
translation_verse: Awã kĩ lineke kanɔ mɔ yĩ odi fude fɔlɛ deĩ ni, ade awã ɔtutũ mɔ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi kakɛna ana a.

english_verse: When peacemakers plant seeds of peace, they will harvest justice.
translation_verse: Bati a kĩ balɔla bati kayite ni, badu fudutsa nɛ lukudɔ kamɛ, ade foe babi nyɛ nkpã wĩ kadzi a.

english_verse: Why do you fight and argue with each other? Isn't it because you are full of selfish desires that fight to control your body?
translation_verse: Litsa avɛlɛ kawũ mɔ ɔdzɛ kado nɛ mi kamɛ? Nnɛ́ mi sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ fɔanɔ mɔ a mi kamɛ futo?

english_verse: You want something you don't have, and you will do anything to get it. You will even kill! But you still cannot get what you want, and you won't get it by fighting and arguing. You should pray for it.
translation_verse: Miawɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔakɔ mi odo, lɛmɛ miláapuli mina foe, nɛ foesũ miawɛ kĩ miakɔ oti. Anɛ ayɔɔla mi mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ nɛ fɔtsa akũ, lɛmɛ mi awɛ tata foe, nɛ foesũ miawɛ sɔwã kanɔ kawũ. Miána lɛtsa a kĩ miawɛ a, kitonɛkĩ miávia Baguma.

english_verse: Yet even when you do pray, your prayers are not answered, because you pray just for selfish reasons.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mivia Baguma fɔtsa ni, miána foe, kitonɛkĩ miavia foe mɔ adzuni kpa. Miavia fɔtsa a kĩ míakɔa mido mi mɔa odi akũ kawɔlɛ.

english_verse: You people aren't faithful to God! Don't you know if you love the world, you are God's enemies? And if you decide to be a friend of the world, you make yourself an enemy of God.
translation_verse: Mi bati kĩ miádi ɔnɔkɔali! Minyína kĩ ntɛ mibɔɛ katinya kamɛ tɔkɔba ni, mikɛna mi akũ Baguma bakesĩnɛ? Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ yanya katinya kamɛ ɔkɔba kɛna ye akũ Baguma okesĩnɛ.

english_verse: Do you doubt the Scriptures that say, “God truly cares about the Spirit he has put in us”?
translation_verse: Miakɔna kĩ pupulidza bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a kamɛ kĩ, “Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma do nɛ boe kamɛ a anɔ mɔ boe sukɛna fɔwɛtsa a lineke.”

english_verse: In fact, God treats us with even greater kindness, just as the Scriptures say, “God opposes everyone who is proud, but he blesses all who are humble with undeserved grace.”
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Baguma amɔ boe kɔnya pii, ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Baguma asua bati a kĩ bata akũ osi, lɛmɛ yamɔ bati a kĩ badɔla be akũ a kɔnya.”

english_verse: Surrender to God! Resist the devil, and he will run from you.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mifɔnɛ mi akũ awɛ mikpa Baguma. Misua Abonsam osi, lɔkɔa yaalo nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: Come near to God, and he will come near to you. Clean up your lives, you sinners. Purify your hearts, you people who can't make up your mind.
translation_verse: Mifuãmɔ Baguma, lɔkɔa ye malo yaafuã mi. Mi tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ, mivɔlɛ awɛ! Mi anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, mikpalɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: Be sad and sorry and weep. Stop laughing and start crying. Be gloomy instead of glad.
translation_verse: Miwo ɔblɔ, mitɛ kalɔɛ, mibe lɛmɛ. Mifɔ̃ mi kamɛmɛ kɛdani ayɔlɔhɔ kabe, mi kawɔlɛkamɔ lɛmɛ kɛdani ɔblɔ kawo.

english_verse: Be humble in the Lord's presence, and he will honor you. Saying Cruel Things about Others
translation_verse: Midɔla mi akũ nɛ boe Ɔlate anɛ lɔkɔa yaadɛla mi nɛ ode. Mitadzɛmɔ Mi Bawaɛ̃ Kristofɔ.

english_verse: My friends, don't say cruel things about others! If you do, or if you condemn others, you are condemning God's Law. And if you condemn the Law, you put yourself above the Law and refuse to obey either it
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta nɛ mi akũ akũ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta nɛ ye ɔwaɛ̃ okristoni akũ, ĩye yadzɛmɔ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, yalɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtáfɛta nɛ mbla a akũ, ade yadzɛ mɔ mbla a. Ntɛ ɔdzɛmɔ mbla a ni, obuki ɔnyɛ́ oti kĩ yakɛna nɛ mbla a akũ, mbom oti kĩ yadzɛmɔ mbla a.

english_verse: or God who gave it. God is our judge, and he can save or destroy us. What right do you have to condemn anyone? Warning against Bragging
translation_verse: Baguma odi nyɛ mbla a ɔkpanɛ mɔ ye fɔlɛtsa ɔdzɛnɛ. Ye odi keĩ aapuli ɛkpa nkpã ĩye ɛwɔla ye. Owei anɛ kĩ adzɛmɔ nɔ ɔkɔba? Kɔdɛ Nɛ Kukũpia Akũ.

english_verse: You should know better than to say, “Today or tomorrow we will go to the city. We will do business there for a year and make a lot of money!”
translation_verse: Finyaa mitse, mi a kĩ mialɛ kĩ, “Nviã ĩye kunya bɔ́anaa ɔmatɔ kpale kĩĩ ĩye okĩ a kamɛ, budzi nɛ awã kateli mɔa bɔnya kɔyaatɔ bɔna nfasɔ.”

english_verse: What do you know about tomorrow? How can you be so sure about your life? It is nothing more than mist that appears for only a little while before it disappears.
translation_verse: Minyína ayekĩ mi nkpã aana nɛ kunya kamɛ malo! Mi nkpã, litsa yanɛ? Mila ndɛ luflututu kĩ laka kako nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ kabuki kayɛla.

english_verse: You should say, “If the Lord lets us live, we will do these things.”
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ mialɛ nyɛ kĩ, “Ntɛ boe Baguma tunɔ mɔ budeĩ nkpã ni, bɔ́akɛna fukĩĩ ĩye fukĩ nɛ akĩĩ.”

english_verse: Yet you are stupid enough to brag, and it is wrong to be so proud.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ finyaa miata akũ kapia akũ. Akũ kata kĩĩ flee nyɛ tɔkpa.

english_verse: If you don't do what you know is right, you have sinned.
translation_verse: Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ enyina tuwĩ kakɛna mɔ yaákɛna te ni, fɔnyɛ tɔkpa fɔkpa ye.

english_verse: You rich people should cry and weep! Terrible things are going to happen to you.
translation_verse: Finyaa mi a kĩ mideĩ akũ a, mibe, mibɔa fɔwɔla nɛ lubo kamɔ a kĩ laya nɛ mi akũ a sũ.

english_verse: Your treasures have already rotted, and moths have eaten your clothes.
translation_verse: Mi akũ kana fɔtsa a titi, ade fupuka ba mi tɛtadiɛ a.

english_verse: Your money has rusted, and the rust will be evidence against you, as it burns your body like fire. Yet you keep on storing up wealth in these last days.
translation_verse: Mi sika ngbã mɔ sika ovoe dzi nkandɔlɔ, ade nkandɔlɔ kĩĩ aadi adansiɛ etia mi, ɛba mi sukɛna ndɛ fi aye a. Mikpɔta akũ kana fɔtsa miyi akũ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kĩĩ kamɛ.

english_verse: You refused to pay the people who worked in your fields, and now their unpaid wages are shouting out against you. The Lord All-Powerful has surely heard the cries of the workers who harvested your crops.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ midã! Mitáse bati a kĩ bɛkɛna adzuma nɛ mi fɔba kamɛ a kɔtɔ kudima. Mitse be kabe! Kɔtɔ a kĩ misisi mitáse apaafɔ a kĩ bɛnɛ fɔba bɛkpa mi mi a lamɔ mi onukpɛ̃ katsua mɔ fɔwɔla. Bati a kĩ bakpɔta mi fɔba kamɛ fudutsa a kabe wo boe Ɔlate Asafu Yehowa atɔ kamɛ.

english_verse: While here on earth, you have thought only of filling your own stomachs and having a good time. But now you are like fat cattle on their way to be butchered.
translation_verse: Mikɔa fɔtsa a kĩ fɔatɛ kɔya mido mi akũ kawɔlɛ beblebee, midɔli ndɛ bayaɛ aye mikpa luwi a kĩ baakɔ mi a.

english_verse: You have condemned and murdered innocent people, who couldn't even fight back. Be Patient and Kind
translation_verse: Mikɔ́ oti wĩ a kɔtɔ, ade titɔ kĩ ɛtápili mɔ mi malo a, mikɔ ye. Mina Ɔwɔlɛ Bɔɛɛ, Mikaabɔa Mpaɛ Lɛmɛ.

english_verse: My friends, be patient until the Lord returns. Think of farmers who wait patiently for the autumn and spring rains to make their valuable crops grow.
translation_verse: Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ boe Ɔlate a aaya. Midã ayekĩ okuani a kĩ edzi yadzɔlɛ funitsã mɔ kɔya a kĩ ye tite akpa a, ana ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kadzɔlɛ oni kako nɛ kanɔde mɔ kɔtsɛ lɔkɔ.

english_verse: Be patient like those farmers and don't give up. The Lord will soon be here!
translation_verse: Mi malo kɛnɛ kĩ mina ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ lɔmɔ, mido ɔwɔlɛ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate kaya luwi a wo ɔtɔ liyua.

english_verse: Don't grumble about each other or you will be judged, and the judge is right outside the door.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mitakɔa mi ɔhau mite nɛ mi bawaɛ̃ akũ mɔ Baguma aadzɛmɔ mi. Midã Ɔdzɛnɛ a dzɛ̃ nɛ onyukpɛ̃!

english_verse: My friends, follow the example of the prophets who spoke for the Lord. They were patient, even when they had to suffer.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mikai Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ bide lɛtsã nɛ boe Ɔlate dĩ akũ a akũ. Mifɔ̃ ayekĩ bido ɔwɔlɛ bɛmɔ́ lubo a fɔnya nfantuhũ fɔkpa mi.

english_verse: In fact, we praise the ones who endured the most. You remember how patient Job was and how the Lord finally helped him. The Lord did this because he is so merciful and kind.
translation_verse: Bɔabu bati kĩ bado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ lubo kamɔ kamɛ kĩ kawɔlɛ bati. Minu ayekĩ Hiob do ɔwɔlɛ, mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma kɛna ɛkpa ye nɛ kawũna kamɛ a. Oti fɔlɛtsa api boe Ɔlate a nɛ sɛmɛ, ade yamɔ oti kɔnya a.

english_verse: My friends, above all else, don't take an oath. You must not swear by heaven or by earth or by anything else. “Yes” or “No” is all you need to say. If you say anything more, you will be condemned.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, yĩ kalɛ titiliwu nyɛ kĩ mitatani fɔtsa nɛ nhihiɛ adi kakɛna kamɛ. Mitatani ode, ĩye tite, ĩye lɛtsama. Ntɛ kalɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ni, milɛ kĩ, “Oo”, ntɛ kɛnyɛ́ ɔnɔkɔali ni, milɛ kĩ, “Oowo”, ayekĩ Baguma lɛláakɔ mi kɔtɔ.

english_verse: If you are having trouble, you should pray. And if you are feeling good, you should sing praises.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi deĩ nɛ ɔhau kamɛ ni, ɛbɔa mpaɛ ɛkpa Baguma. Ntɛ kawɔlɛ de mi kamɛ odi ni, ɛsã tɔnɔ emu Baguma.

english_verse: If you are sick, ask the church leaders to come and pray for you. Ask them to put olive oil on you in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi asɔ ni, ɛvɛ asɔli banɔkɔɛ̃ a bɛyaabɔa mpaɛ bɛkpa ye, lɔkɔa bɛtsɛla ye kugua nɛ boe Ɔlate a dĩ akũ.

english_verse: If you have faith when you pray for sick people, they will get well. The Lord will heal them, and if they have sinned, he will forgive them.
translation_verse: Mpaɛ kĩ bɔbɔa nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a, aafɔ̃ ɔsɔnɛ a lɛsaɛ. Boe Ɔlate a aafɔ̃ ɛna akũ ɔsĩ, ade ntɛ ɛkɛna tɔkpa tidi malo ni, Baguma aakɔa ete ye.

english_verse: If you have sinned, you should tell each other what you have done. Then you can pray for one another and be healed. The prayer of an innocent person is powerful, and it can help a lot.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mibinya mi tɔkpa kamɛ mitsa mi akũ akũ, mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa akũ, ayekĩ míana kasaɛ. Oti kĩ edzi kpĩĩ mpaɛbɔ deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kĩ kɔapuli kakɛna fɔtsa pii.

english_verse: Elijah was just as human as we are, and for three and a half years his prayers kept the rain from falling.
translation_verse: Eliya nyɛ otidziwa ndɛ boe aye, ade kĩ ɛbɔa mpaɛ mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ oni ɛtako a, oni táko nɛ tite futeli ɛlalɛ mɔ sɛkɛ.

english_verse: But when he did pray for rain, it fell from the skies and made the crops grow.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ebuki ɛbɔa mpaɛ ade Baguma fɔ̃ oni ko tite nyɛ funitsã a.

english_verse: My friends, if any followers have wandered away from the truth, you should try to lead them back.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ, ntɛ mi kamɛ odi muniki nɛ katɛkado a liti, mɔ oti bɛbã buki ɛkpã ye ɛyamɛna ni,

english_verse: If you turn sinners from the wrong way, you will save them from death, and many of their sins will be forgiven.
translation_verse: mite anɛ kĩ oti a kĩ ɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ a nɛ osi kpa akũ, aafɔ̃ bɛnyɛ tɔkpa ɔkɛnanɛ a nkpã nɛ wuda awɛ, ɛna ye tɔkpa beblebee a kakɔa kate.

english_verse: From Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ. To God's people who are scattered like foreigners in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Petro, Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna bati a kĩ Baguma pau, kĩ bɛgba biko ndɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ aye nɛ Ponto, Galatia, Kapadokia, Asia mɔ Bitinia amantam kamɛ a.

english_verse: God the Father decided to choose you as his people, and his Spirit has made you holy. You have obeyed Jesus Christ and are sprinkled with his blood. I pray that God will be kind to you and will keep on giving you peace! A Real Reason for Hope
translation_verse: Baguma boe Ɔlɛga pau mi ndɛ ayekĩ ehihiɛ eyi a, ade ye Hũhũ a kpalɛ mi akũ kĩ míakɔa obu mikpa Yesu Kristo, lɔkɔa ɛkɔa ye babɔanɛ ɛvɔlɛ mi akũ. Baguma ɛmɔ mi kɔnya, ɛfɔ̃ lukudɔ lɛpɔ nɛ mi kamɛ daa. Lɛtsa a Kĩ Budzi Bɔadã Anɛ Kakpa Daa a.

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ. God is so good, and by raising Jesus from death, he has given us new life and a hope that lives on.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bumu Baguma, boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo Ɔlɛga a! Nɛ ye kɔnyakamɔ beblebee a sũ ɛkpa boe nkpã vɔɛ̃ ɛtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo kadzɛla katomɛna kanɔkpa kamɛ. Fukĩĩ fɔ̃ budeĩ kɔnɛte a kĩ kɔkpɔla.

english_verse: God has something stored up for you in heaven, where it will never decay or be ruined or disappear.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ boe anɛ teĩ kĩ boe awɛ aata nyɛ adzapadiɛ mɔ kɔya a kĩ Baguma manɛ eyi ɛkpa ye bati nɛ ode, awã kĩ yaávɔ̃, yaábu kade ade yaátsɛ lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: You have faith in God, whose power will protect you until the last day. Then he will save you, just as he has always planned to do.
translation_verse: Mi a kĩ mitɛ Kristo mido, kĩ bɛkɔa Baguma kɔbɛ̃ bɛmanɛ mi, kĩ Baguma aakpa mi nkpã nɛ luwi nkaɛ akũ a, ade mi lá adzapadiɛ kĩĩ a.

english_verse: On that day you will be glad, even if you have to go through many hard trials for a while.
translation_verse: Mimɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ, titɔ kĩ nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ malo, míamɔ lubo nɛ sɔhuiɛ ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ pii kamɛ,

english_verse: Your faith will be like gold that has been tested in a fire. And these trials will prove that your faith is worth much more than gold that can be destroyed. They will show that you will be given praise and honor and glory when Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: ayekĩ baadã ntɛ mi katɛkado a sipi. Sika ngbã kĩ sapuli kawɔ malo, basɔ se kadã nɛ fi kamɛ. Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ bɛsɔ mi katɛkado a kĩ kɛtɛ kɔya kɛba sika a bɛdã ayekĩ kɛna daa, lɔkɔa baamu mi, bɛkpa mi kukũkpalɛ mɔ obu nɛ Luwi a kĩ Yesu Kristo aaya a akũ.

english_verse: You have never seen Jesus, and you don't see him now. But still you love him and have faith in him, and no words can tell how glad and happy
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ mitámɔ ye malo a, miawɛ ye kalɛ, ade kĩ miámɔ ye finyaa malo a, mitɛ ye mido, ade miamɔ kawɔlɛ wĩ kadi kĩ oti lɛláapuli ɛlɛ.

english_verse: you are to be saved. This is why you have faith.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ mitɛ Kristo mido a sũ, Baguma kpa mi tɛkla nkpã.

english_verse: Some prophets told how God would treat you with undeserved grace, and they searched hard to find out more about the way you would be saved.
translation_verse: Ade nkpã kĩĩ akũ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a dzi bɛkɔna, bɛwɛ fɔlɛtsa kamɛ yededeede, ade bɛlɛ biyi ayekĩ Baguma aamɔ mi kɔnya, ɛkpa mi nkpã a.

english_verse: The Spirit of Christ was in them and was telling them how Christ would suffer and would then be given great honor. So they searched to find out exactly who Christ would be and when this would happen.
translation_verse: Bɛbɔa mbɔdi bɛwɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ fɔ́aya mɔ ayekĩ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ a. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Kristo Hũhũ nɛ be kamɛ a katsa ayekĩ Kristo aamɔ lubo, mɔ kukũkpalɛ a kĩ kɔ́atomɔ koe a.

english_verse: But they were told that they were serving you and not themselves. They preached to you by the power of the Holy Spirit, who was sent from heaven. And their message was only for you, even though angels would like to know more about it. Chosen To Live a Holy Life
translation_verse: Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a kĩ nnɛ́ be kalɛ sũ bɛkɛna adzuma, mbom nɛ mi kalɛ sũ. Bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ finyaa fɔtɔ banyanɛ a tsã Hũhũ Kpalɛwa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma do etomɛna ode a akũ, bide lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ fɔtsa a kĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ malo wɛ kĩ banu kayɔ kufɛ a. Baguma Vɛ Boe Kĩ Bɔyadzi Nkpã Wĩ.

english_verse: Be alert and think straight. Put all your hope in how God will treat you with undeserved grace when Jesus Christ appears.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ mikpa adzuma kakɛna, mipi mi akũ kapi wĩ. Mikɔa anɛ flee mite nɛ nhila a kĩ Baguma aakpa mi nɛ luwi a kĩ Kristo aaya a akũ.

english_verse: Behave like obedient children. Don't let your lives be controlled by your desires, as they used to be.
translation_verse: Ndɛ babi kĩ babu Baguma ni, mitafɔ̃ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ fɔna nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ kadikatanyi kamɛ kɔkɔɛ a lɛnya mi akũ.

english_verse: Always live as God's holy people should, because God is the one who chose you, and he is holy.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma a kĩ ɛvɛ mi a nyɛ oti kpalɛwa a, ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ mi malo mianya bati kpalɛwa nɛ mi fɔtsakɛlawa fudi nyɛ fudi kamɛ a.

english_verse: That's why the Scriptures say, “I am the holy God, and you must be holy too.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛ nɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Minya bati kpalɛwa, kitonɛkĩ oti kpalɛwa manɛ.”

english_verse: You say that God is your Father, but God doesn't have favorites! He judges all people by what they do. So you must honor God while you live as strangers here on earth.
translation_verse: Ntɛ miavɛ Baguma a kĩ yaádã oti anɛ ade yadzɛmɔ odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye lɛkɛnana onukpɛ̃ a kĩ boe Ɔlɛga nɛ mi mpaɛ kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ miavila ye nɛ mi fuwi nkaɛ kamɛ nɛ tite kĩĩ akũ.

english_verse: You were rescued from the useless way of life you learned from your ancestors. But you know you were not rescued by such things as silver or gold that don't last forever.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ nnɛ́ sika ngbã ĩye sika ovoe a kĩ savɔ̃ Baguma kɔa ese kɔtɔ nɛ mi lɔlɔ, ɛnyɛ mi nɛ nkpã pupulidza kadzi a kĩ mi bawanyɔ kɔa biyi mi a kamɛ,

english_verse: You were rescued by the precious blood of Christ, that spotless and innocent lamb.
translation_verse: mbom Kristo babɔanɛ mɔ kɔya paa a ɛkɔa ɛtɛ mi. Kristo la ndɛ kavelibi kĩ kɛkpɔla ade mfumsu lɛmɛ lɛláa ke akũ a.

english_verse: Christ was chosen even before the world was created, but because of you, he did not come until these last days.
translation_verse: Baguma pau ye eyi fɔmɔ ɛbɔa katinya, ade ɛnyɛ ye ɛtsa nɛ fuwi nkaɛ kĩĩ kamɛ nɛ mi sũ.

english_verse: And when he did come, it was to lead you to have faith in God, who raised him from death and honored him in a glorious way. This is why you have put your faith and hope in God.
translation_verse: Mitsã Kristo akũ mitɛ Baguma a kĩ ɛdzɛla ye etomɛna kanɔkpa, edo ye obu lɛmɛ a mido. Nɛ foesũ mi katɛkado mɔ kɔnɛte deĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ.

english_verse: You obeyed the truth, and your souls were made pure. Now you sincerely love each other. But you must keep on loving with all your heart.
translation_verse: Finyaa kĩ mitɛ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a, mitsã ke kamɛ mikpalɛ mi akũ, ade miawɛ mi bawaɛ̃ Kristofɔ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ a, kɛnɛ kĩ miakɔa mi tɔwɔlɛ flee miwɛ akũ kalɛ papaapa.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Humans wither like grass, and their glory fades like wild flowers. Grass dries up, and flowers fall to the ground.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Batidziwa flee la ndɛ tuwĩ aye ade be kahɛhɛ flee la ndɛ nhuilɛ a. Tuwĩ avɛ ade te nhuilɛ a awili.

english_verse: But what the Lord has said will stand forever.” Our good news to you is what the Lord has said.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate kalɛ a kɔ̃ waa daa.” Ade kalɛ kĩĩ nyɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a kĩ ke akũ bide lɛtsã bɛkpa mi a.

english_verse: Stop being hateful! Quit trying to fool people, and start being sincere. Don't be jealous or say cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mifɔ̃ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi odu kakɛna. Mifɔ̃ fɔvã kama mɔ anɛ kamɛ kɛkɛ fɔtsa kakɛna, mɔ anɛngbã mɔ bati buĩ kanyɛ.

english_verse: Be like newborn babies who are thirsty for the pure spiritual milk that will help you grow and be saved.
translation_verse: Miwɛ Baguma ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a ndɛ ayekĩ akɔkɔa awɛ tɛmɛ mui luwi daa, ayekĩ míabo anɛ nɛ mi nkpã katɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: You have already found out how good the Lord really is.
translation_verse: Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Mi mɔawɛ mita onukpɛ̃ midã, mimɔ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate a deĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ.”

english_verse: Come to Jesus Christ. He is the living stone people have rejected, but which God has chosen and highly honored.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ mifuã miya nɛ boe Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃. Ade ye nyɛ nkpã kɔla kake de a kĩ bati sĩ kĩ lɛnyɛ fɔtsa pupulidza, lɛmɛ ade de Baguma nyɛ kĩ lɛtɛ kɔya nɛ ye anɛ a.

english_verse: And now you are living stones being used to build a spiritual house. You are also a group of holy priests, and with the help of Jesus Christ you will offer sacrifices that please God.
translation_verse: Mi malo mila ndɛ kɔla kake nkpã boe, foesũ miya Baguma ɛkɔa mi eke hũhũ kamɛ afɔliɛ kɔla. Ade kɔla kĩĩ kamɛ míasum ndɛ basɔfɔ kpalɛwa kĩ bɛbɔa hũhũ kamɛ afɔliɛ kĩ yawo Baguma anɛ bɛtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo akũ bɛkpa Baguma.

english_verse: It is just as God says in the Scriptures, “Look! I am placing in Zion a choice and precious cornerstone. No one who has faith in this one will be disappointed.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Midã! Ĩnyɛ kɔla akũ de titiliwu a, nkɔa de mayi nɛ Zion. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ ye edo ni, kɔnyɔã lɛláawo ye da.”

english_verse: You are followers of the Lord, and this stone is precious to you. But it isn't precious to those who refuse to follow him. They are the builders who tossed aside the stone that turned out to be the most important one of all.
translation_verse: Foesũ mi a kĩ mitɛ mido a ni, de kĩĩ tɛ kɔya paa lɛkpa mi, lɛmɛ bikĩ bɛtátɛ bido a kɔ̃ ni, binyi kĩ, “De a kĩ kɔla bakenɛ sĩ a, ade de lɛyadani okonto akũ de kĩ lisĩ lɛba flee a.”

english_verse: But you are God's chosen and special people. You are a group of royal priests and a holy nation. God has brought you out of darkness into his marvelous light. Now you must tell all the wonderful things he has done. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ kade a kĩ Baguma pau, lɛgãkanya basɔfɔ, ɔmaĩ kpalɛwa, mɔ bati kĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkɛna ye bade mianɛ. Baguma vɛ mi etomɛna ɔtũ kamɛ ɛyamɛna nɛ ye awãwã ɔhaĩ a kamɛ, kĩ mide lɛtsã nɛ ye awãwã fɔtsa a akũ.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Nɛ lɔkɔ lidi kĩ lɛtɛ̃ kamɛ ni, mitánya Baguma ɔmaĩ, lɛmɛ finyaa minyɛ ye ɔmaĩ. Nɛ kɔkɔ lɔkɔ lidi kamɛ ni, Baguma támɔ mi kɔnya, lɛmɛ finyaa ɛmɔ mi kɔnya. Midzi Nkpã Ndɛ Baguma Basate Aye.

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: Nwaɛ̃ amɛ bawɛnɛ, ndɛ banɔvɔɛ̃ mɔ basitsãnɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ni, mitakɛna nɛ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa a kĩ fɔakɔ odo kayidza kadza nɛ mi akũ a.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Mibɔa ɔbla wĩ nɛ amamufɔ a kamɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ bɛlɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ mi akũ kĩ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ mianɛ malo ni, ke liti, baamɔ adzuma wĩ a kĩ mikɛna, lɔkɔa baamu Baguma nɛ ye kaya Luwi a akũ.

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Nɛ boe Ɔlate sũ ni, midɔla mi akũ mikpa batidziwa a kĩ bidzina nɛ mbla onukpɛ̃. Midɔla mi akũ mikpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Flefle a kĩ lideĩ otumi lɛbɛ̃ flee a.

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: Midɔla akũ lɔmɔ lɛmɛ mikpa abãã banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ a ado kĩ bɛyaavɛlɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a sɔtɔ, bimu bati a kĩ bakɛna tuwĩ a lɛmɛ.

english_verse: God wants you to silence stupid and ignorant people by doing right.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kawɛ nyɛ kĩ mikɔa tuwĩ kakɛna midina fɔkɔasiatsa a kĩ bati alɛ nɛ mi akũ nɛ kadikatanyi kamɛ a.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Midzi nkpã ndɛ bati kĩ bidzi be akũ akũ aye, lɛmɛ mitakɔa akũ akũ kadzi a mikɛna ndɛ tɔkpa kakɛna osi kana, mbom midzi nkpã ndɛ Baguma basate aye.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Mikɔa obu mikpa odi nyɛ odi. Miwɛ mi bawaɛ̃ batɛ badonɛ kalɛ. Mivila Baguma. Mikɔa obu mikpa Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ Flefle a lɛmɛ. Kristo Lubokamɔ a Nyɛ Nfantuhũ Fɔkpa Mi.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Mi basumunɛ, midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi balate, mikɔa obu flee mikpa be. Nnɛ́ mi balate a kĩ bɛdɔ, bideĩ sɛmɛ kalɛ a odi kɛnɛ kĩ miakpa obu, mbom mibu bikĩ bideĩ sɛmɛ ɔnyɛ a lɛmɛ.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi lamɔ lubo a kĩ lɛtáfɛta kĩ ɛmɔ kamɔ, lɛmɛ nɛ Baguma sũ edo ɔwɔlɛ ɛmɔ lubo ni, Baguma aahila ye.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mikɛna fɔtsa kpa mɔ mido ɔwɔlɛ mitɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a ni, kamu kawɔdabe deĩ nɛ foe kamɛ? Lɛmɛ ntɛ mikɛna tuwĩ mɔ mido ɔwɔlɛ mimɔ́ lubo nɛ foe kamɛ ni, Baguma aahila mi.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ sũ Baguma vɛ mi a, kitonɛkĩ Kristo mɔawɛ a malo mɔ́ lubo nɛ mi lɔlɔ, ɛkɔa foe ɛtsa mi nfantuhũ kĩ míatsã ye abɔa kakekɔ̃.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: “Ɛtákɛna tɔkpa tidima, ade ɛtákɛ odima lɛmɛ a.”

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Kĩ bivũna ye a, ɛtávũna odima ese kɔtɔ. Kĩ bɛmɔna ye lubo a, ɛtáhũnahũna odima, mbom ɛkɔa anɛ ete nɛ Baguma a kĩ yadzɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ a akũ.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: Kristo mɔawɛ lɛlɔ boe tɔkpa nɛ ye sukɛna kamɛ ɛnamɛna asendua a akũ, ayekĩ bɔ́anɛ nɛ tɔkpa kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ, budzi nkpã bɔkɛna tuwĩ. Ɛkɔa fɔɔkpa a kĩ ɛtɛ a ɛtsa mi fɔsɔ.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Kɔkɔɛ a, mina ndɛ baveli kĩ bɛyɛla osi, lɛmɛ finyaa Baguma muniki mi miya nɛ mi Baveli Ɔkpãnɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ mi Akũ Ɔdãmɛnanɛ sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Ade ayea mi batsɔ̃ midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banyɔ, ayekĩ ntɛ be kamɛ badi tátɛ Baguma kalɛ a bido malo ni, mi ɔbla wĩ aafɔ̃ bɛtɛ bido. Ade fɔláasĩ malo kĩ miabinya onukpɛ̃ milɛ kadima,

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ baamɔ ayekĩ mi ɔbla kabɔa nɛ Baguma kavila kamɛ kpalɛ mi akũ.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Mi kalɛkadã kɛtana nɛ sukɛna kalɔla ndɛ tɔlɔ kasui, sika ngbã fɔtsa kado, mɔ tilima kĩ tɛtɛ kɔya kadzi kamɛ.

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: Mbom mi kalɛkadã a kɛna nɛ hũhũ kĩ ɛdɔ, yadã dĩĩ kamɛ, ade ɛnya lɛtsa a kĩ lɛláawɔ lɛmɛ a. Tiyitsɔ̃ kĩĩ odu tɛ kɔya paa nɛ Baguma anɛ.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Nɛ kɔkɔɛ a, batsole kpalɛwa a kĩ bɛkɔa anɛ bite nɛ Baguma akũ a, dɔla be akũ bɛkpa be banyɔ, ade fɔnya akũ kakɛɛlɛ fɔkpa be a.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Ade aye Sara dɔla ye akũ ɛkpa Abraham a, ade ɛvɛ ye kĩ, “Yĩ Ɔlate” a. Finyaa mi malo midani Sara babitsole, ntɛ miakɛna tuwĩ mɔ miávila lɛtsama.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Ade aye mi banyɔ lɛmɛ midzi mɔ mi batsɔ̃ nɛ akũ kayɔkanu kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ mi batsɔ̃ lɛlá kɔbɛ̃ ndɛ mi aye. Mikpa be obu kitonɛkĩ mimɔ be flee Baguma mɔ́ kɔnya kĩ míadzi nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna. Ntɛ miakɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, lɛtsama lɛláasua mi mpaɛbɔ osi. Lubokamɔ Nɛ Tuwĩ Kakɛna Sũ.

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: Nɛ kawũna kamɛ a ni, mi flee mina nɛ adzuni mɔa kamɛ, oti akũ ɛkɔ mi kɔnya, miwɛ akũ kalɛ, mikɛna sɛmɛ kalɛ midɔla akũ lɛmɛ mikpa mi akũ akũ.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Mitakɔa tɔkpa mise tɔkpa kɔtɔ, ĩye midumu mise kadumu kɔtɔ, mbom mivia nhila mikpa be, kitonɛkĩ kavɛ Baguma vɛ mi kĩ miyaana nhila.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa lɛ a, “Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ kĩ edzi nkpã wĩ ɛmɔ fuwi wĩ ni, tuwuli kpa tɛtanɛ tito ye onukpɛ̃ ade ɛtáma fɔvã lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ ɛfɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna, ɛkɛna tuwĩ, ɛbɔa mbɔdi ɛwɛ lukudɔ osi, etomɔ de liti mɔ ye ɔwɔlɛ flee.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate anɛ teĩ nɛ tuwĩ bakɛnanɛ a akũ, ade ebinya atɔ yatse be mpaɛbɔ a. Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate a abɔa kanɛ liti kakpa tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Ntɛ akũ asĩ mi kĩ miakɛna tuwĩ ni, owei deĩ kĩ yaakɛna mi fɔlɔɛwotsa?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ míamɔ lubo malo nɛ tuwĩ a kĩ miakɛna sũ ni, Baguma ahila mi! Mitavila odima, lɛtsama lɛmɛ lɛtaha mi tɔwɔlɛ.

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Mbom mikɔa obu mikpa Kristo, boe Ɔlate a nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Mimanɛ akũ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ, kĩ míapuli minyɛ foe kayɔ mitsa odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaavia mi fɔlɛtsa nɛ kɔnɛte a kĩ mideĩ a akũ.

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mikɛna foe nɛ obu mɔ akũ kadɔla kamɛ. Mifɔ̃ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ tɛkpalɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ bivũna mi malo ni, kɔnyɔã kuwo bikĩ balɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ ɔbla wĩ a kĩ miabɔa ndɛ Kristo batomɛnanɛ a sũ.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ fɔnyɛ Baguma kawɛ ni, fɔnɛnɛ kĩ miamɔ lubo ndɛ tuwĩ bakɛnanɛ, kɛba kĩ míamɔ lubo ndɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Kristo lɛmɛ ku nɛ bati tɔkpa lɔlɔ deedimɔapɛ ɛkpa fɔkɔ a flee. Titɔ kĩ ɛnyɛ oti wĩ malo a, eku nɛ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ lɔlɔ ayekĩ yaakpã mi ɛnamɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Bɛkɔ ye nɛ sukɛna kamɛ, lɛmɛ Baguma dzɛla ye edzi nkpã nɛ Hũhũ kamɛ.

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: Ɛna nɛ Hũhũ a kamɛ, ade ɛnalɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa ɛkpa hũhũ a kĩ ɛwaa kɔla a.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: Ade be nyɛ bati a kĩ bɛtátse Baguma ɔlɛdo, titɔ kĩ Baguma na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɛkpa be malo a nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ Noa kamɛ ye adakã kpale a. Ye kamɛ bati sukuloo kĩ biwo be ɛlɛ̃ lɛna nkpã nɛ mui kayili a kamɛ.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: Mui kayili kĩĩ ketimɔ mui kawɔla amaniɛ a kĩ finyaa bɛkɔa bɛtɛ mi nkpã. Nnɛ́ tuduli kavɔlɛ nɛ oti akũ fɔanɛ, mbom fɔnyɛ fubo kalɔ kĩ oti aakɔa ye ɔwɔlɛ flee ɛkpa Baguma. Baguma mui kawɔla a lɛtɛ mi nkpã fɔtsãmɛna Yesu Kristo kayidza kato kanɔkpa a akũ.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: Kristo naa ode, ade edzi nɛ Baguma sɔmɔna, yanya Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ, mɔ ode otumifɔ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ flee akũ a.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ Kristo mɔ́ lubo ndɛ otidziwa aye a ni, mi malo miakɔa adzuni mɔapɛ a mido mi akũ kɔbɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛmɔ lubo nɛ sukɛna kamɛ ni, yafɔ̃ tɔkpa kakɛna.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Foesũ kito finyaa kanaa ni, midzi mi nkpã fuwi nkaɛ nɛ tite akũ a nɛ Baguma kawɛ onukpɛ̃, nnɛ́ nɛ otidziwa fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ odo a onukpɛ̃.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Kɔkɔɛ a, mibula lɔkɔ kade, midzi nkpã mikakɛna fɔtsa ndɛ amamufɔ aye nɛ lɔkɔ pii kamɛ. Nkpã a kĩ midzi tɔ̃ a nyɛ kɔkɔbato kpa kabɔa, sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa liti katomɛna, bavɛ kawuga, anya kpa kanya, futo kpa kato, mɔ baviɔ̃ kasum kĩ fɔláa mbla adima kayɔ.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Finyaa fɔakɛna amamufɔ a wãwã kĩ mibuki miádo akũ nɛ be nkpã pupulidza kadzi kamɛ, nɛ foesũ balɛ mi akũ tuwuli kpa.

english_verse: But they will have to answer to God, who judges the living and the dead.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ baanyɛ be akũ onukpɛ̃ bɛkpa Baguma a kĩ ɛmanɛ akũ kĩ yaadzɛmɔ bati a kĩ bidzi nkpã mɔ banɔkpa flee a.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Ade foesũ Kristo de lɛtsã nɛ Kalɛ Wĩ a akũ ɛkpa banɔkpa a lɛmɛ a. Ade titɔ kĩ Baguma adzɛmɔ be ndɛ kɛfɛta odi nyɛ odi malo ni, Kristo de lɛtsã ɛkpa be ayekĩ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ni, baadzi nkpã ndɛ Baguma aye. Kɛnɛ Kĩ Bɔkɛna Baguma Futetsa Akũ Adzuma, Bɔkɔa Busum Akũ Akũ.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Fɔtsa flee kawũna lɔkɔ fuã, foesũ mipi mi akũ kapi wĩ, mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, ayekĩ míapuli mibɔa mpaɛ.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa titiliwu nyɛ kĩ, miwɛ akũ kalɛ mɔ ɔdɔ kĩ eto mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ flee, kitonɛkĩ ɔdɔ afɔ̃ bati akɔa bati bɛbã tɔkpa pii kate.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi nase ɔwaɛ̃ ni, ɛtɛ ye mɔ kawɔlɛ hũhũhũhũ kakɛna fɔtana nɛ foe kamɛ.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Mi kamɛ odi nyɛ odi tɛ futetsa pɔtii etomɛna Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Foesũ ndɛ Baguma futetsa futefute kĩĩ akũ badãmɛnanɛ ni, mikɛna foe akũ adzuma kakɛna wĩ, ayekĩ fɔ́ana libi fɔkpa mi akũ akũ.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi alɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa ni, ɛlɛ foe ndɛ Baguma fɔlɛtsa aye. Ntɛ odi asum ni, ɛkɔa kɔbɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma kpa ye a esum, ayekĩ nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kamɛ ni, bati aatsã Yesu Kristo akũ bimu Baguma. Ye fude nyɛ kukũkpalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ daa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ. Lubokamɔ Ndɛ Okristoni Aye.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: Yĩ bawɛnɛ, mitafɔ̃ ayekĩ bɛlamɔ mi kasɔ kadã, milamɔ lubo kamɔ mɔ kalɔɛ lɛkɛna mi wãwã ndɛ lɛtsa vɔɛ̃ kĩ miádã anɛ kɔlaa.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Mbom mifɔ̃ kawɔlɛ kide mi kĩ miamɔ lubo ndɛ Kristo aye, ayekĩ ntɛ ɛnɛ́ ɛta nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ ni, mi malo míapuli mimɔ́ kawɔlɛ mitu osee.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bati vũna mi kĩ mi nɛ ayekĩ mitomɔ Kristo sũ ni, kawɔlɛ kide mi, kitonɛkĩ kukũkpalɛ Hũhũ a, kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma Hũhũ a tomɔ mi.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mi kamɛ odi amɔ lubo ni, fɔtanya kĩ ɛnyɛ owudini, ĩye oyekpanɛ, ĩye fɔtsa kpa ɔkɛnanɛ ĩye kĩ edo onukpɛ̃ nɛ bati bɛbã fɔlɛtsa kĩ fɔtsɛ́la ye akũ a kamɛ.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to suffer for being a Christian. Praise God that you belong to him.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ mi kamɛ odi amɔ lubo kĩ ɛnyɛ Kristo ode sũ ni, kɔnyɔã kɔtakɔ ye, mbom emu Baguma kĩ Kristo dĩ teĩ nɛ ye akũ.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Lɔkɔ wo ɔtɔ kĩ Baguma aayi bati kadzɛmɛna kayɔ, ade ye mɔawɛ tɔtɔ kamɛ yaanya lɔtɔ ɛdzɛmɛna a. Ade ntɛ eyi kayɔ nɛ boe akũ a, nde fɔ́awũna fɔkpa bati a kĩ bɛtátɛ ye Kalɛ Wĩ a bido a?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ a, “Ntɛ fudeĩ ɔsĩ fɔmɔ Baguma aatɛ bati kpĩĩ bɛna nkpã ni, kekɔ̃ nde fɔ́ana fɔkpa bati a kĩ baávila Baguma mɔ tɔkpa bakɛnanɛ a?”

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Foesũ bati a kĩ bamɔ lubo ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma wɛ ɛkpa be a bɛkɛna tuwĩ, bɛkɔa be ɔkla flee bido nɛ be Ɔbɔanɛ a kĩ yaápãã nɛ ye kalɛkayi akũ da a awɛ kamɛ.
