english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: Finyaa, yĩ ndɛ asɔli ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ aye ni, mawɛ kĩ madɛ asafu banɔkɔɛ̃ a kĩ bideĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a. Yĩ mɔawɛ a mmɔ́ ayekĩ Kristo mɔ́ lubo, ade maana tsɛfã nɛ ye kukũkpalɛ a kĩ baanyɛ bɛtsa a kamɛ a. Makpa mi kɔdɛ kĩ,

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: Mikpã Baguma baveli kɔdabu a kĩ ɛkɔa edo nɛ mi awɛ a kadã wĩ. Midã be akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Baguma awɛ nɛ ɔdɔ kamɛ, kĩ nnɛ́ nɛ ɔhɛ kamɛ. Mitakɛna adzuma nɛ kɔtɔkase sũ, mbom mifɔ̃ futo mi ɔwɔlɛ faa kamɛ.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Mitawɛ kĩ mianya bati a kĩ Baguma kɔa edo mi nɛ awɛ a akũ, mbom mi ɔbla ɛnya nfantuhũ ɛkpa baveli kɔdabu a.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Ntɛ Baveli Ɔdãmɛnanɛ ɔnɔkɔɛ̃ a nɛ ɛta ni, míana kukũkpalɛ lɛgãbɔɛ a kĩ de ɔhaĩ a lɛláabu kade.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Ade ayea mi bapopo lɛmɛ midɔla mi akũ mikpa mi banɔkɔɛ̃ a. Mi a flee midɔla akũ mikpa mi akũ, misum akũ nɛ mi lɛkɛnana lidi nyɛ lidi kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ kĩ, “Baguma ayidza kadza nɛ bati a kĩ badɛla be akũ nɛ ode a akũ, lɛmɛ yamɔ bikĩ bɛdɔla be akũ a kɔnya.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ midɔla akũ mido nɛ Baguma kɔbɛ̃ awɛ a kayɔ, ayekĩ yaadɛla mi nɛ ode nɛ ye mɔawɛ lɔkɔ wĩ a kamɛ.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Mikɔa fɔtsa a kĩ fɔaha mi a flee mido nɛ Baguma awɛ kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ ye adãmɛna mi akũ.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Mina nɛ kukũmanɛ kamɛ, mikaadã kadã wĩ! Mi okesĩnɛ, Abonsam, tsɛ̃ yamini ndɛ Dzata kĩ yakulumɛ, kĩ yawɛ odi epi ɛyɛlɛ ɛba.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Mikɔa kadza pintii nɛ katɛkado kamɛ misua tɔkpa osi, kitonɛkĩ minyina kĩ mi bakɔba Kristofɔ nɛ katinya kamɛ flee lamɛna lubo kĩĩ odu kamɔ.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ nɛ mi lubo kamɔ lɔkɔ lukũ liti ni, Baguma a kĩ ye kɔnyakamɔ pɔnɛ a, aakɛna mi mikpɔla, edo mi kɔbɛ̃ midza pintii. Kitonɛkĩ ɛvɛ mi kĩ miyaana tsɛfã nɛ ye daa kukũkpalɛ a kamɛ, nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna mɔ Kristo sũ.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ade ye deĩ kɔbɛ̃ daa daa a! Fɔya lɔmɔ. Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Ntsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa lukũ kĩĩ ntsãmɛna Silvano akũ mama mi. Mabu ye ndɛ ɔkɔba okristoni kĩ yadi ɔnɔkɔali. Mawɛ kĩ mado mi kɔbɛ̃ mɔ lɛtsa a kĩ yĩ mɔawɛ mmɔ́ kĩ ade Baguma kɔnyakamɔ a nɛ awĩ a. Midza pintii nɛ ye kamɛ.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Babilonia asafu a, kĩ Baguma pau ndɛ mi aye a, awɔ̃na mi. Ade aye yĩ obi Marko lɛmɛ awɔ̃na mi a.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Miwɔ̃na akũ nɛ Kristo ɔdɔ kamɛ. Lukudɔ litomɔ mi flee a kĩ mikɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Simon Petro, Yesu Kristo osumunɛ mɔ fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna bati a kĩ bɛtsã boe Baguma mɔ boe Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo tuwĩ kakɛna akũ bɛna katɛkado kĩ kideĩ kɔya ndɛ boe kade a aye.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Baguma kɔnyakamɔ, mɔ ye lukudɔ lɛpɔ nɛ mi akũ, ayekĩ míabuki minyi ye mɔ Yesu kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate a mibu. Ayekĩ Baguma Vɛ Bati Ɛpau Be.

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Baguma kɔa ye mɔawɛ kɔbɛ̃ ɛkpa boe lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ busĩ nɛ nkpã kamɛ a faa kĩ bupuli budzi nkpã busum ye kasum wĩ. Ɛkɛna fukĩĩ ɛnɛɛ yabumɔ boe kĩ bunyi oti a kĩ ɛvɛ boe kĩ bɔyaana tsɛfã nɛ ye mɔawɛ kukũkpalɛ mɔ tuwĩ kakɛna a kamɛ.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Baguma tsã osi kĩĩ akũ ete boe fɔtsa kpale mɔ kɔya a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a, ayekĩ bɔ́apuli bɔtsã futetsa kĩĩ akũ bulo nɛ fɔtsa kpa kĩ fɔakɔ oti odo kĩ fɔawɔla oti nɛ katinya onukpɛ̃, lɔkɔa bɔtsã foe akũ bɔna tsɛfã nɛ Baguma kutidu a kamɛ.

english_verse: Do your best to improve your faith by adding goodness, understanding,
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ, mibɔa mbɔdi mikɔa tuwĩ kakɛna mibumɔ mi katɛkado. Ade ayea kadikanyi kibumɔ mi tuwĩ kakɛna,

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mideĩ ɔbla kĩĩ mɔ ɛtɛ mi kamɛ flee ni, fɔafɔ̃ mikabɔa mbɔdi, mi akũ lɛna nfasɔ, nɛ ayekĩ minyi boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo sũ.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ ɔbla kĩĩ lɛláa odi kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ eku anɛ eyua, kĩ ɛláapuli ɛmɔ mɔ lugo, ade yalɛla tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna ɛtɛ̃ a kĩ Baguma wɔla nɛ ye akũ a.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, mibɔa mbɔdi mɔ ɔsĩ miba kɔkɔɛ, mido akũ ɔsĩ mifɔ̃ kavɛ a kĩ Baguma vɛ mi, mɔ kapau a kĩ ɛpau mi a, fɔnya fɔtsa kɔlɛwa fɔkpa mi. Ntɛ mikɛna foe lɔmɔ ni, miláamuniki nɛ mi katɛkado a liti.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Ntɛ fɔtsã osi kĩĩ akũ a, baakpa mi osi faa miwo nɛ boe Ɔlate mɔ boe Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ a kĩ kɛwaa daa a kamɛ.

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ minyina fɔtsa kĩĩ kɔkɔɛ, midzɛ̃ pintii nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ bɔtsa mi a kamɛ malo ni, mawɛ kĩ makate mi foe anɛ luwi daa.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: Mbu kĩ, kĩ ndzi kpã ni, fɔnɛnɛ kĩ nkaanyina mi nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ.

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: Ĩnyina kĩ owi lɛláabuna mɔ maaku ndɛ ayekĩ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo nyɛ ɛtsa yĩ pefee a.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ maabɔa mbɔdi ntsa mi osi a kĩ nɛ yĩ wuda liti ni, míapuli mite anɛ nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ akũ lɔkɔ nyɛ lɔkɔ. Bati a Kĩ Bɛmɔ́ Kristo Kukũkpalɛ a.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ tugu kĩ bɛmɛ nɛ nyansã kamɛ bɔkɔa bɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kaya nɛ kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ a bɔtsa mi. Boe mɔawɛ a lɛmɔ ye kɔbɛ̃, obu mɔ kukũkpalɛ a mɔ anɛ.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Bɔna nɛ awã luwi a fɔmɔ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga a kɔa ye obu mɔ kukũkpalɛ ɛkpa ye, ade odo to ode nɛ Kukũkpalɛ Flee Ɔlate a sɛkɛ̃ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade yĩ Obi kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ a. Yawo yĩ anɛ.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Boe mɔawɛ a linu odo kĩĩ kĩ eto ode nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɔna nɛ ye sɛkɛ̃ nɛ ɔtɔ kpalɛwa a akũ.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ boe mbom bɔtɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ lɛtsã a kĩ bide nɛ ye akũ a budo bɔba. Mibɔa mbɔdi mipi ɔlɛdo a kĩ ɛla ndɛ ɔsɛdza kĩ yavɔlɛ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ a mido mɔ akũ, kɛnaawo odenyinawi kĩ ɔnɔnɛ lisibii a aade lɛvɔlɛ nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛbɛ̃ foe flee nyɛ kĩ, mite anɛ kĩ odima lɛláapuli ɛnyɛ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a kayɔ nɛ ye mɔawɛ akũ akũ.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ fɔlɛtsa fudima táto otidziwa kawɛ kamɛ fɔya tɔ̃ da, mbom Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ lɛfɔ̃ bati lɛ Baguma ɔlɛdo a biyi.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Ndɛ ayekĩ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ nɛ́ nɛ bati kamɛ kɔkɔɛ a, ade ayea bavãlɛvã fɔtsa batsanɛ aanɛ nɛ mi kamɛ a. Baatsã tɛdake kamɛ bɛyamɛna fɔvã fɔtsa katsa a kĩ fɔ́abula bati kade, ade baasĩ boe Ɔlate a kĩ ɛya be ɛtɛ be nkpã a malo. Be fɔtsakɛlawa aafɔ̃ bɛwɔla be mɔatsɛ.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Bati pii aatomɔ be ɔbla kpa kabɔa a liti, ade nɛ fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ a sũ ni, bati bɛbã aalɛ kɔdzɛla kpa bitia ɔnɔkɔali osi a.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ bavãlɛvã fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ deĩ anɛngbã nɛ sika akũ sũ ni, baatsã tɛdake mɔ fɔvã kamɛ bɛna mi akũ nfasɔ. Lɛmɛ Baguma kɔ be kɔtɔ eyi anɛ kɔkɔkɔɛ, ade Oti a kĩ yaawɔla be a lɛmɛ lanyɛ anɛ nɛ be akũ!

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Baguma támɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛkɛna tɔkpa a kɔnya, mbom edo be nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ, ɛta be edo nɛ fi kĩ fɔádĩ da a kamɛ, awã kĩ bideĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ badzɔlɛ kadzɛ Luwi a.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: Ade ayea Baguma támɔ atitifɔ katinya bati a kɔnya a. Ɛfɔ̃ mui kayili wɔla bati a kĩ bɛtávila Baguma nɛ katinya kamɛ flee a, mbɔɛntɛ Noa kĩ ede lɛtsã nɛ nkpã kadzi kpĩĩ akũ, mɔ bati evũkɔnɔ bɛbã odi Baguma nyɛ nɛ foe kamɛ.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Baguma kɔ Sodom mɔ Gomora tɛmatɔ tɛkpale tɛkpale a kɔtɔ, ade ɛfɔ̃ fi wɔla te bubloo tɛdani batɔ nɛnɛ a. Ɛkɛna be kĩ bɛnya nfantuhũ bɛkpa bikĩ baávila Baguma a lɛtsa a kĩ laaya nɛ be akũ.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Oti wĩ kĩĩ dzi nɛ be kamɛ, ade be ɔbla kpa a kĩ ɛkamɔ ɛkanu mɔ be titikpa a kaha ye ɔwɔlɛ luwi nyɛ luwi.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ boe Ɔlate nyina ayekĩ yanyɛ bati a kĩ bavila ye a etomɛna be sɔhuiɛ kamɛ, mɔ ayekĩ yafɔ̃ bati kpa aana nɛ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ kamɛ bɛkɔa bɛdzɔlɛ kadzɛ luwi a.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Yakɛna foe titiliwu nɛ bati a kĩ bitomɔ sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa kĩ fɔakɔ odo liti, kĩ foesũ baábu Baguma otumi kĩ yanya be akũ a kado nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ. Fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ deĩ anɛ ɔsĩ, ade badɛla be akũ nɛ ode a. Baákɔa obu kakpa ode bati kpalɛwa a, ade ntɛ balɛ tɔkpa nɛ be akũ malo ni, akũ lányɛnɛ be.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bideĩ kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi bɛbɛ̃ fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ malo a lákɔa fɔlɛtsa kpa katsua be onukpɛ̃ nɛ boe Ɔlate a anɛ.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ la ndɛ bayaɛ kpa kĩ bɛlá adzuni, kĩ katinya nyɛ be kĩ bati bipili be bɛkɔ. Balɛ fɔlɛtsa kpa nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɛtánu de kayɔ a akũ. Baguma aawɔla be ndɛ ayekĩ batidziwa awɔla tuwĩ kamɛ bayaɛ.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Baamɔ lubo nɛ lubo a kĩ bɛfɔ̃ bati mɔ́ a sũ. Be kawɔlɛ nyɛ kĩ bɛkɛna be sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kpa fudi nyɛ fudi nɛ suwa ketee. Bɛnyɛ kɔnyɔã mɔ tuduli fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, ade ntɛ mi mɔ be midzi mianya a, bamɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ be bati kakɛ tisi a akũ.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Bideĩ anɛ kĩ yamɔ batsole adɔpaafɔ, ade anɛ a kakɔa kakɛna tɔkpa láplo be a. Bavɛlɛ bati kĩ be katɛkado lɛdzɛ́ pintii kado nɛ tɔkpa kamɛ. Bɛvɛlɛ be akũ bɛkpa anɛngbã. Baguma kadumu tomɔ be!

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Bɛfɔnɛ nɛ osi kpĩĩ a awɛ, ade bɛyɛla osi a. Bɛtsã osi a kĩ Balam, Boer obinyole a tsã a. Balam mɔ kawɔlɛ nɛ sika a kĩ yaana etomɛna tɔkpa kakɛna kamɛ a akũ.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Baguma kã ye anɛ nɛ ye tɔkpa a sũ. Ye mɔawɛ aflimu kĩ ɛnɔnɛ lɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ oti odo, ade esua onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a fɔbɔdamtsa kakɛna osi a.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Fɔvã fɔtsa batsanɛ kĩĩ la ndɛ fɔwɔkɛ kĩ fuviɔ̃, ĩye luflututu kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ abɔa kanamɛna. Baguma manɛ kadzikɔ̃ eyi ɛkpa be nɛ ɔtũ kpli kamɛ.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Balɛ kɔdzɛla mɔ akũ kata, kalɛ fɔkɔasiatsa lɛmɛ. Bakɔa sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ odo kakɛ bikĩ owi tábuna kĩ bilo nɛ amamu kadzi kamɛ.

english_verse: They promise freedom to everyone. But they are merely slaves of filthy living, because people are slaves of whatever controls them.
translation_verse: Bakpa be anɛ kate nɛ akũ akũ kadzi akũ, lɛmɛ be mɔawɛ a bɛnyɛ ɔbla kpa a kĩ yawɔla bati a basate, kitonɛkĩ lɛtsa a kĩ lɛnya oti akũ ni, oti a adani ɔsate ɛkpa lɛtsa a.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bati tsã boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo kanyi kamɛ bilo nɛ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔado oti efĩĩ sɛkɛ̃, mɔ́ ɔbla a na muniki ewo nɛ be kamɛ ɛnya be akũ ni, bati a na nkpã awũnade a abu kade kaba atɔnyade a.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Ntɛ kanyi kĩĩ bɛtanyi lɛtsama nɛ kadzi nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ ni, kufɛ fɔnɛnɛ kɔlaa fɔkpa be kɛba kĩ binyi osi wĩ kĩĩ lɛmɛ bibuki bimuniki nɛ mbla kpalɛwa a kĩ Baguma kpa be a liti.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ lɛya nɛ be akũ a atsa kĩ fɔgbã kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ, “Okpete amuniki kanaabɔɛ ye mɔawɛ tɛdã,” ade, “Ɔplakuo kĩ bɛwɔla ye mui yededeede amuniki kanaato tɔdɔ̃.”

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: Mawɛ kĩ mite anɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kpalɛwa a lɛ biyi anɛ kɔkɔɛ a, mɔ tɛbla a kĩ mi fɔtɔ banyanɛ a tɛ bitomɛna boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ sɛkɛ̃ bɛma mi a akũ.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Minya lɔtɔ minu foe kayɔ kĩ nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni, nsekuo badinɛ aaya. Baadzi nkpã nɛ be sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ oti odo onukpɛ̃ bidi mi nsekuo.

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: Ade baalɛ kĩ, “Ɛlɛ eyi kĩ yaaya. Nde ye? Kitonɛkĩ anɛ kĩ boe bawanyɔ ku kɛyawo finyaa, ade ayea lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa buki lideĩ ndɛ ayekĩ fɔna kĩ Baguma bɔa katinya a!”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Bibua pa bisĩ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ anɛ kɔkɔɛ mɔ Baguma kɔa kalɛ ɛbɔa tite mɔ ode. Ɛkɛna tite etomɛna mui kamɛ, tɛdzɛ̃ nɛ mui kamɛ,

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: ade mui lɛmɛ, mui a kĩ biyili a ɛkɔa ɛwɔla katinya kɔɛ a.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Ade Baguma kalɛ mɔapɛ kĩĩ pini tite mɔ ode a kĩ fudeĩ finyaa, ade ɛmanɛ foe eyi kĩ yaakɔa fi ɛwɔla foe a. Baguma manɛ foe eyi ɛkpa kadzɛ luwi a kĩ yaawɔla bati a kĩ bɛtávila ye a.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Nɛ badi kakɔna onukpɛ̃ ni, boe Ɔlate lána sɔwa nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛlɛ eyi a kakɛna akũ. Fɔlá lɔmɔ, mbom ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ edeĩ ɛkpa mi, kitonɛkĩ yaáwɛ kĩ odima ɛyaawɔ, mbom yawɛ kĩ bati flee bɛdani tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a aaya ndɛ ayekĩ oyekpanɛ aya a aye. Nɛ luwi a akũ ni, ode aatɛ̃ ɛnaa nɛ odo kpaa kanɛ kamɛ, ade odetɔ́ kamɛ fɔtsa flee a aatɛ̃ fuvio fɔwɔ, ade tite mɔ te akũ fɔtsa flee lɛmɛ aavio a.

english_verse: Everything will be destroyed. So you should serve and honor God by the way you live.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ baawɔla fɔtsa kĩĩ flee nɛ osi kĩĩ akũ ni, bati bawɔdabe odu kɛnɛ kĩ mianya? Kɛnɛ kĩ mibɔa ɔbla kĩ ɛkpalɛ, mikɔa mi akũ flee misum Baguma,

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ midzi miadzɔlɛ Baguma Luwi a mɔ akũ kasĩ kĩ lɛya mɔatsɛ. Ade luwi a mɔ ode aapi fi evio, ade fi ɔwɛ a aanyinyina odetɔ́ kamɛ fɔtsa flee a.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ nɛ Baguma kalɛkayi onukpɛ̃ ni, bɔadzɔlɛ ode vɔɛ̃ mɔ tite vɔɛ̃, awã kĩ fɔtsa wĩ kakɛna tɛ tɔtɔ.

english_verse: My friends, while you are waiting, you should make certain the Lord finds you pure, spotless, and living at peace.
translation_verse: Foesũ nwaɛ̃ amɛ, kĩ miadzɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a ni, mibɔa mbɔdi kĩ míanya bati kpalɛwa, kĩ nfumusu lɛláa mi akũ nɛ Baguma anɛ, mbom lukudɔ lɛna nɛ mimɔ Baguma kayite.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Kɛnɛ kĩ bɔabu boe Ɔlate a ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kana kakpa boe a ndɛ osi kĩ ebinya ɛkpa mi kĩ mina nkpã katɛ. Ade fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ boe ɔwɛnɛ Paulo malo tsɛlɛ ɛma mi nɛ nyansã a kĩ Baguma kpa ye a onukpɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: Ade lɛtsa a kĩ yalɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ nɛ ye tuvoli a kamɛ a. Ye tuvoli a kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a fudi kayɔ kanu deĩ ɔsĩ. Nɛ foesũ bati a kĩ binyína tuvoli mɔ bikĩ bɛtátim nɛ be katɛkado kamɛ a adani foe kayɔ kanyɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ bakɛna mɔ Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa fɔlɛtsa bɛbã a fudi. Fukĩĩ kakɛna aafɔ̃ bɛwɔla be akũ.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi yĩ bakɔba, minyina fukĩĩ kɔkɔɛ. Foesũ midã mi akũ kadã wĩ ayekĩ bati a kĩ baábu mbla a lɛláanyɛ kudu nɛ mi abɔa kayɔ minɛ mitɔ!

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Mibo anɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate mɔ Ɔtɛnɛ Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ mɔ kanyi kamɛ. Ye kade nyɛ kukũkpalɛ kito finyaa kanaa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ bɔamɛna mi nɛ Baguma kalɛ a kĩ kakpa nkpã, kĩ kideĩ anɛ kayɔkayi a akũ. Bunu kalɛ kĩĩ, bɔmɔ́ ke mɔ anɛ, nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, bɔmɔ́ ke, ade bɔta ke mɔ awɛ lɛmɛ a.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Kĩ nkpã kĩĩ nyɛ ye akũ kanya a, bɔmɔ́ ye, foesũ bɔlɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ ye akũ, ade bude lɛtsã nɛ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, kĩ edeĩ nɛ Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃ kĩ Baguma nyɛ ɛtsa boe malo akũ a, bɔkpa mi.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔmɔ́, bunu a, ade de bɔabi mi malo a, ayekĩ míayabumɔ boe nɛ ɔmɔa a kĩ bɔkɛna mɔ Ɔlɛga a mɔ ye Obi Yesu Kristo.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Bɔtsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ bɔama mi, ayekĩ boe kawɔlɛkamɔ a aakpɔla. Baguma Nyɛ Ɔhaĩ.

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Finyaa ni, ɔlɛdo a kĩ bunu butomɛna ye Obi sɛkɛ̃ a, kĩ bɔkɔa bɔade lɛtsã nɛ ye akũ bɔkpa mi a nyɛ Baguma nyɛ ɔhaĩ, ade ɔtũ odima lɛláa ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ budeĩ nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna kamɛ mɔ ye mɔ bubuki bɔtsɛ̃ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ bɔama fɔvã nɛ boe kɔdzɛla kalɛ mɔ boe fɔkɛlatsa kamɛ.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ budeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ ye malo edeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ ni, kekɔ̃ bɔakɛna ɔmɔa mɔ boe akũ akũ, ade ye Obi Yesu babɔanɛ a vɔlɛ tɔkpa tidi nyɛ tidi nɛ boe akũ a.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ tɔkpa lɛláa boe akũ ni, kakɛ bɔakɛ boe akũ, ade ɔnɔkɔali a lɛláa boe kamɛ a.

english_verse: But if we confess our sins to God, he can always be trusted to forgive us and take our sins away.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ bubinya boe tɔkpa kamɛ bɔtsa Baguma ni, ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔalini mɔ oti kpĩĩ kĩ yaakɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe, ɛvɔlɛ efĩĩ adi nyɛ adi nɛ boe akũ.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɔlɛ kĩ bɔtákɛna tɔkpa ni, bute Baguma fɔvã, ade ke ye kalɛ a lɛmɛ lɛláa boe kamɛ a.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Yĩ babi, nlamɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kamɛna mi ayekĩ miláakɛna tɔkpa. Lɛmɛ ntɛ odi kɛna tɔkpa ni, budeĩ odi kĩ yawãnɛ boe lɔlɔ nɛ Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃. Ade ye nyɛ Yesu Kristo kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ a.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Kristo akũ Baguma tsã ɛkɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe. Nnɛ́ boe odi tɔkpa ɛkɔa ete, mbom ɛkɔa ete batidziwa flee.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɔakɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ ni, fɔ́afɔ̃ bɔmɔ́ buyi ɔsũ kĩ bunyina ye.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ yalɛ kĩ, “Ĩnyina ye,” lɛmɛ yaákɛna nɛ ye mbla a akũ ni, ɔvãlɛvã yanɛ, ade ɔnɔkɔali a lɛláa ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ ye kalɛ a akũ ni, ade ye ɔdɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa Baguma a lɛkpɔla a. Ayekĩ bɔ́akɛna bunyi kĩ bɔkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Baguma nyɛ kĩ,

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ edzi nkpã ndɛ ayekĩ Yesu Kristo dzi a. Mikɛna Nɛ Mbla Vɔɛ̃ a Akũ.

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, nnɔ mbla vɔɛ̃ ntsɛlɛ mama mi, mbom mbla kɔɛ a kĩ bɛkpa mi kito anɛ kayɔkayi a yanɛ. Mbla kɔɛ a nyɛ ɔlɛdo a kĩ minu kɔkɔɔkɔɛ a.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mbla a kĩ ntsɛlɛ finyaa mamɛna mi a nyɛ avɔɛ̃, ade ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a lɛmɛ nyɛ akũ nɛ Kristo mɔ mi kamɛ a. Kitonɛkĩ ɔtũ a lamɛna katɛ̃ ade ɔhaĩ mɔawɛ a lamɛna kavɔlɛ kɔkɔɛ a.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ edeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ, lɛmɛ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, ebuki edeĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ kɛyawo finyaa.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kalɛ ni, edeĩ nɛ ɔhaĩ a kamɛ, foesũ lɛtsama lɛláafɔ̃ ɛkɛna tɔkpa.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, edeĩ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ, ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ ɔtũ kamɛ, ade enyína awã kĩ yakpa, kitonɛkĩ ɔtũ a kɔ ye anɛ.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: Mi babisɛ̃, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ bɛkɔa mi tɔkpa bite mi nɛ Kristo sũ.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Mi balɛga, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ minyi Kristo a kĩ edeĩ nkpã kito anɛ kayɔkayi a. Mi bapopo, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ minya Oti Kpa a akũ.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: Mi babisɛ̃, mi nlamɛna ovoli kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kama, kitonɛkĩ minyina Ɔlɛga a. Mi balɛga a, ntsɛlɛ mma mi, kitonɛkĩ minyina Kristo a kĩ edeĩ nkpã kito anɛ kayɔkayi a. Mi bapopo, ntsɛlɛ mma mi, kitonɛkĩ mideĩ kɔbɛ̃, Baguma kalɛ a deĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, ade minya Oti Kpa a akũ a.

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Mitawɛ katinya ĩye fɔtsa a kĩ fudeĩ nɛ ke kamɛ a fudima kalɛ. Ntɛ odi awɛ katinya kalɛ ni, Ɔlɛga a ɔdɔ lɛláa ye kamɛ.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa flee kĩ fɔakɔ sukɛna odo, ĩye fɔakɔ anɛ odo, mɔ fɔtsa a kĩ oti apia nɛ foe akũ a lɛmɛ, fudima táto Ɔlɛga a sɛkɛ̃, mbom katinya kamɛ futo.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Katinya mɔ ke kamɛ fɔtsa a kĩ fɔakɔ oti odo aatɛ̃, lɛmɛ oti a kĩ yakɛna nɛ Baguma kawɛ akũ a, aadzi nkpã daa. Midã Kadã Wĩ Nɛ Kristo Bakesĩnɛ a Akũ.

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: Yĩ babi, katinya kawũna a fuã! Ndɛ ayekĩ minu kĩ Kristo okesĩnɛ a aaya a, finyaakĩĩ malo Kristo bakesĩnɛ pii nɛ́ kɔkɔɛ, nɛ foesũ bunyina kĩ katinya kawũna a fuã.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ ni, boe kamɛ bati kĩĩ nɛ́ bito, lɛmɛ bɛláa boe kamɛ. Kitonɛkĩ ntɛ boe kamɛ bideĩ ni, kufɛ bibuki bideĩ nɛ boe kamɛ. Lɛmɛ bɛdzakũ ayekĩ fɔ́anɛ fɔwa pefee kĩ be kamɛ odima lɛnyɛ́ boe ode.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ Kristo kɔa Hũhũ Kpalɛwa eko nɛ mi akũ, ade mi flee minyi ɔnɔkɔali a.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Nnɛ́ kĩ minyína ɔnɔkɔali a sũ mɔ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli kĩĩ, mbom ayekĩ minyina ɔnɔkɔali a, ade minyina lɛmɛ kĩ fɔvã lɛláa ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ sũ.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Foesũ owei koũ nyɛ ɔvãlɛvã a? Ade ye nyɛ oti a kĩ yalɛ kĩ nnɛ́ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a. Ade oti kĩĩ odu liti ɛnyɛ Kristo okesĩnɛ a kĩ esĩ Ɔlɛga a mɔ Obi a flee a.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ esĩ Obi a ni, Ɔlɛga a lɛnyɛ́ ye ode. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Obi ni, Ɔlɛga a nyɛ ye ode.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ minu kito kayɔkayi a fɔna nɛ mi tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Ntɛ mipi fɔlɛtsa a kĩ minu a midomɔ akũ ni, míapuli mina nɛ ɔmɔa kakɛna kamɛ mɔ Obi a mɔ Ɔlɛga a.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Ade bati a kĩ bawɛ kĩ bakɛ mi a akũ fɔlɛtsa nlamɛna katsɛlɛ kama mi a.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi kɔ̃ kugua a kĩ Kristo tsɛla mi buki kudeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, foesũ fɔtásĩ kĩ odima abuki ɛtsa mi fɔtsa. Kitonɛkĩ ye kugua katsɛla a atsa mi lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa, ade fɔtsa a kĩ kɔatsa a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ fɔvã lɛláa foe kamɛ. Foesũ mikɛna nɛ ye fɔtsa katsa a akũ lɔkɔa mina nɛ Kristo kamɛ.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Foesũ finyaa, yĩ babi, midzi nɛ Kristo kamɛ, ayekĩ ntɛ ɛyanɛ ɛta nɛ Luwi akũ ni, bɔ́ado ɔwɔlɛ, kĩ kɔnyɔã lɛmɛ lɛláakɔ boe nɛ ye anɛ.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Ntɛ minyina kĩ Kristo nyɛ oti kpĩĩ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ mitɛ mido kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna fɔtsa wĩ ni, Baguma obi yanɛ.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Midã ɔdɔ a odu kĩ Ɔlɛga a deĩ ɛkpa boe! Yawɛ boe kalɛ paa kĩ bavɛ boe Baguma babi. Ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ kĩ ye babi bɔanɛ lɛmɛ. Lɛtsa a sũ kĩ katinya kamɛ bati linyína boe nyɛ kĩ bɛtányi Baguma.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, finyaa Baguma babi bɔanɛ. Bɛtányɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de bɔ́adani bɔkɛna a bɛtsa boe tɔ̃, lɛmɛ bunyina kĩ ntɛ Kristo ya ni, bɔ́ana ndɛ ye aye, kitonɛkĩ bɔ́amɔ ye ndɛ ayekĩ eti ɛla a.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ kɔnɛte kĩĩ nɛ Kristo akũ ni, yakpalɛ ye akũ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo nyɛ oti kpalɛwa a.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, efum Baguma mbla a, kitonɛkĩ tɔkpa nyɛ Baguma mbla kafum.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ minyina kĩ kaya Kristo ya kĩ yayaalɔ boe tɔkpa ɛnamɛna, ade nɛ ye kamɛ ni, tɔkpa tidima lɛláa.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛkɛna ɔmɔa mɔ Kristo ni, yaádzi kakɛna tɔkpa, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ edzi yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛtámɔ tɔ̃ ye ĩye ɛtányi tɔ̃ ye.

english_verse: Children, don't be fooled. Anyone who does right is good, just like Christ himself.
translation_verse: Yĩ babi, mitafɔ̃ odima lɛkɛ mi! Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ ni, ɛnyɛ oti kpĩĩ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo lɛmɛ nyɛ oti kpĩĩ a.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, Abonsam ode yanɛ, kitonɛkĩ Abonsam kɛna tɔkpa kito anɛ kayɔkayi a. Lɛtsa a sũ kĩ Baguma Obi a ya nɛ katinya kamɛ nyɛ kĩ yayaawɔla Abonsam fɔkɛlatsa a flee.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma obi ni, yaádzi kakɛna tɔkpa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kutidu a deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ. Ɛláapuli edzi ɛkakɛna tɔkpa kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ye Ɔlɛga.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Ntsitsemu a kĩ edeĩ nɛ Baguma babi mɔ Abonsam babi kayite nyɛ kĩ, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaákɛna fɔtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ ĩye yaáwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kalɛ ni, ɛnyɛ́ Baguma obi. Miwɛ Akũ Kalɛ.

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Ɔlɛdo a kĩ minu kito anɛ kayɔkayi a nyɛ kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔawɛ akũ kalɛ.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Mitana ndɛ Kain aye kĩ ɛnya oti kpa a ode, ɛkɔ ye mɔawɛ ɔwaɛ̃ Abel a. Litsa sũ Kain kɔ ye? Ɛkɔ ye kitonɛkĩ ye mɔawɛ a ɛkɛna tɔkpa lɛmɛ ɔwaɛ̃ kɔ̃ kɛna fɔtsa nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Foesũ, nwaɛ̃ amɛ, fɔtakɛna mi saa kĩ katinya kamɛ bati akesĩ mi.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Boe kɔ̃ bunyina kĩ bɔtsã wuda kamɛ buwo nɛ nkpã kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ bɔawɛ akũ kalɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ oti kalɛ ni, ɛkahɔ nɛ wuda kamɛ.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, owudini yanɛ, ade minyina kĩ nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a lɛláa owudini odima kamɛ a.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Ade limii bɔ́anyi ayekĩ ɔdɔ la a. Kristo kɔa ye nkpã ɛbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe lɔlɔ, foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ boe malo bɔkɔa boe nkpã bɔbɔa afɔliɛ nɛ boe bawaɛ̃ lɔlɔ.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi deĩ akũ fɔtsa mɔ ɛmɔ́ ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ kisĩ ye lɛmɛ fɔtákɔ ye kɔnya kĩ yabumɔ ɔwaɛ̃ a ni, nde yaapuli ɛlɛ nɛ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kĩ yawɛ Baguma kalɛ?

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: Yĩ babi, mitafɔ̃ bɔkɔa fɔlɛtsa mɔ kɔdzɛla kalɛ pupulidza bɔwɛ oti kalɛ, mbom mifɔ̃ boe oti kawɛ kɛna nɛ boe fɔkɛlatsa mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ. Bɔ́apuli Budo Ɔwɔlɛ Nɛ Baguma Anɛ.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Fɔtsɛ̃ fukĩĩ akũ bunyina kĩ bɔnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a bade, ade bɔ́apuli budo ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ a.

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: Ntɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ kɔ boe kɔtɔ malo ni, bunyina kĩ Baguma bɛ̃ boe tɔwɔlɛ ade enyina lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Yĩ bawaɛ̃ kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, ntɛ boe tɔwɔlɛ lákɔ boe kɔtɔ ni, kekɔ̃ bunyina kĩ bɔ́ado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Baguma anɛ,

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: lɔkɔa bɔtɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ buvia a butomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ bɔakɛna nɛ ye mbla akũ, ade bɔakɛna fɔtsa fɔawo ye anɛ a.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: Ye mbla a nyɛ kĩ bɔtɛ ye Obi Yesu Kristo budo, lɔkɔa bɔwɛ akũ kalɛ ndɛ ayekĩ Kristo wɛ etomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ a.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna nɛ Baguma mbla akũ a, edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ, ade Baguma lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a. Hũhũ a kĩ Baguma kpa boe sũ ni, bunyina kĩ edeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mitatɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yalɛ kĩ Baguma Hũhũ deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ mido, mbom misɔ ye midã ntɛ hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a to Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Kitonɛkĩ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ pii nɛ bɛtsɛ̃ bamini nɛ katinya kamɛ.

english_verse: and you can know which ones come from God. His Spirit says that Jesus Christ had a truly human body.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ míakɔa minyi ntɛ Hũhũ a to Baguma sɛkɛ̃ a. Hũhũ adi nyɛ adi kĩ yalɛ kĩ Yesu Kristo ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ otidziwa aye ni, eto Baguma sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ hũhũ adi nyɛ adi kĩ yaádi Yesu akũ adansiɛ ni, ɛtáto Baguma sɛkɛ̃. Ade ekĩĩ nyɛ Kristo okesĩnɛ hũhũ a kĩ minu kĩ yaaya a, ade finyaakĩĩ malo ɛya edeĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ kɔkɔɛ.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ yĩ babi, Baguma bade mianɛ, ade minya fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a akũ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ mi kamɛ a bɛ̃ hũhũ a kĩ edeĩ nɛ katinya kamɛ bati kamɛ a.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ katinya kamɛ bati banɛ sũ ni, fɔvã onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a alɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ katinya kamɛ fɔtsa odi akũ, ade katinya kamɛ bati a atse be ɔlɛdo a.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ boe kɔ̃ ni, Baguma bade bɔanɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyina Baguma ni, yatse boe ɔlɛdo, lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ́ Baguma ode ni, yaátse boe. Foesũ fukĩĩ bɔ́akɔa bɔmɔ́ ɔnɔkɔali Hũhũ mɔ fɔvã hũhũ. Baguma Nyɛ Ɔdɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, mifɔ̃ bɔwɛ akũ kalɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ ɔdɔ to. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ bati kalɛ ni, Baguma obi yanɛ ade enyina Baguma a.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ bati kalɛ ni, enyína Baguma kitonɛkĩ Baguma nyɛ ɔdɔ.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Ayekĩ Baguma nyɛ ye ɔdɔ ɛtsa boe nyɛ kĩ edo ye Obi mɔapɛ nɛ katinya kamɛ, fɔtsɛ̃ ye akũ ni, bɔna nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ kamɛ bunyi lɛtsa a kĩ liti lɛnyɛ ɔdɔ a. Nnɛ́ ayekĩ bɔwɛ Baguma kalɛ, mbom ayekĩ Baguma wɛ boe kalɛ, edo ye Obi kĩ ɛnya oti kĩ yaatsã ye akũ ɛkɔa boe tɔkpa ete boe.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, ntɛ aye Baguma wɛ boe kalɛ kɔ̃ ni, kɛfɛta kĩ boe malo bɔawɛ akũ akũ kalɛ.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Odima támɔ tɔ̃ Baguma. Lɛmɛ ntɛ bɔawɛ akũ akũ kalɛ ni, kekɔ̃ Baguma deĩ nɛ boe kamɛ, ade ɛkɛna ye ɔdɔ a ɛkpɔla nɛ boe kamɛ a.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Bɔtɛ budo kĩ budeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ, ade ye malo edeĩ nɛ boe kamɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔa ye mɔawɛ Hũhũ ɛkpa boe.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Bɔmɔ́ fukĩĩ ade bude lɛtsã nɛ foe akũ bɔkpa bati kĩ Ɔlɛga a do ye Obi kĩ ɛyaanya katinya kamɛ Ɔtɛnɛ.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ebinya ye kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ Yesu nyɛ Baguma Obi ni, Baguma deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ ade ke ye malo edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ a.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Boe mɔawɛ a bunyina ade bɔtɛ Baguma ɔdɔ a kĩ edeĩ ɛkpa boe a budo a. Baguma nyɛ ɔdɔ, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ bati kalɛ ni, edeĩ nɛ Baguma kamɛ ade Baguma lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: If we truly love others and live as Christ did in this world, we won't be worried about the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Ade fukĩĩ kamɛ ɔdɔ a aakpɔla nɛ boe kamɛ ayekĩ bɔ́ado ɔwɔlɛ nɛ Kadzɛ Luwi a akũ, kitonɛkĩ boe nkpã kadzi kamɛ nɛ katinya kĩĩ kamɛ ketimɔ Kristo ade a.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Libe lɛláa ɔdɔ kamɛ, mbom ɔdɔ a kĩ ɛkpɔla a, ablɔmɛna libe nɛ bati kamɛ. Nɛ foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yavila ni, ye ɔdɔ tákpɔla kitonɛkĩ libe mɔ sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ tsɛ̃.

english_verse: We love because God loved us first.
translation_verse: Bɔawɛ Baguma kalɛ kitonɛkĩ ye lɛnya lɔtɔ ɛwɛ boe kalɛ.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi lɛ kĩ, “Mawɛ Baguma kalɛ” lɛmɛ yakesĩ ɔwaɛ̃ ni, ɔvãlɛvã yanɛ. Kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yaáwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ a kĩ yamɔ mɔ anɛ kalɛ a, lɛláapuli ɛwɛ Baguma kĩ yaámɔ mɔ anɛ a kalɛ.

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Mbla a kĩ Kristo kpa boe nyɛ kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ Baguma kalɛ ni, ɛwɛ ɔwaɛ̃ lɛmɛ kalɛ.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ edo kĩ Yesu nyɛ Kristo a ni, Baguma obi yanɛ. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ obilɛga kalɛ ni, yawɛ ye obi lɛmɛ kalɛ.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ bɔawɛ Baguma kalɛ mɔ bɔakɛna nɛ ye mbla akũ ni, kekɔ̃ bunyina kĩ bɔawɛ Baguma babi lɛmɛ kalɛ.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bɔkɛna nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ ni, fɔatsa kĩ bɔawɛ ye kalɛ. Baguma mbla akũ kakɛna lɛlá ɔsĩ ɛkpa boe,

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma obi anya katinya kamɛ akũ. Lɛtsa a kĩ bɔkɔa bɔnya katinya akũ nyɛ boe katɛkado.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Owei aapuli ɛnya katinya akũ kɛba oti a kĩ ɛtɛ edo kĩ Yesu nyɛ Baguma Obi a? Adansiɛ Kadi Nɛ Yesu Kristo Akũ.

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: Yesu Kristo nyɛ oti kĩ ɛtsã mui mɔ babɔanɛ kamɛ ɛya nɛ katinya kamɛ. Ɛtáya nɛ mui odi kamɛ mbom ɛya nɛ mui mɔ babɔanɛ kamɛ. Ade Baguma Hũhũ a mɔawɛ adi adansiɛ kĩ ɔnɔkɔali fɔanɛ, kitonɛkĩ Hũhũ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a.

english_verse: They are the Spirit, the water, and the blood, and they all agree.
translation_verse: Ade be nyɛ Hũhũ a, mui a mɔ babɔanɛ a. Be ɛlalɛ a flee alɛ onukpɛ̃ mɔa.

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Bɔtɛ otidziwa adansiɛ kadi a budo, lɛmɛ Baguma adansiɛ kadi a deĩ kɔbɛ̃ kɛbɛ̃, kitonɛkĩ ye lidi adansiɛ nɛ ye Obi akũ.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Foesũ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtɛ Baguma Obi a edo ni, adansiɛ kadi kĩĩ deĩ nɛ ye ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtátɛ Baguma edo ni, ɛfɔ̃ Baguma dani ɔvãlɛvã, kitonɛkĩ ɛtátɛ adansiɛ a kĩ Baguma di nɛ ye Obi akũ a edo.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Adansiɛ kadi a nyɛ kĩ, Baguma kpa boe nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a, ade nkpã kĩĩ lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ ye Obi kamɛ a.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ edeĩ Baguma Obi a ni, edeĩ nkpã kĩĩ. Ade aye odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛlá Obi a ni, ɛlá nkpã kĩĩ. Nkpã Kĩ Ɛlá Kawũna.

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ mama mi a kĩ mitɛ Baguma Obi a mido, ayekĩ míanyi kĩ mideĩ nkpã kĩ ɛla kawũna a.

english_verse: We are certain God will hear our prayers when we ask for what pleases him.
translation_verse: Budeĩ ɔwɔlɛ kado nɛ Baguma anɛ kitonɛkĩ ntɛ buvia ye lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ ye kawɛ onukpɛ̃ ni, yatse boe.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Ntɛ bunyina kĩ yatse lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔavia ye ni, kekɔ̃ bunyina lɛmɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɔavia ni, bɔatɛ katomɛna ye sɛkɛ̃.

english_verse: Suppose you see one of our people commit a sin that isn't a deadly sin. You can pray, and this person will be given eternal life. But the sin must not be one that is deadly.
translation_verse: Ntɛ odi mɔ ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa kĩ tɛláakpã ye tɛnamɛna wuda kamɛ ni, kɛnɛ kĩ yabɔa mpaɛ ɛkpa Baguma lɔkɔa yaakpa ye nkpã. Bati a kĩ bakɛna tɔkpa a kĩ taávɛlɛ wuda kayamɛna a fɔlɛtsa malɛ. Lɛmɛ tɔkpa tidi deĩ kĩ takpã oti kanamɛna wuda kamɛ, nlámɛna kalɛ kĩ mibɔa mpaɛ mikpa Baguma nɛ te akũ.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Lɛkɛnana kpa lidi nyɛ lidi nyɛ tɔkpa, lɛmɛ tɔkpa tidi deĩ kĩ taánamɛna oti wuda kamɛ.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Bunyina kĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ Baguma obi ládzi kakɛna tɔkpa, kitonɛkĩ Baguma Obi a adãmɛna ye akũ, ade Okesĩnɛ a lɛláapuli ɛkɛna ye ablɔ adima a.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Bunyina kĩ Baguma bade bɔanɛ, ade katinya kamɛ flee lɛmɛ deĩ nɛ Okesĩnɛ a kɔbɛ̃ kayɔ.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Bunyina kĩ Baguma Obi a ya, ade ɛkpa boe fɔlɛtsa kayɔkanu ayekĩ bɔ́anyi Baguma a kĩ ɛnyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. Budzi nkpã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali Baguma a kamɛ, budzi nkpã nɛ Obi Yesu Kristo lɛmɛ kamɛ. Ade ye nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali Baguma mɔ nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.

english_verse: Children, you must stay away from idols.
translation_verse: Yĩ babi, mivɛlɛ mi akũ nɛ baviɔ̃ ɔwɛ̃.

english_verse: From the church leader. To a very special woman and her children. I truly love all of you, and so does everyone else who knows the truth.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna boe Ɔma a kĩ Baguma pau, mɔ ye babi a kĩ mawɛ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ a. Nnɛ́ yĩ odi awɛ mi kalɛ mbom bati a kĩ binyina ɔnɔkɔali a flee lɛmɛ,

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ ɔnɔkɔali a deĩ nɛ boe kamɛ ade yaana nɛ boe kamɛ daa a.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: Baguma boe Ɔlɛga mɔ Yesu Kristo, kĩ ɛnyɛ Ɔlɛga a Obi a bɛmɔ boe kɔnya, bɛkɛna boe sɛmɛ kalɛ, bɛkpa boe lukudɔ lɛmɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali mɔ ɔdɔ kamɛ. Midzi Nɛ Ɔnɔkɔali Mɔ Ɔdɔ Kamɛ.

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Kawɔlɛ de yĩ paa kĩ mmɔ́ nɔ babi badi kĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a kamɛ, ndɛ ayekĩ Ɔlɛga a wɛ etomɛna boe sɛkɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ, boe Ɔma, ntsɛlɛ ovoli kĩĩ makpa mi kĩ bɔwɛ akũ akũ kalɛ. Nnɛ́ mbla vɔɛ̃ yanɛ ntsɛlɛ mama mi, mbom mbla a kĩ bɔtɛ kito anɛ kayɔkayi a yanɛ.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Bati bakɛnɛ pii gba bɛtsɛ̃ nɛ katinya kamɛ, bati kĩ baálɛ kĩ Yesu Kristo ya nɛ katinya kamɛ ndɛ otidziwa aye. Oti a na odu nyɛ bati ɔkɛnɛ mɔ Kristo okesĩnɛ.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Foesũ midã kadã wĩ kĩ miláayɛla lɛtsa a kĩ mipili mina a, mbom kĩ míana mi kɔtɔkase lodo.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛtápi Kristo fɔtsa katsa edomɔ akũ mɔ ɛtsa fɔtsa bɛbã ni, Baguma lɛláa ye kamɛ. Lɛmɛ odi nyɛ odi kĩ epi foe edomɔ akũ ni, Ɔlɛga mɔ Obi a flee deĩ nɛ ye kamɛ.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ntɛ odi ya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃ mɔ ɛtákɔa fɔtsa katsa kĩĩ ɛyamɛna ni, mitatɛ ye nɛ mi tɔtɔ kamɛ. Mitatunɔ ye kawɔ̃na titau malo,

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: kitonɛkĩ odi nyɛ odi kĩ etunɔ ye kawɔ̃na a, na tsɛfã nɛ ye tɔkpa a kĩ ɛkɛna a kamɛ. Yohanes Fɔlɛtsa Nkaɛ.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kufɛ kĩ maatsɛlɛ mma mi, lɛmɛ ntáwɛ kĩ mate foe nɛ ovoli akũ. Nɛ foe kadokɔ̃ ni, madã anɛ kĩ yĩ mɔawɛ maaya nɛ mi sɛkɛ̃, bɔlɔmɛna anɛ mɔ anɛ, ayekĩ boe flee kawɔlɛkamɔ a aakpɔla.

english_verse: Greetings from the children of your very special sister.
translation_verse: Awaɛ̃tsole a kĩ Baguma pau a babi awɔ̃na mi.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, asɔli lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna Gayo kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, kĩ mawɛ kalɛ nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ lɛmɛ.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: Yĩ ɔkɔba kĩ maátunɔ nɔ kalɛ, mabɔa mpaɛ kĩ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa lɛlɛ lɛkpa nɔ, kana akũ ɔsĩ lɛmɛ. Matɛ kado kĩ nɔ hũhũ lɛmɛ deĩ kadeĩ wĩ.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Mmɔ́ kawɔlɛ paa kĩ boe bakɔba batɛ badonɛ badi yabi yĩ ayekĩ opini ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a ndɛ ayekĩ opi ke kɔkɔɛ a.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Kĩ nnu kĩ yĩ babi dzi nkpã nɛ ɔnɔkɔali a onukpɛ̃ a, mmɔ́ kawɔlɛ paa. Batɛ Badonɛ a Mu Gayo.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: Yĩ ɔkɔba kĩ maátunɔ nɔ kalɛ, adi ɔnɔkɔali paa nɛ adzuma a kĩ akɛna a kamɛ kakpa nɔ bakɔba batɛ badonɛ, titiliwu banɔvɔɛ̃.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Bɛyabɔa asɔli bati a amaniɛ nɛ ɔdɔ a kĩ odeĩ ɔkpa be a akũ. Make nɔ aduli kĩ bumɔ be ndɛ ayekĩ fɔtɛta nɛ Baguma adzuma kakɛna kamɛ, lɔkɔa bɛnaa lɔtɔ nɛ be osi katsã kamɛ.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Kristo adzuma sũ bipi osi ade bɛtátɛ kabumɛna kadima bitomɛna amamufɔ a sɛkɛ̃ a.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Foesũ kɛnɛ kĩ bɔabumɛna bati kĩĩ odu ayekĩ bɔ́anyɛ bɔtsa kĩ bɔmɔ́ be flee bɔnyɛ bakɔba nɛ adzuma kakɛna kamɛ bɔkpa ɔnɔkɔali a. Yohanes Lɛ Kalɛ Nɛ Diotrefo Mɔ Demetrio Akũ.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Ntsɛlɛ ovoli lukũ mmɛna asɔli bati a, lɛmɛ Diotrefo kĩ ɛbɔɛ ye akũ ndɛ lɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ aye, tábu yĩ edo nɛ lɛtsama kamɛ.

english_verse: So if I come, I will remind him of how he has been attacking us with gossip. Not only has he been doing this, but he refuses to welcome any of the Lord's followers who come by. And when other church members want to welcome them, he puts them out of the church.
translation_verse: Foesũ ntɛ ĩya ni, maavɛlɛ mi adzuni nnamɛna lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ ɛkɛna akũ. Maalɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ yalɛ nɛ boe akũ mɔ fɔvã a kĩ yama a! Nnɛ́ foe odi. Esĩ kĩ yaátɛ Kristofɔ a kĩ bayaa nɛ awã a, ade yasua bikĩ bawɛ kĩ batɛ be a osi malo a. Yabɔa mbɔdi kĩ yablɔmɛna bati a nɛ asɔli a kamɛ.

english_verse: Dear friend, don't imitate the evil deeds of others, but follow the example of people who do kind deeds. They are God's children, but those who are always doing evil have never seen God.
translation_verse: Yĩ ɔkɔba kĩ maátunɔ nɔ kalɛ, tatomɔ tɔkpa liti, mbom tomɛna fɔtsa wĩ liti. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ ni, Baguma ode yanɛ. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛtámɔ Baguma eyi ɔsũ.

english_verse: Everyone speaks well of Demetrius, and so does the true message that he teaches. I also speak well of him, and you know what I say is true. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi abɔa Demetrio dĩ wĩ. Ye ɔbla alɛ kalɛ wĩ nɛ ye akũ. Boe malo bɔadi adansiɛ nɛ ye akũ, ade minyina kĩ lɛtsa a kĩ bɔalɛ a nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali a. Yohanes Kawɔ̃na Nkaɛ.

english_verse: I have much more to say to you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink.
translation_verse: Ndeĩ fɔlɛtsa pii kĩ mawɛ kĩ mabi nɔ, lɛmɛ nláakɔa fɔtsa katsɛlɛ otse mɔ katsɛlɛ mui ntsɛlɛ foe.

english_verse: I hope to see you soon, and then we can talk in person.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ matɛ kado kĩ owi lɛláabuna mɔ maamɔ nɔ, lɔkɔa bɔ́alɔmɛna nɛ foe akũ anɛ mɔ anɛ.

english_verse: I pray that God will bless you with peace! Your friends send their greetings. Please give a personal greeting to each of our friends.
translation_verse: Lukudɔ lɛna mɔ nɔ. Nɔ bakɔba flee nɛ awĩ awɔ̃na nɔ. Wɔ̃na boe bakɔba a ɔmɔa ɔmɔa nɛ awã kakpa boe.

english_verse: From Jude, a servant of Jesus Christ and the brother of James. To all who are chosen and loved by God the Father and are kept safe by Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ to yĩ, Yuda, Yesu Kristo ɔsumunɛ a kĩ ĩnyɛ Yakobo ɔwaɛ̃ a sɛkɛ̃. Ntsɛlɛ ye mamɛna bati a kĩ Baguma vɛ, kĩ Baguma boe Ɔlɛga awɛ be kalɛ, ade yadãmɛna be akũ kayi Yesu Kristo a.

english_verse: I pray that God will greatly bless you with mercy, peace, and love! False Teachers
translation_verse: Baguma kɔnyakamɔ, ye lukudɔ mɔ ye ɔdɔ ɛpɔ nɛ mi akũ ebu. Lubo a Kĩ Fɔvã Fɔtsa Batsanɛ Aayamɔ.

english_verse: My dear friends, I really wanted to write you about God's saving power at work in our lives. But instead, I must write and ask you to defend the faith that God has once for all given to his people.
translation_verse: Yĩ bakɔba kĩ maátunɔ kalɛ, titɔ kĩ mbɔa mbɔdi kĩ matsɛlɛ mi ovoli nɛ ayekĩ Baguma kpa boe flee nkpã a akũ malo ni, finyaa fɔyasĩ mɔ ɔsĩ kĩ ntsɛlɛ mi ovoli mɔatsɛ nkɔa ndo mi kɔbɛ̃ mipuli mipili katɛkado osi a. Ade katɛkado kĩĩ Baguma kɔa ɛkpa ye bati a deedimɔapɛ a.

english_verse: Some godless people have sneaked in among us and are saying, “God treats us much better than we deserve, and so it is all right to be immoral.” They even deny we must obey Jesus Christ as our only Master and Lord. But long ago the Scriptures warned that these godless people were doomed.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ bati kĩ baávila Baguma badi bɛla pɛtɛɛ biwo nɛ mi kamɛ nɛ mi katanyi kamɛ. Bɛdani boe ɔlɛdo a kĩ bɔtɛ nɛ ayekĩ Baguma amɔ oti kɔnya akũ a, batsa fɔtsa bɛbã kĩ fɔkpa be osi bɛbɔa ɔbla kpa. Bisĩ boe Lɛgãnɔkɔɛ̃ mɔapɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo. Katsɛlɛ Kpalɛwa a lɛ eyi anɛ titiiti kĩ Baguma aakɔ be kɔtɔ lɔmɔ.

english_verse: Don't forget what happened to those people the Lord rescued from Egypt. Some of them did not have faith, and he later destroyed them.
translation_verse: Titɔ kĩ minyina fukĩĩ flee kɔkɔɛ malo ni, mawɛ kĩ makai mi kĩ boe Ɔlate a nyɛ Israelfɔ etomɛna Egiptefɔ tite akũ, lɛmɛ ke liti a, ɛwɔla bikĩ bɛtátɛ ye bido a.

english_verse: You also know about the angels who didn't do their work and left their proper places. God chained them with everlasting chains and is now keeping them in dark pits until the great day of judgment.
translation_verse: Mite anɛ kĩ Baguma ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛtákɛna nɛ otumi a kĩ bɛkpa be a akũ kakɛna wĩ, mbom bɛdzakũ nɛ be mɔawɛ fudzikɔ̃ a, Baguma do be nɛ nkɔsɔnkɔsɔ kamɛ daa nɛ ɔtũ kpli kamɛ, kĩ bɛna nɛ awã kɛnaawo Luwi Kpale a kĩ yaadzɛmɔ be ɛkɔ be kɔtɔ.

english_verse: We should also be warned by what happened to the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah and the nearby towns. Their people became immoral and committed all sorts of sexual sins. Then God made an example of them and punished them with eternal fire.
translation_verse: Ade ayea Sodom mɔ Gomora mɔ tɛmatɔ a kĩ tifuã te a, bati kɔa be akũ bɛkpa adɔpaa mɔ ɔbla kpa mɔ ɔsĩ mɔ ɔsĩ a. Baguma kɔa be edo nɛ fi kĩ fɔádĩ da kamɛ kĩ fɔnya nfantuhũ fɔkpa bati flee.

english_verse: The people I am talking about are behaving just like those dreamers who destroyed their own bodies. They reject all authority and insult angels.
translation_verse: Ade ayea fɔda bawanɛ kĩĩ akɛna tɔkpa nɛ be mɔawɛ sukɛna akũ malo a. Baábu Baguma otumi a kĩ yanya be akũ a, ade balɛ tuwuli kpa nɛ ode fɔtsa a kĩ obu deĩ nɛ foe akũ a akũ.

english_verse: Even Michael, the chief angel, didn't dare to insult the devil, when the two of them were arguing about the body of Moses. All Michael said was, “The Lord will punish you!”
translation_verse: Baguma Ode Fɔtɔ Ɔnyanɛnɔkɔɛ̃ Flee Mikael malo tákɛna fukĩĩ odu. Kĩ ye mɔ Abonsam bɛvɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ be kamɛ oti a kĩ ye aabɔɛ Mose ɔnɔkpa akũ malo ni, ɛtádo ɔwɔlɛ ɛlɛ tuwuli kpa ɛkɔ Abonsam kɔtɔ, mbom ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɔlate a ɛkã nɔ anɛ.”

english_verse: But these people insult powers they don't know anything about. They are like senseless animals that end up getting destroyed, because they live only by their feelings.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ bati kĩĩ alɛ fuvũnatsa nɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa kĩ bɛtánu de kayɔ a akũ, ade fɔtsa a kĩ binyina bitomɛna be kabɔa kamɛ ndɛ ayekĩ tuwĩ kamɛ bayaɛ kĩ bɛlá adzuni a malo nyina a, ade foe mɔapɛ a awɔla be a.

english_verse: Now they are in for real trouble. They have followed Cain's example and have made the same mistake that Balaam did by caring only for money. They have also rebelled against God, just as Korah did. Because of all this, they will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Bɔbɔɛ makpa be! Bɛtsã osi a kĩ Kain tsã a. Nɛ sika a kĩ baana sũ ni, bɛkɔa be akũ bido nɛ tɔkpa a kĩ Balam kɛna a kamɛ. Biyidza bɛdza nɛ Baguma mbla a akũ ndɛ Kora aye, ade ke bɛwɔla be ndɛ ye aye a.

english_verse: These people are filthy minded, and by their shameful and selfish actions they spoil the meals you eat together. They are like clouds blown along by the wind, but never bringing any rain. They are like leafless trees, uprooted and dead, and unable to produce fruit.
translation_verse: Ntɛ mikpɔta mianya boe Ɔlate ɔdɔ funitsã a, bati kĩĩ nyɛ efĩĩ nɛ mi kamɛ, awã kĩ baányɔã kanya mɔ kamɔa kpafũũ nɛ Baguma anɛ. Be odi akũ badãmɛna. Bɛla ndɛ luflututu kĩ oni lɛláa de kamɛ, kĩ ɔwɛ abɔa de katɛ̃mɛna. Bɛla ndɛ futse kĩ fɔáwũ babi nɛ kawũ lɔkɔ, ndɛ futse kĩ bɛbɔlɛ mɔ tunu fuku, fuku fubuli.

english_verse: Their shameful deeds show up like foam on wild ocean waves. They are like wandering stars forever doomed to the darkest pits of hell.
translation_verse: Bɛla ndɛ mpo mui kĩ ɔwɛ mɔ ɔsĩ abɔa be bafũ kanyɛ be fɔnyɔãtsa katsa ndɛ mui anɛ kuvũ aye. Bɛla ndɛ fusibii kĩ fɔato katɛ̃, bati kĩ Baguma manɛ kadzikɔ̃ ɛkpa be nɛ ɔtũ kpli kamɛ, awã kĩ baana daa.

english_verse: Enoch was the seventh person after Adam, and he was talking about these people when he said: Look! The Lord is coming with thousands and thousands of holy angels
translation_verse: Ade bati kĩĩ akũ Henok kĩ ɛnyɛ Adam kasinu kavũkɔnɔde a oti lɛ eyi kɔkɔɔkɔɛ kĩ, “Ɔlate a mɔ ye ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ kpalɛwa mpim mpim aya,

english_verse: to judge everyone. He will punish all those ungodly people for all the evil things they have done. The Lord will surely punish those ungodly sinners for every evil thing they have ever said about him.
translation_verse: ɛyaadzɛmɔ katinya kamɛ bati flee. Yaakɔ bati a kĩ baávila Baguma a kɔtɔ nɛ fɔtsa kpa a kĩ bɛkɛna, mɔ tuwuli kpa a kĩ bɛlɛ nɛ ye akũ a sũ.”

english_verse: These people grumble and complain and live by their own selfish desires. They brag about themselves and flatter others to get what they want. More Warnings
translation_verse: Bati kĩĩ akɛna hũhũhũhũ daa, kanyɛ nfumusu kakpa bati bɛbã. Batomɛna be mɔawɛ fɔwɛtsa kpa liti, bapia akũ, ade bakɛ bati mɔ sɛmɛ mɛnɛmɛnɛ ayekĩ baana lɛtsa a kĩ de bawɛ a. Osi Kasua Mɔ Kɔdɛ Kakpa.

english_verse: My dear friends, remember the warning you were given by the apostles of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi yĩ bakɔba, mite anɛ nɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo fɔtɔ banyanɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ lɛyatɛ̃ kamɛ a akũ.

english_verse: They told you that near the end of time, selfish and godless people would start making fun of God.
translation_verse: Bibi mi kĩ, “Nɛ fuwi nkaɛ a kamɛ ni, bati aanɛ, bidi mi nsekuo, bitomɛna be sukɛna fɔwɛtsa kĩ fɔakɔ odo liti nɛ Baguma katavila kamɛ.”

english_verse: And now these people are already making you turn against each other. They think only about this life, and they don't have God's Spirit.
translation_verse: Ade be nyɛ bati kĩ basɛ̃ bati kamɛ a, bati kĩ katinya kamɛ fɔwɛtsa nya be akũ, mɔ bati kĩ Hũhũ a lɛláa be kamɛ.

english_verse: Dear friends, keep building on the foundation of your most holy faith, as the Holy Spirit helps you to pray.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ mi yĩ bakɔba, mi kɔ̃ ni, mikaabo anɛ nɛ mi katɛkado kĩ kɛnyɛ mi fɔtsa kpalɛwa a kamɛ, lɔkɔa mibɔa mpaɛ nɛ Hũhũ Kpalɛwa a kɔbɛ̃ kamɛ.

english_verse: And keep in step with God's love, as you wait for our Lord Jesus Christ to show how kind he is by giving you eternal life.
translation_verse: Mikɔla mi akũ nɛ Baguma ɔdɔ kamɛ, nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ miadzɔlɛ boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo kɔnyakamɔ a kĩ kɔayakpa mi nkpã kĩ ɛlá kawũna a.

english_verse: Be helpful to all who may have doubts.
translation_verse: Mimɔ́ be kamɛ bikĩ bɛtásipi nɛ katɛkado kamɛ a kɔnya.

english_verse: Rescue any who need to be saved, as you would rescue someone from a fire. Then with fear in your own hearts, have mercy on everyone who needs it. But hate even the clothes of those who have been made dirty by their filthy deeds. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Bati bɛbã a kĩ banaa fi kamɛ a ni, miwãnɛ be minyɛ, mitɛ be nkpã. Mimɔ́ bati bɛbã kɔnya lɛmɛ mivila be, lɔkɔa mikesĩ be fɔkɛlatsa ndɛ ayekĩ míawɛ̃ sukɛna tɛtadiɛ kpitii a. Kɔlɛkanyɛ Mpaɛbɔ.

english_verse: Offer praise to God our Savior because of our Lord Jesus Christ! Only God can keep you from falling and make you pure and joyful in his glorious presence. Before time began and now and forever, God is worthy of glory, honor, power, and authority. Amen.
translation_verse: Baguma odi keĩ kĩ ɛtsã boe Ɔlate Yesu Kristo akũ ɛkɛna ye boe Ɔtɛnɛ a, ade ye mɔ obu, kamu, kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi nyɛ ye fude a, kito anɛ kɔkɔɛ, mɔ finyaa kanaa daa. Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: This is what God showed to Jesus Christ, so that he could tell his servants what must happen soon. Christ then sent his angel with the message to his servant John.
translation_verse: Ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa nyɛ Yesu Kristo kanyɛ katsa a kĩ Baguma kpa ye, kĩ ɛnyɛ ɛtsa ye basumunɛ nɛ fɔtsa a kĩ kɛnɛ kĩ fɔya nɛ lɔkɔ lukũ kamɛ a akũ. Kristo tsã ye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ akũ ɛfɔ̃ ye ɔsumunɛ Yohanes nyi fɔtsa kĩĩ flee.

english_verse: And John told everything he had seen about God's message and about what Jesus Christ had said and done.
translation_verse: Yohanes lɛmɛ lɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ ɛmɔ a flee. Edi adansiɛ nɛ Baguma kalɛ a mɔ ɔnɔkɔali kalɛ a kĩ Yesu Kristo nyɛ ɛtsa ye a akũ.

english_verse: God will bless everyone who reads this prophecy to others, and he will bless everyone who hears and obeys it. The time is almost here.
translation_verse: Baguma ahila oti a kĩ yakã ovoli kĩĩ, mɔ bati a kĩ batse fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi, kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ foe akũ lɛmɛ a, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ a wo ɔtɔ kĩ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ. Yohanes Wɔ̃na Tɛsɔli Evũkɔnɔ a.

english_verse: From John to the seven churches in Asia. I pray that you will be blessed with kindness and peace from God, who is and was and is coming. May you receive kindness and peace from the seven spirits before the throne of God.
translation_verse: Yĩ, Yohanes, lamɛna fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ katsɛlɛ kamɛna mi tɛsɔli evũkɔnɔ a kĩ tideĩ nɛ Asia amantam kamɛ a. Baguma kĩ edzi nkpã, kĩ ɛna kɔkɔɛ, kĩ yaaya a, ɛmɔ mi kɔnya, ɛkpa mi lukudɔ. Ade ayea hũhũ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ ye lɛgãkpo anɛ a,

english_verse: May kindness and peace be yours from Jesus Christ, the faithful witness. Jesus was the first to conquer death, and he is the ruler of all earthly kings. Christ loves us, and by his blood he set us free from our sins.
translation_verse: mɔ Yesu Kristo ɔnɔkɔali ɔdansini, kĩ ɛnyɛ bati a kĩ Baguma dzɛla etomɛna kanɔkpa kamɛ ɔtɔnyade, kĩ yanya tite akũ fɔgã flee akũ a, bɛmɔ mi kɔnya bɛkpa mi lukudɔ lɛmɛ. Yawɛ boe kalɛ ade ɛtsã ye wuda kamɛ ɛnyɛ boe etomɛna tɔkpa kamɛ.

english_verse: He lets us rule as kings and serve God his Father as priests. To him be glory and power forever and ever! Amen.
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ eyi lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ ɛkpa boe kĩ bɔnya basɔfɔ busum ye Baguma mɔ Ɔlɛga a, ade ye mɔ mikɔa kukũkpalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ mikpa daa daa! Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: Look! He is coming with the clouds. Everyone will see him, even the ones who stuck a sword through him. All people on earth will weep because of him. Yes, it will happen! Amen.
translation_verse: Midã, ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ luflututu akũ yaya! Odi nyɛ odi aamɔ ye, ade bati a kĩ bɛtsɔɛ ye lɔtsɔɛ nɛ sɛklabi a lɛmɛ aamɔ ye. Tite akũ bati flee aawula babe yoo nɛ ye akũ! Ade aye kɛnɛ kĩ fɔna a! Fɔya lɔmɔ.

english_verse: The Lord God says, “I am Alpha and Omega, the one who is and was and is coming. I am God All-Powerful!” A Vision of the Risen Lord
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate, Baguma Kpale, kĩ edzi nkpã, kĩ ɛna kɔkɔɛ, kĩ yaaya a, lɛ kĩ, “Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade.” Kristo Kanyɛ Katsa.

english_verse: I am John, a follower together with all of you. We suffer because Jesus is our king, but he gives us the strength to endure. I was sent to Patmos Island, because I had preached God's message and had told about Jesus.
translation_verse: Yĩ, Yohanes, mi ɔwaɛ̃ kĩ bɔmɔ́ mi bɔtsã butomɛna Yesu a, ĩnyɛ mi ɔkɔba kĩ bɔdɔla boe akũ, bɔmɔ́ lubo a kĩ laya kakpa bikĩ bɛnyɛ ye ode lɛgãkanyakɔ̃ bade a. Bɛkɔa yĩ bɛnadzina nɛ tite nɛ mui kayite a kĩ bavɛ Patmos a akũ, kitonɛkĩ nde lɛtsã nɛ Baguma kalɛ a, mɔ ɔnɔkɔali a kĩ Yesu nyɛ ɛtsa a akũ sũ.

english_verse: On the Lord's day the Spirit took control of me, and behind me I heard a loud voice that sounded like a trumpet.
translation_verse: Nɛ boe Ɔlate Luwi a akũ ni, Hũhũ a tɛ yĩ kamɛ, ade nnu odo kɔɔba kĩ ɛnɛ́ ndɛ kagbulɛɛ aye, ade ɛkalɛ kɔdzɛla nɛ yĩ liti a.

english_verse: The voice said, “Write in a book what you see. Then send it to the seven churches in Ephesus, Smyrna, Pergamum, Thyatira, Sardis, Philadelphia, and Laodicea.”
translation_verse: Odo a lɛ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a kayi, lɔkɔa kakɔa ovoli a kamɛna tɛsɔli a kĩ tideĩ nɛ tɛmatɔ tɛkpale tɛkpale evũkɔnɔ kĩĩ kamɛ. Ade te nyɛ Efeso, Smirna, Pergamo, Tiatira, Sardis, Filadelfia mɔ Laodikea a.”

english_verse: When I turned to see who was speaking to me, I saw seven gold lampstands.
translation_verse: Ndani anɛ kĩ madã oti a kĩ ɛlamɛna yĩ kalɛ kabi a, ade mmɔ́ sika ngbã ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ a.

english_verse: There with the lampstands was someone who seemed to be the Son of Man. He was wearing a robe that reached down to his feet, and a gold cloth was wrapped around his chest.
translation_verse: Litsedi kĩ lɛla ndɛ Otidziwa Obi aye kĩ edo atadiɛ wulaa kĩ ɛka eko nɛ ye fɔnɛta, ade ɛkɔa sika ngbã abɔsɔ ɛbɔa nɛ ɔwɔlɛ a.

english_verse: His head and his hair were white as wool or snow, and his eyes looked like flames of fire.
translation_verse: Ye lɔlɔ tɔlɔ voe fitaa ndɛ kuveli tɛtsã ĩye ndɛ lɛdãglɛglɛ aye, ade ye banebi ata ndɛ fi luwotu aye a.

english_verse: His feet were glowing like bronze being heated in a furnace, and his voice sounded like the roar of a waterfall.
translation_verse: Ye fɔnɛta ata ndɛ kɔɔble kĩ bɛvɔlɛ nɛ fi kamɛ, ade ye odo anɛ ndɛ ɔwɔ mui kĩ baka kato ɔtɔ akũ kako waa nɛ lutubu kamɛ a.

english_verse: He held seven stars in his right hand, and a sharp double-edged sword was coming from his mouth. His face was shining as bright as the sun at noon.
translation_verse: Ɛnɛɛ fusibii evũkɔnɔ nɛ ye sɔmɔna awɛ, ade atugbe mɔ ɔbɔ̃ lɛmɛ nɛ eto ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ a, ade anɛ kamɛ amɔanɛ ndɛ suwa ketee aye a.

english_verse: When I saw him, I fell at his feet like a dead person. But he put his right hand on me and said: Don't be afraid! I am the first, the last,
translation_verse: Kĩ mmɔ́ ye a, nnɛ́ ntɔ nɛ ye abɔa kamɛ ndɛ oti kĩ eku, ade ɛkɔa ye sɔmɔna awɛ ete nɛ yĩ akũ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Tavila! Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade,

english_verse: and the living one. I died, but now I am alive forever, and I have the keys to death and the world of the dead.
translation_verse: mɔ oti a kĩ edzi nkpã! Nku tɔ̃ lɛmɛ finyaa ndzi nkpã daa. Wuda mɔ kanɔkpade tɛsafi deĩ nɛ yĩ awɛ.

english_verse: Write what you have seen and what is and what will happen after these things.
translation_verse: Foesũ tsɛlɛ fɔtsa a kĩ ɔmɔ́, fukĩ fudeĩ finyaa mɔ fukĩ fɔ́aya nɛ foe kamɛ ke liti a kayi.

english_verse: I will explain the mystery of the seven stars you saw at my right side and the seven gold lampstands. The seven stars are the angels of the seven churches, and the lampstands are the seven churches.
translation_verse: Kalɛ kɔlawa kĩ kideĩ nɛ fusibii evũkɔnɔ a kĩ ɔmɔ́ nɛ yĩ sɔmɔna awɛ, mɔ sika ngbã ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ a kayɔ nyɛ. Fusibii evũkɔnɔ a nyɛ tɛsɔli evũkɔnɔ a ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ, ade ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ a lɛmɛ nyɛ́ tɛsɔli evũkɔnɔ a.”

english_verse: This is what you must write to the angel of the church in Ephesus: I am the one who holds the seven stars in my right hand, and I walk among the seven gold lampstands. Listen to what I say.
translation_verse: “Tsɛlɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ kama Efeso asɔli a ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a. Ade oti a kĩ epini fusibii evũkɔnɔ nɛ ye sɔmɔna, kĩ ɛtsɛ̃ nɛ sika ngbã ɔsɛdza titse evũkɔnɔ kayite a ɔlɛdo nɛ awĩ a.

english_verse: I know everything you have done, including your hard work and how you have endured. I know you won't put up with anyone who is evil. When some people pretended to be apostles, you tested them and found out they were liars.
translation_verse: Ĩnyina nɔ adzuma flee mɔ ayekĩ ɔbɔa mbɔdi odo ɔwɔlɛ ɔmɔ́ lubo. Ĩnyina kĩ aáwɛ bati kpa fɔlɛtsa kalɛ. Ɔsɔ bati a kĩ bavɛ be akũ kĩ fɔtɔ banyanɛ lɛmɛ bɛnyɛ́ fɔtɔ banyanɛ a ɔdã, ade ɔmɔ́ oyi ɔsũ kĩ bavãlɛvã banɛ a.

english_verse: You have endured and gone through hard times because of me, yet you have not given up.
translation_verse: Ĩnyina ayekĩ ɔna ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ ɔmɔ́ lubo nɛ yĩ sũ, lɛmɛ akpɔ táveli nɔ.

english_verse: But I do have something against you! And it is this: You don't have as much love as you used to.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ndeĩ kalɛ kadi nɛ nɔ akũ. Ade ke nyɛ kĩ aáwɛ yĩ kalɛ finyaa ndɛ ayekĩ ɔnya lɔtɔ ɔwɛ yĩ kalɛ a.

english_verse: Think about where you have fallen from, and then turn back and do as you did at first. If you don't turn back, I will come and take away your lampstand.
translation_verse: Nɛ foesũ ni, te anɛ nɛ nɔ kadzakɔ̃ a kĩ ɔdza oto ɔtɔ a akũ! Dani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ lɔkɔa kakɛna lɛtsa a kĩ ɔnya lɔtɔ ɔkɛna a. Ntɛ ɔtádani ɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kɔ̃ ni, maaya nɛ nɔ sɛkɛ̃ ĩyaabɔɛ nɔ ɔsɛdza otse a nɛ ye kadzakɔ̃.

english_verse: But there is one thing you are doing right. You hate what the Nicolaitans are doing, and so do I.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ odeĩ kĩ lawo yĩ anɛ nyɛ kĩ akesĩ Nikolatiafɔ fɔkɛlatsa ndɛ ayekĩ yĩ malo kakesĩ foe a.

english_verse: If you have ears, listen to what the Spirit says to the churches. I will let everyone who wins the victory eat from the life-giving tree in God's wonderful garden. The Letter to Smyrna
