translation_verse: Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kpã yĩ nɛ hũhũ kamɛ ɛnamɛna kɔsa kamɛ. Nɛ awã mmɔ́ otsole odi kĩ edzi nɛ ɔyaɛ kpa ngbã odi akũ. Bɛtsɛlɛ mbusuo buĩ kĩ basupa Baguma bite nɛ ɔyaɛ a akũ flee, ade edeĩ fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ mɔ tɛlɛ ewua a.

english_verse: The woman was dressed in purple and scarlet robes, and she wore jewelry made of gold, precious stones, and pearls. In her hand she held a gold cup filled with the filthy and nasty things she had done.
translation_verse: Otsole a do atadiɛ ngbã mɔ fɔwɔwa ntsɛkantsɛka, ade ɛhɛhɛ akũ mɔ sika ngbã fɔtsa, boe mɔ kɔya, mɔ fulitsa mɔ kɔya a. Ɛnɛɛ sika ngbã kɔɔpu kĩ eyi mɔ efĩĩ mɔ kɔwɛ̃ fɔtsa a kĩ ɛna etomɛna ye adɔpaa kabɔa kamɛ a nɛ awɛ.

english_verse: On her forehead a mysterious name was written: I AM THE GREAT CITY OF BABYLON, THE MOTHER OF EVERY IMMORAL AND FILTHY THING ON EARTH.
translation_verse: Bɛtsɛlɛ dĩ kĩ de kayɔkanyɛ bɛla bite nɛ ye nnyɛ kĩ, Babilonia kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ, Adɔpaafɔ mɔ tite akũ fubusuotsa flee ɔma.

english_verse: I could tell that the woman was drunk on the blood of God's people who had given their lives for Jesus. This surprising sight amazed me,
translation_verse: Otsole a kĩ mmɔ́ a wuga Baguma bade a, mɔ bikĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ Yesu katɛkado akũ sũ a babɔanɛ. Kĩ mmɔ́ ye a, fɔkɛna yĩ wãwã paa.

english_verse: and the angel said: Why are you so amazed? I will explain the mystery about this woman and about the beast she is sitting on, with its seven heads and ten horns.
translation_verse: Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a via yĩ kĩ, “Nde sũ fɔkɛna nɔ wãwã? Maabi nɔ kalɛ nɛ otsole a, mɔ ɔyaɛ a kĩ edeĩ fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ mɔ tɛlɛ ewua, kĩ ye akũ edzi a fɔlɛtsa kɔlawa.

english_verse: The beast you saw is one that used to be and no longer is. It will come back from the deep pit, but only to be destroyed. Everyone on earth whose names were not written in the book of life before the time of creation will be amazed. They will see this beast that used to be and no longer is, but will be once more.
translation_verse: Ɔyaɛ kpa a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a dzi nkpã tɔ̃ lɛmɛ finyaa eku. Yaanɛ eto lɛkɛ dzununuunu a kamɛ ɛyaatɛ̃ ɛnaa bɛwɔla ye. Fɔ́akɛna bati a kĩ bidzi nkpã nɛ tite akũ, kĩ bɛtátsɛlɛ be buĩ bido nɛ nkpã ovoli a kamɛ, kito anɛ kĩ bɛbɔa katinya a wãwã ntɛ bɛmɔ́ ɔyaɛ a, kitonɛkĩ ɛnyɛ oti kĩ edzi nkpã tɔ̃, finyaa ɛláa, lɛmɛ yaabuki ɛya.

english_verse: Anyone with wisdom can figure this out. The seven heads that the woman is sitting on stand for seven hills. These heads are also seven kings.
translation_verse: “Fukĩĩ sĩ fɔkpa nyansã mɔ fɔtsa kayɔkanu mɔ nyansã. Fɔlɔ evũkɔnɔ a nyɛ kɔtɔbii evũkɔnɔ, awã kĩ otsole a adzi a.

english_verse: Five of the kings are dead. One is ruling now, and the other one has not yet come. But when he does, he will rule for only a little while.
translation_verse: Fubuki fɔnyɛ fɔgã evũkɔnɔ, kĩ foe elo tɔ kɔkɔɛ, lɔmɔa anya akũ finyaa, ade de nkaɛ a táya tɔ̃. Ntɛ lɛya ni, kɛnɛ kĩ lɛnya akũ lɔkɔ lukũ odi.

english_verse: You also saw a beast that used to be and no longer is. That beast is one of the seven kings who will return as the eighth king, but only to be destroyed.
translation_verse: Ɔyaɛ kpa a kĩ edzi tɔ̃, lɛmɛ ebuki ɛláa a nyɛ lɛgã lɛlɛ̃de, kĩ lɛnyɛ fɔgã evũkɔnɔ a kamɛ ɔmɔa kĩ laanaa bɛwɔla de.

english_verse: The ten horns you saw are ten more kings, who have not yet come into power, and they will rule with the beast for only a short time.
translation_verse: “Tɛlɛ ewua a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a nyɛ fɔgã ewua kĩ bɛtádo tɔ̃ fɔgã kanya awɛ, lɛmɛ bɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ kĩ baanya fɔgã dɔũhuilɛ mɔa mɔ ɔyaɛ kpa a.

english_verse: They all think alike and will give their power and authority to the beast.
translation_verse: Fɔgã ewua kĩĩ flee deĩ botaɛ mɔapɛ, ade baakɔa be kɔbɛ̃ mɔ otumi bɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa a.

english_verse: These kings will go to war against the Lamb. But he will defeat them, because he is Lord over all lords and King over all kings. His followers are chosen and special and faithful.
translation_verse: Baanɔ kawũ mɔ Kavelibi a, lɛmɛ Kavelibi a aanya be akũ, kitonɛkĩ ye nyɛ balate flee Ɔlate, fɔgã flee Lɛgã. Bɛmɔ ye bade a kĩ ɛvɛ, ɛpau, mɔ bikĩ bitomɔ ye nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ a, aanya akũ mɔ ye.”

english_verse: The oceans you saw the prostitute sitting on are crowds of people from all races and languages.
translation_verse: Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a buki ebi yĩ kĩ, “Mui a kĩ ɔmɔ́ kĩ ɔdɔpaani a dzi nɛ be akũ a nyɛ ɔmaĩ nyɛ ɔmaĩ, fude nyɛ fude, batidziwa flee mɔ tide ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ.

english_verse: The ten horns and the beast will start hating the shameless woman. They will strip off her clothes and leave her naked. Then they will eat her flesh and throw the rest of her body into a fire.
translation_verse: Tɛlɛ ewua a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a mɔ ɔyaɛ kpa a aakesĩ ɔdɔpaani a. Baatɛ lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa nɛ ye awɛ bɛfɔ̃ edzi ɔdzɔ. Baaba ye sɛkɛna bido ye fi evio.

english_verse: God is the one who made these kings all think alike and decide to give their power to the beast. And they will do this until what God has said comes true.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛkɔa foe edo nɛ be tɔwɔlɛ kamɛ kĩ bɛkɛna nɛ nhiɛhiɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna eyi a akũ, fɔfɔ̃ bɛkɛna ɔmɔa bɛkɔa be kɔbɛ̃ bɛkpa ɔyaɛ kpa a ɛnya akũ, kɛnaawo lɔkɔ a kĩ Baguma fɔlɛtsa a ya nɛ foe kamɛ.

english_verse: The woman you saw is the great city that rules over all kings on earth.
translation_verse: “Otsole a kĩ ɔmɔ́ a nyɛ ɔmatɔ kpale a kĩ yanya tite akũ fɔgã akũ a.”

english_verse: I saw another angel come from heaven. This one had great power, and the earth was bright because of his glory.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ bɛbã kĩ eduma eto ode yaka. Edeĩ kɔbɛ̃ paa, ade ye akũ ɔhaĩ kpalɛ tite flee akũ a.

english_verse: The angel shouted, “Fallen! Powerful Babylon has fallen and is now the home of demons. It is the den of every filthy spirit and of all unclean birds, and every dirty and hated animal.
translation_verse: Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ɛtɔ o-o! Babilonia ɔmatɔ a kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ a tɔ tsoo! Ɛdani hũhũ kpa mɔ hũhũ kĩ efĩĩ deĩ nɛ ye akũ, mɔ efĩĩ kɔvɔlabi, mɔ kɔvɔlabi kĩ bakesĩ a kadzikɔ̃.

english_verse: Babylon's evil and immoral wine has made all nations drunk. Every king on earth has slept with her, and every merchant on earth is rich because of her evil desires.”
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ fude flee mɔa ye adɔpaa akũ kalɔkpa bavɛ a. Tite akũ fɔgã bɔa adɔpaa mɔ ye, ade katinya kamɛ fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ tsã ye anɛngbã kana kamɛ bɛdani asikafɔ a.”

english_verse: Then I heard another voice from heaven shout, “My people, you must escape from Babylon. Don't take part in her sins and share her punishment.
translation_verse: Ade nnu odo bɛbã kĩ eto ode ɛlɛ kĩ, “Yĩ bati, minɛ́ nɛ ye kamɛ! Kɛtánɛ kĩ miakɛna tɔkpa a na odu, ade kɛtánɛ kĩ miana ye sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ a na odu a.

english_verse: Her sins are piled as high as heaven. God has remembered the evil she has done.
translation_verse: Kitonɛkĩ bɛtɛɛtɛɛ ye tɔkpa tide tɛnatamɔ ode, ade Baguma te anɛ nɛ ye tɔkpa akũ a.

english_verse: Treat her as she has treated others. Make her pay double for what she has done. Make her drink twice as much of what she mixed for others.
translation_verse: Mikɛna ye ndɛ ayekĩ ye malo ɛkɛna mi a. Mise ye foe titi nviã nɛ fukĩ ɛkɛna a onukpɛ̃. Miyula bavɛ mɔ ɔsĩ tɛkɔɔpu nviã mikpa ye, nɛ amɔa a kĩ ɛkpa mi a onukpɛ̃!

english_verse: That woman honored herself with a life of luxury. Reward her now with suffering and pain. “Deep in her heart Babylon said, ‘I am the queen! Never will I be a widow or know what it means to be sad.’
translation_verse: Mimɔna ye lubo, ebe kɔnya ayekĩ kɛfɛta fuketimɔ ayekĩ edzi nɛ akũ kahɛhɛ mɔ nkpã kanya kamɛ a. Kitonɛkĩ yabi ye akũ daa kĩ, ‘Ndzi nɛ awĩ ndɛ lɛgãtsole aye! Nnɛ́ okunawa manɛ, ade nláabe ayɔlɔhɔ da a!’

english_verse: And so, in a single day she will suffer the pain of sorrow, hunger, and death. Fire will destroy her dead body, because her judge is the powerful Lord God.”
translation_verse: Nɛ fukĩĩ sũ ni, nɛ luwi mɔapɛ kamɛ, lubo kamɔ kĩ fɔnyɛ, wuda, fɔsɔ, kɔnya kabe mɔ kɔlɛ aaya nɛ ye akũ. Baapila ye mɔ fi evio gbunugbunugbunu, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma a kĩ ɛkɔ ye kɔɔtɔ a nyɛ ɔbɛlɛbɛ.

english_verse: Every king on earth who slept with her and shared in her luxury will mourn. They will weep, when they see the smoke from that fire.
translation_verse: “Ntɛ tite akũ fɔgã a kĩ bɛbɔa adɔpaa mɔ ɔmatɔ a, bɛnya nkpã mɔ ye a, mɔ́ fi a kĩ fɔapila ye ɔnyɔ a yade ni, baabɔa fɔwɔla bibe ye.

english_verse: Her sufferings will frighten them, and they will stand at a distance and say, “Pity that great and powerful city! Pity Babylon! In a single hour her judgment has come.”
translation_verse: Baadza mɔ lugo nɛ ye lubo kamɔ kavila a sũ bɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Ao! Ao! Nɔ, ɔmatɔ kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ! Nɔ, Babilonia kĩ odeĩ kɔbɛ̃! Dɔũhuilɛ mɔapɛ kamɛ bɛkɔ nɔ kɔtɔ!’

english_verse: Every merchant on earth will mourn, because there is no one to buy their goods.
translation_verse: “Tite akũ fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a lɛmɛ aabe biwo ɔblɔ mɔ ye, kitonɛkĩ odima buki yaáya be fɔtsa.

english_verse: There won't be anyone to buy their gold, silver, jewels, pearls, fine linen, purple cloth, silk, scarlet cloth, sweet-smelling wood, fancy carvings of ivory and wood, as well as things made of bronze, iron, or marble.
translation_verse: Kɔyaatɔ fɔtsa a nyɛ sika ngbã, sika ovoe, boe mɔ kɔya, fulitsa mɔ kɔya, aklala, tilima ngbã, tilima ɔɔwa, tilima plɔplɔ, titse kĩ tabɔa mɔ ɔlɛ̃, kunu adɔ̃ fɔtsa, mɔ titse mɔ kɔya, kɔɔble mɔ sɔbɔtsaɛ ɔɔwa fɔtsa, mɔ kɔla kake boe kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya.

english_verse: No one will buy their cinnamon, spices, incense, myrrh, frankincense, wine, olive oil, fine flour, wheat, cattle, sheep, horses, chariots, slaves, and other humans.
translation_verse: Fɔbɛbã nyɛ futse fɔkpã mɔ ɔlɛ̃ kĩ bavɛ sinamɔn mɔ kutu ɔlɛ̃ kado fɔtsa, lifii mɔ klubɔũ, bavɛ mɔ kugua kĩ bakɔa katɔ, onuvoe kpɛtɛɛ mɔ fɔwã, kugua kĩ batsɛla, banantsue mɔ baveli, bapɔnkɔ mɔ tihilili, basate mɔ batidziwa kĩ baya kɔkɔ malo.

english_verse: Babylon, the things your heart desired have all escaped from you. Every luxury and all your glory will be lost forever. You will never get them back.
translation_verse: “Fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a aalɛ kĩ, ‘Futse babi a kĩ fɔakɔ nɔ odo a aalo fɔfɔnɛ nɔ. Nɔ akũ kana fɔtsa flee mɔ nɔ akũ kahɛhɛ a yɛla nɛ nɔ akũ, ɔláabuki ɔmɔ́ foe da!’

english_verse: The merchants had become rich because of her. But when they saw her sufferings, they were terrified. They stood at a distance, crying and mourning.
translation_verse: Fɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a kĩ bɛnya kɔyaatɔ fɔtsa kumɛkumɛ kamɛ mɔ ɔmatɔ a bɛdani asikafɔ a, aadza mɔ lugo, nɛ lubo kamɔ kavila sũ. Bibe, biwo ɔblɔ,

english_verse: Then they shouted, “Pity the great city of Babylon! She dressed in fine linen and wore purple and scarlet cloth. She had jewelry made of gold and precious stones and pearls.
translation_verse: bɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Ao! Ao! Ɔmatɔ kĩ ɛtɛ dĩ! Ɔmatɔ kĩ bɛhɛhɛ ye mɔ aklala fitaa, tilima ngbã, tilima ɔɔwa, sika ngbã fɔtsa, boe kĩ bɛtɛ kɔya mɔ fulitsa mɔ kɔya!

english_verse: Yet in a single hour her riches disappeared.” Every ship captain and passenger and sailor stood at a distance, together with everyone who does business by traveling on the sea.
translation_verse: Dɔũhuilɛ mɔapɛ kamɛ ye akũ kana fɔtsa a flee bu kade pasaa.’ “Ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ flee, mɔ ɔwɔ akũ basitsãnɛ, ɔkɔlɔ batanɛ a mɔ bati bɛbã a kĩ batsã mpo akũ kanya kɔyaatɔ a dza mɔ lugo,

english_verse: When they saw the smoke from her fire, they shouted, “This was the greatest city ever!”
translation_verse: bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba nɛ lɔkɔ a kĩ bɛmɔ́ ɔmatɔ a kĩ ɛlamɛna kavio a ɔnyɔ a kĩ, ‘Ɔmatɔ kpale kĩĩ odu nɛ́ katinya tɔ̃?’

english_verse: They cried loudly, and in their sorrow they threw dust on their heads, as they said, “Pity the great city of Babylon! Everyone who sailed the seas became rich from her treasures. But in a single hour the city was destroyed.
translation_verse: Bifila kudu biko nɛ be fɔlɔ kamɛ ade bibe mɔ kɔnya bɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Bɔbɔɛ bɔbɔɛ bɔakpa ɔmatɔ kpale kĩĩ! Ɔmatɔ kpale kĩ ye kamɛ futima balate na akũ bitomɛna ye akũ kana fɔtsa kamɛ bɛdani asikafɔ. Kitonɛkĩ nɛ dɔũhuilɛ mɔapɛ kamɛ bɛkɛna ye bubloo!

english_verse: The heavens should be happy with God's people and apostles and prophets. God has punished her for them.”
translation_verse: O ode, mɔ mi Baguma bade a, mɔ mi fɔtɔ banyanɛ mɔ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ a, mimɔ kawɔlɛ! Kitonɛkĩ Baguma kɔ ye kɔtɔ ɛkpa mi nɛ lɛtsa a kĩ ɛkɛna mi a sũ!’ ”

english_verse: A powerful angel then picked up a huge stone and threw it into the sea. The angel said, “This is how the great city of Babylon will be thrown down, never to rise again.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ odi bɔɛ de kĩ lɔpɔnɛ lububu ndɛ kɔwɔlɛ ade ɛta edo nɛ mpo kamɛ, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ade aye baabɔɛ Babilonia ɔmatɔ kpale a bibo mɔ fɔkɔ, ade bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ ye da a.

english_verse: The music of harps and singers and of flutes and trumpets will no longer be heard. No workers will ever set up shop in that city, and the sound of grinding grain will be silenced forever.
translation_verse: Bɛláabuki binu tɔwɛ̃ tɛsankuo, tifluti mɔ kugbulɛɛ tido nɛ nɔ kamɛ da. Bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ awɛ adzuma ɔkɛnanɛ odima lɛmɛ nɛ nɔ kamɛ da, ade ayea lɛmɛ bɛláabuki binu fɔtsa kawɔlɛ nɛ kɔwɔlɛ akũ nkã da nɛ nɔ kamɛ a!

english_verse: Lamps will no longer shine anywhere in Babylon, and couples will never again say wedding vows there. Her merchants ruled the earth, and by her witchcraft she fooled all nations.
translation_verse: Bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ ɔsɛdza katɛ̃ nɛ nɔ kamɛ da, ade bɛláabuki binu olitsɔ̃ mɔ obolitsɔ̃ nyɔ tido nɛ nɔ kamɛ da a. Nɔ kɔyaatɔ banyanɛ a nyɛ katinya kamɛ banɔkɔɛ̃ banɔkɔɛ̃, ade ɔkɔa nɔ kanɔkɔnɛ kadã ɔkɛ katinya kamɛ bati flee a.

english_verse: On the streets of Babylon is found the blood of God's people and of his prophets, and everyone else.”
translation_verse: Bɛvɛlɛ Babilonia sɔtɔ, kitonɛkĩ ye kamɛ bɛmɔ́ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ mɔ Baguma bade a babɔanɛ. Nnɛ́ be odi bade bɛmɔ́, mbom mɔ bati a kĩ bɛkɔ nɛ tite akũ a babɔanɛ bɛ́mɔ nɛ ye kamɛ.”

english_verse: After this, I heard what sounded like a lot of voices in heaven, and they were shouting, “Praise the Lord! To our God belongs the glorious power to save,
translation_verse: Fukĩĩ liti a, nnu litsedi ndɛ bati kɔdabu baũ odo nɛ ode, ɛkalɛ kĩ, “Mimu Baguma! Nkpã katɛ, kukũkpalɛ mɔ kɔbɛ̃ nyɛ boe Baguma fude!

english_verse: because his judgments are honest and fair. That filthy prostitute ruined the earth with shameful deeds. But God has judged her and made her pay the price for murdering his servants.”
translation_verse: Yadzɛ fɔlɛtsa nɛ ɔnɔkɔali kamɛ, ade yakɔ kɔtɔ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ a. Ɛkɔ ɔdɔpaani kpale a kĩ ɛkɔa ye adɔpaa ebula katinya kamɛ kade a kɔtɔ. Baguma vɛlɛ ye sɔtɔ kitonɛkĩ ɛkɔ́ ye basumunɛ a.”

english_verse: Then the crowd shouted, “Praise the Lord! Smoke will never stop rising from her burning body.”
translation_verse: Bibuki bɛbɔa fɔwɔla kĩ, “Mimu Baguma! Ɔnyɔ a kĩ yanɛ nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ a ade nɛ ode daa.”

english_verse: From the throne a voice said, “If you worship and fear our God, give praise to him, no matter who you are.”
translation_verse: Ade odo odi nɛ́ eto lɛgãkpo a kamɛ kĩ, “Mimu boe Baguma, mi flee a kĩ mi ye basumunɛ mɔ ye bati flee, banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃ a kĩ miavila ye a.”

english_verse: Then I heard what seemed to be a large crowd that sounded like a roaring flood and loud thunder all mixed together. They were saying, “Praise the Lord! Our Lord God All-Powerful now rules as king.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, nnu odo odi ndɛ bati kɔdabu baũ fɔwɔla kabɔa ĩye ndɛ ato ɔtɔ akũ mui kaka kako nɛ lutubu kamɛ, ĩye ɔplala kakpɛnɛ mɔ ɔsĩ aye. Odo a lɛ kĩ, “Mimu Baguma! Kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma Kpale anya Lɛgã!

english_verse: So we will be glad and happy and give him praise. The wedding day of the Lamb is here, and his bride is ready.
translation_verse: Mifɔ̃ bɔmɔ kawɔlɛ, butu osee budo ye obu. Kitonɛkĩ Kavelibi a obolitsɔ̃ kapi luwi a wo ɔtɔ, ade ye obolitsɔ̃ a manɛ akũ ɛkpa foe a.

english_verse: She will be given a wedding dress made of pure and shining linen. This linen stands for the good things God's people have done.”
translation_verse: Bɛkɔa aklala fitaa, kĩ yata muamua lima bɛkpa ye kĩ edzi.” Aklala fitaa kpalɛwa a nyɛ fɔtsa wĩ a kĩ Baguma bade a kɛna.

english_verse: Then the angel told me, “Put this in writing. God will bless everyone who is invited to the wedding feast of the Lamb.” The angel also said, “These things God has said are true.”
translation_verse: Ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi yĩ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ kayi kĩ bihila bati a kĩ bɛvɛ kĩ bɛya nɛ Kavelibi a obolitsɔ̃ kanyakɔ̃.” Ebuki ɛlɛ kĩ, “Baguma onukpɛ̃ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa pɛpɛɛpɛ nyɛ fukĩĩ.”

english_verse: I knelt at the feet of the angel and began to worship him. But the angel said, “Don't do that! I am a servant, just like you and everyone else who tells about Jesus. Don't worship anyone but God. Everyone who tells about Jesus does it by the power of the Spirit.” The Rider on the White Horse
translation_verse: Ade ntɔ nɛ ye abɔa kamɛ kĩ masum ye a, lɛmɛ ebi yĩ kĩ, “Takɛna foe! Bɔmɔ nɔ mɔ awaɛ̃ amɛ a kĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ Kristo akũ a kamɛ ɔmɔa manɛ. Ke aduli kakpa Baguma odi!” Kitonɛkĩ adansiɛ a kĩ Kristo di a ado Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ kɔbɛ̃. Ɔpɔnkɔ Ovoe Akũ Odzinɛ a.

english_verse: I looked and saw heaven was open, and a white horse was there. Its rider was called Faithful and True, and he is always fair when he judges or goes to war.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, mmɔ́ kĩ ode binya ɛwaa, ade mmɔ́ ɔpɔnkɔ ovoe odi kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ a. Oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ɔpɔnkɔ a akũ a dĩ nyɛ Oti Kpĩĩ mɔ Ɔnɔkɔalini. Yadzɛ fɔlɛtsa kanɔ kawũ nɛ osi kpĩĩ akũ.

english_verse: He had eyes like flames of fire, and he was wearing a lot of crowns. His name was written on him, but he was the only one who knew what the name meant.
translation_verse: Ye banebi la ndɛ fi sɛmɛ aye, ade fɔgãbɔɛ beblebee tsanɛ nɛ ye lɔlɔ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ dĩ lidi bite nɛ ye akũ, kĩ odima linyína de kayɔ, mbɔɛntɛ ye odi.

english_verse: The rider wore a robe that was covered with blood, and he was known as “The Word of God.”
translation_verse: Edo atadiɛ kĩ bisi bido nɛ babɔanɛ kamɛ. Ye dĩ nyɛ Baguma Kalɛ a.

english_verse: He was followed by armies from heaven that rode on white horses and were dressed in pure white linen.
translation_verse: Ode sodzafɔ kɔdabu kɔdabu do aklala ovoe fitaa tɛtadiɛ, bidzi nɛ bapɔnkɔ ovoe akũ bitomɔ ye.

english_verse: From his mouth a sharp sword went out to attack the nations. He will rule them with an iron rod and will show the fierce anger of God All-Powerful by trampling the grapes in the pit where wine is made.
translation_verse: Lɛpamɛ mɔ ɔbɔ̃ nɛ́ lito ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ, kĩ yaakɔa ɛwɔla fude akũ. Yaakɔa sɔbɔtsaɛ otse ɛnya be akũ, ade yaasumini Baguma Kpale kalɔkpa mɔ ɔsĩ a ɛnyɛ ye waĩ kanunakɔ̃ a.

english_verse: On the part of the robe that covered his thigh was written, “KING OF KINGS AND Lord OF LordS.”
translation_verse: Dĩ a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ ye atadiɛ wulaa mɔ lutolo akũ a nyɛ Fɔgã Flee Lɛgã mɔ Balate Flee Ɔlate.

english_verse: I then saw an angel standing on the sun, and he shouted to all the birds flying in the sky, “Come and join in God's great feast!
translation_verse: Ke liti a, mmɔ́ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ odi kĩ ɛdzɛ̃ nɛ suwa akũ. Ɛbɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba ebi kɔvɔlabi a kĩ kɔayidza nɛ ɔwɛ kamɛ a kĩ, “Miyaatsɛna minya Baguma olobe funitsã kpale a.

english_verse: You can eat the flesh of kings, rulers, leaders, horses, riders, free people, slaves, important people, and everyone else.”
translation_verse: Miyaatsuli fɔgã, sodzafɔ banɔkɔɛ̃, sodzafɔ, bapɔnkɔ mɔ bapɔnkɔ badzinɛ sɛkɛna, akũ akũ badzinɛ, banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃ flee sɛkɛna!”

english_verse: I also saw the beast and all kings of the earth come together. They fought against the rider on the white horse and against his army.
translation_verse: Adeke mmɔ́ kĩ ɔyaɛ kpa a, mɔ tite akũ fɔgã a kpɔta be sodzafɔ kɔdabu a kĩ banɔ kawũ mɔ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ɔpɔnkɔ akũ a mɔ ye sodzafɔ flee a.

english_verse: But the beast was captured and so was the false prophet. This is the same prophet who had worked miracles for the beast, so he could fool everyone who had the mark of the beast and worshiped the idol. The beast and the false prophet were thrown alive into a lake of burning sulfur.
translation_verse: Bipi ɔyaɛ kpa a, mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a kĩ ɛkɛna awãwã fɔtsa nɛ ye anɛ a. Ade awãwã fɔtsa kĩĩ ɛkɔa ɛkɛ bati a kĩ bɛtɛ ɔyaɛ kpa a sɔkpɔ̃na mɔ bikĩ bisum ye kutidu kamɛ a. Bɛta ɔyaɛ kpa a mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a ɔgɔ̃ bido nɛ fi lutubu kĩ latɛ̃ gɛĩgɛĩ a kamɛ.

english_verse: But the rest of their army was killed by the sword that came from the mouth of the rider on the horse. Then birds stuffed themselves on the dead bodies.
translation_verse: Bɛkɔa oti a kĩ edzi nɛ ɔpɔnkɔ akũ a lɛpamɛ a kĩ lɛnɛ lito ye onukpɛ̃ kamɛ a bɛkɔ bati nkaɛ, ade kɔvɔlabi flee yatsuli be sɛkɛna ayekĩ kɔ́apuli a.

english_verse: I saw thrones, and sitting on those thrones were the ones who had been given the right to judge. I also saw the souls of the people who had their heads cut off because they had told about Jesus and preached God's message. They were the same ones who had not worshiped the beast or the idol, and they had refused to let its mark be put on their foreheads or hands. They will come to life and rule with Christ for
translation_verse: Ke liti a, mmɔ́ fɔgãkpo fudi, ade bati a kĩ bidzi nɛ foe akũ a, bɛkpa be kɔbɛ̃ kĩ bɛdzɛ fɔlɛtsa. Mbuki mmɔ́ bati a kĩ bikpeli be fɔlɔ, nɛ ayekĩ bidi adansiɛ nɛ Yesu ɔnɔkɔali, mɔ Baguma kalɛ a akũ sũ a tɛkla. Ade be lɛtásum ɔyaɛ kpa ĩye ye kutidu a kĩ bɛmɛ a, ĩye bɛtɛ ye sɔkpɔ̃na nɛ be nnyɛ ĩye nɛ awɛ a. Biyidza bibuki bidzi nkpã bɛnya lɛgã mɔ Kristo futeli apim mɔa.

english_verse: These people are the first to be raised to life, and they are especially blessed and holy. The second death has no power over them. They will be priests for God and Christ and will rule with them for
translation_verse: Baguma hila bati a kĩ bɛna tsɛfã nɛ banɔkpa kayidza katɔnyade kĩĩ kamɛ a, kĩ ɛkpalɛ be akũ lɛmɛ a. Wuda ayade a lɛlá kɔbɛ̃ nɛ be akũ, baanya Baguma mɔ Kristo basɔfɔ, ade baanya fɔgã mɔ ye futeli apim mɔa a. Bɛnya Satana Akũ.

english_verse: At the end of the
translation_verse: Ntɛ futeli apim mɔa wũna a, baanyɛ Satana nɛ kɔla,

english_verse: He will fool the countries of Gog and Magog, which are at the far ends of the earth, and their people will follow him into battle. They will have as many followers as there are grains of sand along the beach,
translation_verse: ade yanaa ɛnaakɛ fude fude kĩ fudeĩ nɛ katinya tukontoũ ɛna a kamɛ kĩ fɔnyɛ Gog mɔ Magog, ɛkpɔta be ɛkpa kawũkanɔ. Be lidede aana ndɛ mpo abuĩ dã.

english_verse: and they will march all the way across the earth. They will surround the camp of God's people and the city God loves. But fire will come down from heaven and destroy the whole army.
translation_verse: Bɛtsã tite dzɛlɛwa a akũ bɛnadza bisinya Baguma bade a kadzikɔ̃ mɔ ye ɔmatɔ kpale a kĩ yawɛ kalɛ a. Lɛmɛ fi to ode fɔyawɔla be flee.

english_verse: Then the devil who fooled them will be thrown into the lake of fire and burning sulfur. He will be there with the beast and the false prophet, and they will be in pain day and night forever and ever. The Judgment at the Great White Throne
translation_verse: Ade bɛta Abonsam a kĩ ɛkɛ be a bido nɛ fi lutubu mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ a kamɛ, nɛ awã kĩ bɛnya lɔtɔ bɛta ɔyaɛ kpa mɔ fɔvã onukpɛ̃ ɔnyɛnɛ a bido a. Baamɔna be lubo lɛnyɛ mɔ suwa daa daa. Katinya Kamɛ Kadzɛmɛna Nkaɛ.

english_verse: I saw a great white throne with someone sitting on it. Earth and heaven tried to run away, but there was no place for them to go.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, mmɔ́ lɛgãkpo kpale ovoe lidi mɔ oti a kĩ edzi nɛ de akũ a. Tite mɔ ode lo nɛ ye anɛ kamɛ, ade bɛtána kakɔma bɛkpa te a.

english_verse: I also saw all the dead people standing in front of that throne. Every one of them was there, no matter who they had once been. Several books were opened, and then the book of life was opened. The dead were judged by what those books said they had done.
translation_verse: Ade mmɔ́ banɔkpa, banɔkɔɛ̃ mɔ babisɛ̃ kĩ bɛdzɛ̃ nɛ lɛgãkpo a anɛ a. Bibinya tuvoli biyi, ade bibinya ovoli bɛbã odi lɛmɛ kĩ ɛnyɛ nkpã ovoli a. Bɛdzɛmɔ banɔkpa nɛ be fɔkɛlatsa onukpɛ̃ ndɛ ayekĩ bɛtsɛlɛ biyi nɛ tuvoli a kamɛ a.

english_verse: The sea gave up the dead people who were in it, and death and its kingdom also gave up their dead. Then everyone was judged by what they had done.
translation_verse: Mpo nyɛ banɔkpa a kĩ bideĩ nɛ ye kamɛ a ɛkpa, ade wuda mɔ kanɔkpade lɛmɛ nyɛ banɔkpa a kĩ bɛnɛɛ a bɛkpa a. Ade bɛdzɛmɔ be kamɛ odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye fɔkɛlatsa onukpɛ̃ a.

english_verse: Afterwards, death and its kingdom were thrown into the lake of fire. This is the second death.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, bɛta wuda mɔ kanɔkpade biwula nɛ fi lutubu baũ a kamɛ. Fi lutubu baũ kĩĩ nyɛ wuda ayade a.

english_verse: Anyone whose name wasn't written in the book of life was thrown into the lake of fire.
translation_verse: Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ bɛtámɔ ye dĩ nɛ nkpã ovoli a kamɛ ni, bɛta ye bido nɛ fi lutubu baũ a kamɛ.

english_verse: I heard a loud voice shout from the throne: God's home is now with his people. He will live with them, and they will be his own. Yes, God will make his home among his people.
translation_verse: Ade nnu odo kɔɔba kĩ ɛnɛ eto lɛgãkpo a kamɛ ɛlɛ kĩ, “Finyaa kɔ̃ Baguma kadzikɔ̃ deĩ nɛ batidziwa kayite! Yaadzi nɛ be sɛkɛ̃, ade baanya ye bati a. Baguma mɔawɛ aadzi nɛ be kamɛ, ade yaanya be Baguma a.

english_verse: He will wipe all tears from their eyes, and there will be no more death, suffering, crying, or pain. These things of the past are gone forever.
translation_verse: Yaayɔ ɛnyɛ babe nɛ be anɛ kamɛ. Wuda lɛláabuki ɛna. Ade ayea ayɔlɔhɔ, kabe mɔ kalɔɛ lɛláabuki fɔna a, kitonɛkĩ kɔkɔɛ fɔtsa a yatɛ̃.”

english_verse: Then the one sitting on the throne said: I am making everything new. Write down what I have said. My words are true and can be trusted.
translation_verse: Ade oti a kĩ edzi nɛ lɛgãkpo akũ a lɛ kĩ, “Dã, finyaa nkɛna fɔtsa flee fɔvɔɛ̃!” Ebi yĩ lɛmɛ kĩ, “Tsɛlɛ fukĩĩ kayi, kitonɛkĩ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali kĩ baapuli bɛtɛ foe bido.”

english_verse: Everything is finished! I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will freely give water from the life-giving fountain to everyone who is thirsty.
translation_verse: Ade ɛlɛ kĩ, “Biyua, lɛtsa nyɛ lɛtsa! Yĩ nyɛ ɔtɔnyade mɔ owũnade, kayɔkayi a mɔ kawũna a. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, maakpa ye osi ɛmɔa mui etomɛna nkpã lɔwɔkɛ kamɛ faa.

english_verse: All who win the victory will be given these blessings. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnya akũ ni, yaana fukĩĩ etomɛna yĩ sɛkɛ̃. Maanya ye Baguma ade ye malo yaanya yĩ obi a.

english_verse: But I will tell you what will happen to cowards and to everyone who is unfaithful or dirty-minded or who murders or is sexually immoral or uses witchcraft or worships idols or tells lies. They will be thrown into that lake of fire and burning sulfur. This is the second death. The New Jerusalem
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ babelibe, bati abɔa banyɛnɛ, kɔwɛ̃ fɔtsa bakɛnanɛ, awudifɔ, adɔpaafɔ, kanɔkɔnɛ badãnɛ, baviɔ̃ basumunɛ mɔ bavãlɛvã flee a, aana be tsɛfã nɛ fi lutubu baũ a kĩ latɛ̃ mɔ fukpokpo gɛĩgɛĩ a kamɛ. Ade fukĩĩ nyɛ́ wuda ayade a.” Yerusalem Vɔɛ̃ a.

english_verse: I saw one of the seven angels who had the bowls filled with the seven last terrible troubles. The angel came to me and said, “Come on! I will show you the one who will be the bride and wife of the Lamb.”
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ evũkɔnɔ a kĩ bɛnɛɛ tɔkɔɔpu evũkɔnɔ a kĩ tiyi mɔ lubo kamɔ evũkɔnɔ nkaɛ a, kamɛ ɔmɔa ya nɛ yĩ sɛkɛ̃, ade ebi yĩ kĩ, “Ya, ntsa nɔ Obolitsɔ̃ a kĩ ɛnyɛ Kavelibi a ɔtsɔ̃ a.”

english_verse: Then with the help of the Spirit, he took me to the top of a very high mountain. There he showed me the holy city of Jerusalem coming down from God in heaven.
translation_verse: Hũhũ a wo nɛ yĩ kamɛ, ade ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bɔɛ yĩ ɛnamɛna ɔtɔ geĩ odi kalete a. Ɛtsa yĩ Yerusalem, Ɔmatɔ Kpalɛwa a, kĩ ɛka eto ode nɛ Baguma sɛkɛ̃ yaya a,

english_verse: The glory of God made the city bright. It was dazzling and crystal clear like a precious jasper stone.
translation_verse: ade ɛkata mɔ Baguma kukũkpalɛ a. Ɔmatɔ a kata la ndɛ de kĩ lideĩ kɔya, fɔla lɛmɛ ndɛ yaspa de kĩ de kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye.

english_verse: The city had a high and thick wall with twelve gates, and each one of them was guarded by an angel. On each of the gates was written the name of one of the twelve tribes of Israel.
translation_verse: Bike seebi kpale gɛlɛlɛɛlɛ bisinya ye ade bɛnyɛ tunyukpɛ̃ ewua-nviã kĩ ode fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã dzi nɛ te tunyukpɛ̃ a. Bɛtsɛlɛ Israel futete ewua-nviã a buĩ bite nɛ tunyukpɛ̃ a akũ.

english_verse: Three of these gates were on the east, three were on the north, three more were on the south, and the other three were on the west.
translation_verse: Tunyukpɛ̃ ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ sɛkɛ sidi nyɛ sidi akũ, te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ suwa kadekɔ̃, te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ kayɔ, te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ nyangɛ, ade te ɛlalɛ deĩ nɛ suwa katomukɔ̃ a.

english_verse: The city was built on twelve foundation stones. On each of the stones was written the name of one of the Lamb's twelve apostles.
translation_verse: Bike ɔmatɔ a seebi a nɛ kayɔkayi futekũ boe ewua-nviã akũ, ade Kavelibi a fɔtɔ banyanɛ ewua-nviã a buĩ teĩ nɛ be akũ a.

english_verse: The angel who spoke to me had a gold measuring stick to measure the city and its gates and its walls.
translation_verse: Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ bɔmɔ ye bɔlɛ kɔdzɛla a nɛɛ sika fɔtsa kakɔna otse, kĩ yaakɔa ɛkɔna ɔmatɔ a, ye tunyukpɛ̃ mɔ seebi a.

english_verse: The city was shaped like a cube, because it was just as high as it was wide. When the angel measured the city, it was about
translation_verse: Ɔmatɔ a deĩ fɔkɛ ɛna, kĩ ye lɛsa mɔ ye lugo kamɛ keti. Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kɔna ɔmatɔ a mɔ ye fɔtsa kakɔna otse a. Ɛmɔ́ kĩ sɛkɛ mɔa tɛ fusikũ apim mɔa mɔ ɔha elo (

english_verse: Then the angel measured the wall, and by our measurements it was about
translation_verse: Ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kɔna seebi a lɛmɛ, ade se akũ kadzɛla nyɛ fɔnɛta ɔha nviã mɔ ye ewua-avũ (

english_verse: The wall was built of jasper, and the city was made of pure gold, clear as crystal.
translation_verse: Bɛkɔa boe kĩ bavɛ Yaspa bɛkɔa bike seebi a, ade bɛkɔa sika ngbã kĩ se kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye bitsua ɔmatɔ mɔawɛ a.

english_verse: Each of the twelve foundations was a precious stone. The first was jasper, the second was sapphire, the third was agate, the fourth was emerald,
translation_verse: Bɛkɔa boe ahɔlɔ ahɔlɔ kĩ bideĩ kɔya bɛhɛhɛ ɔmatɔ a seebi kayɔkayi futekũ boe a. Litekũ lɛtɔnyade a nyɛ ahuhɔɛ de kĩ bavɛ yaspa, lɛyade nyɛ safir, lɛlalɛde nyɛ yalkedon, lɛnade nyɛ smaragdo,

english_verse: the fifth was onyx, the sixth was carnelian, the seventh was chrysolite, the eighth was beryl, the ninth was topaz, the tenth was chrysoprase, the eleventh was jacinth, and the twelfth was amethyst.
translation_verse: lilode nyɛ sardonik, livũde nyɛ sardis, livũkɔnɔde nyɛ krisolit, lɛlɛ̃de nyɛ beril, livedide nyɛ topas, liwuade nyɛ krisopras, liwua-odide nyɛ hiakint, ade liwua-nviãde a nyɛ ametist a.

english_verse: Each of the twelve gates was a solid pearl. The streets of the city were made of pure gold, clear as crystal.
translation_verse: Tunyukpɛ̃ ewua-nviã a fulitsa bowa ewua-nviã. Litsabi bowa mɔapɛ bɛkɔa bɛkɛna onyukpɛ̃ odi nyɛ odi. Ɔmatɔ a ɔblɔnu nyɛ sika ngbã, kĩ se kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye.

english_verse: I did not see a temple there. The Lord God All-Powerful and the Lamb were its temple.
translation_verse: Ntámɔ asɔli kɔla nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate Baguma Kpalɛ mɔ Kavelibi a nyɛ ye asɔli kɔla.

english_verse: And the city did not need the sun or the moon. The glory of God was shining on it, and the Lamb was its light.
translation_verse: Ɔmatɔ a tásĩ suwa kĩ sɛta ĩye odetɔ kĩ ɛvɔlɛ nɛ ye kamɛ, kitonɛkĩ Baguma kukũkpalɛ nyɛ́ ye ɔhaĩ ade Kavelibi a lɛmɛ nyɛ́ ye ɔsɛdza a.

english_verse: Nations will walk by the light of that city, and kings will bring their riches there.
translation_verse: Katinya kamɛ bati aatsã ye haĩ kamɛ, ade tite akũ fɔgã aakɔa be akũ kana fɔtsa bɛyamɛna nɛ ye kamɛ a.

english_verse: Its gates are always open during the day, and night never comes.
translation_verse: Bɛláabalɛ ɔmatɔ a tunyukpɛ̃ mɔ suwa da, kitonɛkĩ kade lɛláadɔ nɛ awã da.

english_verse: The glorious treasures of nations will be brought into the city.
translation_verse: Baakɔa fude fude akũ obu fɔtsa mɔ akũ kana fɔtsa bɛyamɛna nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: But nothing unworthy will be allowed to enter. No one who is dirty-minded or who tells lies will be there. Only those whose names are written in the Lamb's book of life will be in the city.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ lɛtsa a kĩ de akũ tákpalɛ lidima lɛláawo nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna fɔnyɔãtsa ĩye ɛnyɛ ɔvãlɛvã lɛmɛ lɛláawo nɛ awã, mbɔɛntɛ bati a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ be buĩ bido nɛ Kavelibi a nkpã ovoli a kamɛ aawo nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: The angel showed me a river that was crystal clear, and its waters gave life. The river came from the throne where God and the Lamb were seated.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a tsa yĩ nkpã ɔwɔ kĩ ye mui akpa nkpã. Ye mui a kamɛ kpalɛ ndɛ ahuhɔɛ aye, ade bɛkanɛ kato Baguma mɔ Kavelibi a lɛgãkpo a kamɛ,

english_verse: Then it flowed down the middle of the city's main street. On each side of the river are trees that grow a different kind of fruit each month of the year. The fruit gives life, and the leaves are used as medicine to heal the nations.
translation_verse: ade batɛ̃ nɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔblɔnu kayite a. Nkpã kutse a dzɛ̃ nɛ ɔwɔ a futuni nviã akũ. Kɔawũ babi titi ewua-nviã nɛ kateli mɔa kamɛ, nɛ odetɔ mɔa kamɛ deedi. Koe tɔɔta bakɔa katsa fude fude bati fɔsɔ.

english_verse: God's curse will no longer be on the people of that city. He and the Lamb will be seated there on their thrones, and its people will worship God
translation_verse: Bɛláabuki bɛmɔ́ lɛtsa a kĩ Baguma dumu lidima nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ. Baguma mɔ Kavelibi a lɛgãkpo aana nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ ade ye basumunɛ aasum ye a.

english_verse: and will see him face to face. God's name will be written on the foreheads of the people.
translation_verse: Baamɔ ye anɛ ade ye dĩ aana nɛ be nnyɛ a.

english_verse: Never again will night appear, and no one who lives there will ever need a lamp or the sun. The Lord God will be their light, and they will rule forever. The Coming of Christ
translation_verse: Kade lɛláabuki kɛdɔ ade bɛláasĩ ɔsɛdza ĩye suwa, kitonɛkĩ boe Ɔlate, Baguma aanya be ɔhaĩ, ade baanya akũ ndɛ fɔgã aye daa daa a. Yesu Kaya.

english_verse: Then I was told: These words are true and can be trusted. The Lord God controls the spirits of his prophets, and he is the one who sent his angel to show his servants what must happen very soon.
translation_verse: Ke liti a, ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a bi yĩ kĩ, “Fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ nyɛ ɔnɔkɔali ade baapuli bɛtɛ foe bido a. Boe Ɔlate, onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ Hũhũ Baguma a lido ye ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ ɛyaanyɛ lɛtsa a kĩ laaya mɔatsɛ a ɛtsa ye basumunɛ.”

english_verse: Remember, I am coming soon! God will bless everyone who pays attention to the message of this book.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Midã! Maya mɔatsɛ! Baguma hila bati a kĩ bakɛna nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a akũ!”

english_verse: My name is John, and I am the one who heard and saw these things. Then after I had heard and seen all this, I knelt down and began to worship at the feet of the angel who had shown it to me.
translation_verse: Yĩ, Yohanes, nyɛ́ oti a kĩ ye linu, ɛmɔ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee a. Kĩ nnu fukĩĩ, mmɔ́ foe a, nke aduli nɛ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ a kĩ ɛnyɛ foe ɛtsa yĩ a anɛ kĩ masum ye.

english_verse: But the angel said, Don't do that! I am a servant, just like you. I am the same as a follower or a prophet or anyone else who obeys what is written in this book. God is the one you should worship.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ebi yĩ kĩ, “Takɛna foe! Basumunɛ bɔmɔ́ nɔ, mɔ awaɛ̃ amɛ Baguma onukpɛ̃ banyɛnɛ, mɔ bati a kĩ bakɛna nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ fɔlɛtsa akũ a bɔanɛ. Sum Baguma odi!”

english_verse: Don't keep the prophecies in this book a secret. These things will happen soon.
translation_verse: Ade ebi yĩ kĩ, “Takɔa fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a ɔkɔla, kitonɛkĩ lɔkɔ fuã kĩ foe flee fɔya nɛ foe kamɛ.

english_verse: Evil people will keep on being evil, and everyone who is dirty-minded will still be dirty-minded. But good people will keep on doing right, and God's people will always be holy.
translation_verse: Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tɔkpa ni, ɛdanɛ tɔkpa kakɛna, odi nyɛ odi kĩ yado akũ efĩĩ ni, ɛdanɛ akũ efĩĩ kado. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yakɛna tuwĩ ni, ɛdanɛ tuwĩ kakɛna, ade odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɛnyɛ oti kpalɛwa ni, ɛdanɛ oti kpalɛwa kanya.”

english_verse: Then I was told: I am coming soon! And when I come, I will reward everyone for what they have done.
translation_verse: Yesu lɛ kĩ, “Maaya mɔatsɛ! Maya mɔ yĩ kɔtɔkase, nkpa odi nyɛ odi nɛ ye lɛkɛnana onukpɛ̃.

english_verse: I am Alpha and Omega, the first and the last, the beginning and the end.
translation_verse: Yĩ nyɛ Ɔtɔnyade mɔ Owũnade, Kayɔkayi mɔ Kawũna a.

english_verse: God will bless all who have washed their robes. They will each have the right to eat fruit from the tree that gives life, and they can enter the gates of the city.
translation_verse: “Bihila bati a kĩ bɛvɔlɛ be tɛtadiɛ wulaa tɛnɛ fitaa a, kĩ nɛ foesũ bideĩ osi kĩ banya nkpã kutse a babi, kĩ bideĩ osi lɛmɛ kĩ batsã tunyukpɛ̃ a kamɛ biwo nɛ ɔmatɔ a kamɛ.

english_verse: But outside the city will be dogs, witches, immoral people, murderers, idol worshipers, and everyone who loves to tell lies and do wrong.
translation_verse: Lɛmɛ ɔmatɔ a ɔbaɛ̃ badzinɛ nyɛ́ fɔnyɔãtsa bakɛnanɛ ndɛ bakpete aye, kanɔkɔnɛ badãnɛ, bikĩ bɛtsɛ̃ mɔa linyolewɛ mɔ litsolewɛ, awudifɔ, baviɔ̃ basumunɛ mɔ bikĩ bawɛ fɔvã, kama fɔvã lɛmɛ.

english_verse: I am Jesus! And I am the one who sent my angel to tell all of you these things for the churches. I am David's Great Descendant, and I am also the bright morning star.
translation_verse: “Yĩ, Yesu, lido yĩ ode fɔtɔ ɔnyanɛ kĩ ɛyaadi adansiɛ nɛ fɔlɛtsa kĩĩ akũ ɛkpa mi nɛ tɛsɔli a kamɛ. Ĩnyɛ Dawid onu mɔ ye kasinu a kamɛ obi, ade yĩ lɛmɛ nyɛ ɔnɔnɛ lisibii a kĩ lavɔlɛ a.”

english_verse: The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” Everyone who hears this should say, “Come!” If you are thirsty, come! If you want life-giving water, come and take it. It's free!
translation_verse: Hũhũ a mɔ Obolitsɔ̃ a lɛ kĩ, “Ya!” Odi nyɛ odi kĩ enu fukĩĩ ni, ɛlɛ kĩ, “Ya!” Odi nyɛ odi kĩ ɔmɔado akɔ ye ni, ɛya. Odi nyɛ odi kĩ yawɛ nkpã mui ni, ɛyaatɛ be faa. Fɔlɛtsa a Kawũna.

english_verse: Here is my warning for everyone who hears the prophecies in this book: If you add anything to them, God will make you suffer all the terrible troubles written in this book.
translation_verse: Yĩ, Yohanes, mabi odi nyɛ odi kĩ enu fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi a, kĩ bide foe lɛtsã nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a kĩ ntɛ odi kɔa litsedi ebumɔ foe ni, Baguma aakɔa lubo kamɔ a kĩ bɛtsɛlɛ nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a ebumɔ ye sɔtɔ kavɛlɛ.

english_verse: If you take anything away from these prophecies, God will not let you have part in the life-giving tree and in the holy city described in this book.
translation_verse: Ade ayea ntɛ odi nyɛ litsedi nɛ fɔlɛtsa a kĩ bɛlɛ biyi nɛ ovoli kĩĩ kamɛ a kamɛ ni, Baguma aanyɛ ye tsɛfã nɛ nkpã kutse libi a kamɛ, ade ɛláana tsɛfã nɛ Ɔmatɔ Kpalɛwa a lɛmɛ kamɛ a.

english_verse: The one who has spoken these things says, “I am coming soon!” So, Lord Jesus, please come soon!
translation_verse: Oti a kĩ yadi adansiɛ nɛ fɔtsa kĩĩ flee akũ a lɛ kĩ, “Oo, maaya mɔatsɛ!” Fɔya lɔmɔ. Boe Ɔlate Yesu, ya!

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Boe Ɔlate Yesu kɔnyakamɔ kɔtamɔ odi nyɛ odi.
